chapters.title: Chapter 584 - Xiao Naofu Rises To Fame (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 584 - Xiao Naofu Rises To Fame (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The evening sun was gorgeous and the atmosphere was pompous.

The cat and the dog were running in two separate directions.

Many viewers in front of the screen couldn’t help but have a heartened smile on their faces.

——[This is too cute!!!]

——[The way both of their little short legs move while they’re trying to run towards each other is really so touching!]

——[I actually cried watching this. UwU, its really so beautiful. Everything is so soft and peaceful ~]

…

Whoosh——

The little kitten and the little Shiba Inu met successfully.

Woof!

Meow~

“Woof!”

“Meow!”

The cat and the dog barked at each other a few times, and Little Xiji excitedly pounced onto Xiao Naofu. It then started kissing and licking its fur.

“….Meow!” Xiao Naofu protested twice, but soon, it squinted its pupils comfortably while its whiskers started twitching, and it purred softly.

In the living room.

Xiang Yi and Shi Sui were reading books over some tea. When they saw this scene, the two of them looked at each other and laughed silently.

In the livestream room, the fans began joking.

——[Cat… Adult cat film?]

——[Kissing scenes like this are not suitable for children. Otherwise, children will grow yellow horns on their heads!]

——[Chotto Matte (wait a moment)! Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji may be of different species but they are of the same gender, right? Is this really okay!?]

…

The atmosphere was cordial.

However, there were also barbarians who are incredibly clear about what was going on.

——[Little Xiji is a pure-breed dog and Xiao Naofu is just a tacky cat. They’re not compatible with each other, are they?]

Such comments were ignored in the livestream.

However, some netizens were quick enough to take some screenshots and posted them to the gossip forum.

In addition to laughter, there were all kinds of silly netizens who appeared and fervently discussed the topic of the incompatibility of the cat and the dog.

—— [Oh please, Xiao Naofu is just a stranded son of a rich family, okay? Little Xiji is just a playboy of a wealthy family!]

——[To be fair, Xiao Naofu is the most popular one but Little Xiji has never been famous before, hehe. So, Little Xiji’s fans, stop defending it]

—— [Seriously? We’re already in the modern era and you’re still calling Xiao Naofu a tacky local cat. Xiao Naofu is obviously a noble Chinese garden cat! You call Xiao Naofu a tacky cat but we think Little Xiji is tacky too!]

…

All of a sudden, the dramatic ones came online and started arguing with one another on the Internet.

…

Meanwhile…

The company behind Ah Dai refused to give up. Although they could build and develop another account and replace Ah Dai with someone else, they still decided to milk Ah Dai’s online personality to the very end.

At half past seven in the evening, Ah Dai’s account posted something on Weibo, claiming that Xiang Yi was being a bully by making Xiao Naofu replace Pudding, just because she was popular.

After this post was posted on Weibo, the reward function of Ah Da’s account was activated and some of the netizens who had just started to follow the gossip, thought it was true and gave Ah Dai lots of monetary gifts.

However, as the old fans explained, the new fans suddenly came to their senses.

‘What? Ah Dai is actually so evil!?!’

Soon after that was posted, Tomato Entertainment, which was helmed by Xiang Yi, and the economic team led by Si Chuanbai, retaliated immediately!

In addition to releasing a stern statement, Si Chuanbai bought a spot on the hot search list for @PuddingsGreatAunt’s post.

#ThisPuddingIsNotTheSamePuddingAsBefore

Many people thought it was food and clicked in curiously, only to be shocked by Ah Dai’s actions!

She had deliberately overfed Pudding to fatten it up and then let it die when it could no longer sustain such a lifestyle. After the death of the first cat, she swapped it with another one to cheat her fans!?

The netizens knew that all of this definitely had something to do with the company behind her

Countless netizens were disgusted!

Ah Dai, and her agency, had been taught a huge lesson tonight!

However, the peculiar thing was that various cute photos of Xiao Naofu suddenly began to be circulated on the Internet….

chapters.title: Chapter 585 - Xiao Naofu Rises To Fame (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 585 - Xiao Naofu Rises To Fame (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

For example, there were photos of it tilting its head and acting coquettish, being pretentious, and holding a bottle of goat formula milk…

In this era where cats had become increasingly popular, countless cat fans felt their souls tremble when they saw the sticker pack!

Ow—!

‘It’s a cat! What an adorable cute cat!’

‘Cats are the cutest creatures in the world. This is indisputable and I refuse to accept any rebuttals!’

In an instant, the popularity of the sticker pack of Xiao Naofu surpassed that of the silly Fu Jiayan, propelling straight to the top of the world of sticker packs!

Those who didn’t download the sticker pack of Xiao Naofu making adorable expressions wouldn’t deserve to be called Internet surfers of the Internet!

At first, some netizens thought that Xiao Naofu was a cat influencer but only after understanding that Xiao Naofu was also part of a live show, they realized that it was simply a celebrity cat!

On this day, the livestream of “Two Under One Roof” ushered in a massive wave of new traffic.

The competitors were all dumbfounded.

After airing for a long time, a variety show is bound to accumulate loyal fans, and likewise, it will also lose its sense of novelty. The viewer ratings would also get lower and lower.

However, “Two Under One Roof” was simply divine!

Not only did they have a high-profile opening, the following episodes would also lead to high traffic!

Shi Sui’s career fans, girlfriend fans and wife fans…

The fans of Xiang Yi’s beauty, foodie fans, mother fans, and grandmother fans…

However, a tacky cat surprisingly had its own fans too! It even started its own Weibo!

Countless people were stunned and in awe.

There were also many people in the industry who felt that they were capable enough to produce a show that would become even more popular than “Two Under One Roof”.

All of a sudden, all major TV stations and video sites began to prepare for the production of live variety shows, and in the next few months, new shows sprung up everywhere.

…

In the next few days, Xiang Yi shot commercials for hand sanitizers and women’s clothing one after another.

The shooting went well.

However, the brands both came up with an additional condition.

At first, Nan was shocked to hear the other party’s request.

“What? You want to sign a contract with Xiao Naofu? Are you sure it’s not Shi Sui?”

The brand representative smiled slightly as a gesture of politeness. “Yes.”

Ah Nan murmured, “…Is it true that Shi Sui is washed up now?”

The brand representative: ???

‘What? May I ask what misconceptions you have about Shi Sui?’

It wasn’t not that they didn’t want to hire Shi Sui but rather, they couldn’t afford to do so!

Shi Sui rarely accepted endorsements, but he was loved by the bigwigs of the fashion industry. He would often receive sponsorships and endorsement deal offers.

However, apart from a few top luxury brands, there were very few brands that could afford to hire Shi Sui nowadays.

In short, Xiao Naofu had two more sources of income.

The little kitten turned into a working cat and was particularly cooperative in every commercial shoot.

Xiang Yi even opened a bank account for it and deposited all its earnings into that account.

Xiao Naofu squatted in front of the tablet everyday because it was addicted to shopping. Apart from its favorite snacks, toys, and game consoles, it also bought a lot of things for Little Xiji.

…

Xiao Naofu was on the hot search list for several days and a pet blogger secretly made a sour remark with his private account.

[Sometimes, I really have to be in awe of the magic of fate. No matter how hard you work, it can’t trump being born into a good family~ I don’t mean anything else, my heart just goes out to my dear cat who has put in so much effort but is inferior to a tacky, native cat~]

Many people echoed and chimed in: [Yes, yes! What’s the point of working hard? These days, don’t even mention humans, even cats have a backer!]

All of a sudden…

[@JoyfulSnailVermicelli : Thank you @XiangYi @CutestXiaoNaofu for filming the “Little Happiness” commercial clip.. I hope that you will enjoy your meal regardless of whether you are alone or accompanied by someone. Enjoy some happiness!]

chapters.title: Chapter 586 - Nation'S Sister (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 586 - Nation'S Sister (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The video attached to it was a clip that Xiang Yi and Xiao Naofu had shot together.

Ah Nan saw the Weibo and then cast the ad onto the TV. He then pressed the pause button and pulled Xiang Yi and Shi Sui over to watch it together.

Xiao Naofu meowed coquettishly a few times in a puerile manner, which melted Xiang Yi’s heart. She then picked Xiao Naofu up and held it in her arms.

Little Xiji stared at Xiao Naofu. Perhaps because it knew that its body size made it inconvenient for him to be held by others, it scurried toward Shi Sui’s pants and laid on the ground obediently to watch the TV.

Ah Nan: “…”

Xiang Feng had been staying in the manor lately, but as a domineering CEO, he would work until five p.m. every single day even when there was nothing to do.

That was how stubborn Xiang Feng was.

Without Xiang Feng around, Ah Nan suddenly felt that his presence was quite redundant.

It just so happened that when it was time to start the livestream today, Li Jianyu started streaming ahead of time and aired the ad that Xiang Yi had starred in.

The audience of the livestream: What a smart move!

—— [After #WatchingALivestreamInALivestream, there’s now a #WatchingAdsInALiveStream???]

—— [Hahaha Director Li is really doting on Xiang Yi. He puts in so much effort for Xiang Yi’s career, and he doesn’t forget to advertise for Xiang Yi at all times!]

—— [The scene of Xiao Naofu sitting on Xiang Yi’s lap and wiggling its little feet is so cute! Nanny, quickly give me a healing skill! I’m going to pass out UwU~~]

—— [Birds of the same feather flock together. Since Xiao Naofu is so clingy to Xiang Yi, it means that Xiang Yi is as cute as a kitten! Since Little Xiji is so clingy to Shi Sui, does that mean Shi Sui is the most like a dog?]

…

While the audience was making cheeky comments, Ah Nan pressed the play button with the remote control.

The scene started with a set of empty shots as the camera panned across the dreamcatcher by the window, the cactus ball inside, the magazine… then, naturally, it turned to Xiang Yi.

The young woman was kneeling on a tatami mat, dressed in a gentle-looking lilac knitted shirt. She then slowly and methodically unwrapped the snail vermicelli packaging, while the kitten at her feet was engrossed with playing with the ball by itself. When it heard the sound of the packaging being torn, it came over curiously to smell it, only to have a huge change in its expression!

Immediately afterward, there was a series of shots of the delicacy.

Xiang Yi cooked the vermicelli so well that it was full of indulgence and flavor. Watching her cooking was a completely immersive enjoyment.

When she served the snail vermicelli in a bowl, she garnished it with white sesame seeds, and drizzled some chili oil and rice vinegar on it. Ah Nan couldn’t help but swallow his saliva.

This shot is so tempting!

When Xiao Naofu smelled the stench, its face crinkled even more as it scurried far away from Xiang Yi with its salted fish toy.

Xiang Yi ate while it bit on the salted fish. After it got tired, it lay down on its bed with its legs facing the sky, squinted, then slept comfortably.

Xiang Yi’s eating was a stark contrast to Xiao Naofu’s snoring while it was sleeping.

Without too much narration, one can describe this scene with one word.

Beautiful.

When Xiang Yi finished the last bowl of rice, Ah Nan couldn’t help but unwrap the snacks on the table and stuffed them into his mouth like crazy.

Shi Sui coughed and said, “You seem to be eating Little Xiji’s jerky.”

Ah Nan was confused.

Xiao Naofu protested, “Meow!”

—— [This is mine!]

Although it was bought for Little Xiji…

At this moment, the Xiao Naofu in the ad couldn’t hold back its curiosity and first squatted down on the table with its head tilted before falling into the bowl…

“Poof…”

Xiao Naofu fell into the large bowl and tilted up its little face to look at Xiang Yi in confusion.

It licked its paws, its pupils round and wide.

Xiang Yi was dumbfounded and laughed.

The scene was fixed on the moment the young girl and the cat looked at each other.

chapters.title: Chapter 587 - Nation'S Sister (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 587 - Nation'S Sister (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The camera panned away and the logo of the vermicelli brand appeared, together with the slogan of the advertisement.

“You should eat well even if you are alone.”

It was Xiang Yi’s voice, which was warm, tender and clear. She sounded like a girl-next-door who was whispering a piece of advice.

The commercial ended abruptly.

Ah Nan was still craving for more. He stared at the TV screen, which turned black, for a few seconds before he smacked his lips and said, “This commercial is too good to be true, I’m hungry…”

In the live room, the fans were all hollering.

——[Where is the link? I want to buy some!]

——[Xiang Yi: Heavyweight buyer-decision influencer]

——[I’m craving for the vermicelli so hard that I’m crying! Xiang Yi’s foodie fans start feeling peckish when they watch her cook. I’m craving for Xiao Naofu’s claws too!]

Weibo.

The official Weibo account of Joyful Snail Vermicelli was flooded with comments that were increasing rapidly in number.

——[Ahhhh, how is that little bit of stock enough? Increase your stock amount!]

–[What? I have a friend who is terminally ill and wants to eat a bowl of your snail vermicelli before he dies. Can you ship it to me as soon as possible?]

——[Damn it, which smartypants of your company decided to engage Xiang Yi as the brand spokesperson?! Even my grandmother, who is over 60 years old, said that I should buy her some snail vermicelli!]

——[+1, All the aunts in my family have declared that they want to support Xiang Yi’s work and have already reserved a carton each. So the question is, where can I get so much vermicelli for them? /smile/smile]

…

The people at the headquarters of Joyful Snail Vermicelli were overjoyed.

In addition to the online store where the sales of snail vermicelli were booming, even the sales of spicy and sour vermicelli and chicken soup vermicelli, which were usually not very high, had surged by a large margin.

Their distributors kept calling to place orders, and all the landlines in the office rang incessantly.

The senior executives were both happy and worried.

Considering Xiang Yi’s popularity, they had already taken measures to cope with the situation.

However, they had underestimated Xiang Yi’s ability to drive sales volumes!

After some discussion, the executives tallied the factory’s production volume and regular sales volumes, and then put up a pre-order link for 100,000 packs.

The link was up for only a second before it was sold out 🙂

Everyone was dumbfounded.

‘It’s…sold out just like that!?!’

The crowd did not believe it at all and they instructed the technical department to post another pre-order link for 200,000 packets.

Whoosh——

One second passed.

It was gone again!

Everyone was dumbfounded.

The senior executives were all pounding their chests. In the past, they would be worried about the celebrities being too weak at driving sales when they were looking for celebrities for endorsements, but now they were troubled because Xiang Yi’s ability to drive sales was incredible! Their production capacity couldn’t keep up with it at all!!

The feeling of being unable to earn money that was right in front of them, was extremely terrible!

The executives of Joyful Snail Vermicelli were fretting over it in joy.

…

Meanwhile…

“Eating Well For All Three Meals” also emulated “Two Under One Roof” by starting a livestream sale.

They were not limited to the farmers’ produce that Xiang Yi previously promoted. There was a rich selection and they even invited a famous livestream host, Hao Han.

However, Zhuo Yi’s reputation had already been tarnished while Jiang Yun’er often put on airs. They two of them were not familiar with promoting goods in a livestream so all they did was read the script mundanely.

It just so happened that there was some snail vermicelli among the products that they were promoting today.

“3,2, 1, click on the link!”

Hao Han shouted at the top of his lungs and felt his throat was smoking.

Since engaging in the livestream industry, today was the most tired he had ever been.

Yet, Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er didn’t know how to carry on a conversation nor would they find a topic to talk about, so as to give him some time to rest. Instead, they just kept asking, “What’s the sales volume now? Are there still any available stocks?”

The staff informed, “More than 50,000 sets have been sold now…”

Hao Han was quite satisfied because it was much better than his usual sales volume.

However, Jiang Yun’er asked in disbelief, “What? So little? Can this livestream host you found, get the job done or not!?”

chapters.title: Chapter 588 - Nation'S Sister (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 588 - Nation'S Sister (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“I don’t think so.” Zhuo Yi frowned, “He’s too unprofessional and he keeps making so much noise that my ears hurt.”

The parched Hao Han was dumbfounded.

‘I can’t make it? I think you’re the one who can’t f**king do it!’

Despite cursing hard in his head, Hao Han had no choice but to keep a fake smile on his face and gave them all an out. “Hahhaha, men can’t say no! After all, I’m a human loudspeaker. Why don’t I switch off the microphone for five seconds?”

The initially tense atmosphere slightly eased a little. Before the fans even reacted, there was a change in the situation. However, Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er sneered at Hao Han.

The two of them thought to themselves that it must be because Hao Han’s data must have been falsified,

After all, the last time Yan Kaikai worked with Xiang Yi, the sales volume of a random product started with 100,000.

In contrast, the two of them had only managed to achieve such a low sales volume despite being famous A-listers!

“How about you just mute the microphone all the way to the end?” Jiang Yun’er chided.

Her emotional intelligence wasn’t high in the first place. After winning the title of Queen Songstress, she had become even more arrogant.

People who like her, often praise her for being genuine.

Those who did not like her would send her endless hate.

“Look, Xiang Yi is not even a professional livestream host and yet, she managed to sell hundreds of thousands of bags!” Zhuo Yi was initially fiddling with his phone distractedly when he happened to see a hashtag on the hot search #300,000PacketsOfSnailVermicelli.

After clicking it, he discovered that the one who promoted the goods was Xiang Yi!

Hao Han was already holding his anger back, and this time, he completely lost his temper.

“Good! Then you two continue, I won’t bother you anymore!” He got up, turned off the microphone, and stormed off sullenly!

The staff on the scene were all confused.

The director was the first to slow down and had someone go to persuade Hao Han while winking at Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er, hoping that the two of them could salvage the scene.

The two of them felt that they could still sell the goods without Hao Han and started to introduce the next product directly.

The director was speechless.

They had never seen such confident people.

After letting out a helpless sigh, the director just let the two continue promoting the goods because he had no other solution for now.

Zhuo Yi stumbled after introducing the product while Jiang Yun’er exaggeratedly shouted, “Not to be missed! Buy it now! Click on the link!”

The technical staff quickly put up the link on the livestream.

Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er were not good at interacting with the fans and thus, seemed rather aloof.

However, after more than ten seconds, the two of them couldn’t help but be concerned about the sales volume.

“How much have we sold?”

The staff looked at the both of them carefully before stammering, “A few… a few…”

Zhuo Yi asked expectantly, “Several tens of thousands?”

The product they were promoting this time was a high-end red wine, which unit price was considered the highest in tonight’s selection of goods.

The staff’s scalp was tingling with numbness. “Uh…”

Jiang Yun’er had a bad feeling and said a conservative number. “A few thousand?”

A few thousand may not be much, but considering the expensive unit price, it was somewhat acceptable.

Unexpectedly…

The staff said carefully, “A few hundred bottles…”

In fact, the actual sales volume was only a little over a hundred and he had given them a false number.

Zhuo Yi was dumbstruck.

Jiang Yun’er was confused too.

When they heard this number, both of them seemed to be in disbelief.

‘How is this possible??’

The combination of the Best Actor and the Queen Songstress turned out to be worse than the talkative livestream host!

However, nowadays, the real-time sales volumes of products would be presented on the interface of online shopping platforms.

The hashtag #ZhuoYiJiangYun’erLivesreamFlops was soon on the hot search list.

The upsetting sales volume of ‘100+’ instantly made them the laughing stock of netizens!

….

chapters.title: Chapter 589 - Nation'S Sister (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 589 - Nation'S Sister (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The two of them were very popular in the country. In the beginning, there were netizens who thought that the hot search was a spoof.

——[Is this reverse hype?]

—— [How is that possible!?! There must be more zeros!]

—— [Oh please, the two of them are the ‘Best Actor’ and ‘Queen Songstress’ respectively. Anyone will be able to tell that they could have definitely achieved a higher sales volume! It must be a marketing tactic of the brand!]

——[Oh, right, I’ll wait for it to be revealed as a reversal. Kick me when there’s a follow-up]

…

A netizen who liked finding facts ran over to verify the matter, only to find that the sales… was actually real!

In other words, although the both of them were very famous, their ability to promote and drive up the sales volume was really terrible!

The netizens were dumbfounded.

——[This is too confusing. Celebrities’ ability to promote goods and drive up sales is not as good as that of an influencer??]

——[I remember Yan Kaikai promoting this wine during his livestream before too. Although it’s a little expensive, he managed to sell thousands of bottles it!]

——[These two people are probably unable to save themselves… Ahem, those words seem quite inappropriate, but their sales volume of 100+ is um…]

…

Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er’s team hurriedly spent money to withdraw the hot search when they found it.

However, as soon as they did, it invoked the desire for gossip of the netizens!

What does this mean?

It means that Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er both had a guilty conscience!

In other words, their livestream had really flopped!

The online discussion posts rapidly increased, and the fans of Hao Han were dissatisfied with Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er’s attitude. Hence, they trimmed and edited some clips of Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er’s perfunctory introduction of the products during the livestream, as well their stuttering. They even dissed Hao Han in those clips, and then posted them on Weibo!

The gossipmongers were overjoyed to see it!

‘Impressive gossip!’

Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er rarely appeared in variety shows in the past and often threw their weight around, thinking that they could do anything they want just because they were famous.

However, they didn’t realize that the Internet is extremely developed nowadays and information spreads fast. It was no longer the era where the only forms of digital entertainment were cassettes for music and discs for TV shows.

Any words or actions of the artistes would be infinitely magnified.

It wasn’t too bad during the livestream of ‘Eating Well For All Three Meals’ previously because it was scripted so they only had to act according to the script. Besides, they had lots of loyal fans so they could just muddle through.

However, a livestream goods promotion was different. It was very fast-paced and the hosts would have to be highly adaptive and react quick enough. There was no script to follow at all and their flaws were completely revealed in no time.

——[My family is shocked. Zhuo Yi and Queen Jiang’s EQ are really unique…]

——[Are they not aware of Hao Han’s capabilities? Although he’s a live stream host, he has achieved more than 100 million yuan in sales!]

—— [After watching the entire livestream, I feel that Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er are just overly confident and self-absorbed, so much that they think that they’re the best. I just want to say…times have changed!]

…

The Internet was abuzz with voices of mockery, which caused Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er’s team to feel an immense headache!

To make matters worse, there were still many products that had yet to be promoted during the livestream!

It wasn’t too bad with Hao Han around but now that there wasn’t Hao Han, the amateurs’ promotion of products were rather lackluster.

In the lounge, Hao Han watched the livestream on his phone sneeringly.

‘Do you really think livestream goods promotions are a competition of who’s louder?’

Ridiculous!

The program team begged Hao Han again and again but he wasn’t fazed at all.

It wasn’t him who breached the contract but the two people who threw him out.

So he decided to let them continue with the livestream. Since they had to compensate, the merchant definitely wouldn’t let the matter rest just like that.

The most ruthless one is always the capitalist!

…

As expected, after the end of the livestream, the controversial news about Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er, were suddenly exposed….

chapters.title: Chapter 590 - Nation'S Sister (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 590 - Nation'S Sister (5)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

For example, Zhuo Yi had once broken Shi Sui’s ribs on purpose while filming a fight scene with him. He also broke someone else’s…

For example, Jiang Yun’er seemed to be as composed as a chrysanthemum. In fact, during her younger days, she was actually the third wheel in Zhuo Yi’s relationship. Zhuo Yi had cheated on his fiancée with Jiang Yun’er, before eventually marrying her.

The scandal between the two caused quite a huge stir and the team was extremely anxious and overwrought trying to salvage the situation.

The result was expected by Hao Han. The livestream tonight cost the brand sponsors several hundred thousand yuan each worth of endorsement fees. In particular, the high-end wine brand had previously achieved a massive sales volume after Yan Kaikai promoted it during his livestream sales session. Hence, the wine brand was full of confidence and spent more than a million yuan to occupy the live link spot for the livestream. They also had to pay the “promotion fees” to Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er.

Yet, in the end, they only sold more than a hundred bottles, which was extremely little to the brand!

They definitely couldn’t get the money back but they could expose their scandal and controversial content!

On this night, countless scandals about Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er were exposed on the Internet, which countless netizens discussed about incessantly.

In contrast, the snail vermicelli brand endorsed by Xiang Yi released a total of five rounds of pre-order sales, with a delivery time frame of up to three months. However, even so, countless people placed orders, and there was even an industry chain of group orders…

The cumulative sales amounted to more than one million packets of snail vermicelli!

The final volume made the jaws of competitors drop!

For a while, countless brands approached Xiang Yi’s agency for endorsement deals.

The Spicy Rabbits were extremely proud of it and quickly showed off their purchase receipts on Weibo one after another.

——[My favorite Xiang Yi, and my favorite snail vermicelli. I managed to snatch the first pre-order~~ So happy]ot the stock!

—— [Crying tears of joy! I got my hands on some stocks! I asked the customer service and they said that it will be dispatched tomorrow. I successfully managed to get the same flavor as Xiang Yi!]

—— [I just went to tabulate and the cumulative sales volume of the snail vermicelli endorsed by our dearest Xiang Yi has exceeded one million today ~ Our baby is really great, I’m so proud of her. I’ve already ordered 50 packs to support our baby’s career!]

…

…

Jiang Yun’er had been in a bad mood because of the scandal, and she was even angrier when she saw the posts about Xiang Yi’s high sales volume on Weibo. Hence, she simply reposted it and added the comment : “Who knows if she paid for that traffic?”

She was not satisfied and commented twice more.

[Snail vermicelli is popular in the first place and lots of people tend to buy it. How much impact can she really have on the sales volume?]

[Nowadays, technology is so advanced. Programmers can just write a program that will easily change the sales volume. Does she think we are fools!?!]

After typing away on the keyboard, Jiang Yun’er felt a lot more relaxed. She even complained to Zhuo Yi, “Look, this sales volume must have been falsified! Xiang Yi is just a D-lister, how can she possibly achieve so many sales? Hah… shes just lucky that she was born into a good family that supports her…”

However, in the next second…

Her cell phone started ringing. It was a call from her manager.

Jiang Yun’er answered, “What’s the matter?”

Her manager barked anxiously, “Are you out of your mind?!! Look at what you’ve done! Hurry up and delete those things from your Weibo account! Quick!”

Jiang Yun’er said indifferently, “What’s wrong with making those comments with my fake account? Can’t I enjoy the freedom of speech?”

“What fake account!?! You used your personal account!”

Bang…

It was as if a thunderbolt had exploded in Jiang Yun’er’s mind and she opened Weibo with trembling fingers.

She finally realized that she had forgotten to switch to her fake account!

In just a minute or two, the post had garnered more than a thousand comments.

Jiang Yun’er blacked out.

chapters.title: Chapter 591 - Nation'S Sister (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 591 - Nation'S Sister (6)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

She frantically deleted that Weibo post but unfortunately, it was obvious that she was trying to cover up.

In this short period of time, the post that she posted had been screenshotted and saved by many people who then circulated it on the Internet fervently.

The netizens were all gossiping incessantly.

—— [Wow~ I bet five cents that she’s going to explain that her account got hacked later]

——[Oh my God, oh my God, Jiang Yun’er is actually such a person? I really can’t tell…]

——[I’m laughing so hard. She and her husband ended up selling only over a hundred bottles while Xiang Yi managed to drive the sales volume of the vermicelli up to over 100,000 packets. This comparison is going to drive someone mad~]

…

Twenty minutes later.

Jiang Yun’er bit the bullet and posted a PR statement that her management team came up with for her.

[@JiangYuner:]: [Copy text attached below]

Sorry, I had no intention to take up any PR resources. My assistant just took my phone away just now without my permission and posted those inappropriate texts. I have fired the assistant and I hereby apologize to all of you. *emoji with palms together* *emoji with palms together*]

As soon as the statement was posted, the comment section was full of netizens enjoying the gossip.

——[Hahahaha Jiang Yun’er is my source of happiness today!]

—— [Dear, I suggest that you first delete the first few words]

——[This is too perfunctory, isn’t it? Not to mention that the statement was written by someone else, is it so difficult to just tag Xiang Yi’s account and mention her in the statement? I really don’t see any sincerity in this]

…

Even if Jiang Yun’er reacted and deleted the first few words, it was already too late.

Her image in the eyes of netizens instantly collapsed within one day.

…

On the other hand, Xiang Yi actually received another red packet from Joyful Snail Vermicelli.

The representative said that the money was meant for cat food for Xiao Naofu.

Ah Nan was shocked after seeing the amount.

Brands would usually send separate red packets to their endorses as a token of appreciation when they’re happy with their performance.

However, it’s not often that they are as generous as Joyful Snail Vermicelli.

“But on second thought, it’s justifiable…” Ah Nan sighed, “This brand has now shot to fame.”

The long-term impact on the brand is something more important than the short-term results and sales achieved during livestream sales sessions.

Xiang Yi transferred all the money to Xiao Naofu.

Xiao Naofu was watching cartoons on the tablet. When it saw the message in the notification bar, Xiao Naofu thought to itself sinisterly, ‘Can I rely on this to make money to provide for that silly woman and Little Xiji?’

‘As for Shi Sui, that dog of a man… Hah, he does not deserve it!’

At this moment, Xiang Feng’s loud voice came from the door of the living room.

“Xiao Naofu, Little Xiji, I’m back! Did you guys miss me? Mwacks, come let me carry you…”

Xiao Naofu glanced at him in disdain and covered its ears with its tiny paws, pretending to be deaf.

Little Xiji dashed towards Xiang Feng’s feet and circled twice around it in exchange for a can of meat.

Xiang Feng thought he could stroke Little Xiji but as soon as he reached out his hand, Little Xiji picked up the can and left, while wagging its tail. It then handed the can to Xiao Naofu.

Xiang Feng was speechless.

‘They really get along well.’

“Uncle, you’re back.” Xiang Yi closed the book she was holding and blinked. She asked, “Are you hungry? Is there anything you want to eat?”

Xiang Feng touched his stomach and said, “I want to eat some junk food.”

Xiang Yi made an “OK” and said, “I’ll arrange for it.”

Xiang Feng followed her into the kitchen, and while helping her, he told the story of his encounter a few minutes ago, as if he were doing a crosstalk. “There was an old woman who showed her back to me and wanted to take a ride in my car!”

The netizens who were watching the livestream instantly became interested.

Isn’t this the beginning of a Domineering CEO?

Surprisingly, the next thing Xiang Feng said was…

“Tsk, her back was so fair. It’s such a pity that she’s not going for cupping therapy!”

chapters.title: Chapter 592 - Nation'S Sister (7)
chapters.body:
Chapter 592 - Nation'S Sister (7)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The netizens were dumbfounded.

——[Cupping?????]

——[Such insensitive words from a straightforward and oblivious man!!!]

——[F**k, I thought it was a statement made by a domineering CEO text, but I didn’t expect it to be from a silly man]

…

The crowd was criticizing, thinking that Xiang Feng was hopelessly straightforward and insensitive.

However, to their surprise, Xiang Yi asked, “It should be good for acupuncture too. Her acupressure points can be located easily.”

The netizens: “Huh? Huh?????”

——[Is…is this the legendary saying that members of a family tend to behave in similar manners]

——[Sorry I laughed my head off. Everyone, please do not push or squeeze your way through. Don’t step on my head, thanks]

——[Fire cupping and acupuncture treatment… Amazing, you two must be advocates of healthcare and nurturing the body/ thumbs up]

…

Seeing this conversation, Qin Wanyan was so furious that she started coughing violently.

She had been guarding the vicinity of the Xiang family manor for several days, just for the chance to pretend to run into Xiang Feng by chance.

With the help of the small system, she avoided the surveillance cameras and security officers. Today, she even managed to strike up a conversation with Xiang Feng who parked his car on the side of the road to smoke, for fear that the smell of the cigarette smoke would male his niece uncomfortable back at the manor.

Thinking to herself that God was helping her, she lifted the hem of her skirt and dashed forward.

In order to seduce Xiang Feng, she wore a silver halter dress that came with a slit that ran up to her thighs and fully exposed her back, fully accentuating the beautiful parts of her body.

“Sir, may I have a ride in your car please…”

After several interactions and maniacal investigations, Qin Wanyan learned that Xiang Feng could not remember the faces of the people he met. Hence, she thought it didn’t matter if she had embarrassed herself in front of him before because Xiang Feng would not be able to recognize her at all.

Surprisingly, Xiang Feng said a total of only two sentences to her.

The first sentence.

“There’s a cab ten kilometers ahead.”

“Miss, you’re wearing so little clothing, you’re going to catch a cold. You should go for cupping and moxibustion sometime!”

After saying that, he calmly and indifferently snubbed out the cigarette in a makeshift ashtray made of Coke cans. He then stepped on the gas pedal with one foot, and drove away, leaving Qin Wanyan’s face covered with gas from the exhaust of his car.

“…”

The more she recalled what Xiang Feng said, the more violent Qin Wanyan’s coughing became.

Small system: “There are six days, 23 hours, 16 minutes and 9 seconds left before mission deadline…”

Qin Wanyan barked with great frustration, “Can’t you see that I’m sick!? I can at least call in sick and apply for leave from work!”

The system: “Hello Host, you are advised to go to the hospital immediately to seek medical attention. This task does not have come with a function to apply for leave. The plan must be carried out by force.”

Qin Wanyan grabbed her hair in agony. “In that case, I’ll quit carrying out this task, okay? You guys go find someone else, I don’t want to transmigrate anymore! I want to deactivate linking!”

She would die if she didn’t complete the mission. Who could stand that?

She would rather not be the Chosen One.

Little system: “No, you cannot do that, Host.”

“Who can complete this stupid mission? How can anyone do it?!” Qin Wanyan was being tortured to the point of almost going crazy. She suddenly thought of a possibility and said, “No… I know of a a very capable person. I think she can definitely do it! She’s Xiang Yi. You know Xiang Yi, right!? Let your main system choose her as a transmigrator! Let her replace me!”

The little system stalled for a moment before saying, “Replace?”

“Yes! Replace me with her! The main system must want to complete the mission, huh? Otherwise, it would be a waste of resources, wouldn’t it?”

Little system: “There is no replacement option.”

Qin Wanyan seemed to have found a straw to clutch at. “You can add that function! After replacing me with her, the perfect life mission can then be completed!”

‘If that’s the case, the person who’s about to die will become Xiang Yi, right?’

….

chapters.title: Chapter 593 - Nation’S Sister (8)
chapters.body:
Chapter 593 - Nation’S Sister (8)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

A summer thunderstorm suddenly struck.

The system fell silent too as if there was some mistake in the calculations.

…

There was a downpour outside the window but it was warm and nice inside.

In the kitchen, Xiang Feng was responsible for talking to set the mood.

Shi Sui was washing the dishes slowly and seriously because he was a clean freak. Besides, his hands were very good-looking and watching him wash the dishes was simply welfare for those who liked looking at pretty hands.

Xiang Yi tied her hair into a bun and was making some handmade noodles with her head hung low.

The young girl mixed the sweet potatoes and peas according to proportion with her small and fair hands, funneling the batter through a metal scoop with holes, allowing them to flow down to the boiling water to solidify.

The vermicelli solidified into vermicelli strips, which she then stirred and turned with her long chopsticks. She then left it to boil to the best state before quickly fishing it out and soaking it in cold water.

The viewers were dazzled. It seemed to them that Xiang Yi had succeeded in making hand-made sweet potato noodle in just a short while.

In the live-stream:

——[My brain understands it immediately after I try but my hands can’t do it 🙂 ]

—— [Xiang Yi is so all-rounded! She actually knows how to make vermicelli by hand. I really salute her]

——[I love eating ready-made soup vermicelli! I’ve eaten at a long-established small store. They’ve operated for many years and have been insisting on making handmade vermicelli on site. It’s really so much more soulful and flavorful than machine-made noodles!]

…

The sight of the vermicelli was enough to make Xiang Feng crave the noodles and salivate. He felt that life had been wonderful in the last few days that he got to bring Little Xiji home!

He was simply taking advantage of Little Xiji!

“Uncle, shall we have some hot and sour noodles?” Xiang Yi asked as he tilted his head to the side.

Xiang Feng nodded profusely. “Yes, yes, yes!”

“Good.” Xiang Yi scooped up a few spoons of soup, which she had been boiling for a long time with chicken, duck, and pork ribs, etc. She slowly let it boil over low heat, and now, it had turned into a viscous, milky white color. “Wait, I’ll make you some super sour and super spicy junk food.”

Xiang Feng exclaimed, “Okay!”

In the next second, he heard his little niece look at Shi Sui. He said with a warm and tender voice, “Hot and sour noodles are not healthy. I’ll make you some clear soup noodles with eggs and vegetables, okay?”

Shi Sui chuckled. The chain of his gold-framed glasses were tucked behind his ears, making him look refined but simplistic. As he washed the vegetables, he said, “Thank you, Xiang Yi~”

Xiang Yi said, “You’re welcome.”

Xiang Feng was confused.

‘So Shi Sui gets healthy food but I’m only worthy of junk food?’

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘The more I look at the two of them, the more I think it’s amiss!’

—— [Ahhhh this is the sweetest couple I stan! They’re showing off everyday!]

—— [What’s the matter? As soon as Shi Sui and Xiang Yi make eye contact, I think that there’s romance in the screen]

——[Seriously speaking, the way Shi Sui and Xiang Yi look at each other is full of devotion and affection. He’s always so aloof towards others but he smiles as soon as he sees Xiang Yi. It’s clearly the reaction that one would have when looking at the person they like!]

…

Most of the Shi Sui Sisters and Spicy Rabbits had already decided to take a peaceful approach.

They were a good-looking couple and were childhood sweethearts too. It was normal for them to have three children in two years, let alone fall in love and date each other.

However, there were a few Shi Sui Sisters who were especially disgusted and against the fans of the UntimelyCouple. Thus, they started lashing out at them in the livestream on the spot.

——[Friendly reminder: It’s retarded to ship a couple~]

——[Shi Sui just falls in love with anyone he sees]

——[Shi Sui has won the ‘Best Actor’ award. Xiang Yi is barely an influencer now. Isn’t it awkward for them to be shipped together everyday? They’re compatible, do you understand?]

…

The fans of the UntimelyCouple were not willing to show weakness and thus retorted. The two parties carried out a friendly exchange of verbal attacks. The moment the hot and sour noodles were fished out of the pot, the entire screen was covered in comments left by the fans…

[So fragrant! It smells great!!!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 594 - Nation’S Sister (9)
chapters.body:
Chapter 594 - Nation’S Sister (9)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

It was proven that all fans are amateurs compared to the foodies.

After an intense argument, the conflict faded in the countless “so fragrant” comments, just like a few raindrops.

Xiang Yi was a big eater so Xiang Yi gave him a large bowl of noodles.

The brownish hand-made sweet potato flour was slightly coarse and crystal clear while the soup base was colored with the redness of chili pepper. It was well-greased and moist, with peeled peanut bits, lettuce, and cilantro. The colors were absolutely vivid.

Xiang Feng couldn’t be bothered about whether it was hot or not as he quickly picked up a chopstick and stuffed the noodles into his mouth. He chose to ate in the kitchen instead of bringing it to the dining table.

In an instant…

The numbness, spiciness, sourness, freshness, fragrance, and various other flavors exploded on his tastebuds with an impact so strong that it seemed to reach the depths of his soul.

The texture of the vermicelli was more tough and chewy than the dried vermicelli made by machines. After taking a few bites of vermicelli followed by a mouthful of super sour and spicy soup, he felt double the deliciousness!

It was numbing but not bitter; spicy but not dry; fresh but pure, sour but not tensing. There was endless fragrance on his lips and teeth with endless aftertaste.

Xiang Feng vaguely quipped, “This is delicious, really delicious…”

Countless viewers in front of the screen were so peckish that they started drooling.

On the major takeout platforms, orders for hot and sour noodles surged.

Even the Shi Sui sisters and fans of the UntimelyCouple who had been lashing out at them incessantly, mysteriously stopped fighting too.

Eating comes first before anything. He decided to just order some food first.

The second bowl of vermicelli with soup was given to Shi Sui.

The milky white soup base was mixed with sweet potato powder. There was a half-boiled egg nestled in the middle and it was garnished with some green vegetables, making it look light and clean.

“Here’s some vermicelli that isn’t too sweet or sour,” Xiang Yi said, looking at Shi Sui. “Have some food first.”

Shi Sui said, “I’ll wait for you.”

While cooking some slightly sour and slightly spicy vermicelli for herself, Xiang Yi began to get uncontrollably lost in thought.

‘Shi Sui and I… seemed like an old married couple.’

‘Well, I wonder what we will be like after we get married.’

‘Probably about the same as now, huh? Respectful, restrained and polite?’

“Xiang Yi, the vermicelli is ready.” The man’s low, mellow voice sounded into his ears, and Xiang Yi suddenly sobered up.

‘What kind of mess…am I thinking about?’

‘We’re just dating and I’ve actually started to let my imagination run wild…’

Pretending to be calm, she scooped some vermicelli for herself but the tips of her ears were tinged with a touch of redness.

…

Since everyone present knew each other well, dinner was rather casual, consisting of a fare of vermicelli, a few plates of kimchi, and iced sour plum juice.

Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji were snuggled up with their heads pressed together, sleeping and snoring.

The sounds of rain had yet to stop but the house was brightly lit. It was just a simple dinner but it caused many people to be emotional.

—— [This must be life!]

——[I suddenly realized something. Humanity is what the heart yearns for]

——[UwU I really like such content about daily life that consists of cooking and eating. Xiang Yi’s life may seem simple but to me, it’s like Utopia]

…

Of course, there were lots of aggressive fans who started picking on her.

—— [Xiang Yi is getting lazier and lazier. She’s not even going to cook a simple dish for three? Too much kimchi will cause cancer! What’s the point of keeping her around?]

——[I thought it was barely acceptable for her to be a housewife and serve our Shi Sui. To make matters worse, she actually asked him to wash the dishes!]

——[The difference in class between people exists. It’s not a big deal to rely on variety shows to gain fame. Such popularity has no foundation, it’s no different from influencers. Are influencers more famous than celebrities? There are walls, just like class]

…

Xiao Hai liked watching the livestream and being a keyboard warrior. As usual, he criticized Xiang Yi before scratching his leg. However, his mother suddenly knocked on his door.

“Son! The hand sanitizer endorsed by Xiang Yi has arrived!”

Xiao Hai: ???

….

chapters.title: Chapter 595 - Nation'S Sister (10)
chapters.body:
Chapter 595 - Nation'S Sister (10)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“What’s going on…” Xiao Hai started murmuring to himself in astonishment. “How does my mom know Xiang Yi!?!”

Xiao Hai’s mother was extremely impatient. He turned the doorknob and yelled, “Hurry up! I just saw the ad on TV, I want to buy all the scents! If you go late, you won’t be able to snap up any! Your Aunt Xu, Aunt Yang and the others have all gone to snatch it.”

“Mom you are talking about allbuy right.” After listening for a long time, Xiao Hai finally understood what his mother was driving at. He reluctantly put on his jacket and said, “It’s just a hand sanitizer, what’s there to snap up? Can such a thing possibly be sold out?”

Anyway, he had never seen any empty shelves whenever he passed by the daily chemical product section in the supermarket.

However…

When Xiao Hai arrived at the supermarket with his mother, he realized that he was really…

Too young and inexperienced.

The supermarket was so crowded that it was comparable to the flow of people during celebratory festivals like the Chinese New Year.

Xiao Hai noticed that most of them were middle-aged women like his mother. There were also some elderly women.

Everyone was snatching the hand sanitizers.

The supermarket also arranged for a staff to maintain order with a loud speaker , “Please line up to purchase hand sanitizer. Hand sanitizers are limited to five bottles per person! Hey that lady over there, please step back a little. If you cut in line, you won’t be allowed to buy!”

The group of people was discussing.

“She’s already so old and she’s still trying to cut in line…”

“Yeah, look how eager she is.”

“The last time we were snatching eggs, I didn’t see her behaving in such an uncultured manner.”

“…”

Listening to the sound of discussion coming from all directions, Xiao Hai slipped into a trance.

He had seen purchase limits for cell phones and luxury goods but he had never seen purchase limits for hand sanitizers…

Xiao Hai’s mother stopped in her tracks and exclaimed, “Ah, I’m a step too late! Xiang Yi endorsed six different scents. If we only manage to get five scents, it won’t be a complete set!”

Xiao Hai was extremely aggressive on the Internet but he was actually very cowardly in real life, especially when facing his mother. He said straightforwardly, “Mom, we won’t be able to finish using five bottles of hand sanitizer!”

“You don’t know sh*t!” Xiao Hai’s mother rolled her eyes at him.

“…”

An enthusiastic and friendly lady beside him asked, “Hey, do you want to trade? My husband has already bought five bottles and we’re short of a vanilla-scented one. Just buy two bottles of vanilla-scented sanitizer later, and I will trade it with you for the scent you’re lacking!”

Xiao Hai’s mother’s eyes lit up. “Sure!”

Xiao Hai thought, ‘That works too?’

‘Women are really like dragons. They’re greedy and they love collecting things.’

Xiao Hai’s mother and the other middle-aged lady saw eye-to-eye with each other and they were acting like biological sisters. They exchanged numbers and began to chat about life. In no time, they even started talking about setting Xiao Hai up for a date with a girl.

“Your son is very handsome. He can totally marry Xiang Yi!” The lady joked.

Xiao Hai’s mother said righteously, “How can he be worthy of Xiang Yi?!”

Xiao Hai: ???

However, listening to the middle-aged and elderly women around him discussing about Xiang Yi with great joy, Xiao Hai suddenly realized that Xiang Yi was not only attractive to young people, but she also seemed to have a large number of fans who were middle-aged and elderly women…

He somehow felt a little ashamed for criticizing Xiang Yi for being a lowly influencer.

Xiao Hai filed a short video and posted it on his social media account.

[OCEAN]: Accompanying my mother to buy some hand sanitizers. There are so many people.

A bunch of lousy friends commented below.

—— [Wow, have you changed?]

——[Didn’t you used to hate Xiang Yi?]

—— [I was also accompanying my mom and aunt to get some hand sanitizers. Xiang Yi is really enjoying national fame!]

…

…

Similar scenes were being played out all over the country.

There was no need to buy a place on the hot search list at all. The netizens’ fervent discussion was enough to bump the topic to the top.

#Nation’sSisterXiangYi!

chapters.title: Chapter 596 - Popular With Passers-By
chapters.body:
Chapter 596 - Popular With Passers-By

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Chapter 599: Popular With People

The online sales volume of the snail vermicelli made many brands tempted but many also chose to temporarily wait and observe. However, the brick-and-mortar store sales volume of the hand sanitizer endorsed by Xiang Yi had completely let everyone realize how popular Xiang Yi was with the citizens!

In the entertainment industry, the popularity of a celebrity is metaphysical.

There are some celebrities that are just not likable and will never gain popularity no matter how hard they try.

However, some celebrities are different. Some are well-liked by people of all ages even adults who are not fans of them would say that they were good kids.

The past year’s ‘Xiang Yi’ was the former.

The current Xiang Yi is the latter.

…

…

At the end of tonight’s livestream, Li Jianyu made an announcement.

“There’s quite a number of guests coming tomorrow and I can give you a hint. It’s a group of cute and handsome boys!”

The viewers of the livestream were guessing if it was their idols from SEASEVEN.

Now, SEASEVEN was enjoying fame that they never dared to dream of before and had become the top male idol group in the country. The fun part was that they would mention Xiang Yi all the time during their interviews, just like her number one fan.

Xiang Yi also thought of SEASEVEN so she asked tentatively, “Are Jiang Chen and the rest the ones who will be coming tomorrow?”

Li Jianyu said, “Hehe, mayb~~ Anyway, you’ll have a woodcutter again, Xiang Yi.”

He also deliberately winked at Shi Sui playfully.

“How’s that? I’ve learned to do this wink pretty well, right?”

Shi Sui folded his arms and said with a smile, “I thought you had an eye cramp.”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded.

‘Seems like Shi Sui is already in jealous mode. Gentlemanly, refined, and mellow? That’s all fake!’

The audience watching the livestream began to cheer.

——[Yo, Yo, Yo, it’s him, it’s him, our little jealous Shi Sui!]

–[Wow ~ a group of brothers. What a familiar match and taste~ I look forward to Xiang Yi’s large-scale concubine selection tomorrow]

—— [Why ship the UntimelyCouple!?! I suggest that you guys don’t be too strict with the standards. Be all-accepting like me and you can get more happiness!]

…

While the viewers were speculating, the livestream ended.

Xiang Feng carried Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji upstairs to watch a movie in the newly renovated entertainment room.

Xiang Yi, on the other hand, got up and prepared to go write out the recipes for tomorrow.

The young girl had just stepped into the kitchen when familiar footsteps came from behind her.

She turned around and made eye contact with a pair of deep, dark eyes.

Creak——

The kitchen door was covered.

This was a space that Xiang Yi was all too familiar with, but at the moment, there was an extra touch of tension for no reason.

“What’s wrong? Do you have something to say to me?” Xiang Yi asked.

Shi Sui glanced at her with a mirthless smile and said, “Xiang Yi, you’re putting in quite a lot of effort for tomorrow’s guests.”

Xiang Yi, “Those who come are guests.”

This was what her grandparents had taught her since she was a child, and over time it became a habitual concept.

Shi Sui curled his fingers to hold the frame, noticing that the young girl was staring straight at the position of his Adam’s apple. With his thin lips slightly curled, the man slowly unbuttoned the top button of his shirt and said nonchalantly, “It’s a little hot.”

“It seems to be a little…” Xiang Yi looked at Shi Sui but the more expectant she was, the more slowly Shi Sui unbuttoned his shirt.

He finally unbuttoned one button, vaguely revealing his cold, fair skin and the bulge of his Adam’s apple. It left more to the imagination than baring his chest completely.

When Shi Sui’s fingers touched the second button…

Xiang Yi’s eyes became even brighter and clearer.

Shi Sui suddenly stopped moving.

Xiang Yi was feeling regretful but the man said in a lazy and nonchalant tone of voice, “My hand hurts. Xiang Yi, can you help me unbutton my shirt?”

….

chapters.title: Chapter 597 - Xiang Yi Takes Advantage Of Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 597 - Xiang Yi Takes Advantage Of Me

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“Your hand hurts?” Xiang Yi’s brows furrowed and she grabbed Shi Sui’s wrist. “I’ll take your pulse…”

In the next second…

Her fair and slender wrist, was clutched and held tightly.

He rubbed his warm thumb gently over her slightly raised wrist bones, making her feel ticklish.

In an instant…

The kitchen was so quiet that one could hear the subtle sound of the refrigerator operating.

Although Xiang Yi was sometimes slow-witted, it wasn’t that slow that she didn’t understand anything.

Her ears were burning but she still tried to look serious and asked, “Are you lying to me?”

“Yes.” Shi Sui admitted openly with a warm joy in his dark, peach-blossom-shaped eyes which had curled inner corners and upturned outer corners. “Oh dear, Xiang Yi discovered me.”

Despite saying so, the man was not the slightest bit guilty or vain, but he hooked Xiang Yi’s hair with his other hand and played with it, looking rather sluggish but casual.

He was restrained, but Xiang Yi began to get embarrassed.

A trace of rosiness appeared on the young girl’s cheeks and said, “Although you cheated me… I-I can help you to undo the buttons! Because…because I’m a good person!”

Shi Sui chuckled and bent forward slightly. “Thank you then.”

There was a height difference between the two but now, the distance between them was closer.

Xiang Yi’s fingertips curled slightly, perhaps because of her shyness and anticipation.

She started undoing his buttons with trembling fingers.

She tried hard for a long time but she still couldn’t do it.

Shi Sui looked up, his dark eyes extremely beautiful.

“It’s too difficult to unbutton,” Xiang Yi eagerly said before he could speak.

Shi Sui said with a smirk, “I thought that you wanted to take advantage of me.”

Xiang Yi: !

‘I-I-I did not!’

She stammered and retorted, “I-I don’t often think about it… either.”

“Oh?”

Realizing that she had said the wrong thing, Xiang Yi was embarrassed, but when she thought of the fact that Shi Sui was her boyfriend, she felt that it was justified, “I… I only think about it occasionally, and I didn’t even put it into practice!”

After saying that, she regretted it again. She thought Shi Sui would be angry when he heard it, but she did not expect that Shi Sui not only did not get angry, but even…smiled with some joy.

“Why don’t we put it to practice now, huh?”

“Huh?”

He tugged the young girl’s tiny hands with his slender and well-defined fingers, and then slowly unbuttoned the second button of his shirt.

The contour of the man’s clean and defined Adam’s apple became clearer, bit by bit.

His collarbone was also extremely superior and he had a cold and fair skin toned skin tone. He was surprisingly thin like a teenager.

However, he was very sexy.

Xiang Yi subconsciously forgot to blink.

Shi Sui did not rush to speak and instead picked up a glass of water on the side of the glass table, tilted his head, and took a sip.

As he drank some water, his Adam’s apple started rolling rather obviously.

His unbuttoned white shirt revealed his usually mild and ascetic temperament. Xiang Yi felt that… he was almost unable to hold on any longer.

She slowly rubbed up against Shi Sui. “Boyfriend.”

“Yes, girlfriend?”

“Can… Can I, practice a little more in-depth?”

The man quietly tightened his grip on the glass of water.

After a while, he put down the water glass and placed his fingers on the back of the girl’s neck,gently pinching and stroking like he was petting a cat. He asked, “How in-depth do you want to go?”

Xiang Yi felt a little embarrassed. “I just… I just…”

She tilted her small face, her eyes shockingly bright, like a fallen star.

Shi Sui made eye contact with her and quietly waited although he wasn’t as calm as he seemed to be on the surface.

The young girl put up a finger and said coquettishly in a warm voice, “Can I….touch it?”

chapters.title: Chapter 598 - Pre-Rain Longjing, Overflowing Fragrance Of Tea
chapters.body:
Chapter 598 - Pre-Rain Longjing, Overflowing Fragrance Of Tea

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The pattering of the raindrops on the window gradually weakened. There was a warm light indoors.

The shadows were cast on the ground like a movie scene playing in slow motion.

There was a trace of ambiguity in the air and bubbles of bliss that were sizzling like ice cubes in cola.

Shi Sui’s eyes are dark. “Huh?”

“Just for a while!” Xiang Yi emphasized, “Really, just for a short while!”

Her voice gradually became softer. “Actually, I’ve always been curious about what a boy’s Adam’s apple feels like to touch. Is it similar to inflamed tonsils?”

“…” ‘It turned out to be just like that. It’s just an Adam’s apple.’

Shi Sui leaned against the wall and said leisurely with some sluggishness. “If it’s someone else, I won’t let them touch it for even a second. If it’s Xiang Yi… you can touch it as much as you want.”

Swish-

The lethality of this sentence was too strong. Xiang Yi’s ears reddened at a speed visible to the naked eye.

The little girl inherited the ancestral arrogance of the Xiang family. Even if she was extremely shy, she had to pretend to be indifferent and nonchalant.

She stretched out her index finger and carefully approached Shi Sui. She then nervously and expectantly…

poked it a little while trying to sense it carefully.

“!”

Seeing her serious expression and the way she seemed to be studying him, Shi Sui could not help but chuckle softly while his Adam’s apple vibrated a little.

She quickly retracted her hand and blinked.

“It turns out that it really feels different from inflamed tonsils…” she lamented.

Shi Sui looked at her and asked, “Do you want to continue?”

Xiang Yi was shocked. “Can I still… still continue?!”

‘Is there such a good thing in the world?!’

Shi Sui had an indulgent and doting gaze in his eyes as he took her hand and pressed it onto his Adam’s apple.

“Xiang Yi, you can do whatever you want to do to me.”

Xiang Yi said excitedly, “In that case… I want to touch your collarbone too!”

“You can but…” He deliberately paused.

“But what?” Xiang Yi had really fallen into the trap.

“I know that there are many important people in your heart but I’m lucky to have a place in your heart, so I am already very satisfied…”

Shi Sui was like a cup of tea that had a fresh scent that flowed everywhere.

However, Xiang Yi really fell for it and she immediately panicked. “Don’t say that! I won’t allow you to think that way! You’re clearly very good! No one is allowed to badmouth you! Not even yourself!”

Shi Sui was slightly stunned. He lowered his face to hide the surging emotions in his eyes.

With her hands on her waist, Xiang Yi said, “Anyway, you’re not allowed to do that. Do you hear me?”

“Okay, I’ll listen to you, Xiang Yi.”

Xiang Yi recalled the matriarchal world that she had once transmigrated to, in which she had assisted the female lead to coax her husbands.

Xiang Yi felt that she should coax her boyfriend more.

Hence, she said with a serious expression on her face, “I admit that my family is the most important to me but apart from my family, you’re the most, most, most important person to me! Although we haven’t been in a relationship for a long time, feelings should not be measured or defined by time…”

She paused and said shyly but firmly, “I like you. I like you very, very much. Don’t worry, I’ll definitely give you a sense of security in the future!”

Shi Sui’s breathing became slightly heavier.

‘How can she be…so nice and gentle?’

She patted his thin and slender shoulder.

“I’ll tell you when I get sad in the future.”

“When you’re sad, you can lean on my shoulder too. I have to protect and dote on my boyfriend!”

chapters.title: Chapter 599 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 599 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Although her intention was to coax him, Xiang Yi meant those words from the bottom of her heart.

After the young girl finished, her face became even redder.

After waiting for a few seconds, she still did not get a response from Shi Sui. She blinked in confusion and asked, “Do… you not like to hear these?” Xiang Yi was a little chagrined and she said, “I won’t say such things again in the future then.”

“I like it,” he interjected decisively.

Xiang Yi froze.

“I like it very much.” Shi Sui coughed softly and looked away.

A bold guess surfaced in Xiang Yi’s mind. “Are you getting shy…”

Shi Sui did not answer her question and instead, changed the subject quietly.

He was way too intelligent. With just a few words, he managed to move Xiang Yi’s attention back to the recipe.

“I saw the weather forecast and there are expected showers tomorrow. The temperatures are going to be relatively low, and since there are going to be lots of people, why don’t we have some hotpot?” Xiang Yi looked at the kitchen utensils. Due to the fact that Xiang Feng liked having hotpot, she had lots of pots of different sizes and shapes. Some could contain two different types of soups while some could contain nine different types of soups.

Shi Sui said, “Since they’re boys, just feed them anything.”

“How can I do that? They’re probably still young and going through puberty. They must be fed well…”

Before he finished, a large pair of hands that were warm to touch, were wrapped around her wait.

“Xiang Yi, I’m jealous.”

“Huh?”

“Sister, do you like younger boys a lot?”

“Ahem!”

Xiang Yi felt all her blood gushing to her head and she almost choked on her own saliva.

“Y-y-you… Don’t call me Sister…”

Shi Sui saw all of her reaction and said with raised eyebrows, “Seems like you really like them, Sister.”

Xiang Yi was flabbergasted!

‘It’s over for me. I’m really dead meat!’

‘Ahhh, why do I not react when others call me Sister but when Shi Sui does, I feel such a strong urge to press him against the wall and kiss him!?!’

“Okay, I won’t tease you anymore.” Shi Sui couldn’t bear to force her so he gently patted Xiang Yi’s back and said, “Breathe, don’t hurt yourself by keeping it in.”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

‘How did he find out that I’d hold my breath whenever I’m nervous?’

“G-Goodnight.” Xiang Yi pushed him away and scurried into the bedroom.

Perhaps because Xiang Feng was naturally hated by dogs and cats, Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji dashed downstairs to play even though there were canned food and toys.

When Xiao Naofu saw Xiang Yi, it chased after her.

Little Xiji picked up the salted fish toy that Xiao Naofu like to play with, and chased after it.

Shi Sui was left alone.

There was a cold silence around him and he seemed to be the second person that all cats and dogs hated.

…

On the following day.

Bright early in the morning, raindrops were falling to the ground.

Perhaps because it was raining, Xiang Yi missed her morning workout and was holding Xiao Naofu in her arms, sleeping soundly.

The little kitten was snoring whilst being pressed against her chest.

On the ground, Little Xiji was lying on the cat bed that originally belonged to Xiao Naofu, with a salted fish toy in its arms.

As soon as the livestream began, everyone found out that Xiang Yi actually didn’t wake up early in the morning!

There were haters throwing shade at Xiang Yi.

—— [It’s already 8pm and Xiang Yi is still sleeping? Is she a pig?]

——[Wasn’t Xiang Yi quite diligent at first? Now that she’s famous, she’s throwing her weight around and looking like a big shot?]

——[Her guests are arriving soon, Isn’t she going to get up and make breakfast? Who would marry such a lazy woman?]

…

The spicy bunnies were about to retaliate against the comments when Shi Sui, who had just come home from a workout, appeared on the screen.

He was wearing a gray short-sleeved shirt and a pair of black trousers, which made him look especially youthful.

He forgot to bring a towel so he casually lifted his arm to wipe his sweat with the hem of his short-sleeved shirt, revealing his abs and V-line immediately…

All of a sudden, there was an uproar in the livestream.

chapters.title: Chapter 600 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 600 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (2)

–[Ahhhh Shi Sui, you must be the incarnate of the benevolent Bodhisattava!]

–[Lift your shirt higher. Higher! I don’t mind increasing the traffic!]

—— [Look at that waist, abs, and V-line. Oh my God, it turns out that Shi Sui’s figure is so superb, huh??]

…

The audience were focusing only on Shi Sui’s body but Li Jianyu managed to see more through the camera.

“Why do I think? Shi Sui seems a bit vain today…” Li Jianyu turned his head to the side to ask Ruan Qing who was beside him.

Ruan Qing was wearing a cream-colored coat which made her look very elegant. She handed Li Jianyu a cup of hot coffee with her red lips slightly raised. “Maybe it’s just the childish competitive mindset of men?”

“What?? How are we men childish? How are we competitive!?!”

Ruan Qing played with the cards sent by the cafe that they had ordered takeout from. Recently, it was holding a promotion where patrons would receive a card for every cup of coffee they ordered. The card contained in each cup was different.

Many people would order coffee for the sake of collecting an entire set of cards, like Li Jianyu and the photographer, Old Zhang.

She said calmly, “I heard that Old Zhang has collected nine cards, which means he has one more than you.”<segment 17219 ¶>

Holy shit, this can be tolerated? Can’t stand it!

Li Jianyu asked, “What do you mean? Damn it, I can’t tolerate this. Someone order me two more cups of coffee! I must surpass him and collect all the cards sooner!!!”

Ruan Qing laughed without saying anything.

‘Hah, men.’

…

It turned out that although Li Jianyu was silly, he had a good judgment.

Shi Sui went to take a shower and reappeared on camera. This time, he was obviously a lot more refined than usual.

He was wearing a pure black satin shirt that outlined his taut and toned body, was tucked into his trousers. He looked lazy and casual.

Unlike in the past where he would casually blow-dry his hair or let it dry naturally, he combed all his hair back and kept it fixed in place with wax, revealing handsome features.

He changed his glasses to a retro-style one with a golden chain around his ear. The light in the room added a gentle touch of color to his chiseled and angular face.

He was charming enough when he was wearing casual home clothes. Now that he had put in the effort to doll himself up today, the viewers of the livestream were screaming, completely flabbergasted.

—— [Ascetic Shi Sui… I love, I love]

—— [He’s so handsome bright early in the morning. I can’t handle this. I can’t handle this.]

——[I want to slide down your nose bridge, Brother! I want to swing on your eyelashes! I want to swim in your collarbone! I want to play hide-and-seek in your abs!!]

…

He looked in the direction of the door of Xiang Yi’s room and frowned slightly.

She had a regular routine and rarely snoozed. Hence, he reckoned that she should have already been up at this hour.

‘Could it be that she is sick?’

Shi Sui was rather worried so he asked a female staff member to enter the bedroom and take a look in a rather warm voice.

As soon as the staff member left, there was some chaotic noises coming from outside.

“Are you home, Xiang Yi?”

“Xiang Yi! We’re here, Xiang Yi!”

“I’ve brought you a present, Xiang Yi!”

“…”

It was noisy, yet young and vivid.

Shi Sui opened the door, only to see seven or eight teenagers who were all wearing a black uniform, with a double arrow symbol on their chests. It seemed to be the symbol of Logic.

Upon sight of Shi Sui, the youngsters immediately fell silent like elementary school students running into the discipline master. They subconsciously straightened their backs and some even pulled their spiky hair.

The one standing on the far left side was Xiang Yu, Xiang Yi’s fourth brother.

He was wearing a cap. “Good morning, this is Shi Sui. Big Brother Shi, these are my teammate.”

The fans screamed: [This is the site of the large-scale concubine selection. They might be late but will never be absent!!!]

….

chapters.title: Chapter 601 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 601 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

There was a total of four official players and four reserve players in Team Logic. when they heard that they could come to Xiang Yi’s place today, they vied with each other to come over and they were even more proactive than they were during a competition.

Xiang Yu asked, “Where is my sister?”

Shi Sui answered, “Still sleeping.”

Xiang Yu was bewildered.

The look in his eyes changed immediately and he stared at Shi Sui like the latter was a beast.

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows but he didn’t bother explaining either. He moved aside and welcomed those children in.

The oldest person in the team was the captain, Wander, who was 22 years old, followed by the 21-year-old Xiang Yu.

Most of the other players were around the age of 16-20 years old.

The gaming industry was very pragmatic and cruel. The lifespan of a gamer’s career is usually rather short.

The unstoppable gaming gods who were usually arrogant in-game, were now extremely obedient, so much that they didn’t even dare to eat the fruit that Shi Sui handed them.

Xiang Yu could still hear two of them whispering to each other.

“Will Shi Sui poison the fruit?”

“I don’t think so…”

Xiang Yu heaved a sigh of relief but that person carefully said with some hesitation, “Surely he didn’t lace it with some highly toxic drugs, right?”

“…”

They sounded extremely lowly.

At this moment, the female staff member quickly scurried out of the room and said with an anxious look on her face, “Xiang Yi won’t wake up no matter how I try to wake her. Surely she didn’t pass out, right?”

Shi Sui’s expression changed slightly. At this moment, he couldn’t care less about the differences between men and women. Instead, he strode into Xiang Yi’s room in a gentlemanly manner.

Xiang Yu dashed in too.

…

In the bedroom.

By the bed, Little Xiji raised its front legs and started barking while lying on the bed.

When it saw Shi Sui enter, it rubbed itself against the leg of Shi Sui’s trousers and whimpered twice.

Shi Sui soothingly rubbed the back of the little Shiba Inu’s neck while glancing at Xiang Yi.

The young girl was covered in a thin blanket and she was sleeping soundly. Her breathing was clear and even, and there seemed to be nothing different about her.

“Xiang Yi, Xiang Yi!” Xiang Yu panicked and recalled how Xiang Yi had also taken a nap a year ago, and then woke up as a drastically different person. He immediately broke out in cold sweat.

However…

Just like the sleeping beauty in a fairytale, she didn’t seem to react no matter how Xiang Yu called out to her or shook her.

Shi Sui took a deep breath and forced himself to calm down.

His eyes were locked on Xiao Naofu who was lying in her arms.

The little kitten had also fallen into a deep sleep, with its fluffy tail curled around Xiang Yi’s wrist. The two of them seemed to have been cursed or something.

…

In the living room.

The photographer did not go in and merely stayed in the living room to film the reactions of the boys of Team Logic.

They were genuinely worried about Xiang Yi.

However, there were also barbarians who continued to send hate and crticize them regardless of the time and place.

—— [God knows if she’s pretending. Of all times, she chose to faint at this juncture?]

—— [Wasn’t she fine last night? She passed out just like that today? That’s hilarious.]

——[Isn’t she just deliberately luring Shi Sui into the room? If another woman uses this trick, you’d definitely call her pretentious]

…

The Spicy Rabbits were so furious that they immediately retorted.

——[Are you people blind? Can’t you see how hard Xiang Yi works everyday?]

—— [Please mind your words. It’s normal to fall sick at times. Celebrities are humans too,okay?]

—— [Shi Sui is the one who went inside on his own. Did someone put a knife on his neck and force him to go in?]

There were also fans of the UntimelyCouple who were secretly excited.

So sweet!

…

Meanwhile…

In the midst of her sleepy trance, Xiang Yi saw the familiar interface.

[Hello, I’m Transmigration System 1018. I’m pleased to serve you]

chapters.title: Chapter 602 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 602 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“…”

Xiang Yi was bewildered.

It was really confusing.

She looked down and saw her nearly transparent hands.

There was darkness all around, with occasional specks of silvery light floating around, like they were in a vast universe.

Xiao Naofu who was at the side was just as confused.

Xiao Naofu was swinging its claws in the air. When it rubbed itself against Xiang Yi’s shoulder, it began to holler like a menacing tiger.

“Meow meow meow!!”

—— [The silly woman is going to transmigrate soon!]

There was a cat translator in 1018. After hearing it, it was stunned for a moment. “Have we transmigrated? Wait a moment, I have to check the database of the transmigrator.”

There was silence all around.

1018 was gone.

Xiang Yi hugged Xiao Naofu and pinched its little face.

“Don’t be upset, little gem. If you’re angry, you won’t be the most handsome tiger in the world anymore.”

Xiao Naofu was infuriated. “Meow! Meow!”
