‘How can there be such a thing?! Xiang Yi has already completed all her transmigration tasks. How can she be bound to a system again?’

Although Xiao Naofu was ignorant, it knew that transmigration was actually a very arduous thing.

Life and death, deception, and almost every single person and everything would eventually turn into a fragment of their memory.

It made her wonder if she really existed.

Xiang Yi said, “Don’t be afraid. Maybe there’s just a bug somewhere.”

Speaking of bugs, Xiao Naofu suddenly realized that the world that Xiang Yi was in seemed to be getting more and more abnormal.

It was said that no transmigrators should be appearing in this world again. However, there was first Ling Ye, then Qin Wanyan… and lastly, Shi Sui who had a bizarre aura.

‘What’s exactly going on?’

It meowed tenderly and rubbed itself against Xiang Yi with some uneasiness.

After she waited for a few minutes, 1018 sounded again.

“I’m back, Host. After asking around, I have found that there are no records of your transmigration.”

Xiao Naofu meowed!

‘How can there be no record of it? I was always with Xiang Yi!’

Xiang Yi asked without reacting much. “Are you sure?”

“Yes.”

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “Okay, I got it.”

Although 1018 was a little surprised, it was only a trainee system and it had heard from its predecessors about the reactions of the hosts after learning that they were about to start transmigrating.

Some were ecstatic while some were resistant.Some even began to break down and curse at the top of their lungs.

However, there didn’t seem to be anyone who was as calm as Xiang Yi.

However, 1018 came over with good news. “But I only managed to find out information about this stupid cat. It is indeed the reincarnate of a system…”

1018 had a human mindset and emotions. It couldn’t understand why there would be such a childish system so it wondered if it had been spoiled by the host.

It was green with envy.

Xiao Naofu: ???

“Meow meow meow!!!”

—— [Who are you calling stupid!?! Also, I’m not a cat! I’m a tiger! You’d better show some respect!!]

1018 said straightforwardly, “But after I scanned you, you’re indeed a cat.”

Xiang Yi covered Xiao Naofu’s ears and said, “No, no. I don’t want to hear a tortoise chanting.”

No. 1018 was speechless.

Xiao Naofu humphed puerilely with pursed lips. He was clearly throwing a tantrum.

Suddenly.

No. 1018 said, “Host, I have received an instruction from the main system due to a bug. You can choose not to transmigrate for now but you have to complete the new mission.”

“Ding… Please court this man: Shi Sui. Necessary condition: Get married. Upon completion, you will receive a great reward!”

Xiang Yi was confused.

‘Huh? When did the system introduce a function to urge them to get married?’

chapters.title: Chapter 603 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection
chapters.body:
Chapter 603 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

After a few seconds of silence, she keenly grasped the key point and squinted her pretty doe-like eyes. “The male host of this realm?”

“Host, in fact, your world is a bubble world derived from a book where Shi Sui is the male lead and has the greatest luck and aura. in layman’s terms, he is born with numerous golden spoons in his mouth. Do you need the content to be downloaded?”

“Yes.”

Soon, a book titled “King Of Showbiz” appeared in front of Xiang Yi.

It was a standard male genre feel-good book that revolves around Shi Sui, the male protagonist. It was about his journey to stardom, from fighting monsters, upgrading his level, honing his acting skills, and finally becoming the king of the entertainment industry.

Xiang Yi flipped through the book. Due to Shi Sui’s aversion to women, there were no romantic scenes in the book.

Her name was briefly mentioned in it. She was Xiang Feng’s niece and Shi Sui’s neighbor-cum-childhood-friend.

There was nothing else other than that.

Xiang Yi was in a trance for a while. It turned out that the world she was in, was just a book.

All the things that she considered “fate” was just the effortless writing of someone else.

‘Was Chuang Tzu dreaming of being a butterfly or was he a butterfly dreaming of being a human?’

‘Is everything real? Or is it a dream?’

However, she only thought so for a moment.

Xiang Yi soon calmed down.

So what if she was in the world of the book? To her, this world was real, and so was her family.

Shi Sui… was real too.

There is no doubt about it.

There was also no need to doubt it.

“I know.” Xiang Yi nodded. “Can we go back now?”

1018 was a little surprised, but did not show it.

She actually… was so firm.

She reckoned that the charm of the male protagonists in the books conjured by the main system, couldn’t deceive Xiang Yi.

The official account said again politely, “Okay, please wait a moment.”

…

The private doctor arrived in time to give Xiang Yi a physical examination.

“It might be too exhausting or a psychological reason.” Judging from the vital signs, she couldn’t see anything different. Seeing that the crowd was so nervous, she proposed, “Why don’t we send Miss Xiang to the hospital for a full body checkup?”

As soon as he spoke…

The young girl on the bed slowly opened her eyes as her feather-like eyelashes trembled.

“Xiang Yi!” Xiang Yu half-kneeled in front of the bed and clutched her hand.

Xiang Yi coughed twice, her voice was a little hoarse. “Brother.”

Her words lifted a huge weight off Xiang Yu’s chest.

Xiang Yi’s looked past him and glanced at Shi Sui who was behind him.

He was wearing a gray satin shirt that looked posh and exquisite. At this point, his originally well-groomed hair was slightly messy, with a few strands draping in front of his deep-set eyes and brow bones.

Little Xiji rested its head against his leg with tears in its eyes.

The man and the dog looked extremely disheveled and pitiful.

Xiang Yi felt a sudden soreness in her nose.

“I’m okay.” She said.

“Good that she’s fine, good that she’s fine,” said Xiang Yu who felt extremely fortunate.

Xiao Naofu also woke up and was rubbing itself against Xiang Yi’s chest coquettishly.

Shi Sui picked up the silly cut and Xiao Naofu began flinging its paws in the air to protest.

The man asked in a warm voice, “Xiang Yi, are you hungry? What do you want to eat?”

“Lean meat porridge with doughsticks?”

Shi Sui asked, “… How about I order some takeout for you?”

In the next second…

The system beep sounded in the mind.

“Ding–”

“Please let Shi Sui make breakfast for you. You will be rewarded with 100 points upon completion~~”

Xiang Yi closed the mission window with a straight face.

“My boyfriend is meant for being pampered, not for cooking.”

System 1018: ???

‘Why…why does this host seem a little rebellious!?!’

….

chapters.title: Chapter 604 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 604 - Large-Scale Concubine Selection Site (6)

“Host, but this is your mission…”

“Please answer a question of mine. Which one is more important? The mission result or the process?”

“… The result.”

“So is it logically feasible for me to apply any method I wish, as long as the outcome is the same?”

“…Yes.”

“Okay, you can shut up now.”

System 1018: ???

‘The host so cold and indifferent…’

“Hehehe~~” The sounds of heartless mockery came from Xiao Naofu.

—— [Hmph, little trash! Our silly woman doesn’t need a rookie system like you!]

Xiang Yi summoned System 1018 without mercy and made it connect Xiao Naofu to the same channel, together with the cat language translator function.

System 1018 was speechless.

‘This obnoxious cat actually mocked me!’

…

In the kitchen.

Xiang Yi changed into an apricot-colored thin sweater with a white skirt. She looked really gentle and soft.

She poured some white porridge that had been simmering for several hours, into several casserole dishes, and then added ingredients such as century eggs, lean meat, mushrooms and shredded ginger. She then stirred it slowly with a wooden spoon.

When the noodles were almost fermented, Xiang Yi added some salt and pepper before kneading them. She then cut them into moderately-sized doughsticks. She stacked one on top of another, and pressed a chopstick that had been dipped in water, lightly onto the dough.

The dough was then put into a hot frying pan and after a few moments, it gradually became fluffy and crispy doughsticks.

The fragrant aroma spread out along the doorway, and in a short while, Wander couldn’t help but squat at the door, followed by Xiao Yang, Ah Shui, and Song Song…

After frying a pot full of doughsticks, Xiang Yi fished them out and drained the oil. She then pulled the door open and was ready to call the kids to try the freshly fried doughsticks.

A row of kids were squatting in front of the door, as if they were planting carrots.

Xiang Yi was clearly confused.

The scene made the audience thoroughly amused.

——[ConfusedXiangYi.jpg]

——[Shocking! The eight players of the Logic team actually did this!]

—— [Hahhaha these boys who are squatting in front of the door and waiting to eat are so cute! I want to pinch their faces!]

…

After a short pause, Xiang Yi said, “Doughsticks taste the best right after they’ve just been fried. Do you guys want to try it?”

“Yes, yes, yes!”

Xiang Yi thought that a large pot of doughsticks should be enough for them but to her surprise, they wolfed down the doughsticks maniacally, as if they had been hungry for days.

They were a bunch to feed.

After the kids finished eating, they all looked at Xiang Yi innocently.

“Xiang Yi, did we eat too much?” As the captain of the team, Wander felt quite embarrassed. They were a bunch of night owls who usually skipped breakfast.

However, the doughsticks that Xiang Yi fried were really delicious. Not only were they crispy and soft, they were faintly fragrant and not too greasy.

It really tasted different from store-bought ones.

“It’s okay, I’ll fry another pot. The congee is almost ready, wait for a while so that you can pair the dishes with it. It’s not good to just eat fried foods.” Xiang Yi said softly, lowered her head and continued to fry some doughsticks.

Without needing her reminder, the kids consciously began to clean up the table and collected their cutlery. They even vied with each other to get some pickled vegetables and eggs, making the other team members who were training at the base, smack their lips.

The kids who usually wouldn’t even help to hold a pot of oil when they see it toppling over,were actually so diligent at Xiang Yi’s place!

Xiang Yi acted fast and fried two pots of doughnuts in the blink of an eye. She called out softly, “Breakfast is ready, go wash your hands!”

In an instant, all of Team Logic’s e-sports players lined up in front of the sink.

“Yes, we’ll listen to Xiang Yi!”

chapters.title: Chapter 605 - Century Egg And Lean Pork Porridge
chapters.body:
Chapter 605 - Century Egg And Lean Pork Porridge

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Xiang Yi said, “You have to clean your hands well with hand sanitizer.”

The kids were extremely obedient as they washed up before returning to the dining table.

There were several plates of delicate small dishes and two dishes of freshly stir-fried vegetables on the wooden table.

The doughsticks were cut into small pieces and stacked neatly on top of each other.

The boiled eggs had been chilled with iced water and were just the right temperature for shelling.

There was also a piping hot bowl of lean pork porridge in front of everyone.

“Gulp.”

The sound of saliva being swallowed was extremely clear.

Usually at this juncture, the entire Team Logic would still be sleeping. They initially thought that they’d be very sleepy during filming today but to their surprise, they were extremely energetic after arriving.

Now, they were feeling nothing but peckish!

Xiang Yi urged, “What are you guys waiting for?Dig in.”

The kids finally began to move their cutlery.

The doughsticks were crispy and delicious, with a crunchy exterior and an airy interior that resembled a sponge cake.

The milky flavor was mixed with a slightly peppery flavor and tinges of sweetness, saltiness and spiciness to create a rich texture.

It was absolutely delectable, be it when eaten directly or soaked in porridge.

The lean pork and century egg porridge tasted even better. The rice grains had basically been boiled the point of disintegrating, creating a sticky and viscous mouthfeel. The pork was first steamed and then fried, hence resulting in a chewy bite. The century egg was smooth and appetizing while the mushroom was tender and fragrant. When paired together, they seemed to be able to set off an electric current that blossomed at the tip of one’s tongue, stimulating her taste buds and brain straight away.

“Ahhhh it smells heavenly!!!”

“Ooo this is the best porridge I’ve ever eaten in my life!”

“These pickled vegetables are delicious too! It’s sour and spicy, and it’s got a lot of kick! Xiang Yi, you’re amazing!”

“Yes, yes, yes, Xiang Yi, you’re awesome!”

“Xiang Yi is the best!!!”

“…”

The kids were flattering Xiang Yi and sucking up to her while she said with a gentle smile, “Eat more if you like. If you want pickled vegetables or whatever, I can pack some for you when you leave.”

The crowd cheered.

“Thank you, Xiang Yi!”

Wander said solemnly with a straight face, “Call her Sister Xiang Yi!”

All of a sudden, all the kids called her Sister Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi finished her porridge calmly but she couldn’t help but dangle her legs twice under the table.

Actually, she had always wanted to be an older sister since she was a child but she had unfortunately, never had the chance to fulfill her dream because she was the youngest in the family.

She didn’t expect to get what she wanted today.

Shi Sui sat on her left and leaned over. He whispered, “Are you happy, Sister?”

“!”

Xiang Yi’s hand trembled and her spoon clinked in the porcelain bowl.

How could she explain it?

She didn’t feel anything when the kids called her ‘Sister’ but when Shi Sui did,her legs went limp…

“Ahem.” The young lady pretended to be serious and asked, “Do you want to have some eggs? I’ll de-shell one for you.”

Shi Sui said, “Let me do it.”

Xiang Yi quickly snatched the bowl of eggs and said with a serious expression on her face, “No, a man’s hands are not meant for such chores!”

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows and smiled noncommittally.

“In that case, thank you, Xiang Yi~ I’m so lucky to have met such a nice person like you~”

Xiang Yu, who was the closest to him, was speechless.

‘Shi Sui is really becoming more and more shameless.’

‘Is this still the man I worshiped and respected as a child?’

‘Why does he reek of pretentiousness every single waking moment now?!’

The boys of Team Logic had heard it too. They were just as speechless.

Xiao Yang said straightforwardly, “Shi Sui, aren’t you afraid that the netizens would call you a freeloader?”

Shi Sui slowly and methodically scooped a spoonful of porridge and at it.

He then said calmly and self-righteously, “The doctor said that I have a bad gut.”

Everyone was dumbfounded.

‘What? How dare you be so proud of it?!’

chapters.title: Chapter 606 - As Long As Empress Shi Is Alive, All You Boys Will Be Concubines
chapters.body:
Chapter 606 - As Long As Empress Shi Is Alive, All You Boys Will Be Concubines

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The fans of the UntimelyCouple were all screaming while watching the livestream.

——[Ahhhhhhhhhhh!]

—— [This is a confession! I don’t care, it’s a confession!!!]

—— [See that? This is the majesty of the lawful spouse. As long as empress shi is alive, all you boys will be concubines!]

—— [Oh my God, does anyone still remember how arrogant Shi Sui used to be in the past? He doesn’t restrain himself in front of Xiang Yi at all!!!]

…

The Shi Sui sisters were feeling extremely complicated but after thinking about it carefully, they felt that Xiang Yi seemed to be rather…

Outstanding?

She was pretty, wealthy, mild-mannered, and all-rounded.

To be frank, there may be artistes who are more popular than Xiang Yi, but it’s definitely impossible to find an artiste who is more suitable for Shi Sui than her.

Because Shi Sui adored her.

The though of it made many Shi Sui Sisters come to an understanding.

The significance of idolizing a celebrity is chasing a glimmer of light. Now, this star is also going to chase his light.

After breakfast, the boys vied with each other to wash the dishes, as if they were children in kindergarten who were desperately trying to perform well in front of the teacher in order to get the little red flower as a reward.

The coaches at the base lit a cigarette with some vicissitudes “…”

‘Wow, there’s really something meant for subduing someone.’

‘Finally, there’s someone who can deal with this bunch of lawless little brats.’

…

After breakfast, Xiang Yi fed them a large bunch of snacks before asking them to get to work.

Due to the unique nature of the profession of e-sports, the program team arranged for them to carry out some easy and interesting tasks, so as to avoid the risk of their hands getting injured.

For example, they were tasked to go to the Little Rabbit Farm to control the robot to carry goods and pick up goods; go to the glass nursery to collect flower petals to make aromatherapy oils, and so on.

For the boys of Team Logic, the tasks seemed more like relaxation activities than chores.

The boy’s had a lot of fun and went to catch chickens happily, saying that they wanted Xiang Yi to cook chicken soup at noon.

In the end, they accidentally angered the geese and were nagged at incessantly. A few of them screamed while bouncing around, making the viewers laugh hysterically in joy.

——[As we all know, the combat power of one goose = that of two adults]

——[Hahaha you guys deserve it for being playful. Now you’re being taught a lesson by the big geese!]

——[Mage, pay attention to the positioning! Can you handle fighting in the wild? Pay attention to cooperation. Shooters, why aren’t you shooting yet? Are you waiting for the New Year? /dog head / dog head]

…

Amidst the mocking of the netizens, Wander showed the vigor of the best commander in the league, stabilizing his mind and directing his teammates to launch a counterattack against the big geese.

“Xiao Yang, launch a sneak attack from the left!”

“Ah Shui, what are you running for? Your shoes are going to fall off, come and grab someone!”

“Everyone, do an encirclement and pay attention to your position. Your position must be right! Damn it, don’t peck at me, get lost…”

A few of the geese seemed to have gained sentience as they chased after Wander and attacked him relentlessly with their iron-like beaks, leaving him disheveled and helpless.

The teammates around him laughed hysterically non-stop.

Not far away, Xiang Yu, who was wearing a black cap, had one hand in his pocket, looking rather aloof.

Xiang Yi was holding a basket, which was filled with a variety of flowers that she just cut.

The girl smiled and asked, “Brother, aren’t you going to join them?”

Xiang Yu’s body tensed up and he said arrogantly, “That’s a boring and childish thing that only little kids would play.”

“Brother, you alway says I’m a little kid.” Xiang Yi blinked and continued, “But, I think you’re a little kid too.”

As soon as she said those gentle words, Xiang Yi gave Xiang Yu a gentle push towards the boys.

Then…

The gaming god who said it was boring, immediately grabbed the geese with much more vigor than anyone else.

Xiang Yi looked at her brother, and her tiny dimples appeared on her face.

chapters.title: Chapter 607 - Impressive Xiang Yi (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 607 - Impressive Xiang Yi (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

It was a nice and peaceful time until the system ruined it.

System No. 1018: “Host, your task has not been completed…”

Xiang Yi said, “Refresh for the next one.”

System No. 1018 tried to resist. “Tasks are to be completed in order.”

Xiang Yi, “Activate block function.”

“…” ‘Uwuuuu how cold and indifferent.’ “Okay, I’ll show you the next mission.”

“Ding–”

“Please let Shi Sui spend money for you. The amount is unlimited.”

System No. 1018 was obviously giving Xiang Yi an easy way out and it reckoned that she should agree to such a simple task.

To its surprise…

“Next.”

System No. 1018: ???

It could not figure out. “Why?”

“I have to spend money for my boyfriend, not the other way around.”

“…”

“Please let Shi Sui compliment you once!” It couldn’t cut her any more slack.

Xiang Yi, “My boyfriend is so brilliant, I should be the one to praise him more instead.”

System No. 1018 was speechless.

“Forget it, I’ll look out for myself. You can block yourself out.”

“Meow meow meow~~~” Xiao Naofu dejectedly laughed again in the three-person channel.

System No. 1018 was defeated.

…

The system had human-like emotions, and 1018 fell into a depressed mood.

However, Xiang Yi was deep in thought.

She was not provoking the system, but testing it.

She was testing to see where the bottom line of System No. 1018 was.

System No. 1018 was obviously very tolerant as it allowed her to even refuse to carry out the task.

Xiang Yi felt that the system was, in a way, indulging her.

It felt wrong.

The main system had its own algorithm, and it would maintain a certain degree of fairness. The subsystem also had a certain degree of freedom.

However, it will not be partial to such an extent.

Xiang Yi felt like such behavior seemed a lot like…a form of compensation.

She had transmigrated before but she did not have a record of that matter. She reckoned that the main system had probably concealed something.

What Xiang Yi can do now was to respond to all changes with no change, and slowly fish some information out from System No. 1018.

No matter what, she will definitely not let her family get hurt again this time!

…

The boys played until they were drenched in sweat, and eventually really managed to catch two geese.

The boys regretted it afterwards, thinking that the adorable Xiang Yi would definitely be scared to kill the geese.

Xiao Yang: “The geese are so cute, why don’t we just set them free…”

Xiang Yi: “The goose is so cute, why don’t we just make some roast goose?”

Xiao Yang: ???

The netizens were dumbfounded!

——[Pfft, sooner or later I’m going to die laughing watching this livestream!]

——[I’m already laughing so hard that I’m wheezing. I feel like my mother will soon bring a chicken feather duster over and beat me up]

——[Xiang Yi’s needs to broaden her imagination! In addition to roast goose, she can also make stewed goose with beer, braised goose, cassoulet goose, and goose stewed in iron pot!!]

…

Recalling the wonderful taste of the goose stewed in iron pot he had last time, Li Jianyu offered to help kill the goose.

The audience of the livestream laughed once again.

They had seen variety show directors asking artistes to get to work, but they had never seen directors vying to carry out the tasks meant for the artistes!

While waiting for the goose to be killed and processed, the boys from Team Logic discussed what to play.

“Why don’t we teach Sister to play games?”

Xiang Yi was quite interested. “Sure.”

All of a sudden, the boys expressed their attitudes.

“Sister, don’t worry, I will definitely take you to great heights!”

“Sister, I’ll be there for you. Just follow me and fly behind me!”

“Sister, don’t be scared, we’re all superb!”

“…”

The crowd was talking but the issue became what game to play.

Xiang Yi found out a box of game consoles and she asked, “How about we play with these?”

In an instant…

The boys were all stunned.

Limited edition! They were all limited edition pieces!

….

chapters.title: Chapter 608 - Impressive Xiang Yi (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 608 - Impressive Xiang Yi (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

As a bunch of teenagers who are addicted to the Internet, their greatest hobby was to collect all kinds of keyboards, mice, headsets, and game consoles.

They would usually be able to buy ordinary game consoles that were not of limited editions, even if they might be expensive.

However, many of the consoles in this box that Xiang Yi moved over, were from series that couldn’t be bought even with money!

“Right, there are also these.” Xiang Yi moved several other boxes over, which contained game cards for various games.

There was a time where she liked to play video games so Xiang Yu and Xiang Feng gave her a few consoles. Later on, the rest of her brothers and Xiang Feng each gave her a few consoles and game cartridges. Over time, she had unknowingly amassed such a large collection…

The dazzling game cartridges left the boys salivating with great desire.

“Damn it, Magic Baby Generation 1?!”

“Ahhhh the full series of Jumping Dragon?!!!”

“Sister…can we really, really, really, really play with those?”

“…”

The group of young men looked at Xiang Yi with their eyes wide open, looking really weak, helpless and pitiful.

Xiang Yi, “Of course you may.”

She graciously pushed the box over and let them share it among themselves.

The boys suppressed their excitement and carefully touched the game controllers.

Ouch!!!

The boys’ reaction caused the livestream viewers to laugh uncontrollably.

——[Hahaha, they’re really adorable!]

—— [I’m a collector. This is really satisfying!]

—— [Xiang Yi: I’m just a mediocre rich girl]

——[I took a screenshot of the game controller and searched it. It costs almost as much as the downpayment for a house in a second-tier city!!?!]

…

After some careful selection, each of the boys chose a game controller each.

The game they chose was a classic, locally-produced gun battle game called “Lost City”.

Initially, Li Jianyu was worried that it might be difficult to film them but to his surprise, Xiang Yi brought him to the third floor.

The entire third floor was all open and it was shockingly spacious, with good lighting.

The space was divided into different regions according to the function, such as fitness area, observation area, and the game area.

There were several large screens, making it convenient for the games to be cast onto them.

One can imagine the warm and beautiful scene of relaxing and enjoying some entertainment with her family, that Xiang Yi used to be in.

Li Jianyu was flabbergasted!

‘Is it too late to suck up to Xiang Yi!?!’

The viewers of the livestream were shocked again and again and again.

Is this the daily life of a rich and beautiful girl!?!

Not to mention Xiang Yi, they wanted to take liberties with Xiang Yi too!

Wander loaded the game cartridge into the port, connected several controllers to the screen, cocked his head to the side, and asked Xiang Yi, “Xiang Yi, in the game of Lost City, there are four professions, namely sniper, special forces officer, mage, and medic. Their roles are almost equivalent to long-range, melee, mage and healer. Which one do you want to play?”

Xiang Yi thought about it before . saying, “Healer.”

‘I often play the support and auxiliary role, I should be able to manage this well, right?’

Anyway, Xiang Chen often criticized her for her poor decision-making while Xiang Li would criticize her for her tactics. She would also be criticized by Xiang Qi for her hand speed, and by Xiang Yu for her operation…

Meanwhile, Xiang Feng was too much of a noob to be fit to criticize her 🙂

As soon as they heard the choice made by Xiang Yi,the gaming fans began to salm her.

——[Well, girls are only good enough to play the auxiliary role in the first place anyway.]

—— [How toxic. We just want to watch professional gamers gaming, not a female celebrity gaming, okay?]

—— [She’s playing with Wang and the rest? Is she worthy? Does this woman know which buttons are for moving back and forth, left and right, and for jumping?]

…

In reality.

Xiang Yu knew what Xiang Yi’s level of gaming was so he didn’t join in and instead, had a reserve player stand in for him.

His behavior had inevitably resulted in more criticism.

With the exciting music playing, the game began!

chapters.title: Chapter 609 - Impressive Xiang Yi (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 609 - Impressive Xiang Yi (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The game map was that of an abandoned city which seemed somewhat dystopian and post-apocalyptic.

The gray tone of the scene was dark and depressing.

Four figures appeared at the resurrection point.

Although it was a single-player game, the selected mode had a ‘Hell’ difficulty level, so the four of them encountered a monster attack as soon as they jumped out of the resurrection point.

In the early stages of the game, the characters would not have much gold to buy equipment. Hence, they were extremely fragile, especially the three output characters. According to habit, Wander and the others all bought equipment for attacking. The fast and intense wave of attack caught the three of them off guard.

If it were usual, they would never panic, because they absolutely trusted the strength of their teammates who played auxiliary roles but now, the person playing the auxiliary role was Xiang Yi…

Although they found it really cute regardless of what Xiang Yi does, they would feel really embarrassed if they couldn’t help her get back to the resurrection point…

The three of them were extremely dramatic and they could kill off the monsters with swift, fluid, and resolute moves while being even more dramatic in their heads.

The monsters came close and soon, they collided face on…

Seeing the imminent mass destruction, a protective shield appeared right set on the melee player!

The three stood in front of the special forces melee player and behind the output, trapping the monsters with the the surrounding buildings.

The protective shield offset most of the damage and the moment the shield broke, the monster’s bite also fell.

However, at the same time…

Brush brush brush-

Three healing rays, in turn, fell on top of the melee player’s head, one after another.

Each time the healing glow appeared, the almost-depleted health bar would be filled up. After the process was repeated thrice and enough time had been bought for the output player, almost all the monsters were wiped out.

“!”

Split-second healing!?

Does Xiang Yi actually know this?!

It was a process for replenishing the health bar, which had high technical requirements. It required the precise insertion of healing sessions at intervals while taking a series of damaging blows.

A second too early and it would be a waste because the teammate to be healed would still have a full of health bar.

A second too late and the teammate might get killed in a second by the enemy. It would simply be too late to save them.

Hence, the healer would have to have a good mastery of the cooldown time and a good sense of the treatment rhythm.

She had to be quick with her hands too.

Without the precise speed, it would be impossible to achieve the best result.

However, Xiang Yi managed to do it!

Most of the livestream viewers didn’t know how to play the game but they vaguely felt that Xiang Yi seemed to be quite impressive in this round.

——[Wow, it feels like Xiang Yi is good at replenishing her teammate’s health bar]

——[Why do I feel that she seems to know how to play?]

–[Xiang Yi just got lucky to have replenished the health bar at the right intervals]

…

Some gaming fans didn’t want to accept this reality because, in their opinion, these were just some regular operations.

—— [That’s not a big deal. I can do that with my feet!]

—— [A healer only has a few skills to master. She just needs to press the buttons one by one!]

——[Isn’t this a very common operation? The majority of guys can do it. You guys are just praising her because she’s a girl, aren’t you?]

…

The game continues.

The adventure team explored into the depths of the city, and along the way, they would trigger random tasks and various battles from time to time. Apart from monsters, there were also rebels hidden in various corners of the city who would also launch a sneak attack on the adventure team.

The thrilling battles made them feel on edge.

It was way too difficult.

Ordinary people would have long died countless times.

However, even till now, everyone’s health bar was still full, except for Xiang Yi who acted as the healer!

Bang!

With the sound of gunfire, the squad was forced to split up. Xiang Yi, the healer, was blocked in an alleyway…

….

chapters.title: Chapter 610 - Impressive Xiang Yi (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 610 - Impressive Xiang Yi (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The battle situation became tense all of a sudden.

Long-range melee mages can still rely on positioning and violent output to barely resist, but if the healer was stuck in an alley, he or she was basically dead meat.

There was a lot of cynicism and sarcastic remarks from the viewers of the livestream.

The cameraman gave a close-up shot of Xiang Yi’s fair, delicate, and completely flawless face. She looked calm and composed, and did not seem to be bothered by the helpless plight she was in.

In the game, the weak healer was facing three enemies.

The only fortunate thing was that those three enemies were special forces characters who could only use pistols and daggers.

“Bang Bang-”

All the gunshots missed.

Perhaps in reality, no one can dodge bullets, but a game is a game after all. Xiang Yi relied on positioning and actually dodged the enemy’s attack in this extremely small space!

Someone exclaimed in the pop-up comment: [Is this… the Godly Position?]

The Godly Position was the positioning that propelled Smog (Xiang Yu) to fame. His positioning was changeable and unpredictable. So far, it had given countless opponents a headache.

Later on, many players in the league tried to imitate him but most of them did not manage to grasp the essence of it.

It was because this positioning not only required one’s hands to be fast, their brain also had to be quick!

In other words, not only did they have to move their hands quickly, they had to think quickly too!

However, Xiang Yi, actually used it!

There was a small uproar in the livestream comments’ section:

——[Xiang Yi is quite skillful!]

——[Damn it, with that talent of hers, it’s such a shame that she’s not an e-sports player!]

——[I’m f**king shocked. When I was in a youth training camp for a few months, I almost puked from practicing this positioning countless times. Yet, someone managed to do it so easily..]

…

The gaming fans who just started criticizing, were completely speechless at this point too.

‘No, why are you hiding your talent?’

‘So a woman can casually use the Godly Positioning?’

Something that left them dumbfounded happened again.

The enemy had already run out of ammo so they all pulled out their short knifes and approached the healer from several different angles.

Xiang Yi pressed a button on the controller and whipped out a dagger, which was the only weapon that she could carry.

The lethality of the dagger was the smallest in the “Lost City”. For example, one can kill a person with five strokes of a short knife while a dagger may require ten or more.

Hence, in this game, it was extremely difficult for a healer to kill others and thus, they can only focus on providing support.

However…

Xiang Yi showed what a melee healer was!

The young woman remained calm and steady, maneuvering the healer in the game to move forward and backward, turning and moving, striking the enemy accurately with each blow!

The smooth operation was like an artistic feast for the eyes.

The aesthetics of violence was vividly and perfectly interpreted in this moment.

“Swish!”

One person fell to the ground.

The battle turned into a 1 VS 2 one.

“Swish swish!”

The second enemy was also seriously injured and could not fight anymore.

At this moment, the healer’s health bar had also been depleted. Just when the crowd thought they were in a hopeless situation, Xiang Yi didn’t panic and treated herself with a few healing skills.

The green healing holy light flashed and everyone could sense the desperation of the game players across the screen.

‘Damn it, why are the health bars getting replenished?’

Xiang Yi, whose health bar was full, leisurely counter-killed the third enemy.

After putting away the dagger swiftly and picking up the battle spoils, she headed towards the spots where her teammates were.

“There you go, the stuff I just picked up.” Xiang Yi calmly distributed them according to their needs.

Xiang Yi’s brothers were speechless.

[What does it feel like to get a large bunch of spoils from your sister whom you failed to save in time?]

The viewers, on the other hand, were completely convinced and began typing comments on the screen.

[Xiang Yi is really impressive!!!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 611 - What A Hot-Tempered Fatty
chapters.body:
Chapter 611 - What A Hot-Tempered Fatty

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

With mixed feelings, Xiang Yi’s brothers accepted the equipment that she gave them and continued playing the game.

Even Hell mode cannot stop a professional player and a godly player who’s pretending to be a newbie.

The big “Game Over!” bubble popped up, and the few of them were left lusting for more.

“This is awesome.” Wander lamented, “Xiang Yi, have you considered becoming a professional e-sports player?”

From his professional point of view, there was absolutely no problem with Xiang Yi’s operation. Although her age of twenty was considered a little too old to e getting started in e-sports, it was absolutely not an issue.

Wander saw her talent and potential but he didn’t expect that his suggestion would spark such a huge uproar in the livestream comment section.

Xiang Yi’s fans were naturally laughing and praising her but the gaming fans who had just been priven wrong were eagerly trying to defend the so-called “glory” of the gaming community.

——[She’s just a woman. No matter how impressive she may be, she’s still just a woman]

——[Not to mention the local gaming industry. Even in the worldwide gaming industry, there are very few female professional e-sports players]

——[It’s not that we look down on women, but women are just not suitable for e-sports, just like how they’re not suitable for science]

—— [The best elites of every industry are all men. If women are really that good, why isn’t there a female player in the top local e-sports team?]

…

When it comes to sensitive topics like gender, the netizens suddenly started arguing.

The response from Xiang Yi, however, made people want to pat their thighs and marvel.

“Wander, are you interested in farming?”

Wander was stunned for a moment but he soon laughed and asked, “Xiang Yi, are you trying to poach me? I usually charge high rates but since it’s you, I can charge you a friendly rate.”

Xiang Yi said, “Okay, okay, if you poach me, I’ll give you a 1% discount.”

The conversation between the two people showed their emotional intelligence.

Both of them turned each other down politely and jokingly.

The textbook way of response is a masterpiece.

Not far away, Shi Sui heard his words and lowered his eyes with a slight smirk as he scratched Xiao Naofu’s jaws.

Xiao Naofu nibbled his fingertips and stained them with its saliva but it didn’t use any force.

The kitten had slowly and unknowingly accepted Shi Sui but it just refused to admit it.

Shi Sui said, “Little fatty, you’re quite hot-tempered.”

Xiao Naofu: ???

‘You’re the one who’s fat! You are the one!!!’

…

Wander saw the others jumping at the chance to play, so he passed the controller to his teammates and let them continue to play, while he and Xiang Yi discussed the operation.

Although she didn’t play many games, she had a clear and logical mind, and a knack for tactical use.

After talking to her for a while, Wander felt that he benefited a lot and sighed. “It’s really different to see things from another perspective.”

He started out as a melee player, so even after he became a commander, he still couldn’t help but think from the perspective of a melee player.

Xiang Yi, on the other hand, was thinking from the perspective of a healer and auxiliary character.

“Why would you play as a support player, Xiang Yi? Won’t you feel aggrieved? Generally, regardless of the game, the first to die is the auxiliary player.”

Xiang Yi replied simply, “Nothing, some people like to be the hero, and I think it’s good to be the one who claps for the hero.”

This answer left Wander stunned.

After a long time, he sighed softly.

He then said self-deprecatingly and “In fact, my wish as a child, is to become a scavenger. At that time, I didn’t know anything and I felt that being a scavenger would give me a lot of freedom… Now that I think of it, it’s really quite ridiculous. After all, other children wish to be astronauts and scientists or something…”

Xiang Yi shook her head and said in a sincere tone of voice, “No, I think every profession and every choice deserves to be respected.”

chapters.title: Chapter 612 - Joint Consultation (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 612 - Joint Consultation (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The stunned Wander stared at her in a daze.

For some reason, Xiang Yi seemed very trustworthy, which was why he subconsciously revealed what he was thinking.

In the beginning, he had merely jokingly revealed his childhood wish to become a scavenger. If it were someone else, they would probably mock him for it or be disdainful but Xiang Yi…

She was very serious.

She may not be the best at expressing herself but she was really the most gentle listener.

No matter how much nonsense anyone says to Xiang Yi, who was far more knowledgeable than ordinary people, she would definitely listen carefully and give her response.

Wander suddenly understood why so many people liked Xiang Yi.

Only when you treat others sincerely, can you be treated with the same level of sincerity.

“Thank you, Xiang Yi.” Seemingly relieved all of a sudden, Wander became much more relaxed. “I regret the choice I didn’t make, but I’m also happy with the choice I made.”

He didn’t regret becoming an e-sports player at all.

Although it was tiring and tough, he felt that it was worth it regardless of how tired he was because it was something he loved and was passionate about.

Xiang Yi smiled and said, “Congratulations for being able to do what you like.”

Wander scratched his head and said, “Actually, I’m ready to retire.”

When he said that, his coaches at the base wanted to vomit blood.

They had a premonition that a ruckus would definitely be kicked up in the club because of Wander’s words!

Besides Xiang Yu, Logic’s most commercially valuable player was Wander!

Hearing the word “retire”, his teammates looked over in unison.

Even Xiang Yu, who was usually the most aloof, was frowning now.

“I’m getting older after all and my hand has an old ailment. I was young and frivolous in the past but during every competition now, the thing I’m most worried about…is being a burden to my teammates. I’m old.”

Wander once thought he would never confide in anyone about this but he had surprisingly said so much to Xiang Yi, whom he had just gotten to know recently.

Fate is really amazing.

“Captain…”

“You’re not old. Not at all!”

“You’re not dragging us down or being a burden! To me, you’ve always been the best!”

“…”

The boys spoke up anxiously in a bid to make Wander stay.

Xiang Yi pressed down her cap and asked, “Hey, who am I going to partner up with if you leave?”

Wander’s heart sank.

The two of them had been gaming partners for so many years that their friendship had developed into something more than just teammates and friends.

It’s not an exaggeration to say that they were just like brothers and family.

The livestream viewers were also immersed in a melancholic mood.

——[Wander is retiring? Please don’t, Master!]

——[Wow, I cried. E-sports players really have it too hard]

—— [If he doesn’t care for his team? How could he have such thoughts… Wander, sometimes I really hope you can be selfish and spare a thought for yourself. Put yourself first before thinking about others all the time]

…

There were many die-hard fans of Wander who were secretly wiping their tears in front of the screen, but Xiang Yi soon spoke in a warm and gentle voice.

“You have a hand injury? Do you mind if I take your pulse?”

Everyone was speechless.

Wander was also confused for a while before responding, “Xiang Yi, I appreciate your goodwill, but even the best physiotherapists from abroad have said that there’s no way for my hand to be cured…”

However, someone did tell him that a few of the top Chinese medical professionals in the country may be able to help him.

However, he knew it wouldn’t be that easy to get his help.

Xiang Yi said, “Why don’t I give it a try?”

Seeing Xiang Yi’s insistence, Wander laughed bitterly and could not bear to turned her down, so he extended his wrist….

chapters.title: Chapter 613 - Joint Consultation (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 613 - Joint Consultation (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The girl rested her fair fingers precisely and unmistakably on his pulse.

She took a longer time to take her pulse this time than anytime else.

the initially expressionless Xiang Yi began to frown with a sullen expression on her face.

The hearts of the viewers watching the live broadcast were also lifted.

—— [How is it? Can it still be saved?]

—— [Xiang Yi is so young. Are her medical skills reliable?]

——[Oh please, Wander is an e-sports player and his hands are precious. Can this woman stop messing around?]

…

Ten minutes later…

After asking and observing for a while, Xiang Yi said, “Your injury is caused by long-term excessive use because of your occupation. I’ve thought of a few treatment plans but I’m afraid you have to wait a little while because I have to ask someone for help…”

Wander had no hope for his own hand, and was already grateful to hear Xiang Yi’s words. “Thank you, really. It’s okay, you don’t have to force yourself, Xiang Yi.”

He thought that Xiang Yi was just trying to give herself an out in a polite manner but to his surprise, in the next second…

Xiang Yi called her grandfather.

Wander was dumbfounded.

‘Can… can she ask him about it on the spot!?’

The phone rang a few times before the call was picked up.

“Ahem, now you know to call me, huh?” Xiang Yin’s tone was quite fierce, with the ancestral style arrogance of the Xiang family. “Tell me what medical questions do you want to ask.”

Xiang Yi asked, “Huh? Grandpa, are you watching my livestream? I heard Grandma say that you often watch…”

Xiang Yin’s voice cracked as he denied, “No way!”

After a pause, he squirmed. “Not often, I just watch it occasionally.”

On the other end of the phone, Xiang Yi’s grandmother snickered and said, “Bunny, don’t listen to his nonsense. He watches your livestream whenever he has free time! If he misses the livestream, he will watch the replay. God knows how many times he has watched it!”

Xiang Yin, who had just been exposed and put to shame, was speechless.

Even though they were only speaking over the phone, the old man still turned his face away.

Xiang Yi grinned, feeling blissful to be silently cared for by her family.

Since her patient was the most important, she cut straight to the chase and told him about Wander’s situation.

Xiang Yin was a little embarrassed at first but as he listened, he began to get distracted.

He thought about it quietly before saying, “I think all the options you mentioned are feasible, but they are not perfect.”

Xiang Yi proposed a few treatment plans that combined acupuncture, medicine, and medicinal food therapy. The young girl had more than enough variation in her medical skills, but due to the limitations of her age and experience, her plans were ultimately too underdeveloped compared to that of old and experienced Traditional Chinese medicine practitioners.

Xiang Yi asked coquettishly, “Grandpa, what should I do then? Can you teach me?”

As soon as Xiang Yi called him Grandpa, Xiang Yin grinned widely.

She sounded the sweetest.

Whenever his grandsons called him ‘Grandpa’, he would be really peeved. Meanwhile, Xiang Feng, whom he had conceived at a relatively old age, was probably silly.

“Hmph, do you think you I will help you out just because you called me Grandpa?”

Xiang Yin’s words made Wander’s heart sink to the abyss…

However, he smiled bitterly and comforted himself that no one was obliged to help him so he had no right to complain.

Some of the netizens were disappointed and displeased.

——[Ah, Grandpa Xiang looks so grumpy]

——[Grandpa, why are you like this? Why can’t you save Wander?]

——[Uwuuuu Wander is so pitiful. She gave him false hope and let him down]

…

The fans were in tears but they soon heard Xiang Yin’s next sentence.

“I’m telling you, you have to call me Grandpa twice at least!”

Wander was speechless.

So were his fans…

That’s it? That’s it ????

chapters.title: Chapter 614 - Joint Consultation (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 614 - Joint Consultation (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Everyone was confused on the spot.

‘What? Does arrogance run in your family!?’

—— [Hahahhaha this is hilarious. Is it the Xiang family’s obsession to get Xiang Yi to ask Brother to call him Brother?]

–[Grandpa Xiang is too cute! I thought he would ask her to do something difficult but I didn’t expect her to want to call him Grandpa twice!]

——[But my concern is, what level is Grandpa’s Traditional Chinese medicine skills at? Can he cure Wander’s hand? Don’t bite off more than you can chew!]

——[Is your brain unevolved? I suggest you search the name ‘Xiang Yin’ / Doghead]

…

Soon, the livestream comments were full of exclamation marks!!!

——[Damn it?]

——[Damn!]

——[One of the top ten contemporary Chinese medicine doctors in China. He has a pair of incredible hands… So Xiang Yi’s grandfather is such a big shot?!!]

…

The netizens’ jaws dropped in shock!

The main thing was that Xiang Yin had made several appearances during the livestream, but he kept a rather low profile and his behavior was comical, so the crowd felt that he was the nice grandpa next door who was actually very fun to be around.

They did hear Xiang Yi mentioning that she had learned about Traditional Chinese medicine from her grandfather since she was a child but their perception of the Xiang Yin’s medical skills was akin to that of old Traditional Chinese medicine practitioners who operated roadside clinics…

Who would have thought that he was such a skilled Traditional Chinese medicine practitioner?!

Gaming base.

Logic’s coaches also searched for Grandpa Xiang’s true identity, and they were all dumbfounded.

After a long silence…

The main coach muttered, “What kind of luck is shining on Wander…”

The chances of visiting Xiang Yi’s home and running into a godly medical expert are simply lower than winning 5 million yuan in a lottery ticket!

In the beginning, the coach these kids a day off to get some rest, and there was quite a bit of discussion among the coaches when they participated in “Two Under One Roof”.

However, now they felt that…

It was a good thing for them to participate!

…

In the manor.

Xiang Yin cleared his throat and generously made several suggestions, all to help Xiang Yi improve her treatment plan for Wander.

The young girl listened carefully and took notes with a pen and paper.

Xiang Yin was getting parched but he still found it a thrill so he said directly, “Wait a minute, I will go over now!”

After saying that, Xiang Yin hung up the phone directly.

At this moment, Wander just happened to read the contents of Xiang Yin’s profile description on Wikipedia, which his teammate had sent to him. It left him in a trance.

The country’s leading TCM doctor, an existence that even many powerful business tycoons could not solicit, was now coming over to treat his hand?

‘Am I really not dreaming?’

Xiang Yu whispered, “Why didn’t you tell us about your hand injury earlier? Is it interesting to hide it from us?”

Wander said, “I didn’t want to cause you any trouble… And I didn’t know your grandfather is such an incredible doctor.”

Xiao Yang said naively, “Yeah, otherwise Brother Smog could have asked Grandpa to come over to treat the captain.”

Wander suddenly asked, “Could you have… invited him?”

Xiang Yu: “…”

It was uncertain.

‘Grandpa will do Xiang Yi a favor but he might give me two slaps on the face.’

…

Time passed, minute by minute.

After they had been waiting for a long time, Xiang Yin still hadn’t arrived.

Some impatient viewers in the studio couldn’t help themselves.

——[Why isn’t he coming? It’s not just a joke, right?

——[If he’s intentionally trying to make Wander desperate, I’ll kill Xiang Yi!]

—— [Hah, it might just be lip service for a better reputation. He might not come at all! It’s all for hype and attention! Dismiss!]

chapters.title: Chapter 615 - Joint Consultation (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 615 - Joint Consultation (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

Even though the Spicy Rabbits joined forces to defend Xiang Yi, there were still more and more doubts.

In particular, the few extreme fans of Wander who initially herd that he was going to retire because of his injury, almost lost control of their emotions. Now that Xiang Yin was late, he vented all his discontent and displeasure on Xiang Yi.

——[Bitch, if you can’t cure Wander, I’ll teach you a hard lesson!]

—— [If Wander retires, you’re the first person I’ll slam on the Internet!]

——[Why don’t you treat your crippled grandfather if you’re really proficient in medical skills?]

…

There were some comments that were even worse but they were censored with asterisks as soon as they were typed out.

The comment section were full of malicious remarks. Not to mention the Spicy Rabbits, even the passersby couldn’t tolerate it anymore.

A netizen who saw it felt unjust for Xiang Yi and spoke up on her behalf but he was rebutted by those extreme fans immediately.

—— [Trying to clear her reputation? Try again!]

—— [Are you guys fools to be a fan of such women?]

—— [I bet those treatment plans are all fake! That old man is just keeping up with the act with her! Such good actors!]

…

At this moment, a staff member raised his voice and said.

“He’s here, he’s here! Mr. Xiang and his friends are here!!!”

He saw the comments in the livestream, which was why he deliberately yelled so loudly.

As soon as he said that, the comments in the live room obviously decreased.

The camera panned to the main entrance and several cars were seen driving in slowly.

The netizens were a little confused as to why there were so many cars.

‘Could it be that Xiang Yi’s grandfather has a special status so he has more assistants and bodyguards?’

The extreme fans refused to let go of every opportunity to criticize them. [Hah, what a grand and pompous appearance. He’s just a Traditional Chinese doctor. Who knows if he’s putting his reputation on the line? Why does he have to put on airs like a celebrity?]

…

Xiang Yi was the first to rush out of the room and she scurried towards the grandfather’s car.

Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji followed behind them.

However, Xiao Naofu was lazy and had short legs. It was shaking up and down while laying on the Shiba Inu, Little Xiji.

The cat and the dog seemed to have gained sentience in the eyes of netizens.

…

The door of the car opened.

Xiang Yin wasn’t that particular. He didn’t ask the chauffeur to come over to open the door and instead, got out of the car.

The old man’s mouth was wide open when he saw Xiang Yi running over like a bright spring light. When Xiang was about to reach him, he was stern again.

“What are you doing running so fast? Are you not afraid of falling!?!”

Xiang Yi was running very quickly and her breathing was messed up. She supported herself against her knees and she was still smiling even though her grandfather was reprimanding her.

“When I was little, Grandpa always picked me up at the door, now that I’ve grown up, I have to pick up Grandpa too!”

The old man was obviously pleased by this statement. He stroked his beard and looked at the sky, pretending not to be bothered. However, he was actually long overjoyed.

“Your grandmother had to go to the square dance competition today. She hasn’t come over yet.” Xiang Yin glanced at the cars behind him and said with displeasure, “Those old men just insisted on coming. How annoying.”

“Huh?”

Like Xiang Yi, the netizens were also curious about who the “annoying old men” Xiang Yin was talking about.

The few old men got out of the car one after another. They were all people whom Xiang Yi was familiar with.

“Grandpa Fang, Grandpa Yun, Grandpa Jing…”

They were the top Traditional Chinese medicine experts that had previously taken her in as their disciple!

Old Master Fang, chairman of the Traditional Chinese Medicine Association!

Old Master Yun, successor of Hui Chun Tang Medical Hall!

Old Master Jing, the master of Ji Shi Tang Medicinal Hall!

Some netizens who recognized them and knew of their identities immediately sat up straight!

The four of them were considered top traffic-drivers of the entertainment industry.

—— [Damn! The most impressive Traditional Chinese medicine team from China is here!?!]

….

chapters.title: Chapter 616 - Bootlicking
chapters.body:
Chapter 616 - Bootlicking

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The netizens were utterly shocked.

In particular, those who studied medicine felt like their zealous souls were about to burst into flames.

It was no exaggeration to say that even the richest man in the city may not be able to invite these four people at the same time.

However, they actually gathered here for Xiang Yi today!

‘This is wonderful!’

Hearing Xiang Yi’s yelling, Old Master Fang and the other two glanced at her, each with a look of discontent.

“What did you call me? Grandpa?”

“Good disciple, just call me Master.”

“My dear disciple, you don’t need to pay attention to those two old men. Just call me Master!”

“…”

Caught between laughter and tears, Xiang Yi obediently greeted her masters.

Seeing that his little granddaughter only cared about talking to those three old men and had left him out, Xiang Yin muttered softly, “Since I’m not welcome here, I’d better go!”

Xiang Yi hurriedly coaxed him, sweetly and softly calling him ‘Grandpa’. She even promised to make the old man’s favorite drunken crab, so he forgave her “reluctantly”.

Old Master Fang and the other two old men at the side watched enviously.

‘Ah, if we had not blocked Xiang Yin because he was always showing off his granddaughter, maybe we would have gotten an apprentice a long time ago!’

It was really too late to regret now!

After exchanging pleasantries, the four of them entered the living room. Jokes aside, they didn’t forget about business.

“Where is the patient?” Old Master Fang was the first to speak.

When Wander saw these esteemed and respectable old men, his legs went a little limp and he raised his hand weakly. “It’s me.”

Four sharp, lightning-like gazes darted at him abruptly.

In turn, he finished taking Wander’s pulse and diagnosing him.

Old Master Fang stroked his beard, pondered for a moment, and looked at Xiang Yi. “Disciple, tell me the treatment plan you thought of.”

Xiang Yi elaborated seriously.

The few of them frowned and nodded from time to time, making the netizens panic.

——[Can it be cured or not!? Give me a final answer!]

—— [Xiang Yi is really amusing. Is she going to reveal the treatment plan just because she was asked to? Isn’t this just a pretense?]

——[You guys don’t really think that Old Master Fang and the others took her as their disciple because of her medical skills, do you? They’re just doing it out of courtesy to Xiang Yin!]

…

In the living room.

After Xiang Yi finished, she humbly asked for advice, “My treatment plan is still lacking in many aspects, so I would like to ask the masters to give me advice.”

The more knowledgeable people are, the more ignorant they tend to feel.

That was the case with Xiang Yi.

Old Master Fang and the others looked at each other with smiles on their faces.

Regardless of her medical skills, they liked Xiang Yi’s attitude.

She was neither arrogant nor impatient, and was also determined to learn. Moreover, her natural talent and strength could already be considered to be at the level of a junior prodigy doctor.

“These few treatment plans…” Elder Fang deliberately kept them in suspense before making a shocking statement. “Are better than your grandfather’s!”

Xiang Yi’s grandfather was speechless!

“Nonsense…”

“Hey, Old Xiang, don’t be in a hurry to refute just yet.” Elder Yun smiled and stroked his beard in a somewhat ethereal manner. “Let me ask you a question first. Is it harder to write an article, or to edit an article?”

Xiang Yin couldn’t tell what he meant, so he humphed and ignored him.

Old Master Yun was not annoyed and said leisurely, “Naturally, it’s editing an article. Likewise, your medical skills must be more than enough for editing my beloved disciple’s treatment plan. Can you come up with these?”

Old Master Jing took over and chimed in, “Admit it, the world belongs to young people now! My good disciple can take over from us old men!”

Everyone was speechless.

Are you guys here to treat Wander or to curry favor with Xiang Yi!?!

chapters.title: Chapter 617 - Introducing, My Boyfriend
chapters.body:
Chapter 617 - Introducing, My Boyfriend

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The netizens’ feelings were even more complicated.

They thought Old Mr. Fang and others would criticize Xiang Yi’s treatment plan, but unexpectedly, they all started by praising her!

They were even more like her grandfather than Grandpa Xiang!

As for those who criticized Xiang Yi, they were dumbfounded.

‘Isn’t Xiang Yi a second-generation doctor who relies on her grandfather’s reputation as a famous doctor? How come Old Mr. Fang and the others are sucking up to her and putting her on such a high pedestal?’

‘Does she really have talent and true medical skills!?!’

Although Xiang Yin had been insulted, he was smiling very brightly.

He just loved it when others praised Xiang Yi.

Besides, Xiang Yi really deserved the compliments. As her grandfather, he had always been proud of Xiang Yi.

Of course, praises aside, the three Traditional Chinese medicine bigwigs began to help Xiang Yi perfect the treatment plans.

“Regarding the acupuncture treatment plan, there are two acupuncture points that can be adjusted…”

“The herbs in this medicinal dish can be replaced with warm and nourishing ones, but we also need to be careful not to pick those that are overly-nourishing. Otherwise, he won’t be able to tolerate the nourishing because of his deficiency…”

“For the formula, I think we can try the method of treating poison with poison. This kid is a gamer, isn’t he? The sooner we get him treated, the sooner he can start playing the computer.”

Wander tried to explain, “Grandpa Jing, I’m an e-sports player…”

“E-sports or whatever! Aren’t they just some games!?!”

“… Yes, yes, yes.”

Wander smiled sarcastically. Over the years, he had met a lot of people who were biased against the gaming industry, so he had long been used to it.

He no longer cared about their comments. It would be too tiring to prove himself to every single person.

Some of his extreme fans began to snap back and lash out at Old Master Jing in the livestream.

—— [What the hell does the old man know?]

——[Discriminating against e-sports? Garbage]

——[This old man doesn’t know anything and he’s still talking nonsense. Ridiculous!]

There was a clamor in the comment section but Xiang Yi began to speak in a warm and gentle tone of voice.

“Master, e-sports and playing video games are not the same. E-sports is the use of electronic devices as sports equipment, which is a sport that involves a competition of human intellect. It’s similar to games like Go and chess. The General Administration of Sports has officially approved the inclusion of e-sports as an official sports competition.”

“Wander and his teammates, who recently won the world championship, are competing for our country’s glory, just like other athletes.”

Wander’s heart was warmed up by her words.

It turned out that this was the feeling of being gently defended…

Old Master Jing came to a sudden realization. “So that’s how it is.”

Old Master Yun said, “That sounds like a very impressive profession.”

Old Master Fang smiled and said, “Then it seems we have to treat this champion player’s hand well!”

Wander was somewhat flattered and he looked at Xiang Yi with gratitude in his eyes.

She didn’t have to say that at all but she still spoke up to explain for him.

It was proper and just right.

Old Mr. Xiang criticized, “What are you guys pretending for? You just don’t know anything about it!”

Old Master Fang said smilingly, “Do you know anything about it?”

Xiang Yi’s grandfather was speechless!

Of course, he did not know anything about it either.

However, Old Master Xiang didn’t sound self-righteous or confident at all. “Xiang Yi knows! She’ll tell me about everything that I don’t know! I can’t help it that there’s someone who will answer all my questions and explain everything to me~~”

Xiang Yin sounded really smug, like a preschooler showing off his toys, leaving Old Master Fang and the others green with envy.

‘What a great disciple. If only I had taken her in a few years earlier!!’

Xiang Yi blinked and said, “How about this?I’ll create a chat group and you guys can ask me any questions that you may have about shopping online, internet slang, etc, in that group.”

After the group was established, Xiang Yi added everyone including Shi Sui.

“Introducing, my boyfriend.”

The lively livestream comment section fell dead silent for a second.

chapters.title: Chapter 618 - Official Announcement (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 618 - Official Announcement (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

‘Wh…what?’

‘Did we mishear? Did Xiang Yi say the word “boyfriend”!?!’

——[Shocking! Xiang Yi has a boyfriend!?]

—— [I’m curious about who her boyfriend is!]

——[Hahaha Grandpa Xiang’s face turned pale in a second. I feel like he’s going to hit someone with his cane!]

…

Shi Sui happened to go to the pantry to make tea and was not in the living room.

He used his real name for his WeChat account and after being added to the group, his username was extremely striking in the eyes of Grandpa Xiang and others.

Old Mr. Fang and the others were not too bad. Although they found it a pity, they were happy for Xiang Yi.

However, it was different for Xiang Yin.

‘Why did Xiang Yi shortchange herself and raise a pig!?’

‘What’s so good about Shi Sui? There are so many problems with him, like…’ Xiang Yin thought about it for a long time but he still couldn’t think of any shortcomings or flaws that Shi Sui had. Instead, he felt that he had been mild-mannered, refined, self-restraint, and polite since he was a child…

Stop!

Xiang Yin stopped letting those messy thoughts run through his mind and instead gritted his teeth before chiding, “Bunny, how can you get into a relationship at such a young age!?!”

Xiang Yi said with a look of innocence, “Grandpa, I’m 20 years old…”

“That’s still too young!”

“…” She pursed her lips and said, “But when you were 20 years old, you were married to Grandma…”

Xiang Yin coughed.

The atmosphere was suddenly awkward.

At this time, Shi Sui returned with tea. The steam wafted up into the air while the faint fragrance spread around.

Xiang Yin humphed coldly when he saw him.

Old Master Fang and the others grinned while sizing him up.

Shi Sui did not bring his phone with him and still did not know what happened yet. After distributing the tea, he naturally sat next to Xiang Yi.

“What’s wrong?” He asked.

Xiang Yi blinked and said, “I just… added my boyfriend to the chat group.”

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows while his heart skipped a beat.

Those words were extremely ambiguous but there were already fans of the UntimelyCouple who were screaming in the pop-up comments.

——[Damn it, so they’re really dating!?!]

——[Boyfriend!!! Is it Shi Sui?! Is it???]

—— [Ahhhh, I don’t care, I don’t care. This is an official announcement!]

…

There were some who weren’t willing to believe it and instead, started sneering.

——[Has Xiang Yi got any shame at all? She already has a boyfriend an she’s still talking to Shi Sui like this?]

—— [Shi Sui isn’t a good person either. Hah, men. Indeed, they accept any women who throw themselves at them. Doesn’t he think that Xiang Yi is filthy?]

—— [Haven’t you heard of a drama couple? When filming, they’re together but once they’re done, they’ll break up immediately. These two are obviously a variety show couple! The day this variety show ends, it must be the day that they sever ties with each other!]

…

Everyone started analyzing in the comments, as if they were all psychology and relationship experts.

Until…

Shi Sui’s low and alluring voice spread through the receiver and resounded in every corner of the livestream.

“What chat group? Girlfriend.”

Boom !!!!

It was as if there was a deafening thunderclap!

‘What did Shi Sui say?’

‘Are we hallucinating? Why did we hear him calling Xiang Yi his girlfriend??’

At this moment, be it the Shisui Sisters, the Spicy Rabbits, the fans of the UntimelyCouple, or ordinary passersby, were all shocked!

The piece of news was shared by countless netizens on all major social media platforms.

The livestream of “Two Under One Roof” immediately gained a surge in traffic, with the number of online viewers reaching the last record high, and even showing signs of surpassing it!

Li Jianyu and others were dumbfounded.

Wander and others were dumbstruck.

There was an uproar in the comments in the livestream.

On the one hand, some gossipy netizens rushed over.

The entire Internet had gone mad at this moment!!!

….

chapters.title: Chapter 619 - Official Announcement (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 619 - Official Announcement (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

——[Damn, did you hear about the official announcement of Shi Sui and Xiang Yi being in a relationship!?!]

——[Nani Nani? Shi Sui and Xiang Yi are dating!?!]

——[I was dumbfounded, are those two really dating and not just hyping their relationship up as a publicity stunt?!]

—— [Oh my God! It’s real!! Ahhhh—]

…

The number of people watching the livestream went from 8 million to 9 million, and then 10 million…

Whoosh!

The number of viewers officially exceeded the 10 million mark with the tendency of further increasing!

The figure made countless directors and investors of the industry really tempted!

The executives of the brands that sponsored “Two Under One Roof” and engaged Xiang Yi to be their spokesperson were all grinning widely!

‘What a nice program. Not only is the traffic stable, it comes with the potential of being on the hot search list. It’s really worth it!’

The brands wished they could give more money to the show!

…

In the living room.

When Shi Sui asked the question ‘What group, Girlfriend?’ Xiang Yi openly showed it to him.

“There you go. I also added Grandpa and my masters.”

Shi Sui nodded and said, “Let me edit the group title.”

He changed it to “Loving Family”.

The camera had just given a close-up of her phone, and snapped a photo of the group name.

The netizens expressed their opinion one after another.

——[What are you doing? Is Xiang Yi spying on my life?]

——[Hahahaha, our family also has this group name! It’s exactly the same!]

—— [I love my family. I request to go to war!]

——[The Xiang’s will never admit defeat!]

——[A loving family! Shi Sui and Xiang Yi’s children are already grown up!]

…

The next second, Shi Sui, who had changed the name of the chat group, sent a text message.

[Shi Sui]: Rose *handshake* *fist*

[Shi Sui]: Cheers to our friendship .jpg

[Shi Sui]: A thread of the network, cherish this fate.jpg

When the netizens saw that scene, almost everyone slowly sent a question mark.

‘Shi Sui, are you blinking after your account was hacked?’

‘ What the hell is this middle-aged and elderly style of painting?’

To everyone’s surprise, Old Mr. Fang and the rest developed a strong interest in Shi Sui.

“Hey Shi Sui, how did you post this picture?”

“Shi Sui, it seems you are good at chatting!”

“Not bad, not bad, I think this kid, Shi Sui, is very good!”

Listening to the compliments of the three Chinese medicine masters, the crowd was in a kind of trance.

‘Ah… is this the legendary aura of being likable to others!?’

Shi Sui spoke warmly about how to save sticker packs. He was very patient and not only did he speak carefully, he also helped each of the old masters save the sticker packs before showing them how to send them right on the spot.

Even the most arrogant Xiang Yin, could not help but sneak a few glances. He secretly thought about it in his head.

… As long as he learned it, he could go back to Grandma Xiang to show off!

She accidentally met Shi Sui’s eyes while Xiang Yin somehow felt guilty. He began to cough uneasily.

Shi Sui asked humbly and warmly, “Grandpa, can I help you save a sticker pack?”

Xiang Yin’s ears twitched, but he still sounded extremely fierce. “I don’t need it!”

Shi Sui said, “Yes, yes, yes, it’s not that you need it, it’s that I want to train myself more. In fact, I only learned how to send sticker packs recently.”

“Oh?” Grandpa Xiang looked at him from sideways. “So you don’t know how to do that either?”

“Yes.” Shi Sui smiled, feeling a little embarrassed, as if he had just learned how to surf the internet.

Only then did Xiang Yin say benevolently, “Okay, since you’re begging me to save it, I’ll agree to it!”

chapters.title: Chapter 620 - Official Announcement (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 620 - Official Announcement (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Shi Sui looked down and tapped the screen with his bony fingers to save the sticker pack for Xiang Yin.

He whispered to Xiang Yin and taught him how to use it.

The man’s logic was clear and well-organized, and the old man gradually got immersed.

In the livestream, the netizens began clamoring in unison.

—— [Wow, Shi Sui is so good at this!]

—— [Pretentious Shi Sui: Ah, I can’t help it that I’m just so popular and well-liked by elders.]

—— [To be fair, Shi Sui did a good job at explaining! I’ve already taken a screen recording and I’m going to send it to my family’s chat group]

…

After a while.

Xiang Yin and the others had all learned how to send stickers.

The four people in the group began to compete in sending stickers. They were a few hundred years old and were staring at the screen with full attention. They were so serious that it seemed amusing.

On the other hand, Shi Sui looked at Xiang Yi with his lips slightly curled.

Finally.

‘She’s given me a proper status.’

The two of them had a tacit understanding of each other’s feelings when they made eye contact with each other.

The system’s cheerful prompt sounded in his mind.

“Ding… The system has detected that you have completed the hidden task [Official Announcement]and the following rewards have been issued to you: 1000 points, [change plot card] X1”

Xiang Yi frowned and asked, “Change plot card?”

“Yes, you can choose to change the plot of any of the characters in this book. In other words, you can change a person’s fate!”

Such a card was so tempting that others probably wouldn’t be able to resist it and would immediately put it to use.

However, Xiang Yi merely assented indifferently. “Just keep it.”

No. 1018 couldn’t help but ask, “Host, won’t you consider using it? You can not only change the fate of others, but also your own!”

“Why would I want to change my fate?” Xiang Yi said indifferently, “I don’t believe in fate, I only believe in myself.”

No. 1018: “… Because in the book ‘King of Showbiz’, your ending wasn’t good.”

“Is that so?”

System 1018: “You didn’t have that access at first, but I got it for you! I will unlock your destiny script for you next…”

With a “ding”, a large chunk of information surged into Xiang Yi’s brain.

In the plot sent by the system, she followed her life path and got engaged to someone, only to be betrayed miserably and have her family destroyed by her fiancé.

Seeing the ending of her brothers dying in a fire because of her, Xiang Yi’s fingertips curled up and she trembled slightly.

However, she quickly calmed down.

‘This can’t be true.’

Even if she was overwhelmed by love, her brothers would not be that stupid.

There must be something wrong with this so-called “original”!

She asked calmly, “So I have to win Shi Sui’s heart in order to rewrite my own destiny?”

“That’s right! Shi Sui has an advantage because he’s the protagonist of this world. The world will be unconditionally biased towards him!”

Xiang Yi looked at Shi Sui and thought about it.

Even if the systems had human-like minds, they were not real people after all and instead had an algorithm-based logic.

Hence, their motives can be speculated by following the right track.

The clues began to gradually be pieced together.

Binding System, conquering Shi Sui, rewriting destiny…

All of this is related to Shi Sui.

Perhaps, the system was not targeting her but…

Shi Sui.

System 1018 was still following the path and tempting her. “Host, do you really not consider using the card? The system recommends you [Beauty Filter], which can help you become more beautiful!”

“I don’t need it.” Xiang Yi rejected coldly. “I remember that you can give away points, right? Help me give it to Ling Ye.”

The noisy System No.. 1018 suddenly fell silent.

chapters.title: Chapter 621 - Comparison
chapters.body:
Chapter 621 - Comparison

Xiang Yi squinted and asked, “What? Is there a problem?”

After a few seconds, System No. 1018 said politely, “Host, the Ling Ye you’re referring to is someone from this world. You need to know the other person’s real name before you can gift points.”

In the next second, Xiang Yi said, “Su Ye.”

“!”

System No. 1018 was shocked.

It did not expect that Xiang Yi would know Ling Ye’s real name.

‘How could Ling Ye even tell her this?’

It quickly calculated the consequences of Xiang Yi finding out that Ling Ye had been erased.

After thinking about it, System No. 1018 chose to lie.

“Host, the gift has been successfully sent on your behalf.”

“Thank you, please hide the system.”

“…” ‘I’m being disliked again?’

…

After Xiang Yi finished the test, her mood became heavier.

The premise of giving away points was that the recipient’s soul must still be alive.

However, she was not sure if the system would lie or not.

“Xiang Yi, my hand really feels a lot better!” Wander’s surprised voice rang in her ears, pulling Xiang Yi back to reality.

She retracted her thoughts and looked at Wander’s hand.

Just now, Old Master Yun had given him a massage while Old Master Jing had inserted two needles into his arm. On the other hand, Old Master Fang wrapped a wrist guard containing medicinal herbs around his wrist. It would automatically heat up and warm his wrist.
