In just a moment, Wander already felt as if his wrist was healed!

Xiang Yi said softly, “This is just temporary relief and not treatment of the root problem. I reckon it’ll take a long time to heal it completely.”

Wander got nervous again, thinking he would hear three or five years or longer.

‘I’m afraid that his career won’t last much longer.’

The young girl pulled a long face and said earnestly, “You can achieve about 90% recovery within three months.”

Wander was flabbergasted.

The other players of the team were just as dumbfounded.

‘Only three months?!’

Seeing that they were all dumbstruck, Xiang Yi thought that it was because they felt that three months was too much time. She clenched her first and said, “I’ll try harder then. How about two months? I’m afraid it’ll be difficult… but we can try.”

Wander was overwhelmed by the feeling of bliss that suddenly fell upon him. It was as if he had drunk a kilogram of fake alcohol as he said, “It’s okay, it’s okay, three months is fine! I can do it! I’ll definitely cooperate!”

Old Master Fang was heartened.

Old Master Fang and the others were very relieved. What doctors dread and fear the most are not difficult and complicated diseases but the painstaking research that needs to be done before the treatment plan can be formulated.

“Young man, don’t worry, we will definitely do our best!”

Wander was flustered and thanked him repeatedly.

Xiang Yi looked at the time and realized that it was almost mealtime. She got up and said, “The original plan was to have hotpot. What does everyone think? Shall we have a vote? Or should we whip up a few dishes?”

It may seem like a hassle to others but she was more than willing to do it.

Everyone said, “No, no, hotpot is fine!”

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “In that case, I’ll make a few nine-grid hotpots, and prepare more ingredients, so everyone can cook the food that they prefer.”

She was about to go to the kitchen when she was stopped by Old Master Fang and the others.

Old Master Fang said, “Disciple, I’ve had someone boil some bird’s nest and send it here. You should have some here.”

Old Master Yun said, “My beloved disciple, it’s been really hard on you! Come on, I brought you some tonic so that you can have some for fun when you’re free.”

Old Master Jing scolded the two of them for secretly sending gifts before saying indignantly, “I also prepared some medicinal herbs for you. We can soak it in wine or add them into the medicine!”

All the netizens were confused and shocked. ‘Why do these old men…. look more and more like preschoolers who are competing with each other!?!’

chapters.title: Chapter 622 - Thank You For Finally Giving Me A Proper Status, Xiang Yi
chapters.body:
Chapter 622 - Thank You For Finally Giving Me A Proper Status, Xiang Yi

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Xiang Yin was not happy to hear that at all, and he fished out a card from his pocket. “You must be tired from filming everyday. Give yourself a day off, and don’t come back until you’ve spent all the money in this card!”

The netizens were dumbfounded.

—— [When can I have such a simple and unpretentious grandfather?]

—— [Uwu, indeed, regardless of gender and age, people look really suave the moment they take out their cards to make payment!]

—— [I really envy Xiang Yi. She has her brothers to dote on her and her grandfather to pamper her, as well as her masters!]

—— [Don’t forget that she’s dating the ‘Best Actor’ /smile/smile]

…

Xiang Yi had no choice but to drink the bird’s nest from Old Master Fang, accept the gifts from Old Master Yun and Old Master Jing, as well as the black-and-gold card from Xiang Yin.

She went into the kitchen, and Shi Sui followed.

The number of viewers, which had been stagnant, increased again!

Two of them sharing the same room! Wow!

Li Jianyu went to the kitchen to shoot.

Although he had expected it, he was still extremely agitated and excited to learn that Xiang Yi and Shi Sui were really dating each other, so much that his hands trembled a little, and it took him a long time to get over it.

“I’ll prepare the soup first.”

“In that case, I’ll wash and peel the vegetables.”

“Be careful not to scald your hands.”

“…”

The interaction between the two people was unexpected by many people.

It wasn’t that sensational. On the contrary, they were like a couple that had been married for a long time, peaceful yet warm and gentle.

Xiang Yi sewed a cute little apron with lace ends for Shi Sui while Shi Sui looked down and rolled up Xiang Yi’s sleeve. He even tied her hair into buns for her.

“I look like Nezha,” Xiang Yi said, rolling her tiny head.

Shi Sui pinched the bun on the left of her head and said, “It’s adorable.”

The simple interaction caused the netizens to leave multiple comments on the screen in a frenzy.

—— [So sweet. This is so sweet!!]

—— [Head-pressing team deployed! Kiss her! Kiss her now!]

—— [Can Shi Sui do it? Do I lack traffic? Give me something inappropriate, okay?]

…

The two of them proceeded to handle the ingredients separately and occasionally exchanged words.

They didn’t speak much but it didn’t feel awkward at all. Instead, it was a rather comfortable interaction.

However, Li Jianyu didn’t let them off and conducted a short interview with each of them.

First, he asked Xiang Yi.

“Xiang Yi, how do you feel now?”

Xiang Yi’s answer was extremely straightforward. “I’m really happy because we’re going to have hotpot.”

Li Jianyu asked, “What else? After all, you’ve just made your relationship with Shi Sui public.”

The young girl looked up and assured solemnly while looking at the camera, “I will treat him well and spoil him like a little prince.”

“Pfft… why does it feel like Xiang Yi took the male lead’s script?” Li Jianyu laughed out loud.

Most of the livestream viewers felt that it was really sweet and there was a small number of Shisui Sisters who couldn’t accept the reality.

——[I’ve already stopped being a fan of his. I can’t stand being his fan anymore, it’s too tiring]

——[Hah, is she such a simp? Well, she has to. Otherwise, how could Shi Sui possibly bother paying attention to her?]

——[It seems to be the Vase Fairy who took the initiative. Well, it’s much easier for girls to court guys than the other way around. Shi Sui is just after a sense of novelty. He’ll kick her to the curb sooner or later!]

…

It’s Li Jianyu’s turn to interview Shi Sui.

“What do you want to say, Father?”

With the peeling knife, Shi Sui started peeling potatoes, his long, fair and slender fingers like pieces of art that were marred by the tackiness of the world.

“Peeling potatoes is much harder than acting.

Li Jianyu said, “Seriously, birds of a feather flock together. How does it feel to announce to the public that you’re dating Xiang Yi?”

The man had an excellent camera sense as he managed to get a killer shot the moment he looked at the camera. The gaze in his upturned peach-blossom-shaped eyes was full of devotion.

“I’d like to thank Xiang Yi for finally giving me a proper status.”

“Hello everyone, I am Shi Sui, an actor.”

“I’m also, Xiang Yi’s boyfriend, Shi Sui.”

….

chapters.title: Chapter 623 - "Us"
chapters.body:
Chapter 623 - "Us"

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

His smile seemed to have added a touch of fragrance and vibrancy to the surroundings.

It was a shocking revelation that left everyone flabbergasted.

It was a strong strike to the heart!

The netizens began spamming comments as if they had gone mad.

——[Heheheheehe]

——[Hope you give birth to a child soon and I wish you two conjugal bliss!]

—— [Shi Sui’s attitude… Um… So it’s not Xiang Yi courting him but the other way around!?!]

—— [What? When will Xiang Yi also give me a proper status? I would like to be a member of your harem of three thousand beauties /dog head/ dog head/ ]

…

The netizens were exhilarated and flabbergasted. Even Jianyu’s hand started shaking incessantly while he was holding up the camera.

‘How flirty.’

‘No wonder he’s Shi Sui!’

He teased, “Hahahah Shi Sui, you will probably have a new name in the future, and that is, Xiang Yi’s boyfriend.”

Xiang Yi put down the pepper in her hand and turned her face to the side before saying seriously, “Shi Sui is Shi Sui. He’s who he is.”

Li Jianyu was stunned for a while before saying, “Uh…”

Ruan Qing took over in time and she said with elegance and great intellect, “That’s right, Shi Sui is still Shi Sui while Xiang Yi is still Xiang Yi. What has changed, is that ‘you and I’ have become ‘we ‘.”

Shi Sui smiled and said, “Yes, it’s us.”

The tips of Xiang Yi’s ears were a little red, and she used the opportunity to pour some peppers to cover up her embarrassment. However, Xiang Yi, who usually had no problem holding pots that weighed tens of kilograms, accidentally poured too much pepper at this moment.

She pretended to be indifferent about it but thise scene did not escape the eyes of netizens.

—— [Look at Xiang Yi’s ears! They’re red! They’re red!]

—— [My heart has melted. How can my daughter look so adorable even when she’s being shy!?!]

——[Wow, whose voice is this? What she said makes a lot of sense~ In fact, I know that Director Li doesn’t mean any harm but that female voice just now seems to have immediately elevated the feeling of those words~]

…

This moment.

Muyao TV.

The senior executives gathered in the conference room. Although they hated to, they had no choice but to admit that they were witnessing the birth of a miracle.

The number of viewers of the online stream of “Two Under One Roof” had already exceeded 13 million, a figure that was not only unprecedented, but almost certainly difficult to surpass in the future!

Li Jianyu used to work for Muyao TV…

Ruan Qing was also a former employee of Muyao TV…

If… if they had stayed with Muyao TV, this glory would probably now belong to Muyao TV.

Unfortunately, there are no ‘if’s in this world.

The data of the livestream was still rising, but the executives in the conference room couldn’t bring themselves to rejoice.

Especially after hearing Ruan Qing’s words, many people secretly felt in awe of her ability once more.

“Speaking of which, although Ruan Qing is a woman, she’s really quite capable…”

“Once she left, she took a lot of contacts away and many of our cooperations with Nancheng TV have been terminated. They said that she’s the only person they’ll work with…”

“I was clearly in approval of this plan of Li Jianyu’s back then. Alas, some people caused our TV station to suffer such heavy losses for their own selfish interests~”

“…”

There are cliques in every workplace, and the same goes for Muyao TV.

In many cliques, the members would be bitchy to each other before focusing their aggression on the leader of a certain department.

——He was the one who vetoed Li Jianyu’s plan and allowed Director Chen to plagiarize the show produced by Li Jianyu.

Unfortunately, be it “Heartbeat” or “Eating Well For All Three Meals”, they all ended up being awful.

“You can write your resignation letter now.”

chapters.title: Chapter 624 - Hotpot
chapters.body:
Chapter 624 - Hotpot

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“No…” The man’s face was ashen and he looked utterly dejected, but he knew deep down that his career, in a sense, had come to an end!

He had all brought it upon himself!

He looked at the director with resentment. Clearly, the director was at fault too but why was he the only one being made to leave?

Some of the lower-level executives were also secretly dissatisfied. The matter regarding Li Jianyu wasn’t too bad and Ruan Qing’s resignation could be blamed on the station manager.

However,he had to pay the price for it too.

In the next second…

The next moment, the door of the conference room was pushed open. A document from the higher-ups were delivered to them.

The content was regarding the replacement of Muyao TV’s station manager!

In an instant…

There was an uproar all around!

The station director who had just fired someone else was stunned. He never thought he would be fired too!

…

…

In the manor.

The preparation of the hotpot may be a little difficult for others, but it was a piece of cake for Xiang Yi.

Firstly, it was because of the abundance of agricultural produce of the Little Rabbit Farms and secondly, it was because of the wide range of seasonings that can be bought in the market. Thirdly, it was because the soup stock she had at home was just as good as the soup served in various established hotpot restaurants.

Soon, Xiang Yi made several large hotpot bases.

There was spicy butter soup and tomato soup in each of the compartments of the double-soup pot.

The four-grid pot contained wild mushroom soup, seafood soup, green pepper soup, and clear soup.

Meanwhile the nine-grid pots contained traditional Sichuan-style spicy soup and they adopted the cooking style of “same soup base, different temperature”.

Each compartment of the pot had a different temperature, with the middle compartment being the hottest since it was placed directly above the fire. It was suitable for cooking crispy food and food that require shorter cooking times.

The heat that was used to boil the soup in the compartments at the side was weaker but much more even. Hence they were more suitable for slow-cooking or warming foods up.

The four compartments in the corners had a milder temperature, which was suitable for slow-cooking and making food tender and flavorful.

The boys of Team Logic took the initiative to pack up the extra tables.

There were many people of various ages today, so Xiang Yi didn’t arrange for all of them to be seated at the same table but rather, she left it to them to pick their own seats according to their preferences.

In the end, the boys chose to sit in front of the nine-grid pot. They weren’t particular about it and were sitting cross-legged around the coffee table, drenched in sweat because of the smoke and heat from the hotpot.

The few other people chose the double-soup pot and sat at the table by the floor-to-ceiling windows, with a beautiful scenery to enjoy, the company of friends, and Director Li who had secretly sneaked in for a free meal…

The netizens were all making remarks and thinking to themselves that they had never seen a director with such a huge appetite!

‘Are you here to film a variety show or to eat something!?!’

On the other hand, Xiang Yi, Old Master Fang, and the other old men sat in front of the four-grid pot with Shi Sui’s company. Xiang Yi didn’t eat much herself. Instead, she was quietly cooking food for the entire table like a waitress.

…

At first, everyone felt that eating hotpot was all for the atmosphere rather than taste.

However, when they ate the cooked food…

Huh?

‘Huh???!!!’

‘Damn!’

‘This lamb is so tender and fresh!’

‘This maw is so crispy and smooth!’

This chicken roll is so fragrant after it absorbed the wild mushroom soup!!

In addition, the sesame sauce was fragrant but not greasy while the Shacha sauce was sweet, spicy and salty. The soya sauce and chili powder was fragrant and spicy…

Xiang Yi paired the cooked vegetables with several types of sauces. There were also lots of other ingredients and delicious soup base!

How! Delectable!

The boys were moving their chopsticks quickly while Director Li snatched the food as quickly as he could. As soon as the ingredients were cooked, they would be distributed immediately.

Even Old Master Fang, who was extremely knowledgeable, was charmed by the hotpot.

Old Master Yun said, “My beloved disciple, why don’t you come back with me, so that I can teach you the art of medicine!?”

Elder Jing, “Beloved disciple, ignore him. I can’t let you be tired, I can come to your house to teach you!”

Old Mr. Fang stroked his beard and ate to his heart’s content.

He said slowly and leisurely, “Disciple, I’m recently struggling to find a place where I can meditate and study the art of medicine. I wonder if you would be willing to take me in for a few days?”

Old Master Yun and Old Master Jing were dumbfounded.

‘Ew! Shameless old man!!!’

….

chapters.title: Chapter 625 - What'S Wrong With My Husband And Wife Being Together?
chapters.body:
Chapter 625 - What'S Wrong With My Husband And Wife Being Together?

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

‘I thought you were the noblest, but I didn’t expect you to be the most shameless one!’

The netizens watching the live broadcast laughed out loud.

——[Our Xiang Yi is really good with the elderly~~]

——[Hahahaha these grandpas are so cute!]

—— [Shocking! China’s three major Traditional Chinese medicine saints actually did such a thing because of a young woman…]

——[Great! I won’t even read the headlines of the news if you’re not writing them in the future!]

…

Old Master Jing mocked, “You have so many disciples, why must you eye on my disciple? Is it because you think you can bully her easily!?!”

Old Master Fang said with a faint smile again, “Why? Are you envious of me? Old Master Jing, after so many years you have only accepted one disciple. It’s time you reflect on yourself.”

Old Master Jing was confused.

Old Master Yun took a sip of mushroom soup and teased, “Those who don’t know might think that you’re homeless and have nowhere to go, so much that you can’t even find a place to study medicine.”

Old Fang smiled slightly and said, “Home is where my apprentice is.”

Old Master Yun was dumbstruck.

‘Okay, little brother, you’re awesome! *cupped fists*’

Old Mr. Fang was being smug and pleased with himself when he heard Old Mr. Xiang humphing coldly. “Did you get my permission to take Xiang Yi as your disciple?”

The three of them were diffident for a while.

Some netizens didn’t understand.

[Grandpa Xiang’s words are too harsh, huh? Your granddaughter is lucky that the three elders are willing to accept your granddaughter. How can you put the blame on others?]

Someone immediately came forth to explain.

[Others would be brainless and have low EQ for saying those words but Grandpa Xiang is really not wrong to say that! I recommend you to go find out about Grandpa Xiang’s life history. Although he is similar in age to Elder Fang and others, he ranks much higher in seniority in the field of Traditional Chinese medicine and his medical skills are impeccable. To put it bluntly, even Elder Fang has to call him Uncle-Master!]

The netizens were in a trance.

‘So… this arrogant young man, Grandpa Xiang, is a hidden expert!?!’

‘So much respect for the Xiang family’s genes!’

…

Facing the sharp eyes of Grandpa Xiang, Elder Jing’s gaze fluttered while Elder Yun’s hand trembled slightly. Even Elder Fang found it difficult to maintain a calm and composed demeanor.

“I’m already in my sixties. I just want to accept a disciple!” Old Master Jing began to be tyrannical.

“Ahem, Old Xiang, aren’t we cultivating good seedlings for the Chinese medicine community?” Elder Yun said self-righteously.

Old Master Fang pondered for a moment before saying, “Old Xiang, we are all brothers, your granddaughter is our granddaughter too. Your little bunny is our little bunny! Tell me, aren’t I right?”

Xiang Yin was shocked!

‘What the hell? Who are you calling old Xiang?!’

Old Master Yun and Old Master Jing were immediately in awe and full of respect towards Old Master Fang.

‘Older brother, you are hanging!’

This wave of interaction between the elderly made countless people laugh.

Xiang Yi sat at the side and laughed obediently.

Shi Sui refilled the tea and water for the elders at the table, not forgetting to scoop Xiang Yi her favorite dish of duck blood and bean sprouts, with the common cutlery.

Xiang Yi grinned and helped Shi Sui to his favorite bamboo shoots too.

Amidst the dense water vapor, the two of them looked at each other and smiled.

The world seemed to have become brighter and warmer.

There was peace and serenity.

This scene was screenshotted by countless people and circulated online for many years to come.

The fans of the UntimelyCouple were so exuberant that they screamed in the comment section.

——[Get married! Right now, right there!]

——[I believe in love again!]

——[Shi Sui is my husband, and Xiang Yi is my wife. What’s wrong with my husband and wife being together?]

The Shi Sui Sisters and Spicy Rabbits who were crying, saw that scene…

Huh?

‘There seems to be….nothing wrong with that, huh?’

chapters.title: Chapter 626 - Don'T Force Me To Kneel Down And Beg Me To Marry You?!
chapters.body:
Chapter 626 - Don'T Force Me To Kneel Down And Beg Me To Marry You?!

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The two camps of fans accepted the reality in a trance.

The incredible comment was screenshotted by netizens and pitched to a meme account, which made countless silly netizens laugh out loud once they were issued.

——[Is there something wrong with it? No problem!]

——[I wish my husband and wife /dog head]

——[With all due respect, I advise Shi Sui and Xiang Yi to behave themselves! Go to the Civil Affairs Bureau to get your marriage registered. Don’t force me to kneel down and beg you to get married, okay!?!]

…

After lunch, the group of energetic boys took the initiative to do farm work, but Elder Fang and the others argued over the selection of rooms…

Since Old Master Fang started it, Old Master Yun and Old Master Jing also expressed their desire to stay.

A group of old men whose ages added up to almost 200 years old started rolling up their sleeves as they argued.

“I had my eye on this one first!”

“Bullshit! Obviously I saw it first!”

“Hah, are your names written on it?”

“…”

Xiang Yi was caught between tears and laughter, struggling to mediate the conflict them. After a painstaking attempt, she finally managed to appease the three of them.

She turned her head, only to find that her grandfather was angry.

She hurried over to coax.

He stroked the handle of his cane and said seriously, “Their medical skills are just like that. If there’s anything you’re unsure of, ask Grandpa.”

There were only a few people in the Traditional Chinese medicine industry who would dare to say this.

Xiang Yi praised softly, “I know, Grandpa is the most powerful person in the world!”

Grandpa Xiang tried hard to keep his face austere, but he was still coaxed into smiling radiantly. He couldn’t help but grin triumphantly.

“They’re average, nothing too impressive. I just know a little bit.”

In the live-stream:

——[Grandpa Xiang… is so good at bragging!]

——[Only know a little? All medical students have to kneel down to you]

——[Not bad for a lousy variety show. We got to see the unknown side of these big shots]

——[It’s not because of the smalltime variety show but because of Xiang Yi. How can an ordinary variety show director possibly be able to hire such picky guests…]

…

After coaxing her grandfather, Xiang Yi began thinking about the dishes to cook for dinner. However, she suddenly saw Old Master Fang and the other two old men walking over with somber expressions on their faces.

“Disciple, I have an urgent matter and I need to make a trip out. I’ll leave these recipes to you so that you can study them slowly.”

“Beloved disciple, you can look through these medicinal recipes when you’re free.”

Elder Fang and Elder Yun stuffed a few books to Xiang Yi. She looked bewildered and uneasy.

“Good disciple…” Old Master Jing had the most eccentric temper and was extremely sharp-tongued but in front of Xiang Yi, he was like a kind and lovely little old man. “I have nothing more to give you. Put these notes away well.”

There were now a few more books in the young girl’s hands.

After saying that, the three did not say anything more and began to leave.

Since they were advanced in years, their backs were not that taut or upright, but their temperament were more upright than green pine.

However, it somehow seemed melancholic.

It was as if they weren’t the people who just argued in the room.

The people in the livestream began discussing one after another.

——[Why do… these three big shots seem like orphans?]

—— [You guys are thinking too much. You’ve probably come to your senses and realized that Xiang Yi is just like that~]

—— [There are still people who are undermining Xiang Yi? I suggest you go to the psychiatrist. If you don’t need your brain, you can donate it to the needy]

…

Xiang Yin was frowning and had vaguely guessed something.

He gently stroked the head of his obedient and gentle granddaughter.

“Bunny, learn if you want to but if you don’t, it’s okay too. Don’t tire yourself out.”

“Eat well and sleep well. I just want you to…be well.”

“I’m going out.” He sighed and said, “You don’t have to wait for me to come back.”

chapters.title: Chapter 627 - A Gentle Kiss (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 627 - A Gentle Kiss (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

It had been a few minutes since Grandpa Xiang left, and Xiang Yi was still standing in the same place, not moving a step.

She subconsciously picked at the palm of her hand lightly, forcing herself to calm down and speculate what had happened.

In fact, it was not difficult to guess.

Two words surfaced in her mind.

Xiang Yi closed her eyes and when she opened them again, she gestured for the cameraman to stop filming.

Old Zhang was puzzled, but he turned off the camera.

Xiang Yi went to the choreographer’s room first and explained the situation to Li Jianyu.

“… So, I may not be able to participate in the livestream in the future.”

Li Jianyu’s jaw dropped. “Xiang Yi, you… don’t you want to consider it again?”

Ruan Qing was much calmer and she merely asked, “Have you made up your mind?”

Xiang Yi nodded.

“As expected of Xiang Yi.” Ruan Qing smiled and pinched Xiang Yi’s little face. “Go, but stay safe. We will all be here and waiting for you to come back.”

She had never liked to cause trouble for others, but now she was causing trouble for the entire program team.

A thousand words came to her lips, but she was at a loss for words.

Finally, Xiang Yi said softly, “Thank you.”

Li Jianyu reacted, “Why? What are you thanking us for, Xiang Yi? We’re the ones who should be thanking you. To be honest, without you, we might not be able to do this show…”

If it wasn’t for Xiang Yi, Shi Shi would not have agreed to participate in the livestream.

Even if he had agreed, “Two Under One Roof” would never have become what it is today without Xiang Yi.

It was the two of them that mutually created this miracle in the history of variety show.

Ruan Qing’s focus, however, was more delicate, and she asked softly, “Did you talk to Shi Sui about your decision?”

Xiang Yi answered, “… no.”

She hesitated and asked, “What should I do to coax him?”

Li Jianyu said, “Ah that’s a question I can’t answer.”

Ruan Qing said, “I’m afraid there’s nothing we can do about this. The only person who can do it is yourself, Xiang Yi.”

Her eyes were filled with bewilderment, and after a moment, she cheered herself up. “I’ll try.”

…

Shi Sui received a text message from Xiang Yi, asking him to come back to his room.

He did as he was told.

The young actor looked down at the chat box.

Xiang Yi had never changed her profile avatar.

It was a chubby cartoon bunny, which was said to be designed by Xiang Qi. Xiang Chen, Xiang Li, Xiang Yu and the others had edited it and it could be said that all of them helped to draw it.

After waiting for a while, he still did not see another message from her. Shi Sui tapped the screen and the simple and clean keyboard popped up. The next second, there was a rustling movement at the balcony.

Xiang Yi propped herself up with one hand on the partition and climbed over with ease, looking valiant and handsome.

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows and walked towards the balcony.

It was the first time she had ever climbed over the balcony so she somehow felt like a thief.

She took two deep breaths, turned around, and was caught off guard as he pulled her into his warm arms.

“…”

The little girl tilted her small face slightly, her clear deer-like eyes looking like a handful of moonlight.

“Shi Sui…” she called out softly.

In this world, there are countless people who have called his name, but never had anyone sounded as gentle and soft as she did. No one had made his heart race like she could either.

“Hmm?” Shi Sui caught her small hand, wipe the dust off it meticulously and patiently.

“I’m going on a trip to a faraway place because I’m worried about my grandfather…” she said with some difficulty.

He suddenly tightened his grip on her hand.

“Will you come back?” Shi Sui asked softly.

Xiang Yi wavered for a moment.

chapters.title: Chapter 628 - A Gentle Kiss (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 628 - A Gentle Kiss (2)

Chapter 628: A Gentle Kiss (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

But it was only for a moment.

The young girl was calm as usual but her heart was filled with guilt. “I’m sorry.”

Shi Sui stared at her quietly for a long time.

“I’ll wait for you.” Those four words were his promise to her.

The tip of Xiang Yi’s nose was sore, and she tried to force herself to smile. “Is there anything you want to eat? You can give me a list of dishes.”

The wind blew over and two tufts of his hair, which was mostly gathered back, draped in front of him. The gaze in his eyes was heavy, the arc of his peach-blossom-shaped eyes slightly sharp.

It seemed that he was afraid of scaring Xiang Yi as he lowered his long, raven-black eyelashes, covering the unfathomable emotions in the depths of his eyes. He said softly, “I just want you to eat well, sister Yi.”

“I will.”

“How about I cook you some noodles when you come back?” He rubbed his lightly calloused fingertips gently against her slim wrist bone. “The kind with added cheese, ham sausage, kimchi, crab steak, and fish tofu.”

“Junk food… ” Xiang Yi said seriously, “My favorite!”

“Remove the first half of the sentence.”

“Hmm?”

Abruptly, the man closed the distance between the two, their striking height difference bringing about a sense of oppression. The angles of his face were blurry yet gentle and bright.

Shi Sui asked in a raspy but alluring voice, “Xiang Yi, come coax me, okay?”

He was afraid he would not be able to control it.

It wasn’t difficult to make her stya.

He had had more extreme thoughts than this.

Just like the things his father did to his mother, locking her up, trapping her, monopolizing her…

However, those dark and extreme thoughts were all suppressed by him.

Reason being, Xiang Yi would be said if he did that.

The tips of Xiang Yi’s ears were burning but she was happy with it and she said just what he wanted to hear.

She said in a warm and gentle voice, “Shi Sui, I like… you the most.”

After a short while, Shi Sui sighed softly.

“It’s worth it.” He said.

Her sentence, it is enough.

Xiang Yi explained, “Take good care of yourself. If youb don’t want to cook, order take-out. If you don’t want to join the livestream, just take a break. If you hate any gueests who come, just don’t entertain them. Anyway, just don’t mistreat yourself.”

1

Shi Sui stood there, standing silently, more stunning than the carefully shot pictorial.

“And…”

“Hmm?”

Shi Sui thought she still had something to say but his neck was suddenly wrapped around by the little girl, after which there were sounds of footsteps.

A gentle kiss landed on his jaw.

Shi Sui laughed. “Girlfriend, is this considered taking advantage before leaving?”

Xiang Yi was puzzled. “Kissing my own boyfriend is also considered taking advantage of him?”

“Kissing your husband doesn’t count.”

1

“… ” Xiang Yi reacted and coughed. “You’re thinking too far.”

“It doesn’t hurt to be prepared.”

But unexpectedly, her next sentence was:

“I seem to think farther than you.I have secretly thought of the names that our future children should have.”

1

Shi Sui was slightly stunned.

‘So… she has thought about our future too?’

After saying what was in her heart, Xiang Yi was so shy that she wanted to flee but her collar was caught by him.

1

Swish–

The fair and slender girl was pushed against the wall of the balcony, and the grip of the hand around her waist suddenly tightened. It was coupled with a warm and intense touch.

1

Bang, bang bang…

The heartbeat, the dazzling daylight, the vague fragrance of flowers, sour emotions, hot body temperature, dizzying and everything that was chaotic…

Shi Sui[‘s voice was hoarse.

He said, “I’ll let you take advantage, OK?”

…

Meanwhile.

Li Jianyu, who had just returned to the editing room after a smoke, suddenly realized that although Xiang Yi terminated the shooting for her films, but the body of the mike forgot to turn off!

At this moment.

The number of people watching the livestream had reached a staggering number of 20 million!

2

Twenty million viewers!

…

chapters.title: Chapter 629 - God Conferment
chapters.body:
Chapter 629 - God Conferment

——[I’m dying, I’m dying, ahhhhh!]

——[I’m going to say it 10,000 times! The UntimelyCouple is real!]

———[Oh my, such a sweet couple of the entertainment industury]

——[I’m smiling like an aunt in front of my screen. What are the big designer brands waiting for? Quickly come sponsor Shi Sui and Xiang Yi’s wedding!!]

…

At this moment, the fans of the UntimelyCouple were overjoyed while the rest of the netizens were excitedly gossiping about it!

The top ten spots of the Weibo hot search list were fully occupied by that topic!

#ShiSuiXiangYi

#XiangYiForgotToSwitchOffMicrophone

#TheUntimelyCoupleIsReal

#WhatShouldWeNameTheChild?

#NewRecordForTwoUnderOneRoof

…

…

The people who saw these hot search topics were confused at first, and after they clicked in, they found that there was nothing but an audio recording. They thought, “What’s so good about this?

However, after listening to the edited version…

“Xiang Yi, coax me, okay?”

“Shi Sui, you’re the one I like the most…”

He said, “I’ll let you take advantage of me, okay?”

The people who heard it: !!!

‘Oh my gosh! So sweet!’

——[Oooh Hubby and Wifey, you two must be blissful!]

——[If I commit a crime, the law will punish me, not Shi Sui and Xiang Yi shoving their display of affection in my face!]

——[I can’t, I can’t, I have an ulcer at the corner of my mouth that finally healed. Now that I’m smiling, it broke again!]

…

In the director’s room.

Li Jianyu was confused for a few seconds but he moved extremely quickly and soon switched off the livestream.

Once he did, there was a complete uproar among the public opinoin!

All kinds of netizens have started imagining things.

——[I don’t lack this traffic! Continue! Let me continue listening!]

——[Director Li, if you continue streaming, I’ll call you my father! Dad, I’ll get on my knees for you. Look at me!]

——[They kissed just now, right… So will they umm…]

——[Damn it, I’ve already started to imagine the scene of the the two of them and their kids doing a livestream! Xiang Yi will cook while Shi Sui takes care of the kids. Meanwhile, Little Xiji and Xiao Naofu will show their affection for each other. What a wonderful scene!!]

…

In the director’s room.

Li Jianyu mumbled, “This is considered… an accident that happened during the livestream, right?”

The rest were so frightened that they didn’t dare to breathe at all.

Usually there were people watching, but it was really a coincidence just now. It happened that everyone went out, and thus, resulting in that accident.

Ruan Qing was the calmest of all, methodically giving orders.

Soon, the people did their jobs.

Someone restarted the live stream and shifted the camera to the boys from Team Logic while someone contacted the PR team to discuss an emergency response strategy. On the other hand, someone else was responsible for keeping an eye on online public opinion in real time, as well as the live stream’s various data.

Not long after that –

A weak voice came from the corner, “Director…Director Li…”

The incredibly nervous Li Jianyu asked, “Huh? What’s the matter? What happened!?!”

“W-W-We just broke the record… all the data, have reached the peak since the live…”

The program team gathered around and burst into tears when they saw the shocking number of 20 million viewers!

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded, “That…that works too?”

The numbers that he thought that he would never achieve, had been reached just like that!

Ruan Qing was also silent for a full ten seconds. She then exhaled and said, “Perhaps, this accident is not a mistake, but a favor from God.”

Time, fate and luck were all in place.

True capability plus luck constitute a miracle.

When the whole network was swooning over the couple, the industry was concerned about another point…

From today onwwards, “Two Under One Roof” would become a legend in the history of variety shows!

chapters.title: Chapter 630 - Where Did Xiang Yi Go?
chapters.body:
Chapter 630 - Where Did Xiang Yi Go?

Chapter 630: Where Did Xiang Yi Go?

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

For a while, many people were displeased.

Some were emotional, some were envious, and some were jealous.

However, they were no longer disdainful.

As for Muyao TV, it was mocked again.

They felt that Muyao TV was really ridiculous to have given up such incredible personnel.

They forced Li Jianyu and Ruan Qing into leaving, and even went around sneaking around to steal others’ ideas.

Yet, they were still terribly defeated.

Now that “Eating Well For All Three Meals” was gradually going downhill, Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun’er had become much less popular after their livestream flopped the last time.

There were rumors going around in the industry that Muyao TV had come to terms with reality and started planning for a new livestream variety show. Although Muyao TV wouldn’t give up on “Eating Well For All Three Meals”, they would no longer provide the program team with resources first.

…

The fans of “Two Under One Roof” were happy to find out about their cherished show breaking records. They were as happy as a lark, as if it were a festival to celebrate.

But…

The people soon realized one thing.

Where did Xiang Yi go?

The livestream was still going on, and there were a lot of shots of Shi Sui too.

The man was still calm and restrained, as he slowly and methodically watered the flowers and plants that Xiang Yi printed. He even started trimming the branches and leaves.

He then went to feed the chickens, ducks, geese and also brought the boys of Team Logic to the mountains to pick wild vegetables.

However, they couldn’t identify the vegetables so they ended up picking a bunch of poisonous mushrooms and inedible grass, which made the audience mock them mercilessly.

The boys were making a lot of noise, like teenagers on a field trip.

Xiang Yu wasn’t in the mood to play and he was aloof throughout, pressing his cap extremely low and exuding a somber pressure.

He frequently took out his cell phone but the messages he sent were all unanswered.

His sister did not reply to his message.

Xiang Yu was exasperated and aggrieved.

Does not even have the most basic right to know that his granffather and sister had left without informing him?

Some netizens noticed the abnormality in his behavior.

——[Is Smog unhappy?]

——[Why does he look good even when he’s angry!?!]

——[Speaking of which, do you guys realize that not omly is Smog acting strangely, Shi Sui is unhappy too?]m

The netizens carefully observed for a while. They couldn’t identify the feeling, but Shi Sui really…

Seemed different.

When Xiang Yi was around, he wouldn’t talk much, but the gaze in his eyes were often soft while his tone was mild.

Now that Xiang Yi was not around, he still treated others politely and there was nothing he could be faulted for. In fact, he even seemed detached.

He talked less too.

The livestream comments were full of different opinions and speculations.

——[Seriously speaking, Old Master Fang and the rest said such strange things…]

——[Could it be that some big shot has fallen ill and they’re going to treat him jointly so Xiang Yi is moving over too.]

——[Her masters and grandfather would be enough. What did Xiang Yi join them for? That’s adding more trouble! Isn’t she afraid of offending a big shot!?!]

…

The netizens continued to gossip into the evening.

It was almost dinner tim and Shi Sui threw a tablet at the boys. “What do you want to eat, order it yourself.”

The boys looked at him and started chattering.

“Where is SIster Xiang Yi?”

“Is she not going to come home this evening?”

“What does Sister like to eat? I’ll order her some!”

“…”

Shi Sui said calmly, “She went out.”

“I see…” The boys were filled with regret.

Shi Sui looked at their pitiful selves and frowned. “I’ll go cook porridge.”

…Unknowingly, he had been influenced by Xiang Yi.

Hearing this, it turned out that the small wave of Shi Sui sisters who were clamoring about not wanting to be his fan anymore, began to make a fuss again,.

——[Is there something wrong with Xiang Yi? Why is she creating trouble instead of staying home to cook!?! Are Shi Sui’s hands meant for cooking!?!]

…

chapters.title: Chapter 631 - Don'T Just Illuminate But Shine
chapters.body:
Chapter 631 - Don'T Just Illuminate But Shine

——[Vase Fairy is so weak and feeble. How can she take good care of our dear Shi Sui!?! How can we feel comfortable leaving Shi Sui to a woman like that?]

——[As long as you break up with Xiang Yi, I am still willing to continue to be your fan! Otherwise, I’ll leave the fan base right away!]

…

The people who scrolled past the post reacted the same way. They were all equally dumbfounded.

‘What?? What’s wrong with you guys?!’

‘Are you all going to go to the Oscar awards ceremony venue?’

‘Aren’t you tired of being so dramatic everyday?’

The Spicy Rabbits and fans of the UntimelyCouple immediately taught them a lesson.

——[Please, hurry up and stop being a fan of him. Don’t embarrass the Shi Sui sisters]m

——[What day and age are we living in now? Why are you still promoting male superiority? The household chores should be done by both men and women. Why must Xiang Yi take care of Shi Sui?]

——[There’s a Buddhist saying, “the Buddha’s heart shows itself”. In layman’s terms, it means you’re what you perceive others to be. You keep criticizing our baby Xiang Yi, you must be living a miserable life now 🙂 :)]

…

The most important thing is that you can find a lot of people who are not able to get the best out of the company.

These people were basically in the same chat group and they discussed for a long time before writing a paper and sending them to some influential Weibo accounts.

After their perseverance, some Weibo users really shared that article, but…

It was shared as a joke. 🙂

[@EntertainmentIndustryyyy]: Here’s an article that was sent to me today. I’m going to share it with all of you, just for laughs.]

He also deliberately highlighted some of the few strangest points in red.

“Xiang Yi doesn’t know what the three virtues are! This shows that she does not follow the traditional Chinese culture!”

“Girls are supposed to take care of their boyfriends and husbands, so isn’t it natural for women to serve their men?”

“Xiang Yi always portrays herself as a rich and beautiful heiress but that will put pressure on Shi Sui. When a woman is the domineering one in a relationship, it’s definitely not going to work out. She should behave herself and keep a low profile while giving Shi Sui enough respect when they’re outside!”

“…”

The crowd of netizens were dumbfounded.

‘What the hell is this? What’s up with this backward and patriarchal mindset!?!’

The netizens started to mock them all of a sudden.

They even tagged Shi Sui’s fan club and some of the most influential fans of his.

Soon after, the official supporters of the Shi Sui came out to update their Weibo.

[I hope everyone stays rational when idolizing your favorite celebrities but the most important thing is to shine, not just be illuminated. ❤]

Shi Sui’s top fans were much more hostile.

——[This kind of person is not worthy of being a fan of Shi Sui, okay?]

——[I suggest that they all get banned from being fans. How twisted are they to think that they should destroy him since they can’t get him?]

——[If you guys decide to become detestable since you can’t get him, that’s really sad]

…

After such a mockery, those people finally stopped making harsh comments.

But, the dramatic twist came too soon –

The Spicy Rabbits found the Weibo of the person who wrote the article by following the clues in the post of the user who shared it. They then discovered that the writer was still selling online lessons about “the virtues a woman should follow ” and was the head of a group with a few hundred members!

The Spicy Rabbits smiled slightly without sending hate and instead, reported them to the internet police.

The authorities immediately intervened with amazing efficiency, soon cracking the case!

The person who sent the article was not a true fan of any idol at all. Rather, she was pretending to be a fan so as to promote her online classes!

There were more than thousands of victims!

Now, they were all caught!

chapters.title: Chapter 632 - Fans Holding Small Red Flowers
chapters.body:
Chapter 632 - Fans Holding Small Red Flowers

Nowadays, the Internet police would make sure to keep up with the trend of the times and paid a lot of attention to new media operation. Thus, the authorities immediately issued a Weibo post to praise the Spicy Rabbits.

[@NanchengInternetPolice: Here’s a little red flower for the Spicy Rabbits. Thank you for not forgetting to help crack the case while idolizing your favorite star. Here’s another reminder, the Internet is not a place where you can escape the law! Everyone, you’re welcome to report any illegal behavior at any time, so as to restore the peaceful envrionment in Weibo.]

The authorities of Weibo also shared the post to express their stand.

The netizens burst into laughter immediately.

The fans held onto the little red flowers and the official Weibo account kept singing praises for Xiang Yi.

‘What kind of amazing existences are the Spicy Rabbits!?!’

They were the white sheep of fans of celebrities!

…

Meanwhile.

The takeout was delivered to the manor.

After having the hotpot made by Xiang Yi in the afternoon, the boys didn’t find the takeout on the table appetizing at all.

They really just paled in comparison.

They often ordered takeout from this restaurant previously. The food was rather expensive but the ingredients were fresh and delicious. However, after eating the food made by Xiang Yi, they felt that the takeout tasted much worse.

After Shi Sui cooked the congee, he brought the pot over.

The congee was quite a failure. Perhaps, it was more convenient to call it rice now.

Some netizens speculated that Shi Sui was perhaps not as calm as he seemed to be on the surface.

The men weren’t particular about it either. One by one, they picked up large bowls of congee and paired it with the meat in the takeout and the pickled vegetables that Xiang Yi had prepared previously. After mixing all the food together, they started eating.

This meal was a stark contrast to the exquisite and sumptuous meal of hotpot in the afternoon.

The netizens in the comments section started teasing.

——[Their mom is obviously not at home]

——[Hahaha the boys really don’t wash their hands when Xiang Yi is not around!]

——[The way that these boys are eating are really going to get them a beating from their mother. They’re making the takeout that costs an average of more than a hundred yuan per person look like pig food…]

…

However, many of the netizens found it really awkward.

Without Xiang Yi, the variety show really seemed…different.

She usually doesn’t say much and looks like she has no presence, but the wonderful thing is that no one will ignore her during the livestreams.

Now that she was not around, the audience was really not used to it.

And…

Shi Sui seemed to be very quiet and despondent without Xiang Yi around.

The boys did not dare to interact with him much, and somehow, fewer and fewer people were talking. In the end, the entire crew fell silent.

For the first time in the history of “Two Under One Roof”, there was such a quiet scene.

Li Jianyu was getting a splitting headache.

Even he felt embarrassed, not to mention the viewers watching the livestream.

The number of online viewers, too, began to show a downward trend.

Now in addition to the “Eating Well For All Three Meals”, there were a few more livestream variety shows that popped up. Seeing the situation, the producers of those shows hurriedly paid off some keyboard warriors to criticize them.

——[They’re bound to decline after reaching the peak. This variety show is coming to an end soon.]

——[I’m laughing to death. What kind of livestream is this? It’s obviously a still]

——[Honestly, Shi Sui’s gentle and introverted personality is not suitable for variety shows. He lacks humor and beheaves too awkwardly~]

…

People started criticizing in the pop-up comments again.

The professional fans of “Two Under One Roof” were furious.

The variety show had clearly just set a record and was about to soar high and tide through waves. What happened in the end?

They fell off the pedestal again after being put on it.

That’s not the way to abuse fans!

Since the people had nowhere to vent their anger, slamming Xiang Yi became the only option.

——[Is Xiang Yi going to ruin this lousy variety show?]

——[I have never been so disappointed with Xiang Yi before. I think she’s really irresponsible!]

——[xiang Yi is just dragging everyone down. She created trouble for Old Mr.. Fang and the others, as well as Shi Sui and the rest. Doesn’t she feel ashamed at all??]

chapters.title: Chapter 633 - Overlyprotective
chapters.body:
Chapter 633 - Overlyprotective

…

…

When Li Jianyu saw these remarks, he rolled up his sleeves and eagerly retorted.

“What’s wrong with their brains!?! They started criticizing Xiang Yi before even getting a clear idea of the situation! Xiang Yi is such a great girl, what do they know!? Who are they to criticize her!?!”

Li Jianyu was furious.

The staff had been getting along very well with Xiang Yi and it is no exaggeration that Xiang Yi was now everyone’s favorite!

Many staff members would go on the Internet to help Xiang Yi clap back at her haters at night after a long day at work.

The more familiar they were with her, the more their hearts ached for her.

Xiang Yi was really a girl who deserved to be treated well by others.

Ruan Qing remained silent with folded arms, though she was exuding an icy cold aura.

“What’s the point of scolding them here?” She sounded much calmer than Li Jianyu, causing the latter to feel a little ashamed. However, the voice of the elegant and intellectual Ruan Qing sounded again as she said steadily, “Leave the PR matters to me. I’ll go contact Tomato Entertainment and Mr. Si now. As for you, go register an account and clap back at those netizens.”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded.

‘Huh? Huh!?!’

“Why? You don’t even know how to be a keyboard warrior?” Her beautiful eyes were filled with disdain and disgust.

Li Jianyu looked dumbfounded. “I know how to…”

“Then go now.”

“Okay!”

Li Jianyu took out his phone and started to register an account.

The staff at the side was dumbfounded. ‘I-I-Is this the heartless demoness who only knows to pressurize others, that we know!?’

‘Isn’t Xiang Yi… too overly protective!?’

After Ruan Qing glanced at them, everyone shuddered.

“W-We’ll register an account immediately!”

…

…

Several lights were illuminated as the sky gradually turned dark gray.

Xiang Yi met up with Xiang Yin at the airport.

Old Master Fang and the others were also there, and when they saw Xiang Yi’s figure, their brows furrowed.

Xiang Yin was so furious that he slammed his cane against the ground. “What are you doing here? Is this a place for a child like you to come! Go home!!”

Old Master Fang and the others also had the same attitude.

They really couldn’t bear to see her there.

Since she had left in a hurry, Xiang Yi forgot to take her coat and was wearing only a thin jacket. She looked extremely thin and slender but her back was taut and upright.

She said calmly, “Grandpa, I’m not a child anymore. First, I think my medical skills can come in handy and secondly, I’m young and I can stay up late. Thirdly, you are my grandfather, so I can’t be selfish and ask you to stay, but I can accompany you… and fight alongside you.”

Xiang Yin’s lips were moving while his heart heaved up and down. Even his voice had become shaky as he spoke.

“You…”

Facing the young girl’s clear but firm eyes, he could no longer say the thousands of words that he wanted to.

“Forget it, forget it.” Xiang Yin waved his hand wearily and said, “Come with me, but there is one thing you have to promise me and that is, you must stay by my side!”

Xiang Yi nodded obediently.

Old Master Fang sighed and said, “What an obedient child.”

Old Master Yun and Old Master Jing looked at each other, knowing that they both couldn’t bear to part.

Soon.

More and more people gathered.

The atmosphere was solemn and silent.

The airport opened a special passage, and the crowd registered as quickly as possible.

When a passenger passing by saw this scene, he took a picture with his phone and uploaded it to his ‘Friends’ page.

[Is this some group tour for middle-aged and elderly tourists? Hahaha but there’s a pretty girl among them. She’s fair and thin, and even has an excellent aura!]

…

As soon as she posted it, she received a text message.

[Emergency notice! Unless necessary, please do not go to the West Island area in the near future!]

chapters.title: Chapter 634 - Against The Grain
chapters.body:
Chapter 634 - Against The Grain

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“What on earth… That must be rumor.” The tourist cursed without taking it seriously.

He had an upcoming flight to West Island for a business trip.

However…

There was suddenly a broadcast announcement in the airport.

“Dear passengers en route to West Island, flight F286 will not be able to take off on time due to the weather. We would like to apologize…”

“Passengers heading to West Island, due to weather conditions, flight F355…”

A series of announcements rang out one after another.

The flights to West Island were all cancelled!

Some people were immediately dissatisfied.

“Didn’t the weather forecast say it was sunny?”

“Why are the lfights cancelled? Wouldn’t this cause a delay!?!”

“Hey hey, is the flight of that boarding gate for West Island too? Why are they allowed to fly but we’re not? They must give us an explanation!”

“…”

Surrounded by commotion, the passenger just now got distracted, took out his phone, and was about to report to his boss. However, he found a few more comments on his post in ‘Friends’ and clicked in out of habit…

——[Workers and the spirit of workers… Workers are superior ones of human beings! /doghead]

——[Huh? They’re going to West Island? According to the news, something seems to have happened there]

——[I just zoomed in to take a look. The girl in the photo is my dear Xiang Yi! She’s so beautiful even in original photos that haven’t been retouched! Can I move this to the forum, please?]

He replied to the comments one after another and suddenly thought of the news notification just now before clicking it again.

After reading the whole article, his eyelids twitched…

…

The manor.

The boys had dinner and said they were on vacation, but they were still thinking about training, so they went back.

Xiang Yi also followed.

Shi Sui walked them to the gate.

In the night, the men stood still for a while in the same place.

At the moment, it was extremely quiet in the large manor and there was only a dog and a cat left there.

Xiao Naofu did not know what was happening and it thought that Xiang Yi had just gone out as usual, and that she would still make it some fresh shrimp and pumpkin rice for breakfast tomorrow.

It inadvertently raised its head, only to realize that Shi Sui… was behaving strangely.

His eyes were deep, and his deep-set peach-blossom-shaped eyes had a sharp arch now even though thye were usually curved when he smiled.

He looked extremely dangerous.

Xiao Naofu took a few steps back, for fear that Shi Sui would take it to get spayed while he was in a bad moood.

It had yet to enjoy the life of a “tiger”, mate with a tigress, and give birth to cubs!

Little Xiji coaxed it, its breath warm and moist, seemingly coaxing Xiao Naofu.

Shi Sui lowered his eyes, glanced at the two of them, and then walked away.

There were lots of emotional pop-up comments.

——[Shi “loner” Sui]

——[I can’t get used to Shi Sui behaving like this. I prefer it when Xiang Yi is around him because he’s always so gentle and smiling all the time in her presence]

——[Xiang Yi keeps getting up to all these nonsense instead of doing her job well as an artiste. Everyone is being too nice to her. She’s a terrible artits’te!]

At this moment…

The PR draft written by Si Chuanbai and Ruan Qing was published…

There were several drafts but they eventually decided on the simplest one.

[@TwoUnderOneRoof: You look really beautiful going against the grain @XiangYi]

The photo attached to it was that of Xiang Yi scurrying towards the setting sun while dragging her luggage along.

The official Weibo account of Tomato Entertainment shared that post with the caption: [Medical professionals are so kind /rose/rose]

Xian Yi’s fan club, Si Chuanbai, and Ah Nan all shared it too.

At first, netizens were a little confused, until they saw the firs topic on the hot search list…

#UnidentifiedDiseaseOutbreakInWestIsland

When they clicked into the topic, the most popular post was the photo of Old Master Fang and the other bigwigs waiting to board the plane!

chapters.title: Chapter 635 - Medical Aces
chapters.body:
Chapter 635 - Medical Aces

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The original Weibo was posted in the Spicy Rabbits’ forum.

[@YiyaYiyaYo: I saw an untouched photo of Xiang Yi on Weibo and she’s gorgeous. Her grandfather is really suave too. To be honest, Xiang Yi’s family is just really good-looking!]

The comments at the bottom were initially full of the Spicy Rabbits’ praising Xiang Yi until someone pointed out something.

——[Huh? Why are there so many bigwigs of the medical field here? Apart from the bigwigs of the Traditional Chinese medicine field like Old Master Fang, Old Master Jing, and the others, there are also quite a few Western medicine doctors who are big shots that have been mentioned in textbooks…]

That Weibo post gave lots of people a reminder.

——[Huh? That’s really the case. I was lucky enough to have attended a specialist appointment with Old Master Ma previously!]

——[This is not a tour group for middle-aged people and the elderly. This is a group of aces of the medicinal field!]

——[Damn it, have you seen the news?! Surely it’s not related to the West Island region, is it?]

…

When the netizens found out that the flight was bound for the West Island, they immediately got into an uproar!

At the same time, the official media began to report on the situation in the West Island.

“An unknown disease has appeared in the West Island region, the contagion is extremely strong. The experts have now rushed to the scene for consultation…”

The entire Internet was in an uproar.

In particular, some terrible marketing accounts began to create rumors, causing a lot of panic.

The Spicy Rabbits strung the clues together, only to be confused.

Xiang Yi… actually went to such a dangerous place?!

As her fans, their first reaction was to worry about Xiang Yi’s safety.

——[UwU Xiang Yi, are you silly or what?]

——[You obviously didn’t have to go… Ah, Xiang Yi..

——[Xiang Yi, you must take care of yourself!!! T_T T_T]

…

However, the haters were still slamming her.

——[The Western doctors are enough. What’s the point in Traditional Chinese Medicine practitioners joining in? Are they going to cook some soup to deceive others?]

——[What? Can Chinese medicine practitioners cure infectious diseases too? They only know to make some ointment or something to fool others. Now that many lives are at stake, don’t embarrass yourselves!]

——[The people who went there are professionals and industry seniors who are definitely highly-skilled and experienced. Xiang Yi is a 20-year-old kid, what help can she provide?]

…

There are lots of netizens on the Internet these days who have different upbringings and manners. Hence, there were countless perspectives.

People tend to be much more tolerant in real life but the strange thing is that they’re often irascible and easily angered on the Internet.

The netizens left countless comments under that Weibo post and there was a heated argument.

The most aggrieved ones were the Spicy Rabbits, who were being scolded for defending Xiang Yi.

They really couldn’t understand why some netizens would bear so much hatred and hostility towards Xiang Yi.

They could nitpick and hate on her appearance, character, age, ability… everything.

Many people were a little disheartened.

At this very moment.

Suddenly someone retweeted this tweet.

There was more than one person!

[@Yan’nai: Believe in medical angels, believe in Sister Xiang Yi @Xiang Yi]

[@JiangChen: Here’s a tribute and respect to each and every person who has gone to brave the odds! Sister Xiang Yi and everyone else, you must all return safely!]

[@YinJiangxue: May Heaven bless the West Island/ *palms pressed together* Little Xiang Yi, I’ll be waiting for you!]

[@YanKaiKai: It’s been hard on everyone! @XiangYi, I’m waiting for you to come back so that we can host a livestream sale together!]

[@FuJiayan: Xiang Yi, be well!]

[@JiangJiujiu: Ahhhh baby, eat more, okay!?! If you lose weight because you’re not eating well, I won’t acknowledge you as my best friend anymore!!]

…

Among those who shared the post, the most uncouth and wild one was none other than…

[@RongHuai: You maggots in the comments section. What are you scolding for!?! If you have what it takes, come at me!!! Ugh!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 636 - Everyone'S Favorite (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 636 - Everyone'S Favorite (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

The teenager with a buzzcut was seated in front of the screen, and typing so hard that he seemed to be trying to break his phone.

He would retaliate and clap back at anyone who scolded Xiang Yi.

The young man’s brow bones were high, which made his eyes look extremely deep set. However, at this moment, his eyes were bloodshot and full of a menacing hostility.

He would never allow these filthy people to smear a warm, gentle and bright girl like Xiang Yi.

They’re not worthy of doing so!

…

The content of Rong Huai’s sharing was so… powerful that the Spicy Rabbits seemed to be full of zeal.

——[Protect our brother Rong Huai!]

——[Boy, it’s not good to hurl vulgarities (but it feels really awesome to do so)]

——[Foreign language professional reporting! I’ve already sent you a list of vulgarities and swear words in Chinese, English, German, Italian and French via private message! Boy, go!]

——[I’m an unknown rapper but I’m willing to help you! Brother,if you can’t curse anymore, tag me! I can come up with two whole sentences for you!]

…

With the crowd’s solidarity, the confused speeches of the haters were gradually drowned out.

Netizens lamented that Xiang Yi was being way too nice!

Almost all the people who had worked with her, stood forth to speak up for her!

‘What a charming girl!’

However, there were some people who focused on some bizarre things…

——[Why isn’t anyone from Xiang Yi’s family speaking up for Xiang Yi? They usually dote on their sister and they claim to pamper her greatly. Where are they now~ And Shi Sui didn’t share her post either! Are they going to officially announce their breakup soon?]

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘That really seems to be the case…’

‘How strange. Are her brothers busy? Or… is there any conflict between them and Xiang Yi?’

As for Shi Sui, he’s her boyfriend, how can he not post something on Weibo to support his girlfriend? What an unqualified boyfriend!

Apart from discussing the situation in the West Island, the entire Internet was criticizing Xiang Yi’s brothers and Shi Sui!

…

4:30 am.

The meeting room lights were lighting up the room like daylight.

Old men like Old Master Fang were indeed helpless. They were either resting with their eyes closed or forcing themselves to hang on.

The most awake person in the room was Xiang Yi.

She had been listening from the side and she was vaguely showing the power to control the scene.

However, she didn’t seem overbearing and was instead, gentle and stable.

She was also very polite to all seniors.

Amidst the discussion of medical professional issues, she also displayed amazing strength!

Some of the experts who were slightly contemptuous of her at first also nodded one after another at this time, obviously appreciating her quite a lot.

“… Regarding the few herbs I just mentioned, there are several prescriptions in the ancient book “Huiran’s Notes on Herbs and Trees” that can be used as supporting evidence.”

Someone questioned, “I’ve never heard of this book, are you sure, young lady?”

However, Old Master Fang’s eyes lit up and he exclaimed, “What a coincidence! I have a handwritten copy in my collection at home, I’ll have someone send it over here!”

“Don’t bother, I have some photocopied versions here.” Xiang Yi lowered her eyes, tapped on the tablet for a while, and cast it onto the screen in the room, “I have retrieved the relevant pages, you may use it as a reference.”

The experts first discussed the medicinal herbs, and during the break, they praised Xiang Yi while drinking tea.

“Ah, young people are the brainy ones…”

“It’s so convenient now that technology is developed, unlike in the olden days where we could only flip through book after book…”

“…”

In the corner, Xiang Yi leaned against the wall and closed her eyes for a second to fall asleep so she could adjust her state.

She didn’t know that the bigwigs in the room were all staring at her benevolently…

“Little girl, do you have a master yet? What? You have three? Well three and thirty are about the same!”

“Why don’t… Hehehe…”

…

chapters.title: Chapter 637 - Everyone'S Favorite (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 637 - Everyone'S Favorite (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

…

The night is over and the morning light is bright.

The sky was gradually getting whiter and the Xiang family’s manor was full of serenity.

In the cat nest, Xiao Naofu opened its eyes and yawned lazily while snuggling up into Little Xiji’s arms.

“Woof woof.”

Little Xiji licked it a few times before falling asleep again.

Xiao Naofu looked outside sleepily.

Shi Sui was sitting by the coffee desk next to the floor-to-ceiling window, his long legs slightly bent with a book spread on his lap.

Xiao Naofu tilted its head in puzzlement. ‘This book… Were we on this page last night?’

The man did not sleep all night and there was some stubble on his jaw. His temperament was also somewhat disheveled and despondent.

‘Huh? This dog of a man would also show such a look?’

Xiao Naofu jumped out of the cat’s nest and walked towards Shi Sui lazily on its thick, round and chubby legs. It grabbed his trouser legs and skillfully jumped to the man’s lap, curiously tilting its head. “Meow?”

Shi Sui did not respond.

Xiao Naofu called several times before Shi Sui slowly came back to his senses.

“Huh?” His voice was hoarse and full of fatigue.

Xiao Naofu patted his arm, and touched its small stomach, hinting to Shi Sui that it was time to feed it.

“Hungry?” Shi Sui perfunctorily rubbed the back of Xiao Naofu’s neck twice before standing up to pour cat food into its bowl.

The cat food was bought by Xiang Feng, and it was said to be the designer brand of the cat food world. Its expensive price corresponds to its unparalleled deliciousness.

However, Xiao Naofu had long been spoiled by Xiang Yi, so it didn’t like the dry cat food at all. It pointed to the door of Xiang Yi’s room with a puerile voice.

If there were outsiders present, their jaws would probably drop.

This cat had probably gained sentience!

Shi Sui accepted this very well. He whispered, “She hasn’t returned yet.”

Xiao Naofu widened its round eyes. ‘What? That foolish woman didn’t come home all night and now that it’s already daybreak, why hasn’t she come home yet?!”

Damn!

It tried to use the chat channel to contact Xiang Yi, only to find that it seemed to be have been blocked.

“!”

Xiao Naofu realized that something was wrong, and its first reaction was to tell Shi Sui.

But…

Sensing the unusual aura on Shi Sui’s body, it hesitated.

‘He may be the stupid woman’s boyfriend, but that does not mean he can be trusted.’

‘Shi Sui must be hiding some secret.’

After all, Xiao Naofu had a low IQ and a simple mind, so it jumped on the sofa and clicked on the tablet.

Fortunately, Xiang Yi’s WeChat account was still logged in synchronously.

Taking advantage of the time when Shi Sui went to the yard, it slid the screen and sent Xiang Yu a video call request.

Nothing happened 🙂

The Internet addicted teenager did not have a morning.

It switcged to dial the number of Xiang Li and Xiang Chen but one did not answer and the other chose to hang up.

Xiao Naofu scratched its head and locked its eyes on the account of Xiang Yi’s third brother, Xiang Qi.

Hesitating, it pressed the call button with its little paw…

“Ding ding ding–”

…

Xiang Qi stayed up all night and finally made an haute couture piece for Xiang Yi.

He was so tired that he collapsed on the sofa and fell asleep.

Everyone in the studio was used to seeing his designs, but they were still inevitably shocked.

The assistant, Roman, had even started half-kneeling on the floor, as if he was the most devout believer that was worshipping the gods.

“This is the will of God, the miracle that descended…”

He muttered to himself, and suddenly heard the cell phone of Xiang Qi ringing.

Even though he was not good at Chinese, he recognized the word “sister” on it, and pressed the answer button fearing that there was something urgent.

“Good morning, Miss Xiang….” Roman greeted awkwardly, in response, he got a sharp and rushed meow!

chapters.title: Chapter 638 - Everyone'S Favorite (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 638 - Everyone'S Favorite (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Roman slowly typed a question mark.

When Xiao Naofu saw that the one who answered the phone was not Xiang Qi, but a green-eyed, blond-haired foreigner, it became more anxious.

“Meow meow! Meow meow meow!”

——”Get Xiang Qi to pick up the phone! Meow!”

Unfortunately, not everyone’s comprehensive abilities were comparable to Shi Sui’s.

Roman couldn’t understand what Xiao Naofu was saying at all, but… while humans may have different emotions, no one in this world would dislike kittens! No one!

“Oh God, this lovely kitty… Even sapphire is not as bright as your eyes. Your paws and claws have been kissed by God…” Roman subconsciously murmured, praising Xiao Naofu incessantly.

Xiao Naofu could not understand what he was saying, and it was so anxious that it let out a fierce roar like a tiger.

“OWOOOOOOO!!!”

Roman instantly lost his ability to speak. “Aaahhhhh!!!”

Xiao Naofu was flabbergasted.

‘Stupid human. What a pain in the neck!!!’

Its fleshy little paws accidentally touched the voice message that Xiang Yi had sent earlier, and the audio recording of her sweet voice began to play.

“Brother, I sent you delicious food! Take good care of your body, don’t be too tired.”

Roman couldn’t understand what she said so he stared wide-eyed at Xiao Naofu who was in the video.

Xiao Naofu hung its head low, ready to give up contacting the silly woman’s brother. All of a sudden, the cell phone was taken away by a pair of large hands.

“Xiang Yi?”

A resplendent, languid, and charming voice sounded.

Phew…

Xiao Naofu’s ears were pricked up as it meowed.

Xiang Qi frowned and asked, “Hey you fat cat, have you got nothing better to do?”

Xiao Naofu: ???

‘What did you say? Who is the fat cat!?!’

‘This tiger isn’t fat! I’m not a cat either!’

The little kitten was so furious that it wanted to hang up the phone ruthlessly, but at thought that he was still unclear of the situation Xiang Yi was in now…

It typed with its furry little paws.

[The silly woman is in danger]

Xiang Qi thought that someone was pulling a prank on him because he never thought that Xiao Naofu would know how to type.

“Who is so lame to do this…” he muttered softly. “And who is the silly woman?”

Xiao Naofu replied angrily: [Your sister! Xiang Yi!!]

Xiang Qi lashed out callously without any regard of his image as an elite fashion designer, “Bullsh*t! How is my sister stupid? She’s the smartest and cutest girl in the world!”

“…”

‘They belong to the same family but why is there such a huge difference in their IQs?’

A look of vicissitude surfaced on Xiao Naofu’s tender and puerile face.

The tablet was suddenly nudged twice by a pair of bony hands.

Xiao Naofu looked up and found that it was Shi Sui who was operating it as he forwarded a news article to Xiang Qi.

“!”

‘What should I do? What should I do? This dog of a man has discovered my secret!’

To its surprise, Shi Sui was very calm. “Xiang Yi’s going to be in danger? Tell me what’s going on.”

‘Huh!?!’

Xiao Naofu feigned ignorance and blinked innocently.

“Meow?”

——”What are you talking about, I don’t even understand!”

“You can trust me.” Shi Sui pinched his glabella and exuded a strong aura amidst his nonchalance. “Otherwise, you would have already been cooked into stew or sent to the research center to be dissected.”

Xiao Naofu continued to pretend.

Shi Sui stared at it for a few seconds before suddenly laughing.

“Are you afraid that I’d find out your secret?”

“Ah meow~”

——”There are no secrets between me and that silly woman!”

“Did you transmigrate?” Shi Sui asked calmly but his words were groundbreaking to Xiao Naofu, who was completely dumbstruck!

‘He… H-H-How did he find out!?!’

Shi Sui picked it up and scrutinized it for a few seconds.

“In the past year, I have met more than one… transmigrator.”

…

…

chapters.title: Chapter 639 - Everyone'S Favorite (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 639 - Everyone'S Favorite (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“Meow? Meow?!!”

Xiao Naofu was shocked.

How could this happen?

The world Xiang Yi was in was clearly a very ordinary and safe one. In the world of transmigration, it belonged to the lower tier.

In this world, be it in terms of logic or power, it was impossible to tolerate frequent transmigration.

Shi Sui calmly pressed Xiao Naofu down in front of the tablet. “Type it out.”

Xiao Naofu hesitated.

Shi Sui said, “How about you speak in human language?”

Xiao Naofu was speechless.

“You can’t even speak human language?” He vaguely showed some disdain in his voice.

Xiao Naofu was speechless.

‘Screw you!’

Despite looking like it couldn’t stand being aggrieved, it reluctantly typed on the screen with its fleshy paws.

Even though he had already prepared himself mentally, Shi Sui nevertheless, raised a brow when he watched Xiao Naofu type skillfully.

However, there was now no longer any communication barrier between them.

Xiao Naofu: [Can I trust you, you dog-like man?]

Shi Sui asked, “Huh? Dog-like man?”

Xiao Naofu was flabbergasted!

‘Oh no, I accidentally typed my thoughts out!’

The kitten diffidently deleted the last three words and went against its conscience to type “handsome hunk”.

The man’s soft and bewitching laughter came from above its head.

“You can choose not to believe that I’ll turn you into cat stew but you can definitely trust that I won’t hurt Xiang Yi,” the man said indifferently but firmly. “I can swear on my life.”

“…” Fancy words! Hmph!

However, after spending so much time with Shi Sui Sui, Xiao Naofu could tell that Shi Sui’s feelings for Xiang Yi were genuine.

After a few seconds of hesitation, Xiao Naofu began to type and slowly recounted what happened…

…

It took about half an hour.

Shi Sui smoothed out all the clues and frowned slightly. “So, is there a system in her sea of consciousness now?”

Xiao Naofu nodded.

Shi Sui gently knocked his fingers against the desk rhythmically.

He suddenly paused.

He searched for something with his phone and then handed the screen to Xiao Naofu.

“Is this woman the Qin Wanyan you mentioned?”

Xiao Naofu, “Meow!”

‘Huh, hasn’t this woman been to the manor before? This dog of a man actually did not remember what she looked like?’

Shi Sui made a phone call and gave a simple explanation, his low and indifferent voice making countless hearts race.

“I want to see her.”

…

At 7:30 am, the morning news broadcast began.

“It is reported that all close contacts have been traced, and in addition, the group of specialists and experts has already formulated a response plan. May all people in the West Island region work together to overcome the difficulties…”

It was good news!

Countless people were inspired and instantly felt that it was not a big deal and that they should continue to gossip.

In a certain rented apartment.

A bearded man woke up from his sleep and the first thing he did was to grab his phone wearily.

When he saw the latest situation in the West Island area, he got really anxious.

If the incident ends like this, how can he still earn from the clout of the hot topic?

Seeing that the number of views of the articles that were written yesterday to ride on the wave of the popularity of the topic, the man picked his feet irritably, and moved his hands to his face to touch his itchy nose a few times. He then suddenly got an idea…

‘Is the truth what the netizens want to see?’

‘Not necessarily.’

‘As long as the entry point is tricky enough and the gimmicky headline is enough to attract attention, what’s so important about the truth of the event itself?’

The man sat up and first used his private account to send a private message to himself. He then posted something on Weibo…

[@ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker: I received a fan submission from the West Island area. This fan is a medical professional and according to her, Xiang Yi has apparently been alienated by the medical bigwigs of the specialist group!]

chapters.title: Chapter 640 - Everyone'S Favorite (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 640 - Everyone'S Favorite (5)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Below the Weibo post, there was a picture of a private message chat.

[Hey ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker, I’m here to submit a draft to you. Can you please publish this!?! The recent events in the West Island area have caused quite a stir. I’m a local medical professional but I shall not state which healthcare provider I work for.]

[Well then, a large group of experts came over, right? There are Western medical experts and bigwigs from the national respiratory disease department and infectious disease department. There are also numerous bigwigs of the Traditional Chinese medicine industry, whom even powerful businessmen may not be able to hire easily.]
