[The most surprising thing to me is that there is a celebrity among the expert group. With all due respect, isn’t acting all she knows? This is really an insult to the efforts of the experts and the public’s trust in the experts.]

[But the good thing is that the panel of experts are very disgusted with her ~ After all, she’s young and her capabilities are subpar. She’s really ridiculous and amusing too. She’s always trying to steal the limelight and she loves showing off her abilities in front of the experts. The experts may not say much to her face but her behavior is really way too disgusting. Um…]

Of course, this so-called “contribution” was just an act conjured by him.

He added a few popular hashtags, and then posted it on Weibo before sharing the post with a few other private accounts.

The man had been operating the Weibo post for a long time and each account had at least 100,000 followers. Several other accounts began to share the link. There was an instant surge in exposure because of the popular hashtag.

As he expected, the entry point was really hard to find.

This timing was the peak time of work and the traffic was amazing.

The netizens who had just felt a little more relieved, were enraged again after seeing the post.

——[Ugh. I knew that would happen]

——[??? She’s just seducing them. Show off? More like “act like a whore”!]

——[The experts bullied her? Is she worthy? I think it’s her who harassed the experts! They’re working so hard to save lives and yet, she’s causing trouble there. Does she think the operation is like going on stage to perform?]

——[[I strongly suggest that Xiang Yi be kicked off the panel! What if she affects the mood of the experts if she stays?]

Some even copied and pasted a famous quote, and tagged Xiang Yi.

——[@XiangYi: Is it nice to benefit from the misfortune of others?]

…

Seeing how furious the netizens were, “ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” smiled smugly in front of the screen.

He had activated the “generate-traffic-to-earn” function so the clicks on ads and rewards from fans were his source of income.

In short, the more people view his Weibo, the more money he can make.

This wave would allow him to earn a ton of money!

…

The Spicy Rabbits began to express their principle of not spreading rumors and not believing rumors. Hence, they were very composed.

What storms have they not seen?

This wasn’t a big deal. They could just remain peaceful.

The fans of several popular influencers took advantage of the opportunity to rub it in, wishing Xiang Yi would be canceled quickly.

——[Wow, how does it feel to have a house collapse?]

——[I bet 50 cents that Xiang Yi will definitely be canceled in less than three days]

——[Her family doesn’t dote on her, her boyfriend doesn’t love her, and people hate on her. Ahhh, her persona as a heartthrob collapsed just like that~]

…

The netizens mocked mercilessly.

At eight o’clock sharp, an official media account suddenly posted something on Weibo.

[@NanchengDaily: Thank you to all Nancheng ethnic entrepreneurs as well as individuals for the monetary and necessity donations. Great love knows no bounds, may love and kindness be passed on!]

The ones that occupied the first few places of the long list of names were Xiang Yi’s brothers, Xiang Feng, and… Shi Sui!

…

chapters.title: Chapter 641 - Everyone'S Favorite (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 641 - Everyone'S Favorite (6)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Shi Sui’s Time Studio donated 50 million yuan!

Xiang Chen’s Lin Chen Law Firm donated 50 million yuan!

Xiang Li’s Nancheng Biomedical Research Institute donated over 40 million yuan worth of medical supplies!

Xiang Qi’s Hades Design Studio donated over 30 million yuan worth of female supplies!

Xiang Yu’s Logic Gaming Team donated over 30 million yuan worth of food supplies!

…

The breathtaking amount of money donated was breathtaking and it instantly caused an uproar on the internet!

——[Oh my God, Xiang Yi’s brothers are impressive!]

——[Shi Sui is so caring, I thought he was aloof and cold, but I didn’t think he was such a gentle person!]

——[Uh, am I the only one who noticed her uncle, Xiang Feng? He donated 100 million! One hundred million! How dare you guys treat the dominant president as an invisible person!]

…

Up to this point, the Xiang family and Shi Sui had yet to make any statements on social platforms, but rather, they let their actions do the talking and immediately sent support to the West Island region!

In contrast, there were many stars and netizens who merely voiced their thoughts without taking any substantial action…

The netizens came to a sudden realization.

——[Ah they donated more as a family than the entire entertainment industry combined…]

——[Who else can do that!?! Those who say that Xiang Yi’s family and boyfriend don’t care, do your faces ache? This slap in the face came so quickly like a tornado!]

——[Although celebrities and influencers really do not have the obligation to donate, we should not criticize or condemn them, but Xiang Yi’s brothers and Shi Sui must be praised! Only then will those who really want to do charity, not be discouraged!]

——[You guys forgot about the domineering CEO, Xiang Feng again!]

——[Xiang Feng: This is obviously a story of six people. Yet, I’m not worthy of having a name?]

…

The netizens cheekily ignored Xiang Feng’s contributions and soon, all sorts of emojis and jokes surfaced.

The Spicy Rabbits also found a powerful counterpoint.

What? Our rabbit persona collapsed? Are you trying to be funny? Come on, we rabbits are first in line in the fight against the epidemic, OK?

What? Rabbit’s brothers and boyfriend didn’t do anything?

Are you kidding? Open your eyes and look at the world, do you really think those hundreds of millions of donations and supplies are fake?

By the way, your favorite celebrities did not donate a single cent at all. They must be living difficult lives, huh?

Come on, continue to work hard as workers of the entertainment industry!

‘Rabbit is excellent on her own and she has her boyfriend to dote on her. I just want to piss you off~’

The fans of the other celebrities were dumbfounded.

‘We can’t afford to mess with you, but can’t we afford to hide? How is this so annoying!?!’

The only people who were incited by “ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” were the ones who were still ostracizing Xiang Yi.

In their eyes, seeing is believing. They had all seen the screenshots of the draft!

As for whether the news is true or false, they did not care about how much was true or false!

Some of those who had nothing better to do were still mocking sarcastically.

——[This is probably the same mentality that the more you lack something, the more you want to show off~]

——[A certain actress embarrassed herself in front of the experts so she had no choice but to find other ways to make up for it.]

——[Hahahah have you forgotten how she derived joy from the misfortune of others? You think the Internet has no memory?]

…

At this moment, the host and reporter of West Island TV were in a joint live broadcast of the situation of the expert group…

“It’s break time, and we can see that the experts are… uh…”

The reporter was in a complete trance. “Are you waiting to vie to snatch disciples?”

chapters.title: Chapter 642 - Everyone'S Favorite (7)
chapters.body:
Chapter 642 - Everyone'S Favorite (7)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The host was obviously stunned for a second and she was holding on only because of her high level of literacy. With a professional smile, she said, “It’s really surprising, I did not expect that the experts would have such a scene. I believe that the audience in front of the screen, must be as curious as I am. Just who is this apprentice that these experts are vying over?”

The reporter said, “I’m afraid you won’t believe me but it’s a young girl in her early twenties.”

The photographer on the scene switched lenses and took a panoramic view.

The slender and fair young girl was surrounded by a group of middle-aged and elderly men and women.

She finally got to get some rest but the people not only did not make full use of the break to get some rest, they even got into an argument that was even more heated than the discussion about the patients’ situation just now. There was great tension.

“Xiang Yi, Traditional Chinese medicine may be good but Western medicine is not bad either! Come, learn about respiratory diseases from me!”

“Don’t listen to him, the infectious disease department is the most powerful!”

“Come on, this is a good candidate for Traditional Chinese medicine. What are you Western medicinal practitioners doing? This is not how you poach her!”

“…”

The young girl looked bewildered, her long raven-feather eyelashes fluttering.

She had an aura that would make all people wanting to take her as a disciple as soon as they meet her!

The crowd argued while the reporters and photographers were in disarray.

The hosts were dumbfounded.

‘No… You experts can get any kind of students and disciples you want, why do you all want to take Xiang Yi as a disciple?’

The reporter slowed down, reacted, and went up to shove the microphone to Xiang Yi’s face. “Miss Xiang, talk about your feelings now.”

Xiang Yi answered, “I…I’m just a little shocked and dumbfounded.”

“Miss Xiang, do you have a teacher in mind?” The reporter seemed to be trying to add fuel to fire. “Which expert’s apprentice would you most like to be?”

All of a sudden.

The experts glared daggers at the reporter!

Xiang Yi said modestly, “Everyone here can be my teacher. Be it in terms of medicine or other fields, there are a lot of things for me to learn from these seniors.”

The young girl’s reply was decent and obedient, which was well received by the experts.

They were all looking at her benevolently like she was their child.

“What if we have to choose one?” The reporter continued to blow things up.

Xiang Yi blinked and said, “Actually, I’ve already chosen three…”

The reporter was confused.

Elder Fang, Elder Yun and Elder Jing smiled slightly and pretended to be invisible.

“I am her great master.”

“I’m not talented but I’m the second master of my beloved disciple.”

“Hmph, I am the third master of my good apprentice, you have a problem with that?”

The reporter was dumbfounded.

Before coming, he had also learned about the biographies of the bigwigs.

They were the chairmain of the Chinese Medicine Association, the heir of Hui Chun Medical Hall, the chief of Ji Shi Hall Pharmacy. If one could be under the tutelage of any of them, they would have to be utterly grateful.

Yet, Xiang Yi managed to become all the disciple of all three of them.

The next second, the others were upset.

“You three old fogies just beat me to it!”

“She has already acknowledged three masters, what’s wrong with having a few more?”

“Traditional Chinese medicine complements the Western medicine treatment methods. The combination of both is the best choice!”

The reporter was dumbstruck.

So was the host.

‘Uh? Is this an apprentice selection site or a large market?’

The bigwigs of the local medicine industry were actually waiting to be picked as Xiang Yi’s master?!

At this moment, Old Master Fang said leisurely, “Only kids have to choose. Xiang Yi, just choose all of them!”

chapters.title: Chapter 643 - Everyone'S Favorite (8)
chapters.body:
Chapter 643 - Everyone'S Favorite (8)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She looked completely innocent, for she had never expected that things would turn out this way.

However, other experts had also expressed their approval.

“I wouldn’t mind.”

“Yes, yes, yes, we can all just take Xiang Yi as our disciple and we’ll be done.”

“Combine Chinese and Western medicine, extract the essence of both and discard the unnecessary stuff. Use modern scientific methods to verify the scientific feasibility and accuracy of the two types of medicine. Only then will it not be a waste of good potential!”

Xiang Yi said, “Seniors, I…”

“Little girl, I came out in a rush today. I’ll make up for the gift later!” One of the experts yelled first, but the others immediately said that they must prepare a gift for Xiang Yi when they go back!

The atmosphere at the venue was happy and harmonious. The crowd was immersed in the joy of acknowledging a young disciple, which alleviated a lot of their stress and fatigue.

Xiang Yin was calm and collected, and it was rare that she didn’t throw a petty tantrum.

In fact, he knew very well that while these experts were teasing, they actually really had high hopes for Xiang Yi.

‘Maybe… Xiang Yi will make impeccable achievements in the field of medicine.’

He thought that since he had already paved the way well for her, it was enough.

She had to continue with the rest of her life on her own.

The reporter was in a trance. “… This is the situation here, Host.”

The host was at a loss. “… Okay, okay.”

This segment of the report, which was broadcast live through the TV link, was seen by countless viewers…

Some mean netizens immediately trimmed this segment into a new clip and posted it on all major social media platforms.

The netizens clicked in to see…

——[All… All of them!?!]

——[Can you acknowledge teachers in such a manner too?]

——[Hahaha some haters who embarrassingly slammed Xiang Yi are really amusing. She’s obviously everyone’s favorite, no doubt!]

This scene also became the “shaming scene of the year” and the video clip was saved by countless people!

The netizens who had been accusing Xiang Yi for stealing the limelight, behaving bitchily, and bullying her, were all dumbfounded!

‘W-W-Why is this completely different from what we imagined?’

The attitudes of the parties involved were the best clarification.

The rumors were clarified on their own!

The public opinion was directly reversed.

The netizens began to question whether the fan submission posted by “ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” were real or not.

——[These are obviously groundless rumors!]

——[Seriously speaking, the people who actually have access to the expert panel have to sign a confidentiality agreement. So how could they have exposed this online?]

——[If they really hate Xiang Yi, how could they possibly be willing to take her as a student!? Be it in terms of medicine or any industry, they won’t casually take anyone under their tutelage, okay!?!]

…

The Spicy Rabbits were very calm.

They weren’t aggressive at all, unlike the fans of other celebrities who liked creating rumors about others and avoiding rumors about their idols.

Hating on Xiang Yi? Sure, do as you please 🙂 We’ll admit defeat if you don’t end up getting shamed!

Seeing the unsurprising twist in events, the Spicy Rabbits began sending stickers about world peace.

They didn’t expect this to have garnered more fans for Xiang Yi, who were all amused by the Spicy Rabbits.

——[Hahaha, why are Xiang Yi’s fans even more amusing than her?!]

——[I’ve never seen such salty fans! Are you guys a bunch of middle-aged people? Please have the self-awareness of fans of influencers. Go fight!]

——[What a precious fan. The stickers are so cute. Can I join the Spicy Rabbits fan base in exchange for more stickers?]

…

Meanwhile,

Shi Sui stepped into Nancheng Mental Hospital….

chapters.title: Chapter 644 - Scam
chapters.body:
Chapter 644 - Scam

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The temperatures were hot during summertime in Nancheng but perhaps because of the good green features of the hospital, one can feel the temperature plummet by a few degrees as asoon as they enter.

“Please sign the visitor registration form.” The woman at the front desk recognized Shi Sui and couldn’t help but look at him a few more times.

The man was tall, with outstanding proportions, broad shoulders and long legs. He was dressed casually in a black silk shirt.

His gold-rimmed glasses softened the sharp edges between his eyebrows and eyes, and every inch was softened as if a filter had been added above his face.

When he looked down to sign his name, his eyelashes cast a faint shadow.

His handwriting seemed to have its own aura.

“Okay.” He slid the form back.

“This way, please.” This mental hospital was privately run and the service provided was excellent. The nurse led Shi Sui to a ward. “This is Miss Qin Wanyan’s ward. If you need anything, you may just ring the bell.”

When she was far away, she raised her hand and knocked gently on the door twice.

The door was swiftly pulled open, revealing a dry and haggard face.

Qin Wanyan was no longer as fresh-looking and beautiful as she used to be. Her hair, which had been permed and dyed too many times without careful care, had become as frizzy as weeds, and the ends of her hair had faded to an unsightly yellowish hue.

She had lost a lot of weight, and when she saw Shi Sui, her eyes were shockingly glistening.

“Shi Sui!” She was surprised and delighted. She then asked cautiously, “Are you… you here to save me?”

The man was poised and at ease as he said, “Good morning, Miss Qin.”

“You must have come to save me!” Qin Wanyan tried to grab Shi Sui’s wrist, but the man dodged swiftly.

She lunged in vain, but was not discouraged and instead, humbly begged, “Please, help me, I am not mentally ill! I’m really not! I’m just locked in here!!”

Ever since she suggested the system to replace her with Xiang Yi to complete the task, everything has changed.

She was no longer the “Chosen One” who was selected to be a transmigrator but rather, she was exiled by the system.

Her career was ruined, her family and friends were inexplicably leaving her one by one. She could feel her life passing by little by little, and every time she woke up from a nap, she seemed to have aged a few years.

However, this was not the most terrifying part…

What is scary is that this building is full of patients with mental illness!

For example, every night, there will be all kinds of strange sounds in the corridor. The patient next door will suddenly knock on her door, and then let out eerie laughter…

The physical and mental torture had long droe Qin Wanyan is already going crazy.

Shi Sui said, “Let’s talk, if you can give me the information I want, I will consider helping you.”

…

A few minutes later, in the garden of the hospital.

Qin Wanyan was wrapped in a thick knitted jacket with a blue and white hospital gown.

She shivered and said, “You know what? I’m a transmigrator! The kind that can travel to other worlds!”

Two patients who were walking passed by.

One giggled and mocked, “Look, look, look, she’s a psycho!”

The other one licked his lollipop. “Yeah, she’s very sick.”

Qin Wanyan was speechles.

“Being called mentally ill… Is there anything more ironic in the world than that?” She laughed bitterly, “Forget it, I know, you won’t believe me…”

Unexpectedly the man faintly said, “I believe you.”

Qin Wanyan was shocked.

She was overjoyed, like a drowning man who had clutched the last straw. “Really?”

Shi Sui looked at her, his eyes extraordinarily gentle under the warm daylight. “Yes.”

Qin Wanyan let out a long sob. “T-the system is a fraud! All of this, is a scam!”

chapters.title: Chapter 645 - Approach
chapters.body:
Chapter 645 - Approach

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

…

An hour later.

Qin Wanyan cried with snot and tears flowing.

However, Shi Sui remained indifferent without giving her tissues or handkerchiefs.

Qin Wanyan was speechless.

‘Why am I always running into such straightforward and insensitive men?’

“I have arranged a sanatorium for you. Before you move there, please come with me to a certain place.”

Qin Wanyan nodded her head frantically.

As long as Shi Sui could save her, she was willing to do anything she was told to do!

As for sexual favors or something… She would be willing to let Shi Sui take liberties with her if he wanted some sexual favors in exchange…

The man did not take her back to the manor, but to Starry Entertainment.

Even though Xiang Yi wouldn’t know about it, he also arranged for two cars to pick them up, so that he could avoid sharing a confined space with another woman.

Upon sight of a familiar sand sculpture, he signaled the driver to stop at the roadside.

They got out of the car and walked towards the green area by the roadside.

Without waiting for him to say anything, Xiang Feng hollered from the tree, “You’re just in time! Sui Sui, quickly give me the whole plastic bag! There are so many peaches, it’d be such a pity if we don’t pick some and bring them home!”

There are so many peaches, it’s a shame not to pick them back!”Xiang Feng’s assistant, an elite man in a suit, was standing beside him. However, at this moment, he looked really devastated.

Who would have thought that a domineering president like Xiang Feng would behave like a country bumpkin?

He was faster than a monkey when climbing trees and it was impossible to stop him!

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows and said, “If I remember correctly, this is a fruit tree that’s meant for greening.”

“So what?”

“They’re meant for viewing and admiring, not for…you to climb up to pick fruit.” After pausing for a moment, Shi Sui added, “Of course, simply put, these peaches won’t taste good.”

“…”

Xiang Feng was speechless for a few seconds before he silently slid down from the tree.

He muttered softly, “You didn’t tell me earlier. I’m about to be tickled to death.”

Suddenly.

Qin Wanyan got out of the car and made eye contact with Xiang Feng.

Xiang Feng asked, “Oh? Is this your grandmother? Why does she look different from before…”

“…” Those words were undoubtedly a stab in the heart for Qin Wanyan.

Shi Sui turned his face to the side and asked Qin Wanyan, “No reaction?”

Qin Wanyan shook her head and said, “No…”

From that day on, the system disappeared but it didn’t mean that it had given up on her but rather, it was erasing her soul little by little…

It was like a beast that had captured its prey but it wasn’t eager to eat it in one bite. Instead, it was slowly toying with it, watching it suffer, go bonkers, collapse, and eventually slip into despair.

Shi Sui pondered for a moment and asked the chauffeur to send her away.

Xiang Feng asked in a silly manner, “What are the two of you doing? Why are you saying things I don’t understand?”

Shi Sui asked instead of answering, “Have you been approached by any strange people recently?”

Xiang Feng rubbed his chin and thought for a while before saying, “No.”

His assistant reminded, “Mr. Xiang, there’s something very fishy about the college student who touched you this morning, the clerk who spilled coffee on you last night, and the waiter who sneaked into your blanket into your hotel room…”

Xiang Feng laughed and said, “Hahaha, don’t you think they’re funny? Don’t panic, take a picture and put it on social media to entertain my friends!”

The assistant was speechless.

Shi Sui smirked. “So many people…”

There were almost as many people who approached him in the past year.

It was too deliberate, too bizarre, and too unbelievable.

Those people were even more frightening than stalker fans, for they would forever be able to track him down and appear in front of him.

At first, he thought they were just stalker fans but during an investigation, one of them discovered by chance that the person’s behavior was extremely abnormal.

It was as if they had the same core even though their appearance had changed.

For example, Xiang Yi.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 646 - Can'T Let The Chickens, Ducks, And Geese Suffer
chapters.body:
Chapter 646 - Can'T Let The Chickens, Ducks, And Geese Suffer

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

So, every time a person appeared, Shi Sui would organize a summary.

By the time of Xiang Yi’s return, he had counted a total of 17 people.

And now…

Xiang Feng seemed to have encountered the same situation.

However, he was too slow to react and did not realize it yet.

With a number in mind, Shi Sui looked at his wristwatch and calmly said, “It’s almost time, I should go back to feed Xiang Yi’s chickens, ducks and geese.”

The assistant at the side was flabbergasted to hear that. ‘Feed the chickens, ducks and geese!?!’

He really wanted to shake Shi Sui’s shoulders and yell at him to come to his senses!

‘Your hands are not meant for carrying out such tasks!’

The assistant looked at Xiang Feng with hope in his eyes, praying that Xiang Feng would dissuade Shi Sui, but to his surprise…

Xiang Feng nodded his head and agreed, “No matter how poor you are, you can’t save on education or let the chickens, ducks and geese suffer. So, feed them more food and don’t let them starve. I’m waiting to have Big Plate chicken, roast duck, and braised geese when Xiang Yi is back…”

The assistant was dumbstruck.

‘Is this why they say that a family tends to behave like each other?’

…

The expert group’s discussion came to an end, followed by clinical treatment.

Xiang Yi had been acting as Xiang Yin’s assistant for the past few days and her performance made the experts…or rather, her masters, thoroughly pleased with her. The more they looked at her, the more they liked her.

Xiang Yi was a diligent young woman of a few words and she was highly professional too. Be it in terms of theoretical knowledge accumulation or physical examination, she didn’t have a single flaw!

If he had to really nitpick…

The only flaw was that they had discovered this gem too late!

Knowing that Xiang Yi was now working as an artiste, many masters were tempted and began trying to poach her during the rare break time.

“Little girl, do you want to study for a doctorate’s degree with me?”

“Hey disciple, I have a quota for a master’s degree!”

“I’ll be visiting a famous foreign medical school soon. Why don’t you come with me?”

“…”

Xiang Yi turned their kind offers down.

Apart from sighing, there was nothing else her masters could do. They could only watch her put on the full-body protective clothing before entering the isolation ward again.

In the past few days, everyone had to maintain a high level of concentration at all times.

While it might be a test for the older experts, Xiang Yi was very good at adapting and she didn’t find it tiring at all.

Besides, she would sleep for only three or four hours each day.

“This little girl is kinda stubborn…” an expert sighed and lamented.

Everyone agreed in unison, feeling sympathetic.

However, they were also… very relieved.

“We are also considered to have a successor now.”

…

A new patient was sent to the ward and his symptoms were relatively mild. After taking his pulse, Xiang Yi had a general idea of his condition.

“In addition to the regular treatment, I will first prescribe him three sets of medicine…” Xiang Yi explained to the nurse. Through the protective mask, her voice sounded a bit muffled, but it could still be distinguished.

The man on the hospital bed asked with uncertainty, “Are you the Vase… Ahem, Xiang Yi?”

Xiang Yi asked, “Huh?”

Through the goggles, the young man saw a beautiful pair of eyes and his heart began pounding rapidly. He then said with a sullen face, “I don’t want you to treat me!”

His voice was so loud that the patients in the isolation area looked over in unison.

Thinking of the comments he saw on the Internet, the man instantly found his confidence again. “You’re so young and you’re a woman. I don’t feel comfortable letting you treat me!”

Xiang Yi understood what he meant. “Are you questioning my medical skills?”

chapters.title: Chapter 647 - So Many Fools
chapters.body:
Chapter 647 - So Many Fools

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Her tone was calm, without any fluctuations.

The man couldn’t figure out what she was thinking for a while and was rather apprehensive.

‘What should I do? What should do?’

‘What if Xiang Yi insists on curing me?!’

It was said on the internet that Xiang Yi was just a “Vase Fairy” who was just a pretty face. Some also said that she was a second-generation physician who had gotten into the expert group only because of her grandfather’s status as a famous doctor.

Then patient felt really unlucky to have contracted such a disease and even run into a poorly-skilled doctor like Xiang Yi!

“Anyway, I will definitely not let you treat me!”

“Please wait a moment, I’ll have someone ask another doctor to come over.”

The man’s hysterical shouting was in stark contrast to the young girl’s gentle and indifferent voice.

“…” The man’s eyes widened in disbelief upon hearing Xiang Yi’s words.

‘Huh? Why is Xiang Yi… different from what I imagined?’

Another patient who was sent to the hospital was a young female college student.

Her thoughts were different from men.

What did the fact that Xiang Yi was young but could be part of the bunch of bigwigs mean?

It meant that Xiang Yi was young but impressive!

She immediately raised her arms in joy and said, “Xiang Yi… Ahem, Dr. Xiang, can you help me take a look?”

Xiang Yi nodded and walked towards her bed.

The man felt lucky that he had made a smart decision, thinking to himself that there were lots of fools around him!

He felt a young, female doctor is not as reliable as an old expert!

Time passed by minute by minute.

The man discovered that the doctor who treated him only arrived late after Xiang Yi had finished checking the pulse of the college girl and gave a prescription.

The reason was no other than the fact that the medical staff were too busy.

The man who treated him was a very famous western doctor. In order to ensure the accuracy of the diagnosis, he first arranged for the man to undergo all sorts of tests.

These tests alone made the man feel overwhelmed enough.

After the test, he waited for a long time again before the doctor came again.

Hence, he was prescribed a large bunch of drugs and even had to get injections and infusions.

The man turned his head to look at the female college student on the bed next to his, only to see that she was drinking Chinese medicine!

The medicine had melatonin-inducing agents and soon, the female college student began to feel tired. She closed her eyes and dozed off.

The man could only comfort himself by telling himself that it must be that the Western medicine would take effect sooner and could cure his disease well!

He believed the claims on the Internet that the medicinal soups were all placebo that was meant for deceiving others!

The use of cell phones was not restricted in the hospital and the man had one hand connected to the drip and using the other to type a post.

After posting it, he swiped his fingers on his phone with great difficulty, only to feel that the days were passing like years.

One night passed and some medical staff came over to do a routine check on the female college student next to him before pushing her to another medical ward.

The man had been on a drip for a long time and he looked swollen and haggared. He reassured himself that the college girl’s condition must have worsened! What a tragedy, he thought.

Little did he know, that two posts appeared on the gossip forum…

The title of the post was clearly a clickbait: [I’m in the hospital of West Island. I want to survive]

The content of the post:

[I’ve never thought that the disaster will happen to me. This is like an apocalypse and it’s as if the world has dimmed. They suddenly discovered that living was a luxury!]

[I’m currently in the West Island Hospital and quite coincidentally, the first one to treat me is the Vase Fairy. Fortunately, I was smart enough and quickly got another doctor! It’d be strange if she can treat someone with those medical skills!]

Another post was very much like a rumor. [Damn it, I got sick and I’m about to fully recover????]

…

….

chapters.title: Chapter 648 - Dr. Xiang Yi
chapters.body:
Chapter 648 - Dr. Xiang Yi

The content of the article:

[First of all, let me calm down, I still feel like I’m dreaming… OK I’ll briefly explain my situation. Yes, I was infected with the disease that has been spreading in the western region recently, but my symptoms are very mild, and my body is functioning quite well.

When I was hospitalized, I was scared to death and I felt like I was going to kick the bucket really soon because I heard the spread of disease was getting worse… Then I met Xiang Yi, yes, the actress who is often hated online.

There was an annoying person on the bed next to mine who kept making a fuss about Xiang Yi being a young, female doctor, and claiming that she must be an incompetent doctor because of that. I was really angry to hear that, plus I felt that since Xiang Yi could join the expert group, she’d definitely be highly competent so I chose her treatment… Now I’ve been transferred to an isolation ward, and the nurse said I should be discharged within a week if things go well. 🙂 ]

As soon as the post was published, the gossipy fans flocked to it.

——[??? Is Xiang Yi a miraculous doctor?]

——[Damn it, what else can I say? Xiang Yi is impressive!]

——[Who knows if what you said is true or not? Have you really been cured just because you said so?]

——[Wait a minute, this post and the next post are linked! So the user who refused Xiang Yi’s treatment is still sick while this user has already almost recovered?]

There were a lot of people who were in doubt so the user added a few photos of herself in West Island Hospital.

There was a complete uproar in the post! The post made it to the hot search list!

The netizens who saw this post were all dumbfounded!

Huh? Two days ago on the Internet, there were still people hating on Xiang Yi and calling her out for being an incompetent doctor who relied only on her grandfather’s reputation. However, Xiang Yi still managed to cure the patient!

Some people said sarcastically:

[She just got lucky. The user has already said that her symptoms are minor, perhaps because she has great immunity. Maybe she healed on her own!]

At this moment…

The official media outlets in West Island posted something.

[Good news! The first patient cured in West Island has set the fastest record!

The netizens clicked in and took a look, only to realize that it was the user who posted that thread on the forum.

They initially thought she was exaggerating, but the truth is…

She was being too conservative!

She wasn’t almost recovered but rather, she was clearly alive and kicking!

She was just worried that it might still be contagious so she remained in the isolation ward for further observation!

Besides, the report was a detailed description of Xiang Yi.

Moreover, she was addressed as ‘Dr. Xiang Yi’ throughout!

“… Dr. Xiang Yi’s treatment plan, which is based on a flexible method of increasing and decreasing prescriptions and complementary dietary supplements, has accumulated a wealth of valuable clinical experience for our medical angels who are fighting on the front lines of the epidemic.]

“In addition, Dr. Xiang Yi also created the ‘Clear Heart Tai Chi Exercise’, which not only helped the patients get some physical exercise, but also relieved their anxious and sorrowful moods, adding a touch of vibrancy to the ward…”

At once, the netizens were overjoyed.

——[This is the greatest piece of good news I’ve heard in days!]

——[Told ya, Xiang Yi is the most impressive! I won’t accept any rebuttal!]

——[Hahaha, how come those sour grapes aren’t frolicking around? How many artists can make the official media praise them? There are barely any!]

…

In the ward.

When the man learned that the college girl in the bed beside his had recovered, he felt as if he had been struck by a bolt from the blue.

‘This…how is this possible?’

He was still being attached to the drip and yet, Xiang Yi had already treated the other patient???

chapters.title: Chapter 649 - The Witch'S Magic Cuisine
chapters.body:
Chapter 649 - The Witch'S Magic Cuisine

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Although the expert who treated him was also very powerful and his condition had improved, he paled in comparison to Xiang Yi…

Xiang Yi’s patient was alive and kicking while he was still lying on bed and too afraid to move around. It was especially inconvenient for him to go to the toilet…

If he had allowed Xiang Yi to treat him at the beginning, he might have already recovered by now.

The man regretted it and finally realized that he was a complete fool!

…

The post published by the female college student was shared on Weibo, together with the reports from the official media outlets. It could be said to be a slap on the face to the haters!

The netizens were gossipping only for fun but a Weibo user suddenly posted a set of photos.

There were pictures from one of the largest foreign social media platforms, and the content can simply be described as unpleasant.

All of a sudden.

The fan circle sisters were united in a minute and stood on the same side.

Thus, the netizens immediately flocked to the foreign social media website.

——[Let me see those orphans making a ruckus]

——[Come find out who your father is!]

——[Seriously? Seriously? Are there still people who really believe such fake news?”

——[Traditional Chinese medicine is nothing? Oh please, after 5,000 years of civilization we’ve produced countless famous doctors who have saved the poor and saved the poor and countless lives! Who are you scums to doubt them?]

Afterwards…

The netizens from America, Germany, Italy, and numerous other countries flocked over to show their kind and friendly intentions on the website.

It was extremely “passionate” all of a sudden.

As they argued, the netizens discovered that there were fewer and fewer people from the enemy’s side.

‘Huh, is their combat power declining?’

In the end, they discovered that countless netizens had updated their posts and statuses.

——[Oh my God, there’s finally a new episode of the mysterious Eastern cuisine show!]

——[Oh my God! I’ve finally waited till the day of the update of “Witch’s Magical Cuisine”! I’ve already prepared my burger, fried chicken, pasta, and beer!]

——[What delicacies will this adorable Eastern genie whip up this time? Oh God! I’m so excited! What should I do? I’ve already started salivating!]

The local netizens were confused.

‘What? Is this “The Witch’s Magic Cuisine” that you mentioned, some food show? Why does it sound so silly? Who’s Alice? Is she some famous celebrity from abroad?’

The crowd was baffled until a foreign student resolved their doubts.

——[Let me explain. “The Witch’s Magic Cuisine” is just the translated term of “Two Under One Roof”! In fact, Xiang Yi is very popular abroad and people of all ages, from the elderly to children, all like to watch her variety show! In a sense, Xiang Yi has fulfilled the export of food culture to foreign countries!]

The netizens were astonished!

‘What? So Xiang Yi is so popular among foreigners?’

The foreign student then updated the news with the following message:

——[In addition, the latest “Witch’s magic dance” has also become a hit on foreign social media today! There are lots of people who imitated her! I’ve already seen dozens of short video clips of people doing that!]

The curious netizens opened the videos, only to find that it was… Xiang Yi’s Mind-Calming Tai Chi exercise.

Tai Chi = Magic Dance?

There doesn’t seem to be anything….wrong with that?

chapters.title: Chapter 650 - This Is What It Should Be Like To Idolize A Celebrity
chapters.body:
Chapter 650 - This Is What It Should Be Like To Idolize A Celebrity

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The news spread back to the local website. The netizens were first confused, and then…

They could not help but burst into laughter!

‘As expected of you, Xiang Yi!’

The Spicy Rabbits were even more proud of it.

What does it mean when her cooking is called ‘Magic Cuisine’, her doing exercises is called ‘Magic Dancing’, and exporting Chinese food and Tai Chi culture in reverse? This means that Xiang Yi is a magical girl!

It didn’t take long for the phrase #MagicGirlXiangYi to become viral and rise to the hot search list.

The netizens’ comments were all over the place.

——[Ah, this is really funny. Xiang Yi, do you really not consider becoming a comedian?]

——[Not only is Xiang Yi funny, her fans have shown themselves several times too. They’re calm, peace-loving, silly, and positive. That’s what idolizing a star should be like, isn’t it?]

——[This is too magical. My little sister who’s in kindergarten has begun to ask me, just how Xiang Yi has transformed. How should I answer her? I’m getting really anxious while waiting]

…

Lunchtime.

The treatment program was beginning to show its effects, and the expert group can finally sit down properly to eat a meal.

Looking at his granddaughter who had lost a lot of weight in just a few days, Xiang Yin was terribly heartbroken.

In addition, there was also Old Master Fang, Old Master Yun, Old Master Jing and others who were scooping some vegetables and pouring her drinks, as if they were competing to give her more food. The food in front of the young girl had already been piled up into a mountain.

Xiang Yi did not push back and instead, started eating obediently. Her mouth was stuffed with so much food that her cheeks were puffed up and she looked like a little hamster.

“By the way, later the national TV reporter is coming over to broadcast live for a few minutes.” Old Master Fang was the most well-informed. He smiled and said, “I guess they’re going to interview Xiang Yi.”

Xiang Yi was not only capable, she was the “visual” of the group too!

Xiang Yi assented.

Then he took a big bite of the beefcake.

The national TV reporter and other people happened to come in and captured this scene.

Unlike the last live news link on West Island TV, this time, it was a live broadcast that could be seen by the whole country…

So…

The audience of the news, regardless of age and gender, felt like they were struck in the heart!

The elderly: Look, this child is starving! Come to Grandpa and Grandma, we’ll keep you full!

Middle-aged people: The way this little girl is eating looks so appetizing! Watching her eat makes me hungry too! If only she’s my daughter!’

The young people: Ahhhh so cute! I’m going to die, I’m going to die! Xiang Yi is such a cutie!!!

Reporter Song who came over to interview them had a hard time holding his laughter in.

He secretly pinched his thigh, walked to the table, first greeted the experts, and then began the interview.

First, it was the issue about the pandemic, which the people were the most concerned about. Old Master Fang spoke on their behalf and answered the reporter’s questions, after which he concluded, “Everything is going well. We have a promising future and I only wish the country and the people peace.”

Then, it was time for the small talk session.

As expected, Reporter Song directed the microphone at Xiang Yi and asked, “Dr. Xiang Yi, are these cakes good? What does it taste like?”

He thought that Xiang Yi would air her woes or complain or something. After all, she was still a young girl, and it was really quite hard for her to work so hard.

Unexpectedly…

Xiang Yi gave a thumbs up and exclaimed, “This is really fragrant!”

Pfft…

The audience at the scene burst into laughter and snickered out loud.

The young lady rubbed her stomach in a serious and embarrassed manner. “I….I want to eat another one, can I?”

chapters.title: Chapter 651 - Missing You
chapters.body:
Chapter 651 - Missing You

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

All of a sudden.

The audience was flabbergasted!

The real-time dynamics of the netizens on the Internet were all roaring,.

——[Eat! Let Xiang Yi eat!]

——[One is not enough! Eat a few more!]

——[I can’t stand it anymore. Nurse, give me more blood!]

–[Where’s the damned medic? Give me a shot of insulin!]

…

Xiang Yin handed over a cake with an austere look on his face and he sounded extremely fierce. “Eat!”

However, if one were to pay close attention, they will find that the cake he took was the largest one of the bunch.

Xiang Yi arched her eyebrows and ate the cake happily.

Reporter Song froze, and then burst into laughter.

The response was really wonderful.

One, the people were concerned about the diets of the medical staff fighting on the front line, and the fact that Xiang Yi ate so well proves that the medical staff were fed well.

Secondly, she did not complain about being tired or lament about anything. Instead, many people felt heartfelt sympathy on her and also the healthcare workers. The simple meal was enjoyable and it invoked lots of emotions within others.

Reporter Song thought of another entry point and unconsciously changed the way he addressed Xiang Yi. He asked in a warm voice, “I heard that you are very busy lately and have no time to contact your family and friends. Do you have anything to say? Our program team can convey it for you.”

Xiang Yi blinked and asked, “Can I say it to only one person?”

Reporter Song looked at the air time and realized that there wasn’t much time left.

The TV station would probably cut off the live broadcast at that point, but he could put the video online.

Hence, he said graciously, “Anyone can do it.”

Hearing his voice, Xiang Yi cleared his throat and looked at the screen. His clear and calm eyes seemed to be suffused with faint moonlight.

“Big Brother, no matter how busy you are at work, don’t drink coffee on an empty stomach.”

“Second Brother, you need to undergo regular rehabilitation and conditioning for your hand.”

“Third Brother, when you can’t draw a manuscript, don’t go to the trees for inspiration, it’s dangerous.”

“Fourth Brother, when you train for more than an hour, you have to look out of the window, otherwise your eyes will hurt.”

“Xiang Feng, the peaches and mulberries that we recently picked below your company should be ripe. Don’t pick them. It’s not that they’re poisonous but because… that is the landscape fruit tree. It tastes horrible… Third Brother and I have tried it previously.”

“…”

She sounded warm and interesting.

Surprisingly, the TV station didn’t stop the livestream.

Instead, the segment was played, in its entirety!

Across the screen, Xiang Yi’s words touched countless people!

In the past, people’s perception of doctors were more metaphysical, and there were even negative news about doctors that would appear very often in society.

The doctor-patient conflict, also occurred from time to time.

That’s because ordinary people… simply do not understand doctors.

Now, they suddenly realized that doctors are humans too.

There would also feel joy, anger and sadness. They also had emotional ties, and…

A gentle and adorable side.

Many people began to tear up.

But I heard Xiang Yi abruptly paused for two seconds before she pursed her lips and looked down, her black eyelashes trembling slightly.

“And… boyfriend…”

“Did you miss me?”

The audience was flabbergasted!

‘What? Aren’t we watching the news on national TV? Why are we watching this public display of affection!?!’

The fair and beautiful young girl on the screen mustered the courage to look directly at the camera, her eyes like falling stars.

They were bright and full of joy.

She said softly, “I miss you!”

After saying that, the little girl pretended to be calm.

However, her soft fingertips, which she was using to hold the beefcake, began to curl up because of how shy she was.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 652 - Two-Way Fancying
chapters.body:
Chapter 652 - Two-Way Fancying

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The audience was so in awe that they couldn’t keep their mouths shut.

The fans of the UntimelyCouple… went mad.

The forums were full of the agitated screaming of fans of the couple.

——[Ahhh kill me to celebrate for Shi Sui and Xiang Yi!]

——[This is so sweet! So sweet! Shi Sui, do you hear that, Xiang Yi is saying she misses you!]

——[I’m going to pass out. Is Xiang Yi getting shy? Hurry up and eat the cake, it’s going to taste awful if it gets cold! Don’t worry, we’ll tell Shi Sui for you!]

…

Meanwhile…

In the livestream of ‘Two Under One Roof’.

The guest today was the domineering CEO, Xiang Feng.

The fans criticized Li Jianyu for being a miser but they soon enjoyed themselves.

The reason was none other than Xiang Feng’s comical antics!

They felt that he was really grounded because he climbed trees, touched fishes, and had one leg crossed over the other in a languid manner! Besides, he was a walking bragger, which happens to complement Shi Sui’s gentle and quiet nature.

Their livestream lasted for more than a day and even the term ‘SuiFeng Couple’ emerged.

——[What to do? The silly domineering CEO X Handsome Shi Sui seems to be a couple that I can stan?]

The fans of the UntimelyCouple sneered and stayed calm.

——[The UntimelyCouple is the real couple! The rest are all concubines!]

The SuiFeng Couple fans were indignant. Xiang Feng and Shi Sui had known each other for years and during the darkest years of Shi Sui’s life, Xiang Feng was the one who extended a helping hand to sign a contract with him.

Besides, in terms of age, Shi Sui and Xiang Feng had known each other for years longer than Shi Sui and Xiang Yi have known each other!

However, when Shi Sui switched on the TV to watch the live news, the comment section was instantly occupied by the fans of the UntimelyCouple.

The crying SuiFeng Couple fans: It’s our mistake after all.

Xiang Feng was a very noisy person who could talk and entertain himself when he was alone. Now that he was with Shi Sui, he was even more talkative.

While munching on the crispy potato chips, Shi Sui said smugly, “Xiang Yi is so pretty! She actually looks good under the unfiltered camera lens of the national TV channel!”

Only then did the crowd come to a sudden realization.

Yes!

This is a live broadcast on national TV!

The true, unfiltered appearance of all celebrities would be revealed under the camera lens of the national TV but not only did Xiang Yi manage to resist it, the exquisiteness of her features were highlighted!

Standing among the crowd, she was so fair that she seemed to be glowing.

Xiang Yi was eating some meatloaf while two men in the living room occupied the two ends of the sofa. One was grinning from ear to ear while the other was gazing at her with a doting gaze and a faint smile.

When hearing the instructions that Xiang Yi gave to her family, Xiang Feng wailed and slapped his thighs.

“Ooo Xiang Yi, you and Xiang Qi actually went to pick peaches and mulberries without me!”

The crowd of netizens were dumbfounded.

‘Xiang Feng, your focus doesn’t seem right!’

Shi Sui has an extremely straight jawline. He was lying lazily on the couch in a rather relaxed manner.

However, when he heard the phrase “I miss you”, there was some charming light in the bottom of his dark eyes.

It was as if the cold galaxy had begun burning.

Xiang Feng was displeased. “Why didn’t you say that you miss me too!?! Am I not your favorite uncle anymore!?”

Shi Sui, who was beside him, assented softly and looked down, his handsome face turning blurry and gentler by the light.

He said with a clear voice that contained some joy, “Yes, I miss you too.”

There seemed to be a spell put on Xiang Feng, which stopped him from speaking. He even kept quiet at this moment.

A few moments later, he let out an earth-shattering roar, “How brutal! Are you guys out to kill me!?!”

In the livestream, the fans cheered like it was a carnival.

——[Hahahahaha, Xiang Feng is indeed the group bully!]

——[Sisters, it’s a two-way fancy. You’ll be in for a profit if you earn it]

——[I hereby declare that the newlyweds are officially married. Let’s play some music! Dang~dang dang dang~~~]

chapters.title: Chapter 653 - We Are Not Worthy
chapters.body:
Chapter 653 - We Are Not Worthy

…

…

The fans of the SuiFeng Couple immediately started hugging and crying on the spot.

Sorry, we’re not worthy! The official couple is more worthy!

Reporter Song was indeed worthy of being a reporter. She kept smiling even after having some public display of affection shoved into her face.

The voice of the writer-director came from the headset. “Continue, interview them for two more minutes! The ratings have exploded!”

Not only the ratings, but also the index of online searches on the network kept increasing.

The web page of the simulcast crashed right away because of the influx of viewers in a short period of time…

The program team deliberately made adjustments to buy more interview time.

Of course, the main thing was that the interview had to be appropriate.

There was not only positive energy, but also a natural flow of affection and love. Besides, it was such a hot topic that was absolutely newsworthy and loved by media personnel.

After thinking about it, Reporter Song asked about Xiang Yi’s “Heart-Clearing Tai Chi Exercise”.

“Xiang Yi, your Tai Chi Exercise has been popular abroad. Do you have anything to say about it?”

Xiang Yi was embarrassed and she said, “I can’t say it’s mine, I adapted it from some basic movements of Tai Chi, it’s actually equivalent to… radio calisthenics? It’s mainly for the patients to move around and relax.”

“So that’s how it is.” Reporter Song asked with a smile, “I’m a little surprised. There aren’t many young people who understand Tai Chi these days.”

“I only know a little bit.”

“Why don’t you teach us a few Tai Chi moves for self-defense, Xiang Yi?”

Xiang Yi hesitated and said, “I’ll teach you some for exercising? I also have a simple version of Tai Chi exercises.”

“Okay.” Reporter Song thought it was just some Tai Chi exercises that could not be used for combat in real life so he didn’t put Xiang Yi in a difficult spot.

The young lady got up and casually started…

There was an ancient vibe to her moves and they were rigid but flexible. It was a combination of softness, etherealness, and toughness.

Her qi, form and spirit were fused perfectly like flowing water.

The audience was dumbfounded.

——[The movement is simple, but his aura is so strong!!]

——[I was shocked, I felt the wind through the screen! Xiang Yi doesn’t really know martial arts, does she?]

——[Heh, but that’s all! If she were to punch me, she would also have to kneel on the ground and beg me not to die!]

Even Reporter Song, who had seen a lot of things, froze in shock.

He had seen the representatives of several major Tai Chi schools in China, all of whom had been practicing for decades, and only then had the “internal strength” as described in martial arts novels.

However, Xiang Yi was young, and yet, he felt her “inner strength”!

From such a distance, his hair was blown by the wind brought up by Xiang Yi’s actions.

She doesn’t teach self-defense moves because… emmmm… don’t need to?

After Xiang Yi demonstrated the moves, there was applause coming from everywhere and the experts kept praising her incessantly.

“Our apprentice is amazing!”

“Our little apprentice has done a perfect combination of rigidity and flexibility, and a combination of intent and energy! Wonderful!”

“Is there anything in this world that my apprentice can’t do? No! My apprentice is too good!”

The little girl was a little embarrassed. She pursed her cherry lips and said, “I’m not… not very powerful…”

The experts exclaimed, “No! Our good pupil is excellent!”

“You don’t have to be too modest, my dear apprentice!”

“That’s right, who dares to badmouth you? If anyone tries to do that, I will dissect a bunny and show it to him!”

“…”

The crowd rattled on incessantly, praising her to no end.

The audience was onfused.

‘Hey, aren’t you experts usually very serious?! Why are you pampering a girl like that!?’

….

chapters.title: Chapter 654 - She Is An Angel
chapters.body:
Chapter 654 - She Is An Angel

Amidst the happy and harmonious atmosphere, the buzzer on the table suddenly started ringing.

The experts who had been relaxed immediately sat upright with stern looks on their faces.

Some hurriedly wiped their mouths while some organized their clothes and others skillfully took off their wigs…

In the beginning, there were viewers who were puzzled and joked cheekily.

——[You’ll be punished by heavens when you persuade people to study medicine]

——[Expert: I’m getting bald on the road to learning medicine. I’ve become stronger too!]

——[I suddenly found that Xiang Yi and Xiang Yin have the best hair among them all! The Xiang family’s genes are really amazing!]

…

Reporter Song was about to ask what happened to Xiang Yi, but he saw the young girl striding towards the outside.

“Dr. Xiang Yi…”

The young girl turned around, her clear eyes calm and indifferent. She nodded at him slightly before saying, “Excuse me.”

Reporter Song was confused.

‘Why did he…leave just like that?’ The rest of the younger experts left one after another.

Old Master Jing was eager to protect his son so he propped himself up against the table before saying, “No, I have to go and take a look. I can’t let my good apprentice be exhausted…”

However, his body swayed a little after getting up and Reporter Song quickly rushed over to hold him.

Old Master Jing’s eyes were red with anger, “If I were ten years younger, these would be nothing! Nothing!”

Old Master Yun sighed, they now have the intention to practice medicine, but their body couldn’t keep up.

After days of fighting, only Xiang Yi could still move about and they, the old men, were already so exhausted to the point that they could no longer move.

The esteemed Old Master Fang explained, “This alert indicates that a patient needs to be rescued…”

Reporter Song suddenly realized that this was the case.

“Forget it. Let’s also go and take a look. Even if we can’t personally go over and help, we can at least we can give them a tip.” Old Master Fang waved his hand and said, “We can’t let the young people look down on us!” The crowd supported each other and dragged their fatigued bodies, but their eyes were filled with incomparable determination.

Occasionally, there would be the sound of experts bickering.

“You old man, can you do it or not? You’re panting after two steps? Wasn’t he very nimble when he grabbed the braised lion’s head just now?”

“If I may say so, you Western doctors should also learn to nurture your health with us!”

“What’s wrong with wearing a wig? That’s better than some of you who are wearing dentures!”

“…”

Reporter Song’s throat rolled. Looking at the experts who were exhausted but still smiling and chatting calmly, they couldn’t voice their emotions.

This bunch of people were the ones who provided solutions for their problems.

“We would like to thank the medical staff for their efforts.” Reporter Song, who had always been a brilliant writer, spoke wryly at this moment. He could not find the words to express his mood at the moment. “We’ve come to the end of our live broadcast today.”

The live broadcast was interrupted, and the other news began to air.

The audience in front of the screen, were speechless for a long time.

That scene was too shocking.

In particular, when Xiang Yi took the lead and walked out, her steps were so fast that it was as if she was stepping on wind.

Her slender, thin figure carried way too much.

Even the most heartless people felt…that it really wasn’t easy for her.

…

On the Internet.

The Spicy Rabbits were bawling.

——[The moment Xiang Yi rushed out without any hesitation was really tear-jerking!]

——[All those who are hating on her, listen up! She’s not a Vase Fairy, she’s not a second-generation doctor, she’s a doctor! She’s an angel!!!]

——[Oh my God, I’m watching the livestream of the national TV and Two Under One Roof at the same time. Shi Sui’s expression is so pitiful!]

…

In the living room.

Shi Sui lowered his long eyelashes without moving.

If one were to look at him carefully, they will find that his hand, which was hanging on the sofa, was clenched into a fist.

He was using so much strength that his knuckles were pale.

chapters.title: Chapter 655 - Let'S Each Talk About Our Own
chapters.body:
Chapter 655 - Let'S Each Talk About Our Own

Even the braggart, Xiang Feng, had his head hung low in dejection.

He actually knew that although Xiang Yin supported his descendants in choosing the profession they loved, he definitely wanted someone to inherit his medical skills.

Unfortunately, Xiang Chen, the others, and himself were really not interested in the art of medicine.

His attentive little niece could sensed Xiang Yin’s dejection. Hence, she had been staying by his side since she was a child.

She had an undeniable interest in the art of medicine but it was mostly…because she wanted Xiang Yin to have a successor.

When Xiang Yi was a child, she would often find herself dozing off while memorizing Traditional Chinese medicine recipes. When she faces questions that she doesn’t understand sometimes, she would even secretly hide in a corner to cry.

To this day, Xiang Feng would still be heartbroken whenever he thought about it.

He thought his little niece would be happy when she grew up, but he didn’t expect her to become more and more pitiful as she had to bear a greater responsibility.

Xiang Feng sniffled and said with genuine sorrow, “Ahhh it’s been so hard on our dear Xiang Yi… When you come back, I’ll surely buy you some fried chicken, ice-cream, and spicy snacks!”

The netizens watching the livestream:

——[What a dangerous speech, Mr. Xiang]

——[He’s going to take Xiang Yi to have junk food? How should I say it? There’s a reason why he’s bullied by the group]

——[In fact, although Xiang Feng is a little naive, he’s really nice to Xiang Yi~ He just wants to make Xiang Yi happy. I cry too easily. I want to cry again]

…

Xiang Feng turned his head to the side and said tearfully, “Shi Sui, go ahead and cry if you want to. You don’t have to hold back! Come on, Daddy’s shoulder is for you to lean on!”

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows. “What?”

Xiang Feng said, “I’ll call you Suisui, you call me Daddy. We can each talk about our own things!”

Shi Sui responded with a smile.

“Why don’t I beat you up and you get beaten up by me after that? Isn’t that fair too?”

Xiang Feng was confused.

Seeing that Shi Sui began to stroke his sleeves, Xiang Feng began to run for his life. “Help~ Xiang Yi, quickly come back to save me!”

Shi Sui chased after him unhurriedly. “Save your breath, Xiang Yi can be saved anyway.”

Xiang Feng was flabbergasted!

The esteemed domineering preseident was running so quickly that his slippers had fallen off, causing the audience to be amazed.

——[My eyes are teary and I held back my tears again/smile]

…

The more laughable thing was that Xiang Feng climbed up a large tree that he chanced upon while running.

His movements were so skilled that it would make anyone who saw him tear up.

How experienced must he be…

——[Xiang Feng is so skilled at climbing the tree to save his life that it hurts…]

——[I imagined the scene of him getting chased and beaten up by Xiang Chen and Xiang Li. Xiang Feng is such a pitiful man]

——[Help, who remembers that Xiang Feng is a domineering president? Why doesn’t he smile sinisterly? He doesn’t have a scheming gaze either!]

…

Shi Sui folded his arms and said indifferently, “Come down.”

While hugging the tree trunk, Xiang Feng exclaimed in a shaky voice, “Come on up!”

Shi Sui sneered.

Xiang Feng shuddered.

He remembered that Shi Sui also seemed to be able to climb the tree…

‘UwU what if he climbs up later?’

Xiang Feng was in misery but he couldn’t see the trees clearly through the dense tree branches.

Afterwaiting for a long time, there was no longer any movement under the tree. Despite feeling a strong urge to relieve nature’s call, Xiang Feng did not dare to go down.

Xiang Feng maniacally imagined it in his head. He reckoned that Shi Sui must be waiting downstairs so he’d definitely court death if he were to go down now.

Boing boing boing boing boing!

Little did he know that Shi Sui had only paused for a moment under the tree before leaving…

The camera tilted up and shot the tree. It was like a still image, but the viewers of the livestream laughed maniacally.

——[I’m laughing hysterically. Hahahahaha!]

…

chapters.title: Chapter 656 - Ancestral Phenomenon
chapters.body:
Chapter 656 - Ancestral Phenomenon

——[Shocked. A certain domineering president actually seems to be evolving backwards into our predecessors]

——[Shi Sui is too vicious. He left just like that. Mr. Xiang is really pitiful]

Xiang Feng stayed on the tree for about two or three minutes, during which he cautiously tilted his head down to take a look.

… hmm?

”Where is he???

He looked bewildered, and after a few seconds, regained his firmness.

“Heh, you just played a trick on me!” Xiang Feng was like a famous detective trying to make conjectures about the crime scene. “Sui Sui, you underestimate me too much!”

The man was seriously being comical and he was even more humorous than a comedian when teasing others.

The audience of the livestream left lots of “hahaha” pop-up comments.

——[Help! Someone help me, I’m really going to die laughing!]

——[Xiang Feng, a man whose perfection lies in the fact that he’s easily amused]

——[Mr. Xiang! Shi Sui has really just lef! He’s really just gone!]

…

In the midst of all the attention, Xiang Feng put his hands on his waist and laughed wildly while sitting on the tree trunk, as if he was waiting for an eternity to pass.

About ten or so minutes later…

Li Jianyu could no longer hold back his laughter. He said, “Mr. Xiang, Shi Sui has really left.”

“Gone?” Xiang Feng wrapped his arms around him and looked down on Li Jianyu. With a domineering and condescending gaze in his eyes, he remarked, “Do you think I will believe it? Naive, stupid and ridiculous man!”

Li Jianyu: Try scolding me again? This scene, which also became one of the classic famous scenes of “Two Under One Roof” was later reposted by countless loyal fans and the funniest clips of the variety show would definitely include that scene.

…

The team found a ladder and went up one by one to persuade him to come down after a great deal of effort.

One second…

Two seconds…

After waiting for a full ten seconds, Xiang Feng did not see Shi Sui coming out to beat him, and he was instantly confused.

‘Is…is he really gone???’

…

Meanwhile.

On Weibo, an unknown director released a video clip.

It was a short promotional clip about the fight against the epidemic.

The starting points for the parents of the people in the film were shot very naturally. They weren’t stereotypically tear-jerking but they somehow tugged at heartstrings.

From the beginning to the end, the characters that appeared were all played by some unknown actors, and even the director himself went up to make a cameo appearance.

The only exception to this rule was Shi Sui.

He played a university teacher who taught online lessons remotely.

He wore a cotton plaid shirt and replaced his glasses with the most common black-rimmed glasses. However, he still could not hide his clean and clear temperament.

His long and flawless fingertips were knocked gently on the desktop twice.

He said in a warm voice, “Hello students, please turn to page 79 of the University Physics…”

The young movie star obviously used the original voice in the flurry. His line-reading was impeccable, and even if the scene was slightly noisy, the man’s pronunciation was still clear to all ears.

“!”

The Shi Sui Sisters who swiped to this highlight clip were thrilled!

——[Love me a Physics teacher!]

——[Oh my God, oh my God, our movie star is finally starting!]

——[His acting skills are so flawless and the sense of immersion is too strong!]

…

The video, without any publicity, surprisingly climbed into the hot search list.

Zhuo Yi, who saw this hot search, held his phone tightly.

“Eating Well For All Three Meals” was going downhill more and more, and he heard that Muyao TV was ready to abandon the program and let a new variety show take its place.

Now, he and Jiang Yun’er’s reputation is ruined, but how can Shi Sui have such a smooth life? Zhuo Yi’s eyes were red with jealousy? He switched to his private account and found a Weibo user to break the news….

chapters.title: Chapter 657 - Zero Pay!
chapters.body:
Chapter 657 - Zero Pay!

…

In the rental house.

The “ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” shook his leg while playing the game.

Since he started operating the Weibo post account “ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” and “BadgerInTheGossipField”, he had earned a lot of money but he squandered them all.

He had either spent them on online gambling, or for topping up his credits in games.

Once he ran out of money, he would continue to slam celebrities online and rely on traffic.

However, after “ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” got mocked for slamming Xiang Yi a few days ago, he was worried that he might face revenge so he laid low for a few days and only posted neutral things.

After playing the game, he lit a cigarette and slid his mouse to browse through Weibo hot searches, looking for material for today’s post.

The bottom right corner showed a private message from a friend. He clicked on it and found a new story from a netizen named “Extraordinary Zhuo’er”.

Netizens had given him information several times and every single time, the news would be extremely juicy and shocking. ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker had managed to gain lots of clout and fame thanks to those information.

As soon as he saw that, ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker’s eyes lit up though his face was yellow and haggard because of all the late nights he had pulled.

…

Half an hour later.

The fans of ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker realized that he had updated his Weibo.

[@ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker: According to a netizen, a certain ‘Best Actor’ has charged extremely high fees for acting and he seems to have engaged in illegal activities! Aren’t the relevant departments going to investigate? Why do we have to work so hard to pay taxes while some people can just evade tax?”

…

The topic of taxation would be on the headlines of the society news section from time to time.

The taxes paid by celebrities were the focus of numerous people’s attention.

Upon sight of that Weibo post, the netizens reading the post all began to let their imagination run wild.

——[Ah… It can’t be the Best Actor I’m thinking of, right?]

——[That person on the hot search? Umm this is very strange]

——[His girlfriend is fair, rich and beautiful while he’s a rich man himself. There’s really no need for him to do that]

——[Those in front, you probably don’t know. Due to an incident that happened to SS’s family, there was a change in his family’s business, which landed them in debt. He debuted for the sake of earning money!]

——[Don’t use an abbreviation! I’m so curious. Is SS Shi Sui? (whispers)]

…

The Shi Sui Sisters immediately controlled the comments.

——[Don’t believe the rumors, don’t spread rumors. Don’t create rumors]

——[Please pay more attention to Shi Sui’s career. He’s a Triple-Gold actor whose box office sales exceeded 10 billion yuan. Fashionable child Shi Sui]

——[Since the establishment of Shi Sui Studio, we have been paying taxes, and Shi Sui himself has supported public welfare many times. He has been donating to the citizens in poor mountainous areas, children who have dropped out of school, children from deaf schools, psychological institutions, etc. Please don’t disappoint people who really want to do charity]

…

However, “ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” smelled some gossip.

He switched to his private account and played different roles.

——[Shi Sui would never do such a thing! Trust him unconditionally!]

——[I’m really shocked. SS actually charged such a high fee for his acting and is guilty of tax evasion?]

——[Um, here’s a conspiracy theory. The previous donation of 50 million yuan for the West Island region is not for money laundering, right… Think through it very carefully!]

…

After he posted it with several accounts, that Weibo post rose to popularity!

The “ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” was looking at the rising number of views. He was thinking that he could make a lot of money today. An alert box suddenly popped up on the screen.

[Your account has been blocked!]

“ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker” was confused.

At the same time, the director of the short film began to speak up.

“Thank you, Shi Sui, for appearing in my short film without any pay! I am deeply touched and I would like to express my deepest gratitude!”

…

….

chapters.title: Chapter 658 - Meeting Each Other (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 658 - Meeting Each Other (1)

Hey… Hey!?

The netizens who had just stood on the side of justice and morals were shocked.

The plot twist was too unexpected!

After all, the salary and appearance fee of A-list stars start from at least a million yuan.

Surprisingly, it is not a sky-high fee…

But zero pay?

——[Is this… real or fake?]

——[How can I be so untrusting? Are there still artistes in the entertainment industry who choose not to earn money when they can?]

——[Are you sure it’s not some fake contract? On the surface, it’s a zero-pay contract and next, the real contract is a real one?]

…

The director replied to the comment about the shady contract.

——[Please don’t assume things and treat others with prejudice. Maybe there are really such signs in the circle but I’m willing to guarantee with my life that Shi Sui hasn’t accepted a single cent. He didn’t even make us pay for transport! All the participating actors can testify!]

There were more and more people who stood forth.

There were actors who joined the shoot for the short film, as well as the screenwriter and the post-production team.

Even the owner of the takeout restaurant that delivered the lunch boxes was full of praise for Shi Sui.

——[This kid is really handsome! He’s very polite too! After delivering takeout, it looked like it was going to pour and he even gave me an umbrella!]

The public opinion was biased to the other side.

However, this time, it was positive!

Only this time, it’s a positive opinion! There are also insiders who have revealed that not only did Shi Sui offer not to charge a fee this time, he also said that he wouldn’t charge for all the charity films that he stars in in the future!

That wasn’t all. The director who gave him the opportunity at the beginning of his career had also charged a friendly price.

The friends asked him to save them and he went without hesitation.

The netizens only then realized while they were in a trance, that Shi Sui seemed to… not only act well, but also had a great character!

The crowd were enjoying the drama with great pleasure. Some people also gossiped and the city that Shi Sui shot in today was quite close to the West Island area. However, he was soon ridiculed by netizens.

‘What a joke. Will Shi Sui go see Xiang Yi just because they’re close by?’

‘Is Shi Sui that in love?’

…

At the same time.

In the nanny van, Shi Sui crossed a leg over the other and his slender fingers were moving, as if he were weaving something.

He casually put his tablet at the side with Si Chuanbai’s expressionless face.

He said, “The owner of the post about the rumors you created today has already been dealt with. All those accounts like ProfessionalInfluencerWrecker belong to haim alone.”

Shi Sui said calmly, “Yes.”

Seeing that Si Chuanbai reacted calmly, he added, “He slams Xiang Yi all the time too. However, he’s very scheming and he has filled in overseas addresses for his profile information. It took a great deal of effort to report him successfully. I’ve already sent the detailed information to Xiang Chen. He said that he will personality write a legal letter.”

Nowadays, it required capital to create rumors. At the very least, he had to openly apologize.

if it were other artistes, they probably wouldn’t be so calculative but unfortunately, he had offended a person who was over protective of his sister.

Shi Sui frowned. “Are there a lot of people who slammed Xiang Yi? I reported all of them.”

“…?”

Si Chuanbai was speechless. ‘You don’t even care when they slam you. Why have you changed at the mention of Xiang Yi? Tsk. You’re very two-faced!’

“Okay, I’ll see to it.”

“If there’s nothing, I’ll hang up.” Shi Sui picked up the tablet, ready to hang up the video call.

Si Chuanbai subconsciously saw the green threads on the man’s fingertips and he exclaimed in shock, “You’re knitting a sweater?”

chapters.title: Chapter 659 - Meeting Each Other (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 659 - Meeting Each Other (2)

“No.”

Si Chuanbai breathed a little bit of relief.

The next second, Shi Sui said indifferently, “I’m knitting a hairclip.”

Si Chuanbai was confused.

‘What? Is it the hairclip I’m thinking about?’

“I’m knitting them for Xiang Yi.” Shi Sui sent a few photos to Si Chuanbai with a gentle tap of his fingers. They were photos of knitted hairclips, which were very much in trend these days. The photos of the hairclips that were of bright colors and cute patterns. “Since other kids have these hairclips, Xiang Yi must have them too.”

Si Chuanbai looked at hairclips with various patterns on them, such as strawberries, bunnies, and Snow White. He then fell into silence.

“I’m going to continue knitting, bye.” Shi Sui hung up the phone calmly.

Si Chuanbai slowed down for a few seconds and asked Ah Nan who was not far away. “Hey you, the one with the colored hair.”

In the office, Ah Nan was typing away loudly on his laptop and snapping back at the netizens online. The speed of his typing of profanities was amazingly fast.

However, despite his aggression online, Ah Nan was sucking on a lollipop in real life and assenting cutely.

Si Chuanbai talked to him about Shi Sui knitting hairclips and showed him the photos. “These stuff probably cost only a few bucks each online, right? Must he knit them by hand?”

Ah Nan was speechless. “… this is probably the reason you can’t find a girlfriend.”

Si Chuanbai asked raised his eyebrows, “Eh?”

“Don’t you think it’s sweet?” Ah Nan’s tone was full of anger. “It’s so sweet! He’s giving something he made with his own hands to the person he likes. Who can top that!?!”

“Is that so…”

Ah Nan clicked on the #UntimelyCouple forum and manually taught Si Chuanbai to stan the couple.

“Come on! I’ll teach you how to appreciate and support the couple. First, you focus on the way they look at each other, followed by their conversation, and then the details! But the real experts are those who can come up with something sweet even when they’re not in the same frame! We usually call them the experts!”

Si Chuanbai pushed his glasses up with a serious expression and began noting things down. From time to time, he wouldn’t forget to write anything down.

The room, in which the humidifier was switched on, was filled with mist.

Si Chuanbai, who was wearing a suit, and Ah Nan, who was dressed in athletic wear, had their heads pressed together.

…

After nightfall, it was raining in West Island.

The patients brought in have all received effective medical treatment.

However, all the experts were helpless as they hadn’t been able to find the cure for the root problem.

Since they finally had the time, most of the people had gone to get some rest and sleep that had become a luxury.

However, Xiang Yi did not rest and instead, browsed through the electronic versions of ancient medical books with concentration written all over his face.
