The electronic file contained photocopied versions of pictures of the texts without even punctuation marks, or traditional Chinese characters.

It was difficult for ordinary people to even break the sentences up but Xiang Yi had no difficulties reading it at all and browsed through the pages at a very fast speed.

Suddenly…

Her fingertips stopped and she read it a few more times, her young, round, and doe-like eyes getting brighter and brighter.

‘I found it!’

Xiang Yi hurriedly took a screenshot and sent them to the new group of experts. She also summarized her notes and sent them too.

In her mind, the long-awaited prompt suddenly popped up.

“Host, the male lead is just below your place!”

Xiang Yi was stunned for two seconds and she quickly opened the window. Amidst the rain and the dark, quiet night, she exchanged glances with a thin figure.

“Pfft, pfft…”

Xiang Yi’s heartbeat accelerated. At a complete loss, her fingers curled.

“Buzz, buzz-“

Her phone vibrated, and with a sideways glance, she saw the name on the screen.

[AAA Boyfriend]

…

chapters.title: Chapter 660 - Pocket Money
chapters.body:
Chapter 660 - Pocket Money

The video call was connected.

After a moment of black screen, Shi Sui’s face appeared on the screen.

Xiang Yi blinked, feeling a little overwhelmed. He awkwardly waved his hand and said, “Hi.”

The light around Shi Sui fell silent. He stood under the streetlamp, clad in a dark black sweater that he had just changed into, which accentuated the fairness of his skin tone.

Shi Sui asked in a warm voice, “Hello?”

Xiang Yi greeted, “Hello.”

The curvature of his eyebrows deepened and he asked, “Xiang Yi, have you eaten properly?”

Xiang Yi felt a bit diffident but she still said, “Yes, yes.”

“What did you have for dinner?”

Xiang Yi couldn’t answer, and she said vaguely, “I-I ate a lot at lunch! The beef cakes smell especially good. I’ll make them for you when I get back!”

Shi Sui sighed but he did not expose her.

He merely answered softly, “Aren’t you cold? Be careful not to catch a cold.”

The little girl on the screen was wearing only a cream-colored short-sleeved loose shirt, probably so that she could move around easily. However, she looked very cold and slender on this rainy summer night.

Xiang Yi immediately leaped onto the single bed and wrapped the blanket around her body. “It won’t be cold like this!”

Shi Sui said, “Xiang Yi, you’re very obedient.”

Xiang Yi swung her little feet.

I was complimented.

She was initially nervous but because of Shi Sui’s silent reassurance, Xiang Yi gradually calmed down and gradually chatted with Shi Sui.

It was obviously some insignificant nonsense, but somehow… She felt very heartened but she was also very blissful.

“Do you feel that we look like an old married couple like this?” Xiang Yi twisted the little blanket and started playing with it.

It was like the way her parents interacted.

One of the words that she said had pleased Shi Sui and the man’s dark eyes were filled with joy. He assented softly.

Xiang Yi came to a sudden realization and asked, “Did you not bring an umbrella!?!”

The drizzling rain drenched Shi Sui’s hair.

The system’s voice was full of compulsion.

“Host, you can now send an umbrella to the male lead~ Not only can you give him an umbrella, you can leave a good impression on him too!”

Xiang Yi agreed.

The system was ecstatic. ‘Finally! This woman is finally going to start doing the task! This is great!’

The next second, Xiang Yi transferred a sum of money to Shi Sui.

At the same time, Shi Sui’s phone rang.

[AAA Girlfriend transferred one million yuan to you!]

Shi Sui was speechless.

The system was speechless.

Xiang Yi said with a serious look on her face, “I can’t give you the umbrella. Why don’t you go back in accordance with the rules to quarantine! I’m sorry, can you go to the convenience store to get an umbrella? Why don’t I help you order takeout?”

The system was about to vomit blood. “No, Host, an umbrella is not that expensive…”

Xiang Yi ignored it while her delicate, porcelain-like face turned red. “D-Don’t misunderstand. I don’t mean to humiliate you with money. I-I want to give you pocket money…”

Just like how her grandparents, uncle, and brothers had given her allowance.

Her definition of pocket money was always the same growing up. That was, she was getting pocket money because her family loved her.

Unfortunately, Xiang Yi was the youngest and couldn’t give out pocket money to others if she wanted to.

But today…

She finally gave some pocket money to her boyfriend!

“Why won’t you say anything?” Xiang Yi was a little uneasy as she began to wonder if she was hurting Shi Sui’s ego.

‘Is my boyfriend…. angry?’

chapters.title: Chapter 661 - Are You Satisfied?
chapters.body:
Chapter 661 - Are You Satisfied?

On the other end of the screen.

Shi Sui pulled up the hood of his sweatshirt and buttoned it up to cover himself.

The knot in his throat rolled while unfamiliar emotions surged and rolled in his heart.

However, it was… wonderful.

Shi Sui had always been a supporter of equal rights for men and women, and he wasn’t a male chauvinist either. Hence, he wouldn’t say that Xiang Yi was insulting him or taking pity on him by giving him money.

He really felt blissful.

When his parents were separated and his family changed drastically during his childhood, pocket money was an unbelievable luxury for Shi Sui.

However, Xiang Yi actually gave him pocket money…

‘What a gentle, tender, and warm Xiang Yi.’

“If you don’t like it, I won’t do that in the future.”

“I’m sorry, it’s my first time being in a relationship. My bad.”

“Will…will you pay attention to me?”

“…”

The young girl’s clear voice came through the phone.

Shi Sui finally lifted his eyebrows.

His peach-blossom-shaped eyes, which had upturned outer corners and curved inner corners, were shining brightly as if they were full of stars at this moment.

“Thank you, Xiang Yi, I’m very happy.”

“Really?” Xiang Yi breathed a sigh of relief, “That’s good, that’s good.”

Shi Sui took out a few hairclips from his pocket. After all, it was the first time he wove them and the finished product was slightly rough. He touched his nose with some embarrassment and said, “Do you like it?”

The man’s slender and well-defined bones were a stark contrast to the hairclips.

“They’re so cute! Did you buy them for me?”

“… hmm.”

The next second.

Xiang Yi’s phone vibrated.

It was a message from Ah Nan.

[Ah Nan Is Stanning The Couple Today Too: Xiang Yi! I was halfway through late night supper with Mr. Si, and I was suddenly reminded that he had woven a hairclip for you! Ahhh, this is so sweet. My devil pepper spicy seasoning has turned into a sweet and spicy flavor~]

‘Huh? Shi Sui knitted those hairclips for me?’

Her heart began to beat rapidly.

Xiang Yi blinked and asked, “Boyfriend, did you weave these for me?”

Shi Sui noticed her action of returning the message, he teased, “It seems I was betrayed by my teammates.”

As long as Si Chuanbai knew about it, Ah Nan would definitely know too.

Xiang Yi corrected him softly, “It’s not…”

“Hmm?”

Xiang Yi was really embarrassed, but she wanted to express her feelings to Shi Sui so she pulled her blanket around herself and covered half of her face.

She said softly, “I love the hairclips that you knitted for me.”

“I also… like you so much.”

‘Ahhhhhhh.’

‘I can’t. I can’t.’

Xiang Yi quickly blushed like a tomato while covering her ears and her face.

Shi Sui’s eyes were deep and he looked at the lights through the rain.

There were countless thoughts in his heart.

However, he got rid of all of them.

“I’ll continue to weave, I hope Xiang Yi can like me a little more.” The man’s tone was as warm as jade, which seemed benevolent in this late night.

The man was so ashamed that his toes curled up and he quietly lifted a slit to meet the gaze of Shi Sui whose eyes were filled with joy.

“!”

With her ancestral-passed arrogance, Xiang Yi said insistently, “I’m not looking at you. I just wanted to look at the hairclip. I wonder what I’ll look like after I put them on.”

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows and asked, “How about I help you put it on?”

Xiang Yi was stunned. “Huh?”

The man lowered his eyelashes, slowly and methodically put the bunnies, strawberries, Snow White hairclips on his head, one by one.

He looked up and blinked, resembling a demon that had just overturned life. Even the surrounding scenery had changed and become vibrant immediately.

“Are you satisfied? Xiang Yi~~~”

…

chapters.title: Chapter 662 - The Cure!
chapters.body:
Chapter 662 - The Cure!

Boom…

It was as if there were fireworks exploding in her mind, and her brain went blank for a short time.

Through the cold electronic device, Shi Sui’s thin lips were curled, and her face immediately began to burn.

“Ahem…,” a few seconds later, Xiang Yi began laughing loudly before calming down gradually. “Uh… it’s just, just okay. “

Shi Sui said with a look of disappointment on his face, “Xiang Yi,do you think the hairclip is ugly? Or do you think I’m ugly?”

People always say that when pretty boys act coquettishly, it’ll be irresistible.

Who would have thought that when a mature and refined man behaves coquettishly…

It was even more irresistible.

“No, no! The hairclips are cute, and so are you! Ah, that’s not what I mean… No, I don’t mean it that way. You’re really cute… UwU, I’m sorry…”

Xiang Yi began to babble incoherently, losing her composure. In fact, she even apologized to Shi Sui.

Shi Sui raised his hand and touched the hairpin. The outline was blurred by the light, but very soft.

“I don’t like it when people compliment me on my cuteness.”

“But Xiang Yi praised me for being cute…”

He sighed, helpless and spoiled. “What to do? I am happy.”

All things related to her in this world are so beautiful.

Hearing the man’s whisper that almost resembled sweet nothings, Xiang Yi dangled her legs even more vigorously.

She flopped onto the bed, pressed her phone against the pillow, rubbed her burning face, and then rushed to Shi Sui…

She made a heart with her fingers.

Shi Sui was slightly stunned.

He was about to respond, but he heard a “beep” and the shy Xiang Yi hung up the video call.

The next two messages were from Xiang Yi:

[It’s getting late. Go home, quickly!]

[Remember to buy an umbrella!]

The words “typing in progress” were still displayed at the top. Shi Sui licked the corner of his lips and continued to wait.

However, the little girl at the other end of the line edited the text and deleted it again before editing and deleting it again before finally sending a few cute stickers with her face flushed and her heart thumping.

[I miss you, all I can think about is you. jpg]

[TheWorldIsBest with you.jpg]

[YouAreMyFavorite.jpg]

…

The last one was a sticker of a small rabbit holding a heart, with two big words at the bottom.

[Muacks Muacks~]

Amidst the summer rain, the man rubbed his slender and defined fingers against the screen before leaving.

…

…

Ten days later.

Early in the morning, there was a piece of exciting news that was released! A cure for the epidemic had been developed after much research!

A cure for the epidemic had been developed after much research!

All of a sudden, people on the major social media platforms were sharing the joy.

However, there were somehow many doubtful comments on the Internet.

——[How can it be so fast? Hah, the vaccine research is still a few months away from completion. Yet, you’ve found a cure for it?]

——[I’m not doubting the officials. I’m doubting that some doctors are faking it for their own reputation!]

——[A cure? I’m laughing my ass off. As far as I know, all patients are cured by strengthening their immune system. Surely this treatment plan isn’t used for bragging just because it’s only a little bit effective?]

[Hah, who knows if it works!?! Maybe it doesn’t work at all! Similar epidemics have broken out abroad, where the medical standards are top notch. But it took years for them to come up with a cure! When will our medical level be comparable to that of foreign countries?]

…

Meanwhile…

The morning news broadcast the list of people who proposed a cure!

Xiang Yi’s name was at the top!

chapters.title: Chapter 663 - Welcome Home
chapters.body:
Chapter 663 - Welcome Home

The netizens who saw this news were dumbfounded.

According to normal logic, ranking first indicates the greatest contribution…

There are so many respected medical bigwigs and yet, they’re standing aside and letting the little girl stand in front. Is this reasonable?

Many netizens quickly became full of arrogance and prejudice. They even began to give instructions.

——[These experts have no bottom line. Accepting apprentices is one thing. How can they be so unruly with the ranking?]

——[I have a bold guess. Xiang Yin and those experts have united to pave the way for the future of his granddaughter. Tsk, tsk, perhaps it won’t be so repulsive if they take it slow but by being so direct, they’re making her seem like a female celebrity that is being promoted actively]

——[What’s the difference between this and faking medical skills? The medical paper doesn’t belong to her and she didn’t make any contributions at all. Yet, she’s being so pretentious… How disgusting. Be careful, the higher you stand, the harder you fall. After all, height can’t trump coldness. Bad behavior will result in a backfire one day!]

…

There were overwhelming voices of doubt.

Even the passers-by, who had a good feeling about Xiang Yi previously, were shaken.

After all… all the good doctors they had met in life were old!

‘How many young doctors are reliable? Besides, she’s a young woman.’

Although she might be talented, there aren’t that many geniuses in the world.

Habit is a strong power. After forming a mindset, it’ll be difficult to change.

There were more and more people involved in the discussion, and various small articles and short videos were popping up.

Their discussion about the treatment plan was far inferior to that of Xiang Yi’s.

The officials also did not expect the crowd’s attention to run away to such an extent.

At the peak of the public opinion, the official blog of “One House Two People” updated their status.

[@TwoUnderOneRoof: Xiang Yi, welcome home! See you all at dinner… Ahem, see you at the livestream!]

The picture attached to it was that of a black car parked at the gate of the bunny farm and Xiang Yi carrying a shoulder bag from the car.

There was a large orange halo around the sun at the end of the sky. The young girl was hiding in the shadows, as if there was a filter applied over her face. Her temperament was quiet and stable.

However, she had obviously lost a lot of weight. Despite wearing a mask, it was still obvious that her chin had become sharper.

For a while, the netizens who could not sit still surged into the livestream.

They did not have much to say and had merely criticized her.

——[As a doctor, how can you come back???]

——[No, no, they’re still reporting it on the news and you’ve already escaped?”

——[This outfit is also too umm… She’s wearing a short-sleeved shirt with jeans and a bright yellow bag! She doesn’t look like a professional doctor at all. How can we trust her like this?]

…

At this moment…

A slender figure appeared in the scene.

The photographer slowly pulled the camera away to ensure that the two were in the same frame.

In an instant, a scene that resembled that of an idol drama appeared in front of everyone’s eyes.

Shi Sui naturally picked up Xiang Yi’s bag and rubbed her hair.

“Come back.”

Xiang Yi’s eyebrows curved slightly and she said, “I brought you a lot of things!”

The school bag was full, and when Xiang Yi unzipped it, the stuff inside seemed to be exploding out.

Xiang Yi introduced the items in a warm and tender voice.

“These are the most famous shrimp buns and custard buns in West China!”

“This is the ointment given by Grandpa Fang. It’s an ancestral secret recipe!”

“And the mystery box I drew at the station. See if this is very similar to you! I’m way too lucky…”

Xiang Yi was like a little dragon who liked collecting shiny treasures but wasn’t stingy to share them.

The netizens of the livestream were speechless.

They were suddenly at a loss for words to criticize them.

‘This…. this is kinda sweet, eh?’

chapters.title: Chapter 664 - Virtuous Husband And Good Father
chapters.body:
Chapter 664 - Virtuous Husband And Good Father

Xiang Yi pulled out every single thing and introduced a few things very seriously

The little girl chattered but she didn’t mess around.

Shi Sui’s eyes were filled with a doting gaze and her smile was warm and gentle. From time to time, she would nod and chime in.

Xiang Yi introduced all the items in her school bag.

“Are they all… for me?” The man asked softly.

Xiang Yi nodded her little head.

Xiao Naofu, who was nearby, took a few steps back after hearing that sentence. Its eyes were filled with disbelief.

Li Jianyu instructed the cameraman to give a close-up of Xiao Naofu, instantly tickling the funny bone of the audience.

——[Hahaha, Director Li is so good at it!]

——[Xiao Naofu: I was wrong that year]

——[Damn it! Has Xiao Naofu gained sentience? It actually pulled Little Xiji into its arms and kissed it!]

——[Xiao Naofu couple! I’m really tired of saying this but this couple is definitely going to last!]

…

The cream-colored Shiba Inu was holding a small kitten in its arms, licking Xiao Naofu’s fluffy fur, as if trying to prove something with its actions.

‘Hah, little kitty, you’re mine!’

‘It is even more like a domineering CEO like Xiang Feng!’

Xiao Naofu was hit hard by that and its heart and soul were greatly impacted. It unknowingly had its head covered in saliva.

…

The audience spoke up one after another.

——[I can’t, my diabetes is getting worse!]

——[I never thought that not only do I have to watch the public display of affection between Shi Sui and Xiang Yi, I also have to watch Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji!]

——[Shi Sui= Live-in husband, Little Xiji = Live-in Husband. So,Shi Sui = A Dog. That’s correct, right my friends?]

…

There was joy in the comments’ section, which eased the tension.

Shi Sui brought Xiang Yi to the living room and placed her on the sofa to let her get some rest, not forgetting to add a soft pillow behind her waist.

The man looked down and turned on the TV before tuning to a variety show. The snacks and fruits were also all ready.

“The meal is ready, I’ll bring it.”

Xiang Yi said in a tender voice, “Why are you such a virtuous husband?”

Xiang Yi burst into laughter and stared at Xiang Yi for a few seconds.

Xiang Yi said in puzzlement, “Why do you keep looking at me… Was I wrong?”

What she got in response was a few rubs on her head by a large pair of hands.

“Wait for me.”

When the man strode into the kitchen with his long legs, Xiang Yi suddenly realized that something…

A virtuous husband and good father…

‘Ahhhh we’re just dating. Why am I spouting nonsense!?!’

The fans of the UntimelyCouple began to smile while watching the livestream.

——[Shi Sui: Thank you, Xiang Yi, I will try to be a good husband and a good father/cute/adorable]

——[Am I the only one who thinks that the ‘wait for me’ that Shi Sui said is a double entendre? He could mean: Wait for me to bring you the food and also: Wait for me to become your husband~~]

——[Hahaha quickly cover Xiao Naofu’s eyes. Our kitten can’t see that!]

…

However, it was too late.

Xiao Naofu was dealt a huge blow again and it was utterly dejected.

‘This stupid woman doesn’t care about me!’

The little kitten lay on its back, paralyzed. It formed a large word with its paws, like a crippled cat.

Little Xiji ran a few rounds around it anxiously, but no matter how it licked Xiao Naofu’s fur, the latter didn’t move.

Until.

A sweet and soft voice, softly sounded.

“Xiao Naofu, look at this. Dang dang dang–

[Xiao Naofu: Hah, no matter what the stupid woman comes up with, I will not forgive her!]

The next second, Xiang Yi pulled over an oversized suitcase that was countless times bigger than her backpack!

Xiao Naofu was speechless.

Xiao Naofu meowed!

chapters.title: Chapter 665 - This Silly Dog Is Really Annoying!
chapters.body:
Chapter 665 - This Silly Dog Is Really Annoying!

——[Could these be…?]

Xiao Naofu suppressed the excitement in its heart.

Xiang Yi opened the box, as expected, all the things bought for Xiao Naofu!

There were canned cat food, cat snacks, cat toys… and even a collection of cartoons specifically for kittens on CD…

The audience was dumbfounded.

——[Is this the legendary… cat porn?

——[Hey, you need to pay for that dirty joke you made!]

——[Hahahaha Xiao Naofu’s reaction is too funny. It turned from motionless to wagging its tail. Baby, don’t forget you are just a little kitten! Why have you started acting like a dog like Little Xiji and Shi Sui!?!]

…

“Do you like it?” Xiang Yi asked with a smile as she sat on her knees on the tatami.

Xiao Naofu’s pupils were bright and shiny and it could no longer resist picking at the toys. However, it was still acting very arrogant.

“Meow~ meow ow~”

——[Hmph, it’s just average!]

Xiang Yi put a golden bell on it and fiddled with it using her soft and slender fingers, after which it made a crisp and clear sound.

Xiao Naofu meowed.

——This tiger doesn’t want to wear this!

“This is the big tiger’s favorite bell~”

“Meow? Meow!”

——Really? I’ll wear it then!

Shi Sui came out with a wooden tray of food. When he saw the little girl fooling around with the little kitten, his lips curved up.

“This is for our Little Xiji,” Xiang Yi said as she took out another red bell and gave it to Little Xiji.

Little Xiji happily nudged Xiao Naofu. “Woof!”

Xiao Naofu had a look of disgust on its face.

‘This silly dog is really annoying!’

“Okay, so you two are wearing sibling clothes now.” Xiang Yi was extremely satisfied. She picked up her phone to take a photo of Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji.

The two were really good at posing in front of the camera and they looked good in all the photos.

Xiao Naofu was too lazy to pose and hence, remained cold and aloof throughout.

However, Little Xiji kept kissing and rubbing it.

The comments in the livestream:

——[I’m willing to exchange five kilograms of fat for the chance to swap souls with Xiao Naofu]

——[What matching brothers outfit? It’s obviously a couple suit / dog head/ dog head]

——[I’m sour. Even kittens get kisses. I’m already in my twenties but I’m still evergreen. UwU what does it feel like to be kissed by a man? Can someone describe it to me?]

…

Xiang Yi took out a video player and placed the disc on it, after which cartoons began to play on TV.

Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji squatted in front of the coffee table, watching with great interest.

There were no guests around, and the two of them were not that sophisticated so they simply sat behind the coffee table to eat.

Shi Sui’s dinner menu was very simple. It consisted of millet yam porridge, boiled vegetables, custard buns, and shrimp dumplings.

Xiang Yi tasted them one by one.

“How does it taste?” Shi Sui seemed calm and nervous.

Xiang Yi looked at him seriously before raising both thumbs.

“Wonderful! Our dear Shi Sui is the god of cooking and a culinary genius. You’re the best at making home cooked food!”

Everyone likes getting praised.

There’s no one who doesn’t love being complimented by the person they love.

Shi Sui lowered his long eyelashes. He could hide the look in his eyes, but not the smile on his lips.

There were countless people being overwhelmed by the sweetness on the screen in front of them again, and they almost forgot to question Xiang Yi.

However, after the meal…

Shi Sui put the crockery into the dishwasher while Xiang Yi cooked medicinal soup in a casserole on the side. The wisps of smoke wafted up into the air and everyone could smell the fragrant aroma of food mixed with medicine.

Li Jianyu sniffed and asked curiously, “Xiang Yi, what are you cooking?”

“A medicinal meal to prevent viruses.” Xiang Yi looked at thea camera and asked, “Do you need it? I can post it on Weibo.”

Her words stirred up various ripples.

…

chapters.title: Chapter 666 - Meritorious Citizen (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 666 - Meritorious Citizen (1)

The comments in the livestream were rapidly polarized.

——[So amazing? I want it, I want it!!]

——[Oh my God, what kind of a God is Xiang Yi? That actually works!?!]

——[Hah, even the foreign experts are helpless after seeing the experimental results. There’s still a long way to go in the development of a vaccine. How can you have the cheek to say that this can prevent viruses?]

——[Let me tell you a joke, there are people abroad who claim that cow urine can be used to cure all diseases. Here’s another joke. There’s a certain Miss Xiang in our country who claims that herbal soups can prevent all viruses. Interesting~ Let’s come up with a conspiracy. Surely she isn’t trying to hype up herbal medicine because of an endorsement deal or cooperation with a herbal company, is she~]

…

The contradictory viewpoints instantly sparked crossfire.

There were some who supported Xiang Yi and some who hated her. None of their fans conceded and all of a sudden, the comments section was unsightly.

Xiang Yi seemed to have long expected that result as she said calmly, “Why don’t you guys take this medicine as a simple dietary supplement? I have made adjustments to it and the taste is okay.”

She tapped her slender and soft fingers on the screen and posted the organized recipe on Weibo.

From the selection of herbal ingredients to the choice of pots and pans, the sequence of putting the herbs, the duration and heat of boiling, etcThe instructions were all stated in detail.

Everything was perfect.

Some people followed the recipe, some scoffed, some sneered, and some even posted the recipe on foreign social media platforms in order to gain popularity.

The headline was very eye-catching.

[Oh, my God! A stupid cure from the East!]

The person turned the name of Traditional Chinese medicine into a sensational one, completely misinterpreting the meaning of the recipe.

Foreigners who did not know the truth were confused when they saw this prescription.

——[God! This is so backward! This is not a cure but a murder plan!]

——[Unbelievable! Is China still in a primitive society? How can they still believe that boiling water with grass and twigs can cure diseases?]

When netizens saw the comments, they were immediately filled with righteous indignation and accused that Xiang Yi was discrediting Chinese medicine!

——[Why don’t they believe in science? Why don’t they believe in Western medicine? Western medicine is the greatest and most sacred study in the world!]

…

… After Xiang Yi’s recipe became viral abroad, it was moved back to Weibo by netizens for gossip.

The netizens were immediately full of righteous indignation after seeing the comments and even denounced Xiang Yi for discrediting the medical profession of China!

——[The countless years of efforts of our country’s medical community have all been ruined! Can a herbal diet prevent viruses? Ridiculous! It’s simply ridiculous! It’s not that Traditional Chinese Medicine practitioners are misleading the crowd but Xiang Yi is! Xiang Yi is the one who’s misleading everyone!

We used to be mocked for being Asian doctors but are we going to be mocked for being backward in the medicinal field now? Xiang Yi, oh, Xiang Yi, don’t you earn enough money being a celebrity? Why do you have to stain the clear pasture of medicine!? Doctors are supposed to save the injured and those who are dying. This isn’t a tool for you to chase clout!]

…

Xiang Yi, who often became part of a hot search list, immediately became embroiled in public opinion.

She was not only not affected at all, she even…

She even fell asleep on the couch.

She slept well and her breathing was clear.

Xiao Naofu, who had always been mischievous, sensed her exhaustion and obediently lay next to her, curling her fingers with its little tail. In no time, it fell asleep and started snoring.

Little Xiji lay on the carpet next to the sofa, holding Xiao Naofu’s favorite salted fish toy and dozing off too.

The room was quiet and filled with a medicinal fragrance that floated around.

However, Shi Sui…

He slowly pulled out his needles and calmly began knitting a new hairclip.

The crowd of netizens were dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 667 - Meritorious Citizen (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 667 - Meritorious Citizen (2)

Is this still the refined, ascetic, and aloof Shi Sui?

He was way too skillful in knitting hairclips!

Even Li Jianyu was stunned.

In the viewfinder, Shi Sui was skillfully knitting some hairpins with his bony, long and fair fingers.

He weaved up and down, hooked and twisted it. He was very skillful and soon, there was a vague outline of rabbit ears.

Li Jianyu muttered, “Is this Shi Sui… He’s really competent and terrifying!”

The netizens watching the livestream had mixed feelings.

——[His handicraft… He actually didn’t poke his finger with the needle?]

——[It’s such a pity that such a pair of good-looking hands are not used for knitting sweaters!]

——[I always thought I would only be attracted to the haute couture outfits and luxury watches that Shi Sui wears. I never thought that I would one day be attracted to the knitted hairclips made by him!]

——[I wanted to criticize Xiang Yi at first but she looks so cute when she’s asleep. I can’t send any hate to her at all! I’d better continue knitting hairclips with Shi Sui (Yes, that’s how influential our handsome Shi Sui is) ]

…

There were also Spicy Rabbits who noticed Xiang Yi’s fatigue.

——[UwU our dear Xiang Yi must be tired. She falls asleep so soon, just like a worker who has worked overtime]

——[Xiang Yi is really so pitiful. She gets criticized for everything that she does but what have some of you keyboard warriors done?]

——[I want to ask the people who criticized Xiang Yi. Are all of you heartless? She has rushed to the front line of the epidemic immediately and worked tirelessly through sleepless nights to save patients. She’s also the biggest contributor to the cure! What else do you people want? Who are you to hold Xiang Yi to the standards of a saint while holding yourselves to the standards of cheap and shameless people!?]

…

They really felt bad for Xiang Yi.

The malicious intent and menace were amplified on the Internet. For ordinary people, they would feel terribly upset after being attacked a few times.

Xiang Yi had been facing the hate of the Internet for a long time.

The prejudice and barbarians are always there, and too often the Spicy Rabbits feel helpless.

However, they also wanted to work harder for her and for their own voice to hold a little more weight. They wanted more people to hear them.

In this way, perhaps something can be changed, right?

On the other hand, the foodie fans chose to support Xiang Yi in the most straightforward way.

This night, on all major social media platforms, there were people sharing the herbal cuisines they cooked.

There were terrible fails that were so awful that even dogs wouldn’t eat them.

There were also exquisite dishes that would make people drool just by looking at them.

One of the most popular dishes was found in the daily vlog of a food streamer.

“Today, we’re going to cook the herbal recipe that Xiang Yi shared. I’ve already bought the herbs and ingredients. Here’s the list.”

The Weibo user, who had a habit of keeping accounts, showed the receipt to the camera, with each item clearly marked.

“I see a lot of netizens scolding her and accusing her of trying to earn money. To be fair, this is the most humane medicinal food recipe I’ve seen! Most recipes have lists of ingredients that easily add up to hundreds of yuan. There are some that involve expensive herbs, which cost a huge bomb.”

“But I went shopping according to this recipe given by Xiang Yi and only spent a hundred in total! Anyway, regardless of whether it can be used to prevent viruses or not, the fact that it can nourish the body makes it extremely worth it!”

…

The Weibo user finished rambling and fast-forwarded directly to the production process, jumping to the final product stage. “Out of the pot!

“I can smell it already! It smells so good! I even suspect that it’s a delectable pot of ‘Buddha Jumps Over The Wall’ soup and not a medicinal soup!”

A pop-up comment appeared on the screen. [Hah, how much money did the Weibo user take from Xiang Yi? She’s boasting so much about the medicinal recipe!]

The next second, the pot lid was lifted and the rising water vapor converged. A few seconds later, the camera focused and the crowd saw the contents of the pot…

….

chapters.title: Chapter 668 - Meritorious Citizen (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 668 - Meritorious Citizen (3)

A few seconds later, the camera focused, and the crowd saw the contents of the pot…

It was different from the black Chinese medicine that they imagined. The soup base in the pot was surprisingly clear and clean.

“Oh, just based on the color, I already know that this soup tastes terrible!” The Weibo user exclaimed excitedly.

He turned over the ingredients at the bottom of the pot with a spoon, and they were all stewed to a soft, mushy, sticky consistency that was appetizing!

“Gu-dong.”

The sound of the streamer gulping saliva came clearly from the video.

“I’m not afraid of being laughed at by you guys. I actually get bored recording so many food videos sometimes.” The streamer touched her head while facing the camera and smiled naively. “Even when facing a mountain of food, I barely have any appetite. Haha, does it sound like I’m humble-bragging?”

He rambled while handily fishing out the remnants of several Chinese herbs.

“But today… This herbal cuisine really makes me peckish. There is no exaggeration!”

‘How do I describe it? It’s that… long-lost taste of eating dishes made by my mother at home.’

Although it was a very simple and plain fare, the fragrance was enough to make one hungry.

It made one want to pick up the bowl and chopsticks, and finish two bowls of rice!

There were real-time pop-ups on the screen.

——[It’s a little exaggerated, right…]

——[Go on, keep acting. Nowadays, streamers of the free media really can’t stop trying to make money at every turn]

——[It’s fine to make money but at least don’t make others disgusted with you, right? I just want to retch when I hear the word Xiang Yi!]

…

The next second.

After fishing out the remnants of the Chinese medicine, the streamer eagerly scooped a bowl of it and placed it in the white porcelain bowl. Without even using a spoon, he took a mouthful of it.

“!”

He froze right on the spot.

The netizens were dumbfounded.

‘What’s going on? Is the Internet stuck?’

‘How did the screen become still?’

For a while, there were lots of question marks on the pop-up screen.

After a full ten seconds, the crowd finally saw that the streamer moved his eyes…

His pupils dilated with his mouth slightly open, obviously extremely stunned.

“Crap!” He couldn’t help but curse loudly, “Damn it, this smells great! Ahhhhh!!!”

The audience was dumbfounded.

——[Those who were listening with their headphones died on the spot…]

——[Oh boy, that voice almost killed me!]

——[I don’t even need to think to know that it’s fake. Oh please, have you not drunk Chinese medicine before? It tastes the same as poison, right?]

——[But based on her expression, it doesn’t seem like an act… Besides, I got really hungry looking at the videos. I’ve already very quickly ordered some abalone, pork belly, and chicken soup takeout]

…

“I’m really not lying to you! If I’m lying, I’ll castrate myself to apologize to you guys!” The streamer was extremely agitated as he downed the soup in one go. Despite being scalded, he was still grinning widely.

Thus, the scene became quite bizarre…

The man’s mouth and eyes were distorted, but he was laughing wildly as if he was having a seizure.

He could easily frighten children every single minute.

The next second.

More shocking things happened!

The streamer: “Friends of the audience, let me first toast to you!”

He actually picked up the claypot and poured all the soup into his mouth with a gulp!

Swish…

The originally sparse pop-ups instantly became dense!

——[?????]

——[Young warrior has such strong arms…]

——[Is this the legendary merciless iron mouth?]

——[Big Brother, you’re just trying to make money! You don’t have to do this, right!? You’re so agitated!!]

Tonight, a meme video began to circulate everywhere on the Internet…

It’s called…

[Contemporary food streamers’ confusing behavior award 🙂 ]

chapters.title: Chapter 669 - Meritorious Citizen (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 669 - Meritorious Citizen (4)

Countless curious netizens clicked on the video, and an extremely impactful scene appeared immediately.

“Dear audience, I’ll toast to you!”

Immediately afterwards, the streamer started chugging the contents of the claypot.

Coupled with upbeat and rhythmic music, the video might be nonsensical but the viewers couldn’t stop laughing from beginning to end!

While the netizens were laughing, they didn’t forget to like and share the video. The popularity of the video was getting higher and higher, and it even set a record of over 10 million plays overnight!

…

The next day, the streamer unlocked his cell phone wearily as soon as he woke up, all ready to interact with his fans.

However, the red number of new fans immediately appeared on the screen! [+498754]

He shuddered and woke up immediately! He knew that he only had about a million followers in total.

His number of followers actually rose by almost half a million last night alone!

‘What’s going on? Did the platform I signed up with have some bug in its system?’

While trembling, he clicked on the data and realized what had happened!

It turned out that the video he posted yesterday had gone viral!

…

Meanwhile, a variety of commentary videos sprang up like rain.

It was the Internet era and there was no shortage of people who liked to watch the fun or gain clout.

——[Look how delicious Xiang Yi’s medicinal cuisine is!]

——[Shocking! Xiang Yi’s medicinal recipe is way, way, way too impressive!]

——[Xiang Yi’s medicinal cuisine tastes really good. I can finish an entire pot in one mouthful! Xiang Yi is just an accessory!]

…

The netizens were all confused.

Yesterday, they were all cursing at each other. How did everything change today? Hah, could it be that they’ve all been bribed?

The netizens who did not believe it opened a certain video…

‘Hah, that’s all.’

‘Hah, they must be acting.’

‘Huh? Why does it…feel like it’s a bit delicious? Damn it !Ahhhhhhh I’m so hungry. Why does every single video look so nice!?!’

Countless netizens were really peckish!

The public opinion had changed from “Xiang Yi discrediting Chinese medicine and selling drugs to make money” to “Whether it works or not, it’s delicious and that’s it!”

Besides, due to the fact that the ingredients and herbs were cheap, and the way they cooked it was incredibly detailed, many people had followed the trend to do it.

There were more and more spontaneous praises.

——[I cooked an entire pot and I have not tasted a single bite of it yet. It has already been distributed among my family. It’s really delicious!]

——[I have slight anorexia, but this medicinal food is really great. But not only is it appetizing, it is not greasy and fatty. I feel that my anorexia has been cured without treatment!]

——[I don’t know if it’s a psychological reason, but I made a pot of it last night, and after my grandmother drank it this morning, she said she felt much better. She was coughing a little at first but now, it has completely stopped!!]

…

The manor.

Li Jianyu scrolled through Weibo while he was in a trance.

The good reviews were surging over like a tidal wave.

Those who praised Xiang Yi could not wait to praise her and her medicinal cuisine!

“Surely Xiang Yi doesn’t really have some magic right…” He muttered to himself dumbly.

While holding the cup of coffee, Ruan Qing said smilingly, “The light of some people can’t be blocked.”

‘It’s because Xiang Yi is destined to shine brightly.’

No matter how many people with evil intentions who wanted to pull her into the endless abyss there were, it wasn’t meaningful at all!

“The actual food seems to be really useful. Xiang Yi fell asleep last night and Father shared a bowl with me. I now feel that my waist is less sore and my legs do not hurt. His breathing is also particularly smooth!” Li Jianyu teased, “It seems that this medicinal food is a placebo. The effect is not bad.”

Placebo, in medical terms, does not have any therapeutic effect.

chapters.title: Chapter 670 - Meritorious Citizen! (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 670 - Meritorious Citizen! (5)

It was only a comforting effect and can be called “fake medicine”.

Li Jianyu naturally believed in Xiang Yi’s medical skills. It was just a pot of medicine that could supposedly prevent viruses, which was beyond his knowledge from childhood.

In his opinion, sickness must be cured with medicine, injections, or the intravenous drip.

Ruan Qing sipped on her coffee and said leisurely, “I do think that this medicinal food does have an effect.”

“Huh? No way, Wifey, this is not scientific at all…”

“Who are you calling wifey? Hmm?” Ruan Qing raised her eyebrows.

Li Jianyu chickened out immediately. “I’m wrong, I’m guilty, I’ll kneel down!”

Ruan Qing smirked and said, “Wait, the durian I bought online will be here soon.”

Li Jianyu: …!!!

Jokes are jokes. Ruan Qing analyzed seriously, “What do you think of Xiang Yi’s medical skills?”

“Of course it’s good!” Otherwise, she would not have been able to join the experts.

“In fact, I don’t have a clear perception of her medical skills. But… What I believe in is not her medical skills, but her as a person. I’ll ask you, when has she ever let anyone down?”

Li Jianyu froze.

While recalling it, they realized that be it in terms of cooking, playing the string instrument, Chinese medicine, or combat value… Xiang Yi would always bring about surprises.

A bold idea suddenly emerged and he felt warm all over his body as if blood was surging to his heart.

“Can this medicinal cuisine… really prevent the virus?”

‘Wouldn’t that be, at least a year or two ahead of the vaccine?’

If it is true…

Li Jianyu did not dare to think further.

…

Xiang Yi took a long nap.

She didn’t even go for her morning exercise.

It was almost noon before she got up, and as soon as she went out, she saw Shi Sui playing with Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji in the courtyard.

The game was very simple. He raised his hand and threw a tennis ball while Little Xiji scurried over to retrieve it. He repeated the process back and forth.

The variable was Xiao Naofu.

The kitten had short and fat legs. It wanted to play that game, but it couldn’t keep up physically, so…

It rode on Little Xiji.

In the livestream, the netizens watched with great interest.

——[Xiao Naofu was on top while Little Xiji was below. / Doghead]

——[Xiao Naofu was turned upside down so hard that the fur on its little head had become messy. I can make ten of such kittens!]

——[Shi Sui looks so suave even when he’s throwing the ball… The child in my stomach immediately has a new father now!]

…

Hearing the sound of footsteps, Shi Sui turned around.

The young lady was wearing furry home attire. Perhaps because she had just woken up, she seemed a little confused.

“Did you sleep well?” He asked in a warm voice.

Xiang Yi nodded and said, “Finally, I’ve caught up on lost sleep.”

During this period of time, the little girl was indeed exhausted and there were a few days where she was almost sleepless. Even an iron-made body would not be able to withstand it.

Shi Sui said, “Then what are the next arrangements? Do we still need to go to the West Island?”

He saw her sleeping too well last night and he did not have the heart to wake her up.

Little Xiji came back with a ball in his mouth, and Xiang Yi squatted down, touching his head and Xiao Naofu’s head respectively. He then threw the ball hard into the distance.

Little Xiji carried Xiao Naofu and chased after the ball.

“No, the epidemic has stabilized. If there is any problem, we can have a treatment over video call.” The young girl said calmly, as if it was just a trivial matter.

Hearing her calm tone, someone in the livestream started being aggressive.

——[I think it is probably because her sales performance is poor, so she was kicked out of the expert group!]

——[The experts abroad have said that if this epidemic had happened abroad, the medical system would have collapsed! Where did Xiang Yi get the confidence that she is better than foreign medical professionals?]

chapters.title: Chapter 671 - Meritorious Citizen! (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 671 - Meritorious Citizen! (6)

——[Seriously, all of the experts of the group are still left to fight in the West Island, and you, the youngest of the group, actually came back so soon. What is the difference between this and a deserter who retreats from the battlefield without fighting? You deserve to be confused!]

…

The netizens’ dissatisfaction mostly came from some kind of subtle jealousy.

How old was Xiang Yi? I am 20 years old.

How is it that she’s all-rounded, knows everything, is a group favorite, and even tops the contribution list among the nation’s top experts in medicine!?

It was really ridiculous!

Hence, they tried their best to prove that Xiang Yi was no big deal.

All rounded? Hah, she’s only average!

Group favorite? It’s just an act! Her family is in it with her! There are clearly so many unfortunate families in the world!

Number one on the contribution list in the field of medicine? It’s just her grandfather paving the way for her! How can she be stronger than a respected old doctor?

…

The manor.

Shi Sui did not ask more questions and merely pinched the plush ball on Xiang Yi’s coat gently. “It’s been hard on you, Xiang Yi. Welcome home.”

The light fell on him very gently.

The bottom of Xiang Yi’s heart felt like a feather had brushed against it gently. It was a numb and gentle itching.

Even though they were the same words, they really sounded different when said by different people…

They would have different states of mind.

Xiang Yi cleared her throat and said with a stern look on her fair face, “I won’t let you wait for such a long time in the future.”

Shi Sui chuckled and said, “Yes, Xiang Yi is really good.”

While speaking, he put a newly woven hair clip on Xiang Yi’s head.

There was a pink circle woven with pink thread on the white rabbit ears. It looked adorable and gentle, much more exquisite than before.

It didn’t seem like the standards of a beginner at all.

Xiang Yi touched it with her hand. Since she couldn’t see, she tilted her head to look at the videographer, Old Zhang. “Does this look good?”

Old Zhang’s experienced old hand began shaking vigorously.

Her absolute beauty wasn’t something that anyone could stand!

The fans of Xiang Yi’s beauty were the same and all of a sudden, they were extremely excited.

——[How beautiful! Xiang Yi, you’re the most beautiful in this world!]

——[Bunny ears for the bunny It’s awesome! Even when I cover my mouth, I can’t stop myself from screaming!]

——[Has Shi Sui really learned to do this for a few days? Those who have stiff hands like me are crying. Is this man that talented at learning!?!]

…

There was lots of questioning that soon came.

——[The medical staff at the front line are shedding so much blood and tears. Yet, you’re performing a public display of affection at home? You really don’t treat other health care workers as human beings, huh?!]

——[Here’s a friendly reminder. You’ve already embarrassed yourself badly! I suggest you go onto foreign websites to take a look when you’re free, and see how much you’ve discredited Chinese medicine!]

——[First, you bragged about being the top contributor to the cure, and then you said that a pot of soup can prevent viruses. Miss Xiang, why don’t you say that you can fly?]

…

Suddenly.

A staff member hurriedly came over and exclaimed, “Xiang Yi, quickly get changed!”

Xiang Yi guessed, “Is there a guest?”

“No, no…” The staff member had yet to recover from the panic and stammered, “There are so, so many people! There are media workers and reporters! I-I heard that there’s going to be a livestream!”

The netizens watching the livestream were shocked to hear that.

The staff was really flustered and it definitely was not a good thing! It seemed that they must have come to reveal Xiang Yi’s true nature!

Indeed, there must be disaster when one lacks morals!

….

chapters.title: Chapter 672 - Meritorious Citizen! (7)
chapters.body:
Chapter 672 - Meritorious Citizen! (7)

——[A flop when pretending to be impressive?]

——[What a great pleasure! Finally someone can cure her!]

——[She deserves to be criticized for fleeing and taking credit again!]

…

A group of people began pointing fingers at Xiang Yi, as if she had been nailed to the pillar of shame.

The Spicy Rabbits, however, curiously speculated.

——[Have all of you left your IQs at home? Do you really think the official media outlets can be deceived so easily?]

——[Wow, let me make a bold guess. Are they here to present a little red flag to Xiang Yi? After all, she is a warm-hearted citizen. /Dog head/ dog head]

——[I think they’re here to praise Xiang Yi too! After all, Xiang Yi made such a big contribution! Some barbarians are blind and only see what they want to see. They also only believe what they want to believe]

——[‘It’ is the essence. To the sisters above, the bookstore does not have your book. I’m going to go smash the bookstore now!]

…

Li Jianyu was also a little confused, for fear that something bad would happen. He was also planning to contact them first, but when he saw Xiang Yi tying her hair into a bun casually. He calmly said, “Don’t panic, I’ll go take a look.”

The staff were confused. “Huh?”

‘Why am I being comforted by Xiang Yi?’

‘Why does it seem like there is something wrong!?!’

Shi Sui said, “I will accompany you.”

Hence, the two of them walked calmly and leisurely in the direction of the main entrance like an old married couple taking a stroll.

The crowd at the scene were dumbfounded.

So were the netizens.

Both have superior body proportions and look big from the back, and also… so sweet so sweet na!

The feeling of facing everything that comes their path regardless of whatever is ahead, was really tugging at heartstrings.

…

At the main entrance, Fujimoto Ouyue climbed all over the black iron gate, through the fence. There were vehicles and people gathered outside and they seemed to be hidden.

The door opened automatically.

When the reporters outside heard the sound, they quickly held up their cameras, as if their equipment were guns and they were going to war.

Their actions were in unison and they were all aiming their guns at Xiang Yi! Li Jianyu and the others who followed behind couldn’t quite get used to that scene.

Li Jianyu was in a trance. “Why do I feel that Shi Sui seems to be washed up?”

There were Shi Sui sisters in the livestream who started criticizing Shi Sui.

——[Be confident and remove your feelings.]

——[After all, Shi Sui is a giggolo]

——[I’m crying tears of joy seeing that Shi Sui has finally gotten to freeload off of Xiang Yi]

The other netizens were dumbfounded.

What’s going on? The fans were being abnormal. Is there another group of Shi Sui sisters apart from the Spicy Rabbits?

People were suddenly confused as to whether they were true fans or not!

However, soon, the attention of the crowd was attracted by the voice of the reporter on the scene. “Xiang Yi, look at you, you’re hungry and thin!”

“I can smell it, Xiang Yi. I have a colleague who said he wants to try your cooking…”

“Psht! Shame on you! The colleague you’re talking about is yourself, right? Xiang Yi, don’t listen to him. I’ll just eat some leftovers!”

“…”

The affectionate nagging was beyond everyone’s imagination!

There were netizens who recognized that many of the people at the scene were famous journalists from major television stations who were impeccable both in terms of professionalism and self-promotion!

In the past, the people who interviewed them were all cold and aloof but today, it was Xiang Yi’s turn…

It somehow became really affectionate!

Xiang Yi nodded slightly. “Hello.”

“Hello, Miss Xiang.” A bespectacled man in the center of the crowd spoke up and his surroundings fell silent. “Sorry to have disturbed you. We are the reporters who have previously agreed to do a joint interview with you.”

“We received the news a few minutes ago, may I ask, how do you feel about being selected as the ‘Meritorious Citizen of the Year’?”

….

chapters.title: Chapter 673 - Meritorious Citizen (8)
chapters.body:
Chapter 673 - Meritorious Citizen (8)

The people at the scene and the netizens in front of the screen all froze in unison.

What did they… hear?

National Meritorious Citizen of the year!?

Although they did not understand what the award was, but the word “national” sounded extremely impressive.

In the livestream:

——[Damn it? What’s going on here?]

——[Huh? These people are not here to criticize Xiang Yi, but to praise her?]

——[I did some research online and this award is really impressive… Simply put, the people who receive the award are those who have made great contributions to the country. I’ll give you two simple examples. The last two people that received the award were a Nobel Prize winner, and a pioneer who made a global breakthrough in materials!]

…

The livestream comments section was abuzz!

What is the hardest slap in the face?

It’s not a slap in the face, but the nonchalance of the other party who had never taken them seriously!

The netizens who kept on hating on Xiang Yi were all dumbfounded.

The scene.

Xiang Yi was stunned and she said humbly, “It’s my honor.”

The refined reporter pushed down his glasses and smiled, “No, I think you deserve it! As we all know, Miss Xiang discovered the ancient recipe in the book of rare medical facts. She also refined it and introduced new innovations with her originality, hence making the cure feasible.”

The crowd of netizens were dumbfounded.

The previous morning news report was not detailed enough. In fact, the TV station had saved up to do an exclusive interview, but they didn’t expect there to be a misunderstanding caused by the biased understanding of some people.

Now, the reporter’s words are undoubtedly a clarification for Xiang Yi!

They also clearly stated her contributions!

The ancient formula was discovered and improved by others, so if she is not number one in the list of contributions to the cure, who else can be number one?!

That’s not all.

The other reporters asked, “Xiang Yi, what do you think about the role of Chinese medicine and Western medicine in this epidemic?”

“Xiang Yi, your preventive medicine has been clinically tested and has been confirmed to be effective in more than 90 percent of cases. How did you come up with the idea of using medicine for prevention?”

“Xiang Yi, this epidemic in the West Island region has been quelled in just less than half a month, and all of the experts said that it’s all thanks to you. They have all asked you to come back and get some rest, so may I ask if you are still planning to go back?”

“…”

The questions were like powerful punches that struck the haters from all around, one after another!

Countless people in front of the screen were already dumbfounded.

So…

The cure was discovered and innovated by Xiang Yi who contributed to the top of the list…

The prevention medicine was invented and promoted by Xiang Yi, and proven to be really effective…

The accusations made against Xiang Yi were all fake! She wasn’t trying to flee back home on her own! It was the expert panel that begged Xiang Yi to head home and rest!

Dressed in home wear, Xiang Yi, who looked like a girl-next-door, answered the question calmly.

“There are boundaries in most disciplines but there are no limits and boundaries when it comes to medical skills. Chinese medicine is good at grasping holistic health while Western medicine is good for precise treatment. If we can combine and penetrate, I think we can save more people.”

“Medicinal cuisine has a long history in China. Not only does it have the effect of toning the body and strengthening the immune system, but it can also treat and prevent some minor illnesses. However, it should be noted that medicinal food is not a panacea. Remember that if you get sick, you must go see a doctor.”

“As for the West Island…. I certainly still have to go.” With her eyes curved, Xiang Yi exclaimed, “Once everything is settled, I want to go to taste all the West Island cuisine!”

chapters.title: Chapter 674 - He Is Also My Family (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 674 - He Is Also My Family (1)

Xiang Yi’s answer was gentle and tender, neither condescending nor lowly. She quickly won the goodwill of the livestream viewers!

——[What kind of a treasure girl is she!?!]

——[I suddenly discovered that Xiang Yi has quite a high emotional intelligence]

——[Ahhhh Xiang Yi is awesome! Baby, you are the pride of mama!

——[I’m from the West Island area, and I’m honestly tired of hearing people say that they want the situation in West Island to get better quickly, but this phrase ‘I’m going to try all the food in West Island’ is really triggering me!]

…

Meanwhile.

The official channel’s live broadcast was still going on.

Xiang Yi, who was clad in a pink and white loungewear and wearing a knitted hairpin with bunny ears on her head, was extremely cute to the viewers, regardless of whether she was answering the interview seriously or smiling!

“We all know that Miss Xiang has posted the preparation method of the medicinal cuisine on Weibo, but the audience of Weibo may be young people. I hope to let Xiang Yi disclose the recipe again through this live interview so that more elderly people can also benefit.”

Xiang Yi nodded her head in a serious manner. “You are right.”

Nowadays, the Internet is developing rapidly but the elderly seem to be left behind by the times.

Many elderly aren’t savvy enough to use mobile payment methods, navigation apps, and even chatting platforms.

Let alone browse through Weibo posts and record recipes.

Other media workers too, have been recording with cameras and recorders in order to create the widest possible impact through more channels.

After all, this is what the media should do ah.

Amidst the expectant gazes of a group of people, Xiang Yi cleared her throat and slowly said in a voice that was several times louder than just now.

“Uncles and Aunts, grandparents, can you hear me?”

Live audience.

——[I’m a headphone gang and I died on the spot]

——[Xiang Yi is really toxic. Why are you shouting? My ears hurt!]

——[To the person in front, you have hands and feet. Can’t you turn down the volume yourselves? I’m afraid that the elderly can’t hear me because they don’t know how to increase the volume!]

No one bragged again.

Instead, in many homes across the country, elderly people with graying hair responded to Xiang Yi.

“Hey hey, I heard you!”

“I heard you.”

“This girl has a loud voice! It’s so nice to hear!”

“…”

Xiang Yi deliberately slowed down her speech and was extremely patienta as she explained clearly about each ingredient and herb.

The reporters felt her kindness, and one by one, they all laughed silently.

The official TV station’s live broadcast also made an exception for her and extended the time once again.

The channel was cold, but the people behind the channel could sense what warmth was.

There are times when exceptions are needed.

After Xiang Yi finished explaining once, she repeated briefly again, and asked loudly, “Do you remember?”

In the livestream, the hostility was gone and replaced by a positive speech.

——[I remember! Praise me!]

——[Hahahaha my grandmother is listening really carefully, and took a small notebook to write down!]

——[I didn’t even realize my father had a hearing problem before this. He was afraid of affecting us so every time the volume was turned down, he would watch the news expressionlesly. Today, I saw him smiling at Xiang Yi and I realized that Xiang Yi’s voice was the only thing he could hear clearly! I’m crying, I’m prepared to take him for a medical checkup this afternoon.]

…

The interview lasted till the end.

“One last question, Xiang Yi, do you have something to say to your family?” The reporter who called her “Miss Xiang” just now had subconsciously started calling her Xiang Yi.

chapters.title: Chapter 675 - He Is Also My Family (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 675 - He Is Also My Family (2)

The fair-skinned and exquisite young girl blinked her black long eyelashes. “There doesn’t seem to be much to say.”

There were several comments in the livestream.

——[Yo, you don’t want to f**k with your group pet persona anymore?]

——[Now it’s a case of forgetting your family when you become famous]

——[Frankly speaking, without your family, can you get this far? Who will care about you? Haha]

…

However, Xiang Yi said:

“I basically have a video call with my family every day, and if everyone is free, they will also have a group call together.”

Their family’s ties were much closer than that of ordinary families.

Xiang Yi’s grandparents, uncle, and brothers often pamper her, and vice versa.

She would immediately share with her family the funny videos that she found online, the nice books she read, and the new dishes you’ve made.

The haters were confused.

‘Sorry to interrupt.’

‘When will the live broadcast come up with a recall function?’

“If you can’t visit home often, then contact them often.” The young lady faced the camera with a faint smile.

The eyes behind the lenses of the decent-looking reporter were filled with joy.

They suddenly understood the reason that those experts spoiled her.

Which elderly would not love a gentle and understanding little girl?

“Then the interview shall end here…” He was about to cue the end of the process when the young girl suddenly said, “But I have something to say to him.”

The young girl held Shi Sui’s hand and he watched with surprise and some shyness. However, he was determined. “I’ve always… missed you.”

The man’s eyes were deep, and for a moment, they became dark and silent.

He subconsciously clutched the girl’s slender wrist.

Their fingers were interlocked.

“Ahem, that’s it.” Xiang Yi looked at the camera and exclaimed, “This is not considered off-topic oh, because he is also my family!”

Bang, bang bang…

Shi Sui felt as if someone had set off fireworks in his heart as it began surging.

He grew up in an environment that was drastically different to that of Xiang Yi.

His relationship with his family was indifferent, and he was also very distant from his own biological parents.

The love of his father for his mother was passionate and grand, but also crazy and paranoid.

Shi Sui’s father was intensely possessive and in the beginning, only restricted Shi Sui’s mother’s friendships and outings. However, later on, it worsened to the point where he directly restricted Shi Sui’s mother’s outings due to certain mental illnesses.

That’s the civilized way to put it.

From a legal point of view, that was clearly a violation of the confinement of personal freedom.

The disagreement between his parents grew, and every day the house was filled with the sound of arguing, crying, and the sound of things being broken.

At that time, Shi Sui Sui’s greatest wish was to have no family.

But now…

Xiang Yi, the warm and tender little girl, had the skin from her ears to her swanlike neck turn red. She was obviously already blushing to the point of no return, but she nevertheless expressed her feelings in front of the crowd and the camera.

He was not just her boyfriend.

But family.

For the first time, Shi Sui experienced the beauty of this word.

“Hmm.” He answered in a low voice, raspy and mixed with some inexplicable emotions, clearly pleasant, “I miss you too.”

All reporters were speechless.

I never thought that such a positive interview could escape the fate of watching someone flaunt their affection.

“Okay, thank you Xiang Yi for accepting our interview. I’m wishing Xiang Yi and her family happiness and well-being forever.” The decent reporter said the closing words with a double entendre and a smile.

In the livestream, the fans of the couple couldn’t help but celebrate.

——[I don’t care, I don’t care! This is National TV’s testament for the UntimelyCouple!!!]

….

chapters.title: Chapter 676 - Rock Fried Chicken (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 676 - Rock Fried Chicken (1)

——[Hello everyone I’m the Civil Affairs Bureau, I’m coming over by myself!]

——[Hello everyone, I’m a flower girl, I’m sprinkling flowers, stars and hearts! ★]

——[Hello everyone I am the matchmaker, Elder Moon, and I announce that the red line of these two people has been locked! I have swallowed the key! This couple has to stay together for three lifetimes!]

…

The interview was stuck at the clip of Shi Sui and Xiang Yi smiling at each other before coming to an abrupt end.

However, the livestream was still in progress.

Hence, the viewers of the livestream discovered…

The extremely particular reporters who were still busy just now smiled at Xiang Yi.

There were some timid ones who got frightened to the point of shivering.

——[W-What’s going on? This is so much like a zombie film scene…]

The was too embarrassed to speak first, but eventually, the gentle and mild-mannered reporter spoke out.

“Ahem, Xiang Yi, it’s almost time for dinner, we have prepared some ingredients ourselves, I wonder if we can…”

Language is profound.

Appropriate pauses in sentences would result in a meaningful effect in a tacit manner.

Xiang Yi immediately understood. “It’s been hard on everyone. Why don’t you guys stay for a meal?”

The atmosphere suddenly became familiar and cheerful.

“Okay, okay, thank you, Xiang Yi!”

“Don’t worry, Xiang Yi, I will only eat one bowl of rice!”

“I’m sorry, I’ll go feed the pigs for you!”

“What are you doing? Are you trying to snatch my job!?! I’m telling you, I’m going to now make things clear beforehand. I’ll deal with anyone who tries to snatch my job!”

The netizens were surprised.

Well, but they had already gotten used to it.

It was just Xiang Yi’s regular operation.

The mild-mannered reporter smiled and said, “I’m sorry for imposing on you.”

The group of people entered the estate. Even though many had watched the livestream, they were still amazed by the picturesque idyllic beauty!

There was a nursery, a large vegetable fields, chickens, ducks, pigs and geese, and a small rabbit farm in the distance…

It was simply a place where the gods live!

A group of celebrity journalists rolled up their sleeves and the legs of their trouser legs. There were rather quick and skilled when working.

The large yard was suddenly lively.

…

The reporters brought a lot of fresh ingredients with them, and after thinking about it, they moved the barbecue grill, which hadn’t been used for a long time, to the courtyard. They then began to handle the ingredients.

The meat was marinated with eggs, starch, salt, oyster sauce, etc. She also prepared extra servings with other marinades.

The shrimp were chopped into puree, mixed with wine, egg whites, soy flour and a little sugar.

The vegetables are washed and neatly arranged on white or wooden crockery to create a harmony of colors.

In addition, she grabbed a nine-compartment electric hot pot and skewered the fresh hand-battered beef balls, fish balls, seaweed and tofu delivered from Little Rabbit Farm in the morning.

The aroma spread and in no time, there were sounds of gulping everywhere.

“Oooooooo this is also too fragrant it…”

“I can’t, my mouth is watering…”

“Is this Xiang Yi’s cooking skill? It’s horrible as hell!”

“…”

However, Xiang Yi was still looking stern as if she was contemplating something big.

The refined-looking reporter asked curiously, “What is bothering you, Xiang Yi? Why don’t you tell us and let us help you think of some countermeasures?”

Two minds are better than one, not to mention that there were so many minds.

“I’m thinking about what to make for the main course.” After a pause, she glanced at the chicken coop and said, “I have thought of it. We’ll just cook those chicken. They seem to be suffering from low blood sugar.”

The reporter was confused.

Xiang Yi said despondently, “It seems that I have to add more sugar when frying them.”

The reporter was dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 677 - Rock Fried Chicken (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 677 - Rock Fried Chicken (2)

The audience’s reaction was the same as the reporter’s.

——[Children, are you just as confused as I am?]

——[Chicken: Ooooooooooo! (Listen, is that something a human should be saying!?!) ]

——[It’s okay to be a little sweet when hyping up their relationship. Is Xiang Yi trying to make me laugh so that she can inherit my summer homework!?!]

…

The pop-up comments were all from people who were heartbroken about the chickens for a while.

Xiang Yi managed to catch the chicken at lightning speed.

Owing to the fact that the scene of killing the chickens was too bloody, the cameraman chose not to shoot it.

By the time he shot them again, the chickens were already lined up in a row and laying cleanly on the chopping board.

There was an immediate shift in the netizens’ opinion.

——[RIP, Brother Chicken / candle / candle]

——[A family has to stay united! / dog head]

——[It’s too cruel! Xiang Yi, can you send me a portion of the chicken via express delivery when it’s ready?]

——[I’m different. Xiang Yi, tell me where your house is! I can deliver myself over for a meal!]

…

In the kitchen.

The kitchen. Xiang Yi was going to make a dish of rock fried chicken today.

“This dish is very easy to cook, you can try it.” Xiang Yi began to heat up some oil in the pan while interacting with the audience.

After the oil was heated up, she added ginger slices and stir-fried them to bring out their flavor. Next, she added some peppers for spiciness, followed by small pieces of chicken.

The soul of rock fried chicken, sweet noodle sauce, was absolutely essential too.

While she was stir-frying the vegetables swiftly, explosive power emerged from her slender body too and she would sometimes even tremble a little.

The audience exclaimed: I get it, I get it now!

She stir-fried the chicken until its moisture evaporated. Next, she added bone broth to the pot, brought it to boil over high heat and then allowed it to simmer over low heat.

Finally, she added green pepper, millet pepper, onion, rock sugar, etc. to increase the rich spiciness and freshness. After stir-frying evenly, she was ready to fish them out of the pan.

In the courtyard, the journalists had already enjoyed the barbecued meat and oden with the special seasoning that Xiang Yi made.

“This chili powder is amazing! It’s worthy of being the super chili pepper cultivated by the research institute!”

“Why does Xiang Yi know how to make sauce? Oh my God, is there anything she can’t do?”

“The oden is 10,000 times better than the ones I get at the convenience store! The meatballs are so fresh! It’s true that the highest quality ingredients need only the simplest cooking techniques!”

“…”

The crowd was full of praises for Xiang Yi, so much that it seemed like they couldn’t wait to write an 800-word press release to prove how good the seasonings and meatballs cooked by Xiang Yi were!

A strong fragrance wafted down to the nostrils of the crowd.

“!”

The group moved and turned to look at the source of the fragrance.

Xiang Yi was carrying a large pot out of the kitchen.

Someone in the livestream was rather aggressive.

—[All visitors are guests. It’s not appropriate to use a basin, right? She ought to distribute the food and serve them on plates]

The comment was quickly rebutted.

——[If you don’t like to see it, get lost!]

——[Do you know why Xiao Ming’s grandmother lived to eighty?Because she has never been nosy!]

——[It must have been hard for you to grow to this age. It’s a godsend miracle that you managed to grow to such an age]

…

The foodie fans’ rebuttal immediately made the haters shut up.

Most of the time, the foodie fans were very peace-loving but the only exception was during a specific time.

Mealtimes!

Their provocation was even more infuriating than throwing their milk tea and fried chicken.

“Here comes the rock fried chicken~”

All of a sudden.

Countless people in front of the screen began seriously and solemnly pulling out their chopsticks like swordsmen whipping out of their swords!

chapters.title: Chapter 678 - Rock Fried Chicken (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 678 - Rock Fried Chicken (3)

The camera gave a close-up of the piping hot rock fried chicken in the basin.

The chicken was crispy, tender, and aromatic, while the broth was thick. The fried chicken was red and bright, echoing the colors of onions and peppers. There was a layer of white sesame seeds sprinkled on top, covering it with an appetizing layer.

It was nothing but appetizing!

There was nothing too fancy about it either!

There were only three words to describe how they felt — Fragrant! Hungry! Peckish!

“Gulp…” In front of the screen, many people have already started to swallow their saliva.

The reporters in the courtyard were not much better as they were all staring intently.

“There’s rice and noodles for the main course.” Xiang Yi added, “The noodles can be eaten like the Large Plate Chicken, mixed with soup at the end.”

“!”

After recalling the way to eat the big plate of chicken, the crowd just felt that this Rock fried chicken had gone up to another level of deliciousness! Si Wen, the reporter with the most experience, spoke up and said, “Let’s move our chopsticks.”

Like hungry wolves, the group of celebrity journalists picked up the chicken bits with their chopsticks.

The chicken was nothing but tender in their mouths! The aroma of light sauce engulfed the chicken, making the first taste sweet and the aftertaste a myriad of flavors like saltiness and spiciness.

The meat had completely soaked up the broth and it felt like it was about to ooze with juiciness!

With the right amount of steamed rice, it was no exaggeration to say that they could pair half a bowl of rice with a bite of fried chicken!

With a glass of cold beer or cold Coke, everyone felt as if the depths of their soul had begun to shiver…

Strangely, no one at the table said a single word.

The only thing the audience can hear is the sound of them chewing their food!

——[Kam! This damn stereo surround sound!]

——[I’m really enjoying these instant noodles while seated in front of the screen! This stir-fried chicken is really nice!]

——[Director Li, come out and tell us. You mentioned that you renewed your devices. That’s all for the sake of shooting delicacies, right? What is your original intention!?! Is it to shoot variety shows or to shoot a livestream!?!]

…

Xiang Yi knew that Shi Sui had a bland palate so she deliberately cooked some light dishes for him.

The two of them sat at the side and ate green vegetables to get the feeling of quietness of the years.

“Want some soup?” Xiang Yi asked. “I also made some purple cabbage and egg flower soup. They’re in the kitchen.”

Without waiting for Shi Sui to answer, someone immediately beat him to it and said, “I’ll go and serve it! How can I let you work, Xiang Yi!?”

“…”

That person happily went to serve the soup, but Shi Sui’s phone vibrated.

He looked at the caller ID and raised his eyebrows slightly before answering the phone.

However, after just saying a few words, the call was over.

He looked at Xiang Yi, his tone a little helpless. He said, “There’s no one taking care of my little nephew these two days. His parents want to send him over for a temporary stay.”

Xiang Yi had an impression of that little nephew. She had met him on his grandfather’s 60th birthday, and felt that he was a very decent and cute little boy.

The little girl had always loved children. She grinned and said, “Okay, what does he like to eat? I’ll make it for him.”

A trace of displeasure appeared in Shi Sui’s heart but he did not show it. His expression did not change and he said, “He’s not picky, he’ll eat anything.”

In the meantime, the staff led a little boy over and said, somewhat helplessly, “That… couple just left this child behind and left, saying they were looking for Shi Sui.”

The eyes of the crowd coincidentally landed on the little boy she was holding.

It was a boy who was about four or five years old. His hair was soft and delicate, and he had short, curly chestnut-colored hair. He was dressed in a British-style shirt and pants, with a pair of clean shoes on his feet.

The only thing that didn’t match his outfits was his sullen face.

chapters.title: Chapter 679 - Believe In Science (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 679 - Believe In Science (1)

“Shi Yu?” Xiang Yi got up and called the name of the little boy.

Shi Yu’s little face was sullen and he nodded in a rather elderly-like manner. “Hello, Sister Xiang Yi.”

Xiang Yi said, “Wow, you still remember me.”

The last time she met Shi Yu was a few months before she transmigrated.

It’s hard to believe that a child of this age can still accurately call out her name.

She walked up to Shi Yu and winked. “Can I hold your hand?”

Shi Yu obediently put his little hand in her palm.

He quietly glanced at Shi Sui, whose face had obviously become a degree more sullen.

He walked towards Shi Sui.

The man had a powerful aura as he shot a glance at them calmly.

Shi Yu bit the bullet and greeted, “Hello, Uncle.”

Shi Sui said, “Well, hello.”

Then…

There was nothing else!

Shi Sui and his nephew both fell into a bewildering silence.

So did the netizens.

Are they really uncle and nephew? Why do they seem to be more polite to each other than passersby are?

…

Fortunately, Xiang Yi gave them an out in a timely manner. She asked softly, “Are you hungry? What do you want to eat?”

The aroma of the Rock fried chicken, barbecued meat and oden immediately wafted up to Shi Yu’s nose. He used all his self-control to restrain himself from saying that he wanted to eat the food. He said in a reserved and decent manner,

“Thank you, Sis. I’ve already had lunch.”

“Do you want to eat some cupcakes? Do you want to watch a cartoon? How about I tell you a story?”

Xiang Yi had always been very patient with children, especially the good-looking ones.

Shi Yu’s black and white eyes were rounded, seemingly unable to understand. Is there…such happiness in the world? He scratched his head uncomfortably and rubbed his eyes again.

Xiang Yi saw his actions but soon misunderstood. “Are you sleepy? Then I’ll take you to take a nap, okay?”

Shi Yu pretended to be aloof but his voice contained a tinge of childishness and puerile tenderness. “Okay.”

Xiang Yi took Shi Yu away.

The reporters smiled and winked.

“Shi Sui, Xiang Yi is quite good with children!”

“Yes, yes, when are you going to get married?”

“Is it time to consider having a second child as well? After all, the three-child policy is now in place…”

It’s human nature to gossip and even famous reporters are no exception.

Shi Sui faintly related without answering.

He didn’t like children.

As for Shi Yu…
