Once he thought of Xiang Yi’s attitude towards him, Shi Sui couldn’t help but grind the tips of his teeth.

…

In the guest room.

The staff sent a small car-shaped suitcase from which Shi Yu took out his own pajamas. Just as he was about to change, he suddenly realized something and tilted his little face upwards to look at Xiang Yi. Feeling a little embarrassed, he pursed his lips and said, “Sis, I’m going to get changed.”

“Ah, sorry, I’m leaving now.”

“…” Shi Yu stayed silent for a few seconds before carefully put forward a request that he would never dare to mention at home, “Sister, can you tell me a bedtime story?”

“Hey?”

Xiang Yi froze and then nodded. “Sure. Get changed while I go to the bathroom to look away, okay?”

The bottom of Shi Yu’s eyes were bright and starry, but he pretended to be nonchalant. “Well, okay.”

He was somewhat like Shi Sui.

…

Xiang Yi entered the bathroom and called out to the system in her head.

“Help me search for a few fairy tales.” Xiang Yi didn’t feel burdened ordering it around at all. “By the way, why have you been so quiet lately?”

The system was silent for more than ten seconds and it was so angry that it almost vomited blood. “…. that’s because you blocked me !!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 680 - Believe In Science (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 680 - Believe In Science (2)

Xiang Yi kept a straight face and said, “Oh, so that’s how it is.”

The system was confused.

‘I’m so infuriated. This is going to be the death of me!’

Although it had a high authority as a system, it had to follow the basic rules of logic.

For example, if the host asks to block the system or mute it, it would have no choice but to be furious deep down unless it’s a special situation or the host takes the initiative to summon it.

“…” The system was speechless for a while before it said aggressively, “Ten fairy tales from different realms have been downloaded for you. Loading… loading complete .”

Xiang Yi was no stranger to receiving information, and soon, ten fairy tales appeared in her mind out of thin air.

It had to be said that the system was quite reliable. The fairytales it found for her were more suitable for children as they were cute and heartwarming, devoid of any gory scenes that involved children being eaten or humans turning into zombies.

“Thank you, good job.”

When they heard Xiang Yi’s gentle, soft and polite voice, the system couldn’t help but roll around in the data.

It had served several hosts before but they were all…

In particular, Ling Ye would lie to it. In short, Xiang Yi was worlds apart from them.

‘The new host is so good, she knows to thank me~’

The system was basking in glee when it heard Xiang Yi saying the cruelest words in the gentlest tone of voice. “Continue blocking the system. Thank you.”

The system was speechless.

‘Is this what the netizens mean by short-lived happiness that won’t last over three seconds?’

‘Why!?! Am I not professional enough? Am I not good enough? I’m clearly countless times better than that fool Xiao Naofu!’

‘Am I… not as cute as Xiao Naofu!?’

No…!

There was a violent fluctuation in the frequency of the data stream, and it took a long time for it to regain its calmness.

…

After testing the system, Xiang Yi probably had an idea.

As far as she knew at present, the completion of the so-called “task” issued by the system was not mandatory. In fact, the system might even take the initiative to give her a way out.

In the past, Xiao Naofu used to be really close to her but due to the rules, she would be punished if she failed to complete tasks.

However, after the punishment, Xiao Naofu would cry miserably.

In addition, the system’s tolerance for her was definitely not normal.

It was as if… It was not in a hurry for Xiang Yi to complete her mission in this world…

The appearance of Shi Yu interrupted Xiang Yi’s thoughts.

“Sister.” The little boy’s voice was clear and its young, round black eyes had soft contours. However, there was an upward arch at the end of its eyes, which were quite similar to Shi Sui’s. She reckoned that when he grows up, he would probably also have deep-set and loving peach-blossom-shaped eyes like Shi Sui.

He changed into his blue and white checkered pajamas, which were made of cotton fabric. Xiang Yi found it very familiar.

“Or do you want to sit over there and listen to the story? When you get sleepy, you can sleep.” Xiang Yi pointed to the direction where the floor-to-ceiling window was located.

This room was facing a good direction. At this moment, the sun was shining brightly and the green curtain was pulled open, leaving a layer of lilac lace curtains. Light shone into the room.

When the wind blew, the light seemed to jump.

There was a row of tatami mats on the floor, a soft beanbag, and a number of pillows.

Shi Yu clenched his small fist, resisted the temptation, and said seriously, “Sis, I’ll just lie down on the bed to listen.”

“But…” Xiang Yi smiled and said, “I want to tell you a story by the window.”

There was obvious joy in Shi Yu’s eyes but he restrained them very well. Or so he thought.

“Well then, the least a gentleman could do is to not put a lady in a difficult spot,” he said with a sullen expression on his little face.

chapters.title: Chapter 681 - Believe In Science (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 681 - Believe In Science (3)

Xiang Yi knew what Shi Yu was thinking but she didn’t expose him and instead pulled him to sit down.

While sensing the softness of the sofa, a trace of shock appeared in Shi Yu’s eyes.

It turns out that there’s such a comfortable thing in this world!

He thought this was happy enough, but he didn’t expect that the next second, Xiang Yi handed him a fluffy blanket, and a rabbit doll.

“Here.” The young girl’s skin was so fair under the sunlight that she seemed to be glowing. “I’m going to start reading the story then.”

Shi Yu stiffly nodded and subconsciously hugged the stuffed rabbit in his arms tightly.

… It was soft.

With Xiang Yi at home, it seemed that everything was soft.

Like her.

All of this was what Shi Yu never even dared to think about.

The sun was warm, just like Xiang Yi’s tender voice. It didn’t take long for Shi Yu to get sleepy.

Even if he were to adhere to the strict tutelage and sit upright, he was still young after all. It did not take long for him small one to sink into that cloud-like softness.

“… The Lemon Prince found the Orange Princess and told her that in this world, fruits may be different from one another, but every fruit deserves to be loved.”

Shi Yu was about to doze off but he still stubbornly asked, “Sister, what if there’s a fruit that no one likes?”

Xiang Yi pondered before asking, “For example?”

“For example… the Durian Princess.” Shi Yu cited the fruit he hated the most as an example while his long eyelashes drooped, casting a shallow shadow. “What if no one in the world likes the Durian Princess?”

Xiang Yi was silent for a while. Stroking his little head, she said, “Maybe the prince who likes durian is still far away and needs Princess Durian to wait a little longer for him to appear.”

Shi Yu’s long eyelashes twitched, “But… What if she can’t wait? You can’t guarantee that your answer is 100% correct, right?”

After asking, he regretted it a little.

Shi Yu’s ability to express and reason with logic was beyond his peers. In a sense, he can be called a genius.

However, the people around him would only ever treat him as a child.

Even if he could solve a puzzle that even adults can’t, all he got in return was his father’s impatient words. “What’s the use of you solving this?”

Or, he would end up being treated like a monkey by others.

“Shi Yu, show us how to recite the pi table!”

When he recited it, those people would often show surprised expressions.

“Not bad, quite impressive.”

Then the conversation would turn in another direction. “But children will suffer from brain damage if they learn so many things! Maybe, the damage will last forever. He might be smart as a kid and end up becoming foolish as an adult!”

He asked questions that few adults could answer.

Whenever they were stumped, they would come up with all kinds of excuses.

“Children don’t need to know this.”

“Well, you’ll know when you grow up!”

“Go, go, go, leave me alone! You can use your phone to search for it and you’ll know!”

“…”

For a long time, Shi Yu had gotten used to it.

He thought to himself that Xiang Yi would probably be unable to answer him or even struggle to think of a way to patronize him.

Unexpectedly…

Xiang Yi’s small hand rested on her cheek and she said adoringly, “Shi Yu, you’re so good, you can think of such a question.”

He froze for a moment.

Immediately afterwards, Xiang Yi said seriously, “Everyone can have their own opinions and views.. That’s just what I think the answer is. What about you, Shi Yu? What is your answer? Can you tell me?”

chapters.title: Chapter 682 - Believe In Science (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 682 - Believe In Science (4)

… Huh?

Hey? Shi Yu froze.

There was no rebuttal, no ridicule, no perfunctory…

Instead, he was treated like an adult, respectful and equal.

This is beyond Shi Yu’s perception.

After a brief blankness of his brain, Shi Yu clenched his fist excitedly and expressed his opinion, “I think that in addition to what my sister said, I think that I can’t be a good person.

“I think, in addition to the kind of possibility that you mentioned, there is also another possibility. Maybe the Durian Princess can’t wait for her own prince in her life, and she may also be hated by other people, but it does not matter, she also hates other people, so…”

Shi Yu hesitated, not daring to speak his mind.

He was so smart and perceptive, so he was afraid that Xiang Yi would guess that the “Durian Princess” was himself.

“So Princess Durian is alone and living a happy life?” Xiang Yi added. “Did I guess correctly?”

Shi Yu looked up at her, and then lowered his head to look at his toes. “… Well, your guess is half right.”

Xiang Yi was distressed. “Well?”

Her confused tone, somehow Shi Yu felt satisfied.

He felt deeply that he was needed!

Xiang Yi was an adult but he could give her the answer to her question!

Shi Yu unconsciously straightened his back and said sullenly, “Because you can’t be happy alone.”

“So, I think you have a good point, Shi Yu.”

“But I have to refute it. Like you said, I cannot prove the correctness of my answer and the same can be said for you, Shi Yu. Why can’t you be happy alone? In this world, men can love women but men can also love men while women can also love women.”

“But even if none of the above options are chosen, I think it’s okay. You can choose who to date and be in a relationship with, as long as its the lifestyle that you like.”

“…”

Although Shi Yu was a talent, Xiang Yi’s words were too overwhelming to him.

Xiang Yi’s point of view was something he had never envisioned before.

“Let me tell you a secret. I love my family, grandparents, little uncles, brothers, and boyfriend very much but sometimes, I like being alone too.”

“I like to cook, and it’s fun to cook for my family, but it’s also fun to cook by myself.”

“It doesn’t matter if Princess Durian can’t wait for the prince, she can still be a happy little princess.”

Shi Yu’s dull and dark eyes turned a little brighter…

…

Outside the door.

Shi Sui brought over small desserts and hot milk.

The livestream was still going on but the guest room was not filmed.

Some people commented: [Shi Sui seems to have a bark that’s worse than his bite. Although he spoke coldly to his nephew, his behavior proved otherwise~]

A large pop-up screen soon appeared.

——[Young man, you are too naive!]

——[I bet with all my dignity, that this is definitely for Xiang Yi!]

——[I think Shi Sui is jealous hahaha. The thought of his girlfriend and other male creatures in the same room would definitely make him uncomfortable, even if the male is only a young child~]

…

Hearing the conversation between Xiang Yi and Shi Yu, Shi Sui’s first reaction was to turn off the microphone.

He then knocked on the room door twice.

Xiang Yi walked over to open the door, with Shi Yu following her.

Shi Sui squinted when he saw how clingy Shi Yu was.

Shi Yu cringed and instinctively felt a sense of danger.

chapters.title: Chapter 683 - Believe In Science (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 683 - Believe In Science (5)

Fortunately, Shi Sui did not seem to be deranged to the point of beating up the children. He handed the tray to Xiang Yi and said indifferently, “I’m afraid you two are hungry.”

Shi Yu heaved a huge sigh of relief.

Xiang Yi took it and said, “Thank you boyfriend ~ I’ll continue telling Shi Yu stories then~”

Hearing his words, Shi Yu tugged the corner of Xiang Yi’s shirt with the childish intentions to show off. He said bravely, “Sis Xiang Yi tells really nice stories.”

Not only does she tell nice stories.

She sounds really nice when speaking too!

Shi Yu was elated. After such a short period of time, he had already wanted to live here forever.

Shi Sui stared at him for a few seconds. After a short while, he lowered his long eyelashes and said in a slightly hoarse voice, “Since I was a kid, no one has ever told me a story.”

“… “

Xiang Yi was stunned.

Xiao Naofu, who was laying leisurely in the hammock of the cat villa nearby, couldn’t help but roll his eyes after hearing Shi Sui’s words.

How in the world can there be such a brazen dog man as Shi Sui!?! Although the viewers of the livestream couldn’t hear the sounds, the fact that Shi Sui lowered his head was enough to make their imagination run wild.

——[Based on Xiao Naofu’s expression, Shi Sui must have said something pretentious]

——[Shi Sui’s acting skills are really impressive! I feel so much sympathy for him after watching him purse his lips. I want to hug him!]

——[Sorry, my focus is different from yours. Shi Yu is still so young but his features are already so good-looking. I have a bold idea. Shi Yu, I can wait for you to grow up! /dog head]

…

Xiang Yi pondered for a while before asking tentatively, “Then I… will let you two continue with the story-telling?”

Shi Yu’s expression was slightly resistant.

Shi Sui smiled and said, “Okay~”

Hence, Shi Sui strutted into the hall and entered the room. His expression was a stark contrast to the sullen-faced Shi Yu.

Xiao Naofu meowed loudly.

——[I’m so happy! This dog of a man is really more pretentious than anyone!]

… Once the trio entered the guest room, the screen of the livestream went black for a few seconds before the camera panned back to the courtyard.

The audience was anxious. Who would want to watch these people eat and drink? It’ll only make them feel lonely!

Many people started protesting under his official Weibo account.

When Li Jianyu saw the comments, he began to hesitate if he should ask Xiang Yi and Shi Sui to come over. However, the door was opened.

Xiang Yi came to the living room and rummaged through the boxes.

He asked curiously, “Xiang Yi, what are you looking for? Do you need help?”

Xiang Yi, “Yellow paper and red ink.”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded. “What’s that?”

“Some stuff for drawing talismans.”

The young girl’s answer horrified Li Jianyu.

“Xiang Yi! You calm down! We can’t engage in feudal superstitious activities!”

Otherwise, the livestream might receive a warning or even get banned!

“Shi Yu can’t fall asleep, perhaps for psychological reasons. I’ll draw a talisman to coax him.” Xiang Yi remained calm and said, “We have to believe in science. From the medical point of view of analysis, this can be considered the same as a placebo.”

“Is… Is that so…” Li Jianyu was confused but seeing how calm Xiang Yi was, he didn’t doubt her at all.

Xiang Yi took out the tools for drawing talismans. She laid the yellow paper on the table and dipped the brush into the red ink and began drawing talismans.

In just a moment, the talisman was drawn.

The livestream viewers were dumbfounded.

——[It seems…to really be the case, huh?]

However, there were also some people who raised doubts.

——[Can it be done so casually? The drawing of talismans is a solemn matter that requires the drawer to take a bath and get changed before drawing. What Xiang Yi is doing is just child’s play!]

….

chapters.title: Chapter 684 - Great Talent!
chapters.body:
Chapter 684 - Great Talent!

Chapter 684: Great Talent! Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

-[There are innate and postnatal talismans. Simply put, only geniuses can draw innate talismans. As the saying goes, “A little ingenuity is a talisman”. Besides, there are complicated rules when it comes to drawing postnatal talismans. Ordinary people draw postnatal talismans but Xiang Yi uses the innate talisman drawing method. Umm honestly, you can choose not to believe it, but you can’t disrespect it, right?]

However, Xiang Yi did not care so much. She was drawing a “clear heart talisman” that she had learned in some immortal realm, which has the effect of calming the mind and calming the spirit.

The only thing was that she was in her own world, and there was no so-called magic. There is no spiritual energy in the world and she didn’t think that there was going to be any substantial effect.

It was undoubtedly just for coaxing children like Shi Yu.

Unbeknownst to her, the video of her drawing the talisman happened to be seen by a certain talisman enthusiast…

Professor Zhu was quite knowledgeable about traditional Chinese culture and was especially interested in Mountain and Sea Scriptures, mythology and other fields.

He was a History professor at Nancheng University, and he had an extremely healthy daily life too. Apart from attending classes and leading graduate students, he refines herbal pills, grows flowers on the balcony and vegetables in the backyard.

Since he had an exchange with a few Taoist masters at an academic event, he became interested in the seal script, and apart from analyzing the culture, history and origin behind it, he would occasionally draw a few seals for fun.

After scientific research, he found that it was really difficult to draw the talismans.

First of all, it was difficult for him to remember how to draw the seal, as it is like a traditional Chinese character.

Secondly, the drawer is required to finish the drawing in one breath without any interruption.

These two requirements are difficult for many people.

Today, he came to attend a book presentation by some graduate students, and before it was time, some people were watching the video.

Professor Zhu was not like some old-fashioned teachers who are resistant to popular things and trends. On the contrary, he was quite fashionable and trendy, and thought that as long as the students had completed their study tasks, there was nothing wrong with playing games and watching videos.

Everything was fine as long as it was done in moderation.

Hence, not only did he not reprimand his students, but he also held onto his thermos flash and watched the livestream together with them with great interest.

They happened to play to the part were Xiang Yi was drawing talismans. At first Professor Zhu thought that Xiang Yi was just fooling around and making casual strokes with the brush. However, the moment she really started drawing…

Professor Zhu subconsciously held his breath.

Xiang Yi started moving lazily, as if she was making a casual drawing.

However, in a moment, a talisman seal was formed in her hands.

The student muttered, “What is this thing? Why does it look like a talisman drawn by a ghost…”

However, Professor Zhu slapped his thigh and exclaimed, “Great!”

The student was startled and trembled, “Teacher…? I’m I’m not looking, I’ll start reading right now.”

However, Professor Zhu praised repeatedly, “The next stroke is so godly. It’s done in one take!”

“The drawing is not confined to the form. How free-spirited!”

“All it takes to draw a talisman is a little light. The world has wasted so much ink!”

“This young lady is a great talent in the art of talismans!”

The students were dumbstruck. “What?? Teacher, are you a Spicy Rabbit too? Why are you so good at praising her!?!

The other side.

A Taoist temple in Nancheng.

A young Taoist priest also found the video of Xiang Yi’s talisman drawing. He rubbed his eyes, confirmed again and again, and then ran wildly with his legs, shouting as he ran.

“Master, Master! Someone has drawn a talisman that looks the same as Grandmaster’s!”

“What nonsense are you spouting?” The immortal-like Taoist master stroked his beard, and when he looked at the symbolic seal on the video, his pupils instantly quaked!

It…it’s the Heart Cleansing Talisman!?!

chapters.title: Chapter 685 - Visiting The Little Friend, Xiang Yi
chapters.body:
Chapter 685 - Visiting The Little Friend, Xiang Yi

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“What nonsense are you spouting?” The immortal-like Taoist master stroked his beard, and when he looked at the symbolic seal on the video, his pupils instantly quaked!

It…it’s the Heart Cleansing Talisman!?!

The Heart Cleansing Talisman had long been lost, and the Taoist temple was fortunate to have left a lineage of inheritance.

Unfortunately, because the talisman was too difficult to draw, their ancestor had broken that tradition.

The reason that his young disciple could recognize it was because their grandmaster had left behind a few talisman seals during his lifetime.

He had no choice but to have the seal, but the method of drawing it had been lost. He had studied it for many years, but he had only comprehended the tip of the iceberg! “This young girl is so young, how can she draw such a difficult and obscure symbolic seal?’

“Master, why is it that this lady can draw it but you can’t? The young Taoist priest shook his head and asked.

He saw this sister draw, it’s not that difficult.

The Taoist master was speechless!

“Nonsense! Of course it’s because I’m inexperienced!

However, he obviously couldn’t say that in front of the young apprentice. He swung the long sword on his back like Taoist masters in immortal novels.

“Disciple, keep a lookout. I have to go down the mountain far away, to visit this young Fellow Daoist!” The disciple was confused. “Master, you don’t know her that well but you called her a Fellow Daoist!?!

The disciple said with a look of hesitation, “Uh, Master…”

“Ah! No need to say more! I have already made up my mind. No matter how much you persuade me, it will not change my mind!”

“You want to come with me? You can’t. God knows how long we will take on this trip. In case of any danger and I can’t protect you, what will happen?

The corners of the young disciple’s mouth twitched. “Master, what I want to say is, you have opened the blade of this sword so it won’t pass the security check!”

In the guest room of the manor. At the strong request of the live audience, and after Shi Yu’s consent, Li Jianyu took Old Zhang into the guest room for filming

Shi Yu was a little tired but he was still sitting cross-legged.

Across the table, Shi Sui was slowly and methodically pouring a cup of hot tea for Xiang Yi.

Seeing Xiang Yi come in, Shi Yu forced himself to get up. Shi Sui said in a soft and tender voice, which was a result of his sleepiness, and said, “Sister…”

Xiang Yi took out the charm seal from behind with a smile on her face “Here, this is the lucky spell that the Lemon Prince gave the Durian Princess. Magic has been added by the witch and if you put it under the pillow when you go to bed, you’ll sleep very well!” Shi Yu already had the mindset that “Santa Claus is fake” and “fairy tales are all lies”. He blinked twice, knowing full well that Xiang Yi was coaxing him.

But…

He really liked it.

Shi Yu was so happy that she carefully placed the paper under the pillow, as if it were a treasure.

Xiang Yi covered him with the blanket. “Good afternoon.”

Shi Yu stole a glance at the Shi Sui and said boldly, “Sister, good afternoon.”

A large number of viewers of the livestream immediately clamored about wanting to take the sack to steal him.

Shi Yu hadn’t been sleeping well but for some reason, he had not only slept well tonight, he even had a good dream.

After Shi Yu fell asleep, Xiang Yi finally left with Shi Sui. After carefully covering the door of the room, Xiang Yi sighed and said, “Shi Yu is so obedient, he must be very easy to handle.”

Shi Sui assented ambiguously and started fiddling with Xiang Yi’s loose hairs.

“Am I not a good boy?” His low voice was filled with a few tinges of pity.

The man looked normal but his eyes were moist.

He was weak, helpless and aggrieved. Xiang Yi was flabbergasted! “Other children have a lucky spell…” There was an air of pretentiousness in the living room. “Unlike me, I have nothing…”

chapters.title: Chapter 686 - Not Chinese If You Don’T Look
chapters.body:
Chapter 686 - Not Chinese If You Don’T Look

Hearing those words…

Xiao Naofu: I’m about to throw up all my canned food!

LiJianyu: I don’t have eyes for this, I really don’t. jpg

The users of the livestream:

—{Great. This is really great]

—1shi Sui, why don’t you consider starting a class to teach us how to be pretentious? I’ll be the first to sign up!]

—1All pretentious people pale in comparison to Shi Sui! They’re nothing compared to him!]

However, Xiang Yi panicked and hurriedly comforted him, “No, no, my dear Shi Sui will definitely get some too!”

Shi Sui muttered self-deprecatingly, “Xiang Yi, don’t go on. I understand. How can someone like me be worthy of using the witch’s magic…”

“Who said you’re not worthy!?!” Xiang Yi grabbed his hand and said righteously, “I’ll draw it for you now!”

Hence, she wrote talisman after talisman under the gaze of millions of viewers…

Seemingly not tired at all, Xiang Yi stopped drawing only after she was done with a thick pile. She then stuffed it into Shi Sui’s hands.

“Is it enough? If it’s not enough, there’s still some more!”

Shi Sui grabbed her small and slender wrist and pinched it gently.

“Are these all for me?”

Xiang Yi nodded hard and said, “If there is really a lucky spell in this world, I want to give you all the luck.”

The bottom of Shi Sui’s eyes were filled with a deep color that was too thick to dissipate.

‘How should I describe my mood at that moment?”

Like the moment a bottle of ice-cold peach soda was unscrewed on a summer day.

All the bubbles surged upwards immediately.

“Just give me a little bit.” Shi Sui gently smiled, the end of his eyes curled into a pleasant arc. “Xiang Yi, you’re the one who should be lucky forever.”

In the live room, the audience was gradually getting used to the public display of affection between them.

—[Ahhhh what kind of divine love is this!]

—1For the death of every singleton, no couple is innocent!]

—1I saw it! I saw it! This is yet another day of rolling in bed all day and watching my favorite couple being sweet!]

Professor Zhu asked his close friend to help host the book report while he watched the livestream of “Two Under One Roof” very seriously.

The students were confused and in a trance.

#What if my teacher is even more addicted to the internet than I am?

When Xiang Yi drew a talisman for Shi Sui, Professor Zhu was really amazed.

In the eyes of ordinary people, Xiang Yi was just drawing nonsense.

However, in his eyes, every stroke was exquisite!

It contained ancient history, traditional culture, and the inheritance of faith…

It wasn’t just the drawing of talismans, it was simply art!

‘Taoist Master Ren was forced to replace his sword with a peach wood sword and got on the high speed train to Nancheng.

He stared straight at the phone while the passerby next to him shook his head.

‘What an era of lifelong entertainment! Even Taoist priests are watching variety shows!”

Unbeknownst to him, Taoist Master Ren was shocked beyond words!

Heart Cleansing Talisman!

Peace and Safety talisman!

House-Protection Talisman!

There were even more talismans that he had never heard of in his life!

Not only was he dumbfounded by the number of different kinds of talismans, but he was even more surprised that Xiang Yi drew one after another without taking a break in between!

He had to take a break after drawing one, and his master could only draw three at most. After doing so, it would be difficult for him to continue drawing!

Yet, Xiang Yi was doing it so quickly! She was just like a photocopy machine!

Daoist Master Ren trembled and forwarded the video to the peer group.

[Fellow Daoists, you’re not a Chinese national if you don’t watch this video! ]

Some people in the group scoffed when they saw that message.

What kind of nonsensical rumors did Old Ren forward to the group?

chapters.title: Chapter 687 - Who Is This Little Friend?
chapters.body:
Chapter 687 - Who Is This Little Friend?

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

They reckoned that it was something about an elderly lady in her sixties who has suddenly been enlightened about the Dao or some article that he took a liking to and decided to share with his friends on social media.

He opened the video to see that it was a mature and fair young girl who was drawing talismans with a brush and red ink.

“That’s not a big deal…”

‘Wait a minute!”

‘It’s all done in one go!”

If this is all, it would be fine but every single one of them was the same.

Moreoever, the variety and obscurity of the symbolic seals were beyond the imagination of these Taoist masters!

When the last second of the video ended, the screen turned black.

On the screen, there were several bewildered faces.

‘Who is this amazing young friend?”

The group, which had been silent for a long time, suddenly became lively.

[Daoist Baiyun Guan Min}: What is this young friend’s last name?Where does she live? Do any of you know?

[Daoist Yuquan Guansu]: @DaoistQingShuiGuanRen, Fellow Daoist, it’s been a long time! I miss you!

[Daoist Yongle Gongyu] : @DaoistQingShuiGuanRen, You and I have known each other for many years. We are not senior and junior brothers, but we are like brothers. We’re not family, but we are like family. Can you reveal some information about this young friend?

All of a sudden…

The crowd rushed to tag Daoist Ren.

Daoist Ren, who had always been disliked by the group, suddenly became well-liked by everyone!

In the living room.

Li Jianyu was overly curious as he immediately got into frame and squatted in between Xiang Yi and Shi Sui. She asked, “Xiang Yi Xiang Yi, this talisman really works? Is there a fortune talisman? Can I really become a rich man? It’ll be great if there’s a talisman that will allow me to win the lottery!”

Xiang Yi was speechless for a while. “No.”

Refusing to give up, Li Jianyu squeezed towards her and said with with a fawning smile, “Xiang Yi, we’re all the same! It’s okay to be a little metaphysical, right…”

Shi Sui’s face remained unchanged but he grabbed Li Jianyu by his collar and yanked him over with one hand. He wouldn’t let his shirt touch Xiang Yi at all!

He was really possessive.

Li Jianyu pressed his index fingers and thumbs together and rubbed them a few time. It somehow seemed really obscene when he did it.

In the livestream:

—Ahhh, you’re so ugly son!!]

—1Comparison really hurts. Son, your face is so much larger than Xiang Yi’s and Shi Suis…)

—1Xiang Yi, look at me! I’m not greedy. Give me a talisman for romance! I just need to attract a few handsome hunks with eight-pack abs!]

Xiang Yi said seriously, “You mustn’t have such a mindset where you want to reap benefits without working hard for it. Wake up, there are no metaphysics in this world.”

“The world is unified in matter-”

“Matter is in motion, and motion has laws-”

“Laws are recognizable, and recognition will develop and change…”

Li Jianyu was dumbfounded.

So were the livestream viewers.

The reporters who entered and were about to bid farewell were shocked when they heard Xiang Yi’s serious words.

‘Is Xiang Yi… that supportive of materialism?

“So, do you understand?”

Li Jianyu suddenly felt ashamed. “Uh, what have you understood?”

Xiang Yi said heartbrokenly, “What do we have to believe in? We have to believe in science!”

Li Jianyu was instantly enlightened and blessed. “OK, Xiang Yi, I’m enlightened!”

The audience was dying of laughter. ‘God damn enlightenment! What enlightenment is that!?!”

The next second.

The vicious and evil Shi Sui said, “Li Jianyu, there seems to be a black shadow behind you.”

The easily frightened Li Jianyu screamed frantically.

“Ahhhhh, strong democratic civilization, harmony, freedom, equality, justice, rule of law, blah blah blah… Namo Amitabha Buddha Amen Balala energy little magic fairy full body transformation!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 688 - The Feeling Of Being Cared For
chapters.body:
Chapter 688 - The Feeling Of Being Cared For

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Shi Sui was speechless.

So were the livestream viewers.

——1Best Actor Shi is so mean hahahaha]

—1I can understand what he said at the beginning but what the hell is up with the little magic fairy at the end!?!]

—1What do you know? Our son is giving us a vivid interpretation of the pragmatism of the Chinese in religious faiths! We will believe in whichever is spiritual! Why? This is the same as worshiping Confucius, Newton, Einstein and all other scientists before a n exam!]

LiJianyu looked like a frightened screaming chicken, providing fresh material for the world of memes and stickers.

Xiang Yi held back her laughter. “No, he lied to you. If you don’t believe me, turn around now.”

“No! No!” Li Jianyu was dead against it. “What if I get sent away once I turn around?”

The person who was still afraid of the superstitious activities that Xiang Yi sas engaging in earlier on, wass now frantically begging Xiang Yi, “Xiang Yi, please give me a talisman. In TV shows, don’t they burn talismans and dissolve the ash in water before drinking it to ward off evil?”

“Then our Ilivestream will really be gone.” Xiang Yi joked. In order to comfort him, she drew a peace talisman, folded it into a small triangle, and said, “Here, put in your pocket.”

Li Jianyu thanked her a thousand times and hurriedly stuffed it into his pocket.

The livestream audience said that if it were not for the live broadcast, they would suspect that he will be stuffed into the sock tube or underwear!

“Ahem.” The reporter came forward and said goodbye to Xiang Yi on behalf of the crowd, “Thank you Xiang Yi for your hospitality. We have already cleaned up the courtyard. We won’t impose on you any further then.”

jang Yi got up, “I’ve prepared some specialties from the Little Rabbit Farm for you.”

The people were polite.

“How can you be so kind? We’ve already eaten your food and if we take your food too, what will become of us!?!”

“Yes, Xiang Yi, we can shop at your online store if we want to eat!”

Li Jianyu was shocked. “Can you guys manage to snap up stocks? I didn’t even get to snatch any even with my hands that have become quick after years of being a singleton!”

The reporters felt like they had been stabbed in the heart.

They couldn’t snap up anything!

At best, they can only go to the seafood market to collect some bonuses.

Xiang Yi grinned and sai

“A new product has just been released recently. You can bring it back to try.”

Xiang Yi was very meticulous and thoughtful. She had long arranged for people to prepare the local specialties.

Each person had a basket, which contained not only Spicy Rabbits head, five spice beef, milk strawberries, etc., but also vacuum-packed pickled radish, pickled cabbage, and three packs of new products ~ instant rice noodles!

The packaging was as cute as ever, with a tender little rabbit holding a bowl and eating a big mouthful of rice noodles.

The livestream viewers were flabbergasted!

—1Ahhhhh another new product? The time has come to test the speed of the hand!]

—[Huh? You’re really quick at releasing new products. If you have what it takes, don’t put a purchase limit! Women, I dare to buy but do you dare to sell?]

—Xiang Yi is really the biggest obstacle on my way to idolizing stars! I don’t even know how to spend money for you! Quickly take up an endorsement deal or shoot a magazine ad about new products. Mama wants to spend money on you!!!]

The reporters were flattered and thanked them repeatedly.

‘When they got to the door, someone surprised them by saying, “Wow, I still have a small jar of barbecue sauce in mine! Did Xiang Yi hear me say that BBQ sauce is delicious?”

“Wow, I have one too! I mentioned that I wanted to have dashi soup and there was actually a jar of dashi in there!”

“Oooh mine is fruit! Xiang Yi is really too sweet!”

The crowd shared their joy.

What nice feeling it is to be cared for..

chapters.title: Chapter 689 - The Dogs Of The Same Lineage
chapters.body:
Chapter 689 - The Dogs Of The Same Lineage

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Xiang Yi and Shi Sui did not have the habit of taking a nap, and the two of them were sitting by the floor-to-ceiling window as usual, one reading his script and the other flipping through a medical book.

Occasionally, they would say a few words to each other softly.

The two of them were not used in other fast-paced variety shows, “Two Under One Roof” was slow most of the time.

However, it was very comfortable.

Many people imitated their lifestyles too.

Many people tend to turn on the livestream, turn down the volume, and then do their homework, or read a book.

It would not only calm their minds, it would even elevate themselves.

At about two o’clock.

Shi Yu woke up from his nap.

He had not slept so well for a long time. He stretched and suddenly thought of something, after which he ran out of the room barefooted.

Shi Sui was alone in the living room.

‘The little fairy froze in place and hesitated for several seconds before timidly calling out, “Uncle, where is Sister Xiang Yi?”

Shi Sui shot him a glance and said gently, “She went to get changed. Want some water?”

Shi Yu shook his head, helplessly clutching the corners of his pajamas.

Fortunately, Little Xiji came over and rubbed his calf.

Shi Yu’s tense body finally relaxed a little. He squatted down and exchanged glances with Little Xiji for several seconds before asking cautiously.

“Can I touch you?”

“Woof!”

Shi Yu’s eyes lit up and he rubbed his hands on his shirt before gently stroking Little Xiji’s head.

Fluffy, and a little hot.

Xiao Naofu’s icy blue eyes were wide open.

“This stupid kid actually touched that silly dog instead of me?

‘Tmay not like being touched but I’m the most popular in this house!”

Hencem Xiao Naofu squeezed Little Xiji away. When facing Shi Yu, its voice became tender and coquettish.

“Meow ~ meow ~ meow ~ meow ~ meow. “Meow~ meow~”

No human can resist meowing! Children can’t either!

Shi Yu held his breath and didn’t respond for a long time. Xiao Naofu tilted its head and hooked Shi Yu’s sleeve with its paw before meowing tenderly.

—{Am I not charming enough? This abominable cub is actually not reacting to me!?!]

The scene of it being jealous had already made many pet fans in front of the screen really worked up.

—It’s yet another day of wanting to steal Little Xiji and Xiao Naofu!]

—Is there any weapon that is more lethal than a munchkin and an adorable pet together? No!]

— {There is a saint of pretentiousness in the front, and then there is a king of pretentiousness. I wonder who is more pretentious]

—II suggest that they both break into the national team! Shi Sui and Xiao Naofu are both really good at pretending. Does anyone want to retort?]

Shi Yu finally could not help but stretch out his little hand and gently poked Xiao Naofu’s head.

Swish–

He left after touching it.

However, that touch seemed to be more wonderful than touching Little Xiji!

Xiao Naofu: Hah, indeed, there is no man that this tiger can not seduce!

‘The little cat lightly jumped into Shi Yu’s arms, taking the initiative to rub his chest coquettishly.

Shi Yu: …

It rubbed me! The cat is rubbing against me! So fragrant, so soft, so cute!

Shi Yu looked around. Seeing that Shi Sui’s eyes were on the script in his hand, Shi Yu’s clear and bright grape-like eyes glistened. While holding Xiao Naofu, he said in a rather elderly-like manner, “Can… Can I kiss you?”

Not waiting for Xiao Naofu’s answer, he kissed Xiao Naofu on its head.

Shi Yu’s ears instantly turned red.

However, Xiao Naofu was confused.

“People from the Shi family are really dogs!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 690 - Call Auntie
chapters.body:
Chapter 690 - Call Auntie

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

‘No, this kid is a bigger dog than that old man, Shi Sui! He pretended to ask for consent, and then kissed me immediately!”

This is equivalent to shaking hands with your opponent before the fight in a martial arts competition, only to take the chance to break their hand.

There were no ethics at all! It was especially awful since he acted like he was so shy that he couldn’t bring himself to raise his head.

Do not know, but also think this tiger tiger put you how it!

Shi Yu is really shy.

He could have never imagined that he would actually do this… kissing kitty thing.

This is contrary to the gentlemanly education he received from childhood.

Oooh.

Woo000000000…

Just as Shi Yu was feeling extremely embarrassed, Xiang Yi had already come out dressed in new clothes.

The young lady changed into a lightweight blue and white sportswear. At first glance, it seemed a bit like a high school sports uniform, but she looked like a school belle.

“Shi Yu, why is your face so red? Do you have a fever?” Xiang Yi sounded worried and wanted to test the temperature of his forehead, but was dodged by Shi Yu.

“I-I’m fine.” Shi Yu was embarrassed, afraid that Xiang Yi would know that he had stolen a kiss from the kitty. Hence, he stammered a bit, “Sister, sister, are you going out?”

Xiang Yi said, “Yes, I’m planning to go mountain climbing with Uncle Shi Sui and pick some wild fruit too.”

Shi Yu’s eyes lit up.

Apart from the kindergarten, his only other area of activity was home. However, his parents were too busy and rarely took him out to play.

But Xiang Yi suddenly realized something. “Ah, then you should call me Aunt. Otherwise, our seniority and ties would be all messed up…”

The man’s low voice came from behind him, “Call her Aunt.”

Xiang Yi’s ears burned a little. “Don’t talk nonsense…”

However, under the “kind” gaze of his uncle, Shi Yu cringed and called out obediently, “Aunt Xiang Yi.”

Now there is one more person who is embarrassed.

Shi Sui’s thin lips curled into a smile, finding Shi Yu to be much more pleasing to the eye. He grabbed his hair and said, “If you want to go, get changed.”

Shi Yu exclaimed eagerly, “On it!”

Shi Yu changed as fast as he could and even took the initiative to place his thermos flask, tissue paper, chocolate and other items in his small school bag filled, which can be said to be filled to the brim!

Xiang Yi offered to help him carry his backpack but he shook his head resolutely.

“Auntie, I can do it myself! I can carry your bag for you if you need.”

The viewers in the studio were wailing, thinking the children of other families are indeed different!

—1God, how do you teach a child to be like this?]

—1Shi Yu was too good at disciplining himself and he wasn’t like most scions of wealthy families at all!]

—1{Why is Shi Yu such a little gentleman? My brother not only does not help me carry my bag, but also makes me help him carry his school bag every time! He even rolls around on the ground to cry when I refuse to help him. Ugh!]

Xiao Naofu clamored about going too so Xiang Yi picked it and Little Xiji up in her arms to bring them along.

Someone watching the livestream commented: [Wow, this is like a family of three with a cat and a dog going on a picnic~}

Someone immediately retorted.

—1Bullshit! It’s obviously two dogs!]

—[Huh? Is Doggy Shi not fit to have a name?]

—{Hah, you must be kidding. How is Little Xiji as much of a dog as Shi Sui?]

The audience almost died of laughter when they saw the comments.

Clicking on the personal pages of those accounts that were hating on Shi Sui, the netizens made an even more amazing discovery!

Many of these people were Shi Sui sisters!

A phrase that climbed up on the hot search –

chapters.title: Chapter 691 - Achiever First
chapters.body:
Chapter 691 - Achiever First

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

The phrase originated from a Weibo user who summarized the recent confusing behavior of fans of various idols in the fan club circle, such as a popular star infiltrating her own fan group and getting kicked out. There were also cases of a new rapper and a hater cursing out at each other.

The funniest interaction was that of the Spicy Rabbits and the Shisui Sisters.

Raise money to fight?

Illegal fund-raising, reported!

Picking up at the airport?

No casting calls!

What’s the big deal about haters hating? Fans are even better at hating!

A Spicy Rabbit reported a user and received a red flower from the Internet police. The instances of the Shi Sui Sisters calling Shi Sui a gigolo and claiming that they wanted to raise Xiang Yi too, were the funniest.

‘As soon as the Weibo post was uploaded, the comments exceeded a thousand.

—-{I’ve already laughed my head off countless times}

——[The Spicy Rabbits are too cute. Not only are they peace-loving, they’re silly too]

—~{The Shi Sui sisters weren’t like this in the past! Why have they been influenced by the Spicy Rabbits!?!]

Of course, the Shi Sui Sisters will never admit that they are as silly as the Spicy Rabbits!

Do not cue us, Shi Sui is very cold and aloof, okay?

As for Xiang Yi… she’s barely making it!

Hmph!

The manor.

The team was ready to leave, and had just walked out of the door when they heard a sharp and loud shout.

“Xiang Yi, stay!” Oh?

They’re looking for Xiang Yi?

The crowd looked over in unison and froze.

The person who arrived as wearing a half-used blue Taoist robe and had long hair. He was carrying a peach wood sword, holding a white horse whisk. He had the style of an Immortal.

The premise was to ignore the large metal pot that he was carrying.

The netizens in the live room were bewildered.

—~{This déja vu scene… reminds me of Brother Sanmao]

—~{@Hades! Heh, what did you bring such a large bowl for? Look at how large his pot is!]

Xiang Yi was also confused, but still nodded politely in greeting, “Hello, may I ask what you want to see me about?”

Daoist Master Ren was excited for a while.

“Little friend Xiang Yi, I’m here to ask you to give me advice!”

Xiang Yi was speechless.

The crowd at the scene were dumbfounded.

So were the livestream viewers.

“As they say, fellow disciples are friends. Xiang Yi, you’re my friend too. Although we have never met before in the past and we’re meeting today for the first time, I already consider you as my long-time friend!” Daoist Ren was really thick-skinned.

Live broadcast.

——{Is this person… a scammer??]

—-[It’s not like the show is looking for any actors, right? I just like how the lousy variety show has no script. If there’s a script, I wouldn’t want to watch it…]

—~{That’s right, we watch the variety show for fun! We watch it to look at some beauties and delicious food. @LiJianYu, child, don’t forget your original intention!]

The next second, Daoist Ren arched his hand towards Xiang Yi and exclaimed, “There is no before and after when it comes to learning. The one who achieves is the first. Today, I came for no other reason than to ask Xiang Yi, my little friend, to guide the way in the talisman seal!”

The crowd was dumbstruck.

“What is it? What?”

‘Do you mean those messy things that Xiang Yi drew?”

Xiang Yi said, “You’re being too serious. What guidance? I was just drawing something random.”

At that moment, there were several cars coming from the distance.

Professor Zhu got out of the car first, and then supported an old gentleman with white hair, followed by a few young students.

“Miss Xiang Yi, please forgive me for intruding!” Professor Zhu supressed his surging mood. “On behalf of the Nancheng Institute of History and Culture, we would like to ask you for a lesson or two!”

chapters.title: Chapter 692 - Youngest Professor In History! (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 692 - Youngest Professor In History! (1)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

“Professor Zhu, how do you do.” Li Jianyu went forward to receive him. “Didn’t you say that you’d be coming tomorrow…”

The research institute did contact the program team, but the appointment was for tomorrow.

The program team felt that it would not only be good for Xiang Yi, but it would also popularize history and culture to the general public, so they readily agreed.

Professor Zhu blushed and said, “This…”

“Lwas too eager to meet Miss Xiang.” The old professor with white hair beside him interjected. Since he was old, his back was a bit hunched and his eyes contained a wise and profound light. “If there is any interruption, please forgive me Miss Xiang.”

“Teacher Ji?” Although her memory was a bit fuzzy, Xiang Yi still recognized him. “When I was in college, I had the honor to attend your lecture once.”

In the comments section of the livestream:

-~ [If you don’t understand, ask. Are these two people from a powerful origin?]

——{Of course! History is the ace major of Nancheng University, and Professor Zhu is the ace professor of the history department! The elderly man next to him, is his mentor, Mr. Ji, who is currently a titanic figure in the academic world!]

After learning about the identity of the two, the crowd was even more surprised.

Such a powerful figure… would actually ask for Xiang Yi’s guidance? Oh my gosh! How impressive must Xiang Yi be!?!

Due to the sudden visit of Taoist Master Ren, Mr. Ji and Professor Zhu, the trip to the mountain had to be put on hold.

When everyone returned to the living room, Xiang Yi poured some tea herself and sat on the sofa.

Shi Sui sat next to her. Both of them looked like attentive star students who were waiting to answer the teacher’s questions.

‘They were calm and composed.

Mr. Ji and Professor Zhu’s Qi cultivation skills were top-notch. The two slowly and carefully tasted Xiang Yi’s tea as their eyes lit up.

Good tea!

DTaoist Master Ren couldn’t hold back and asked first, “Little friend Xiang Yi, I wonder where your teacher learned the art of seals and talismans?”

‘The matter of her transmigration naturally could not be disclosed, so Xiang Yi lightly brushed him off. “I don’t have a master, I’m purely researching blindly on my own.”

Taoist Master Ren did not continue this topic, thinking that Xiang Yi must have her own chance. He praised, “What a genius! Amazing! Incredible!”

Wonderful talent!” In the immortal cultivation realm, Xiang Yi had seen too many amazing talisman prodigies and geniuses, and had always felt that she was just average. Now she was embarrassed by the compliment.

“You have praised me too much.”

“No, no, no, I mean everything I said from the bottom of my heart! I have been studying the art of talismans for dozens of years, and I have only attained the tip of the iceberg. You are so young, but you have such attainments. In ancient times, you’d definitely have established a school and attained

immortality!!”

‘The pop-up comments was full of ‘hahaha.’

–[The Taoist master is too good at talking! I suggest that he publish a book immediately!]

Some people also said otherwise.

-~ [attain the Dao? He’s being too much with the praises]

–[It’s too exaggerated, it’s obviously self-directed]

–[No, a few ghostly scribbles and you can attain immortality? This person has read too many immortal novels!]

At this moment, Professor Zhu asked “Have you heard of the Yu Xia civilization?”

Xiang Yi said, “Do you mean the ancient Yu Xia state? I haven’t researched much about history and I only have some general knowledge. The ancient Yu Xia state is not recorded in history books, but there is a school of thought in the academic world that the ancient Yu Xia state really existed.”

“That’s right!” Mr. Ji’s voice was as loud as a bell.. At the mention of academics, his essence was completely different, “At present, there is a lack of evidence arguing for the existence of the Ancient Yu Xia state but I think that from your talisman, Miss Xiang, we can get a glimpse of the flourishing

civilization back then!!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 693 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 693 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (2)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

This comment caused the scene to be quiet for a few seconds.

Even in the livestream, the comments became fewer, followed by a large row of question marks.

—I[What ????]

–[Ahhhhh history lovers here! Can it really prove the existence of the Yu Xia civilization?]

–[If that’s true, it would be a great change for history, no, for humanity as a whole!]

In the living room.

Professor Zhu added, “At present, we generally believe that the most remarkable feature of the Yu Xia civilization is that it is closely associated with witchcraft, divination, and sacrifice. According to the records of various eras, the runic seal, as a cultural symbol, actually changed in the evolution of

history.”

“All this, is traceable, but this clues lacks the most crucial link!”

“And Miss Xiang’s talisman can help us to complete this closed loop!”

Xiang Yi froze, and in her mind, something vaguely flashed, yet the aura disappeared so quickly that it faded away in the blink of an eye.

“professor Zhu, I am honored to do my small part in your research, may I ask what I can do?”

“Can you provide us with some runic seals? As well as the video of drawing the rune seal, of course, in addition to the honorary certificate, we are willing to provide certain monetary subsidies…”

Xiang Yi, “Forget about the subsidy, can you send me an extra award or a small red flower?”

“Haha.”

Both Professor Zhu and Mr. Ji laughed and looked at Xiang Yi with great admiration.

‘What a good kid! Not only is she hardworking and progressive, she also isn’t obsessed with money!”

Xiang Yi took out the talisman paper and vermilion ink and tried her best to draw out all the types of talisman seals in her mind.

So the crowd watched as the little girl drew hundreds of charms without stopping once, all by herself! The students brought by Professor Zhu were recording a video of it and while doing so, they were amazed by her memory skills.

The drawing method of each talisman was very complicated, and if one is not careful, it would easily lead to mistakes.

However, Xiang Yi did it from beginning to end smoothly without making any mistakes!

It was enough to show how strong her memory was!

After drawing a hundred sheets, the young girl’s hand was still very steady, which showed that her concentration had also reached a terrifying level!

If such a person goes into scientific research…

Her success would be inevitable!

‘The few students looked at each other in dismay while pulling long faces.

‘Ah, what greenhoms are we!?!”

The time passed.

“Swish…”

‘The young girl dropped the last stroke and exhaled gently.

She had drawn all the types of talismans she could think of, so she reckoned that she should be able to help Professor Zhu and the others a little bit.

“Tm done.” Xiang Yi turned her face and asked the students, “Have you all recorded clearly? Is there anything else that needs to be recorded?”

The few of them were stunned for a while before they came to a sudden realization.

“We’re done, we’re done!”

“We also took videos from several different angles!”

Before they came, they were still slightly prejudiced against Xiang Yi.

After all, an actress can easily give people the impression that she relies on her beauty to eat.

However, Xiang Yi’s talent and character conquered them!

If you’re lucky enough to be friends with her, you’ll be very comfortable with her!

Professor Zhu and the others felt extremely thankful as if they had won a treasure.

‘They were in a hurry to go back to their research, so they bade goodbye first.

Before they left…

Mr. Ji broke away from Professor Zhu’s support, and faced Xiang Yi with some difficulty.

However, they still bowed respectfully.

“Thank you, Miss Xiang, for your selflessness! I am proud of the country for having a young man like you!”

chapters.title: Chapter 694 - The Youngest Visiting Professor In History! (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 694 - The Youngest Visiting Professor In History! (4)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

He drew his wooden sword with a swish, affixed a talisman onto it, and then threw the sword into the air.

The livestream viewers were flabbergasted!

My goodness, can you really fly with a sword?!

The next second –

The peach wood sword smashed into the head of Taoist Master Ren, and he let out a miserable scream.

“Ouch ouch it hurts!”

‘The crowd was speechless.

Li Jianyu said fawningly, “Dangerous action, please do not imitate. Thank you for the performance, Daoist Ren! He has sacrificed himself to provide entertainment for us! What a commendable spirit!”

The audience of the livestream:

—1sSeriously speaking nonsense]

—[Hahahaha the Taoist master has made me laugh today!]

—Taoist Master: It’s this sword that doesn’t have any morals! of martial virtue! It sneaked up on me, a middle-aged man! I advise this sword to behave itself!]

The crowd laughed incessantly and the tension dissipated.

“Yeah. Soar to immortality with a sword and fly on a sword? Those only happen in dramas! How can it possibly happen in real life?”

Xiang Yi tried her best to contain her laughter. “Daoist Master, we’re preparing to go up the mountain. Would you like to rest here for a while?”

Daoist Master Ren had yet to recover from the blow. He muttered to himself that it was impossible a few times and forced himself to wake up after hearing Xiang Yi’s words.

frowned glancedSui asShiat Xiang He Yu. Shiand heYi,

“It’s not safe on the mountains. You’re a delicate young girl. What if you run into wild animals together with two unarmed men?! Xiang Yi, I’ll accompany you guys!”

Shi Sui was confused.

Yu. Shi Sowas

Shi Sui and Shi Yu had the same expressions on their faces and they were all sullen and expressionless.

However, the audience of the livestream burst into incessant laughter.

little whogirl—{Taoist, delicatea ever _acan/litscigaretteJhavehundred seen pig?two killpoundyou

—{Hahaha it’s yet another day of Shi Sui being treated as a gigolo]

—1Shi Yu: Forget it if you say that I’m powerless. You’re going overboard by criticizing my uncle!]

Daoist Ren insisted on going together. Xiang Yi and the rest didn’t think much of it and merely set off together.

The viewers had gotten used to the livestream being held in the manor and going out occasionally did give them a sense of novelty.

mountainmainhigh lessSoon was going theatcrowdthe steepistoarrived was _theclimb Xiang Yiandathatpeakaof_ mountan.of neighboringfoottoday. Themountain

Although the altitude was low, there wasn’t much artificial development. There was lush greenery and the air was fresh while the birds and cicadas chirped incessantly. The streams were flowing and their bottoms were clear bottom. They could even see a few fishes swimming leisurely.

Xiang Yi plucked some grass and braided it into a rabbit shape with her delicate hands. She then gave it to Shi Yu to let him play with it.

Shiherhiswas held hand inaobedientlyitYu treasure. like thankedandit

He even pretended as if nothing happened and showed it off to Shi Sui, greatly satisfying his subtle desire to show off.

“Uncle, I have it but you don’t!”

second… theIn next

Shi Sui said softly with a touch of pretentiousness, “Xiang Yi, can I have a little rabbit too?”

Xiang Yi repeatedly said, “Yes, yes!”

boyfriend’sher needs! Ofsatisfy courseshe to had

Xiang Yi hurriedly made two rabbits for Shi Sui.

Shi Sui took them and said with a smile, “Xiang Yi, you’re so nice.”

like said to observeyou edible it.” Yiwild anyaround. smile, thatwere if turning vegetablesa_head’It’shergood withXiangthere

While she was not paying attention, Shi Sui put two small rabbits woven of grass and waved them in front of Shi Yu.

The cool and handsome man who had a flawless bone structure, said seriously, “See? I have two rabbits.”

I… have two rabbits.” little

chapters.title: Chapter 695 - The Youngest Visiting Professor In History! (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 695 - The Youngest Visiting Professor In History! (3)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Immediately afterwards, Professor Zhu, as well as several students, bowed to Xiang Yi!

At this moment, it was not about age or status.

They were simply, paying their respects to Xiang Yi!

Not everyone is willing to teach what they have learned!

However, Xiang Yi had not only drawn numerous talismans, she didn’t accept a single cent either!

She didn’t want any material returns but they ought to still show her some basic respect and gratitude!

“Mr. Ji, Professor Zhu… please don’t.” Xiang Yi was somewhat at a loss and bent forward to bow to them without hesitation.

So the livestream viewers saw a scene of both sides bowing to each other…

–[Pfft, Xiang Yi is really cute and lovable]

—I don’t know why I’m getting teary-eyed. Now that I’m older, I just can’t see these]

–[A teacher is also a student and a student is also a teacher.They pass on the academia and may the academic community in China become better and better]

The focus of attention fell back on Daoist Master Ren as he sent away Mr. Ji and others who were busy with their research.

Daoist Master Ren rubbed his hands, “Uh… Junior Xiang Yi, I wonder if you can answer some questions for me regarding talismans and runic seals?”

He was actually a little guilty. Mr. Ji was here for academic purposes, while he was here for cultivation.

Young people do not believe in this and they made it look like he wa there to cheat…

“What do you want to ask, Daoist?” Xiang Yi asked good-naturedly, “But I can’t guarantee that I can answer because I only know a little.”

The other Daoist Masters who were rushing were flabbergasted to hear that answer!

Little girl, the road is narrow! If you only know a little bit, how can we still mix around?!

Daoist Master Ren was overjoyed and he hurriedly asked some questions about the precautions and techniques of drawing talismans.

Xiang Yi said with confusion, “Isn’t a brush all that you need?”

Daoist Ren was shocked.

That’s it???

His dumbfounded expression was so comical that it made the audience laugh.

—— Daoist Master Ren: Confused]

—[Okay, I’ve learned. So you just need to have hands! I’ll go draw some talismans now / dog head / dog head]

— [Hahaha Xiang Yi this answer and our schoolmaster are the same! When others ask him what the proper way of studying is, he says to use the brain!]

ealizing that her reply was too rude, Xiang Yi coughed and asked, “How about I slow down and draw again in front of you?”

n the immortal cultivation realm, Xiang Yi picked it up after just learning it once and knew it, so it was natural for her to assume that it was the same for everyone.

The problem mentioned by Daoist Master Ren was too unfamiliar to her…

it was because she had never experienced it before…

Little did she know that for ordinary people, they couldn’t draw a proper talisman even if they learned it countless times.

Daoist Master Ren was grateful. “Great! Great! Xiang Yi, it’s no wonder that you’re a genius! Not only are you talented, you’re such a kind soul!”

The crowd was speechless.

‘It doesn’t have to be like that, right?’

‘We’ve just seen so many talismans, haven’t we?!

After discussing with Daoist Master Ren, Xiang Yi drew a Heart Cleansing Talisman.

She held her breath and concentrated her attention on the tip of the brush.

The young lady did not say anything in vain and the strokes of her brush were particularly slow, almost as if they were in cinematic slow motion.

However, it was still fast for Daoist Ren!

He couldn’t even bear to blink as he was staring almost obsessively at the stroke that Xiang Yi dropped…

He suddenly had a vague epiphany.

It was a mysterious and indescribable feeling.

After the drawing of the Heart Cleansing talisman was finished, Xiang Yi discovered that Daoist Master Ren had sat cross-legged on the ground with his eyes tightly closed.

The crowd was confused.

A few seconds later, Daoist Master Ren opened his eyes and said confidently, “Watch me fly to immortality with one sword!”.

chapters.title: Chapter 696 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (5)
chapters.body:
Chapter 696 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (5)

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

Shi Yu was speechless.

He used to worship his uncle, but who can tell him why his uncle is so childish?!

Livestream viewers:

—Shi Sui, you don’t do anything humane at all!]

—[You can’t be like Shi Sui. He even bullies children!]

—|Hahaha, Shi Sui and Shi Yu are clearly showing off to each other. It obviously isn’t real kinship]

Unwilling to show weakness, Shi Yu said with puffed cheeks, “I-I have one too.”

Shi Sui said with a smile, “I have two.”

Shi Yu exclaimed, “Sister gave it to me first!”

Shi Sui continued, “I have two.”

Shi Yu was speechless.

He was really emotionally tired.

Showing off to his little nephew can no longer satisfy Shi Sui. Hence, he turned to look at the camera…

The livestream viewers suddenly had an ominous hunch.

Not surprisingly…

The man approached the camera, which magnified his handsome and refined face. Despite the absence of any beauty filters, his complexion had a cool hue to it and he smirked with a bewitching vibe that would take

the world by storm.

“This is the little rabbit that Xiang Yi made for me.” Shi Sui raised his left hand, and then raised his right hand, “This is also a bunny made for me by Xiang Yi, is not cute?”

The crowd was speechless.

The viewers of the livestream were speechless.

——[There are two trees in front of my house. One is a date palm tree and so is the other. Shi Sui must be a literary hero of modern society!]

—|Hahaha, is this man really 27 years old? How childish!]

—[You guys are cheating the dog and luring it in to kill it! If | were guilty, the law would punish me instead of coldly slapping my face with dog food!]

Xiang Yi suddenly exclaimed in surprise from a short distance away, “There are mushrooms!”

He looked in the direction of the voice and saw Xiang Yi standing in the shade of a tree, waving at the crowd.

Shi Sui moved his long legs and approache. Perhaps because it had just rained, there were many mushrooms growing nearby and had even spread apart to cover a large area.

Xiang Yi quickly distinguished those that were edible and those that were poisonous. She then had everyone pick them separately.

Even Shi Yu was given a small basket, so that he feel the joy of labor.

It was a particularly refreshing experience for Shi Yu, and Shi Yu was having a really good time plucking them while humming a tune.

Xiang Yi vividly told the audience about several ways to cook mushrooms at home, and as she did so, a loud cry came from Daoist Ren.

“Gu-lu.”

Xiang Yi looked over.

Daoist Ren said awkwardly, “Uh… | was in a hurry when I was walking so I had lunch on the train. Xiang Yi, now that you’ve mentioned food, I’m getting a little hungry.”

Xiang Yi did not say anything but she stared at Daoist Ren with a grave expression.

Seeing that she did not say anything, someone watching the livestream immediately picked on her.

——Is this the attitude you should have when you’re talking to your guests?]

—VYes, they came all the way here. Is it not the most basic social etiquette to serve them a meal?]

—She actually ignored Daoist Master Ren? How toxic of her. Is she getting ahead of herself just because she’s famous now?]

The group of people were filled with righteous indignation. The next moment, the camera slowly switched and many people in front of the screen started screaming out loud.

“Abh!”

Through the high-definition lens, the crowd saw that a snake had appeared on the tree behind Daoist Ren at some point.

The viewers of the livestream went mad immediately.

—[Damn it! That’s a venomous snake!]

——[Ugh! I was so scared that I dropped my tablet!]

—[Oh dear, this snake is super poisonous and fast. Surely the crew is not going to die here, are they?] .

chapters.title: Chapter 697 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (6)
chapters.body:
Chapter 697 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (6)

Chapter 697 The Youngest Guest Professor in History! (6)

It was a King Cobra that was ferocious by nature and had quick reactions.

Most importantly, its venom was extremely lethal, making it one of the most dangerous snakes in the world.

The scene was so quiet that they could hear the wind but no one dared to make a sound.

Even the knowledgeable photographer, Old Zhang, couldn’t help but have his hands tremble.

Who wouldn’t be afraid of it!?!

It was a venomous snake!

He might just die here!

Daoist Ren had his back against the tree and due to the angle, he was the only person who didn’t know what was going on. He even started talking to Xiang Yi about freeloading off of her in a thick-skinned manner.

“Xiang Yi, it’s getting late and I can’t stand taking the train. Can I stay at your place for a meal…? Don’t worry! I won’t eat for free! I;m willing to impart to you the exclusive Qing Shui Guan art of sword! It belongs to my master…”

Daoist Ren would never teach others even if they paid him to.

However, Xiang Yi was an exception.

She had selflessly imparted the art of talismans to him so he naturally had to return the favor!

The audience of the livestream were so frightened that they didn’t dare to breathe at all.

They were shivering as they typed.

–[Ahhhhh, Taoist priest, please shut up! I’m so scared the snake will bite you!)

–[Oh my God, I’m going to cry, how can we do this ah? Why would such an incident happen during hiking?)

–[I’ve already called the police, the Fire Department, and the Forestry Bureau. I hope they’ll make it in time… but I think it’d be hard for all of them to be out of danger. At the very least, we have to keep one or two behind to hold this cobra back so that the rest can leave safely]

Anyone with a compassionate heart would be secretly praying and hoping that the entire program crew was safe and sound.

However, even at such a time, there are still people who chose to be sarcastic.

–[Isn’t Xiang Yi good at drawing talismans? Hehe, why don’t she draw one to make the snake go away?! She’s shocked and at a loss now, huh!?!)

Those words easily provoked the people present!

They were undoubtedly out to start a war by saying those words!

The enraged netizens immediately hurled vulgarities.

Even the most peace-loving Spicy Rabbits were extremely infuriated!

Seeing that Xiang Yi hadn’t responded and the way the others were reacting, Daoist Ren vaguely understood something. He had good eyesight and through the reflection in Xiang Yi’s eyes, he could see himself, as well as the snake behind him that was several meters long…

Swish–

Daoist Ren broke out in cold sweat and his legs began to tremble.

The atmosphere at the scene, for a moment into a cold stagnation. The crowd had yet to think of a response strategy but the cobra had actually spat its tongue out and seemed to be ready to hunt. It was like adding insult to injury!

No one dared to move. Their eyes and hearts were filled with despair.

Daoist Ren gritted his teeth and said ruthlessly, “You guys go first, I’ll stall this beast!”

Qing Shui Guan was located on the mountains and he had dealt with snakes before. Besides, he had been practicing martial arts for years and no matter what, he was better than these unarmed young people.

In the livestream:

–[The Taoist Priest is so nice!]

-— [UwU the Taoist priest must survive! I will definitely go back to burn incense in your temple!)

–[Willingness to stay at a time like this speaks volumes about the benevolence of Taoist Master Ren! Unlike some artiste who’s really impressive at drawing talismans and feigning dead!)

At that moment, the mountain peak bowed up and looked like it was about to attack!

It was finally the right moment for Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi said calmly, her voice clear and heavenly, “Borrow me a sword, Daoist Master.”

Daoist Ren was dumbfounded. “Sword? This one I’m carrying? No, it’s a wooden sword!”

chapters.title: Chapter 698 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (7)
chapters.body:
Chapter 698 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (7)

The crew and the viewers of the livestream were completely dumbfounded!

Xiang Yi wanted to borrow a sword?

Is she going to fight the cobra alone!?

–[No, no, is Xiang Yi trying to make me laugh to death?]

–[If it’s an iron sword, maybe there is hope but since it’s a wooden sword… I’m afraid there’s no hope!)

–[I take my hat’s off to her. What is she still pretending to be impressive for at a time like this!?!]

–[Xiang Yi is so annoying. Of what use can a wooden sword be? Do you really think that the superstitious activities of warding off evil with those swords is useful? Can she use her brain!?!)

The crowd spurted on and on, but the Spicy Rabbits’ eyes lit up with hope. Maybe… Maybe… Xiang Yi really has a solution?

They knew Xiang Yi well. If she was completely sure, she should not make such a request. In the midst of all the questions, Xiang Yi merely repeated calmly, “Daoist Master, please hand me the sword.”

The Taoist chief hesitated, but eventually clenched his teeth, drew out his peach wood sword and tossed it at Xiang Yi!

‘Forget it, I’m dead either way. Maybe, there’ll be a chance if I pass it to Xiang Yi!’

The moment he drew his sword, the mountain peak moved too!

It was a few meters long and it formed an incredible sight when it moved!

Countless people in front of the screen closed their eyes.

It’s over. The first one to be bitten must be Daoist Ren who’s the closest!

The situation was extremely dangerous and some people finally couldn’t help but scream out loud.

It immediately resulted in a chain reaction as everyone screamed in panic.

“Ah ah ah ah -“

“I’m dying, I’m dying!!” “Help ah 000000000…”

The audience, who could barely muster the courage to continue watching the livestream, also alsoturned pale and broke out in cold sweat.

T-t-this is more frightening than a horror movie!

It’s almost like a death livestream!

In just a few seconds…

To everyone’s surprise, the cobra not only did not bite Daoist Ren, it even…

“Sss!”

“Hiss hiss!!!”

Two gut-wrenching sounds rang out in quick succession.

The viewers who had been having their eyes closed, immediately had their jaws drop!

The cobra was actually pinned to the tree with the sword by Xiang Yi at the seventh inch of its body!

se

The spot at the seventh inch is the most lethal part of a snake’s body.

It could be said that the sword immediately caused the cobra to lose most of its combat power.

There was silence in the livestream for a few seconds, and the comments skyrocketed at a terrifying rate.

–[Crap???!!!)

–[What the f**k did I see? Am I hallucinating or are there special effects in the studio?!]

–[What?! Isn’t that a peach wood sword? The peach wood sword pierced through the body of the snake and pinned it onto the tree?!)

However, most people said something that came from the bottom of their hearts. –[Xiang Yi is really cool!!!]

The crowd was also stunned.

‘Is the scene in front of us, true…?”

Since the wooden sword was stabbed into the tree, how much explosive power must Xiang Yi’s arm contain!?!

Everyone thought that they had been saved but to their surprise, there was a sudden change!

“Sister be careful!” Shi Yu shouted.

Despite having been nailed to the wall, the cobra didn’t lose its ability to walk and the upper half of its body was taut and straight. It opened its mouth and bit Xiang Yi!

No one thought that there would be such a reversal! “Xiang Yi!”

It’s over… is really over.

That was what everyone thought unanimously.

To their surprise…

Xiang Yi’s body was athletic and she was fluttering like a swimming dragon. She ran to gain momentum before leaping up onto the other tree!

Her tree-climbing speed was simply breathtaking!

In an instant, it was as if she had switched on the flash function as she easily avoided the cobra’s attack!

chapters.title: Chapter 699 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (8)
chapters.body:
Chapter 699 - The Youngest Guest Professor In History! (8)

Xiang Yi’s incredible operation was a heavenly show that made people’s scalps tingle!

“Hiss! Hiss!”

The snake’s efforts to stick out its tongue were futile because they didn’t scare Xiang Yi at all!

The others, too, had pulled away long ago.

The severe pain coming from the spot on the seventh inch of its body made the cobra gradually lose its strength. Before long, it curled up into a ball in exhaustion.

The crowd at the scene was relieved. The audience of the livestream was dumbfounded!

–[This… Is she climbing the tree or practicing lightweight skills?]

–[Oh my goodness! Xiang Yi is climbing trees faster than a monkey!)

–[I’ve learned it! Nail the snake to the tree with a sword and climb up the tree in one second! Adding another useless tip to my book of knowledge for surviving in the wild!)

–[I really respect Xiang Yi! She’s the most impressive one! I refuse to accept any rebuttal!)

Everyone present looked at each other with some disbelief.

She managed to overcome such an exciting and thrilling crisis just like that? Everyone found it hard to believe when they recalled the scene that just happened!

Is this a live variety show or a movie?

Every scene was full of dramatic effects.

Some had yet to react and they hurriedly rewound to that part to take a look.

Xiang Yi’s black hair was soft, and she looked very obedient when she was still, but when she moved, her posture was full of vigorous tension, which made her look beautiful and valiant!

Be it the force of the sword, the angle, or the determination she had when she was suavely running to build up momentum for leaping up the tree, made their hearts race and they couldn’t help but look again and again!

Not long after, the professionals of the Fire Department and Forestry Bureau arrived. They were responsible for handling the matter after.

Xiang Yi then jumped down from the tree with steady feet and her expression was also the same as usual. She returned the wooden sword with her pale hands.

“Thank you, Daoist.” Daoist Ren was in a trance. “Y-You’re welcome.”

When he came to his senses, he said, “Little friend Xiang Yi, I should be thanking you! Without you, this cobra would have bitten me, and I would have died!”

The tension in the livestream dissipated at this moment and the crowd was even in the mood to joke around.

-—(Xiang Yi: Come on, Ren, I’ll teach you what it means to soar with one sword!)

–[While saying that she believed in science, Xiang Yi has also showed us what it means to be a metaphysician…]

–[I was watching the livestream with a friend who’s a foreigner and she now already thinks that all of us in China know kung fu! | laughs bitterly]
