Someone edited the video of the confrontation between Xiang Yi and the cobra, and posted it on the Internet. Once it was posted, there were hundreds of thousands of likes!

The related hot searches were climbing up the charts and almost dominating the list!

#RespectXiangyi

#XiangYiTheFairyThatSoarsWithOneSword

#ChineseKungfu

#AncestralTreeClimbingSkillsOfTheXiangFamil

#ContemporarySwordCultivationSparringVideo

“Sister!” Shi Yu immediately leaped into Xiang Yi’s arms. Even though he had a high IQ, he was physically and psychologically still a little kid. His eyes were completely reddened. Xiang Yi patted him on his back and comforted in a tender voice, “I’m fine. How about you? Are you scared?” Shi Yu shook his head but after giving it some thought, he pursed his lips and nodded. He didn’t want to lie to Xiang Yi.

“I’m sorry, I should not have brought you out if I knew it was so dangerous on the mountains.” Xiang Yi rubbed Shi Yu’s hair. As soon as she looked up, she made eye contact with the deep, abyss-like gaze in Shi Sui’s eyes.

The next second, he pulled her into his arms and hugged her as tightly as he could.

At this moment, the number of people watching the livestream of “Two Under One Roof” exceeded the 20 million mark in just a few minutes!

The supposedly lousy variety show had once again broken another record! The official account of the Nancheng Institute of History and Culture, also posted something new.

–[I hereby specially appoint @ Ms. Xiang Yi as our guest professor!]

chapters.title: Chapter 700 - Multiple Ways To Eat A Duck (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 700 - Multiple Ways To Eat A Duck (1)

All of a sudden.

The academic circle was shaken! Generally speaking, teachers are rated as professors only when they have reached their thirties and forties.

A guest professor is an honorary title and the corresponding requirements expected of a guest professor are relatively lower but basically, this position is assigned to well-known scholars, or entrepreneurs with a certain social status, inventors, etc..

They are usually older in age too.

But how old is Xiang Yi?

20 years old!

There aren’t many 20-year-old guest professors in the country!

The gossipy netizens arrived one after another and the comments section became extremely lively.

–[Xiang Yi is the youngest professor ever, right?]

–[No, no, no, her second brother, Xiang Li, became a professor at the age of 17 or 18 years old. I take my hat’s off. Xiang Yi isn’t that impressive but she’s quite good~~] –[Xiang Yi is so competent! I’m crying tears of relief. I just kicked my brother who can’t even do an elementary school math problem sum]

–[I’m dying from laughing. She’s considered a professor just because she has drawn a few weird talismans? Are the professors of the Chinese academia so incompetent these days?]

–[????? What do you mean a few weird talismans? You can do it if you want!!)

They first came into contact with danger but they were lucky to have been saved. The crew’s limbs went limp.

They barely continued with the livestream because they couldn’t even process what was going on.

After they were rescued, they somehow didn’t even have the strength to hold the equipment.

The livestream stopped at the moment Shi Sui hugged Xiang Yi tightly.

The scene.

Xiang Yi said softly, “Shi Sui, don’t be scared. We’re safe.”

She felt his grip around her waist tightening.

He looked down and his emotions were difficult to determine.

Xiang Yi thought he was angry so she patted his back and said, “I’m not being impulsive. I merely made up my mind after weighing the options. I’m almost 90% sure I could take care of that snake.”

She had encountered danger too many times before. Despite having returned to this world and lived in peace for such a long time, her instincts were still there.

Xiang Yi did not feel that there was any danger today. The man’s hoarse voice sounded in her ears. “I’m not angry.” After a pause, said, “Xiang Yi did a good job.” Xiang Yi was glad to have been complimented by the man she loved, so much that she snuggled up in his embrace.

She was being coquettish.

Shi Sui lightly rubbed the back of her neck twice, the bottom of his long, narrow eyes filled with a dark and hostile gaze.

He was wondering what… Xiang Yi had gone through in the past year.

Did she go through a lot of suffering? Was she mistreated? Did she cry a lot? What a good little girl… He did not dare to ponder further.

Li Jianyu rested for a while, rubbed his face with his hands and shouted, “Come on, everyone! It’s getting late, it gets dark fast in the mountains. Let’s hurry down the mountain and go back to have a hot meal! It’ll be my treat tonight!” The crowd was still in shock, so much that they barely reacted to his declaration that he would be giving them a treat. They hurriedly packed up numbly.

Until…

The young girl’s sweet voice sounded in the crowd’s ears.

“The weather is so hot, the ducks back at home must have gotten gotten a heatstroke. Let’s go back and make several dishes with duck.”

“Will it be heaty for us to eat them if they’ve gotten a heatstroke?”.

“Why? What are you afraid of. Just pair it with some radix isatidis!” “What an insider! Even Elder Fang and the other medical practitioners would praise you for matching it that way!” The crowd were like zombies just now but their eyes lit up immediately.

Their pace was much faster and agile too.

The professional rescue workers who were in charge of taking care of the aftermath, swallowed their saliva one after another.

‘I’m really craving for duck… Ah, the ducks are so pitiful!’

chapters.title: Chapter 701 Multiple Ways To Eat Duck (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 701 Multiple Ways To Eat Duck (2)

…

Although the staff was carrying the equipment, they were walking at the front.

On the contrary, Shi Sui was holding Shi Yu with one hand and Xiang Yi with the other. The three of them were walking at the back.

Shi Yu’s little face was pale. After all, he was still a child and did not want Shi Sui to carry him at the beginning.

However, it did not take long for him to fall asleep while hugging his uncle’s neck. His thick, curly eyelashes cast a shadow over his face, making him look soft and obedient.

The little boy was just too cute, and Xiang Yi couldn’t help but take a few more glances at him.

Shi Sui’s expression didn’t change as he turned Shi Yu’s little head to the other side of his shoulder.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

”Watch where you’re going,” the man reminded her softly.

Yingyi muttered, “How stingy.”

”Oh?”

”Ahem, Uncle said that he’s coming over tonight. He’ll definitely be overjoyed to see Shi Yu.”

Xiang Feng really liked children Unfortunately, he had been evergreen for a long time and could only take care of other children for fun.

Even after experiencing such a thrilling event, Shi Sui’s shirt was still neat and tidy. However, he took off his gold-rimmed glasses. Those peach-blossom-shaped eyes were not blocked by the lenses, giving people a strong visual impact.

He said in a muffled voice, “Do you like Shi Yu very much?”

The sun was setting in the west, and the evening wind was gently caressing it.

Xiang Yi’s eyes were curved. “Boyfriend, you’re not jealous, are you? Or are you jealous of a child?”

Shi Sui lowered his long eyelashes and was silent for a few seconds before assenting.

Xiang Yi could not help but laugh as she explained helplessly and amusedly, “Liking Shi Yu is different from liking you.”

”Besides… I feel that Shi Yu is very similar to you. When I see him, I always think about how you looked like when you were young.”

After all, the two of them had a seven-year age gap, so Xiang Yi missed out on his childhood.

In her impression, the first time she met Shi Sui, he was already the calm and gentle big brother next door.

So it was very difficult for her to imagine what Shi Sui looked like when she was young.

Shi Yu’s appearance made up for this regret.

”Very curious?” Shi Sui’s voice was clear and pleasant to the ear. “When I was young, I didn’t seem cute at all, nor was I likable.”

She retorted immediately, “How could that be! You must have been the cutest kid in the world!”

Shi Sui chuckled softly and changed the topic without batting an eyelid. “What are you going to do with the duck? Roast Duck? Stewed Duck?”

Those unbearable and dark years were not worth mentioning.

There was no need for her to know.

At the mention of food, Xiang Yi perked up and started counting the recipes with her small hands.

”Roast duck is definitely indispensable. The duck ribs can be fried, and then we can make stewed duck neck, stewed duck wings, and duck blood vermicelli soup…”

The faint sunlight fell on their backs, casting a long shadow.

It was time to go home.

…

Two hours later.

The live broadcast of “Two Under One Roof”began, and the server almost exploded from the influx of viewers!

Apart from loyal fans, there were also a lot of newcomers.

——[I’m here because of my reputation. Sister Yi, teach me! I want to learn swordsmanship!]

——[Can anyone answer me, what level of combat ability does Xiang Yi have?]

– [If you don’t know, then ask. Isn’t this a martial arts program? Why are you cooking? ? ?]

…

In the kitchen.

With a bun on her head, she looked absolutely beautiful without makeup. Her fair skin was as white as snow, and she was leisurely scooping out a large spoonful of stewed meat from the pot.

The camera zoomed in and gave a close-up.

The duck neck, duck wings, and duck collarbones were all stewed until they were soft and tender. They were fresh, fragrant, and spicy. It was as if if one were to use too much force, the meat would be separated from the bones…

”Gulp.”

The new fans were in a daze.

Why aren’t their mouths obeying them!?!

chapters.title: Chapter 702 Multiple Ways To Eat A Duck (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 702 Multiple Ways To Eat A Duck (3)

The impact of the gravy was strong enough.

However, this was only the beginning!

The new fans watched as the oven was turned on again!

The roast duck was roasted to a caramel color. The duck fat sizzled under the high temperature and a few drops dripped onto the roasting tray!

The new fans were going crazy.

Then, the duck ribs were fried and the duck blood vermicelli soup was boiled… it could be called an all-duck Feast!

The girl’s movements were clean and neat, and her coordination ability was amazing. Multitasking was the basic, and she didn’t seem to be flustered when she cooked a few dishes at the same time.

In the live broadcast room:

—— [ I’m so hungry, I’m starving! But I just ate! ]

——[ Isn’t Xiang Yi a Sword Immortal? Aren’t Sword Immortals supposed to be aloof from the mortal world? Why are they so skilled in cooking! ]

——[ … forget about sword cultivators, what the Hell is a sword immortal? Xiang Yi is just an ordinary super genius, a master chef in the mortal world, a folk music guru, a Chinese Medicine Sage, a talisman genius, a tree-climbing genius, and a magic girl. ]

——[ You have already grasped the essence of the mortal world! ]

…

The countless new fans in front of the screen were dumbfounded.

However, there were also countless new fans who couldn’t help but click on the food delivery apps..

All of a sudden, orders for stewed duck neck, roasted duck, and duck blood vermicelli soup exploded on takeout platforms across the country!

Not long after, the live broadcast room was already filled with grief:

——[ D*mn! A certain black duck was actually sold out in the entire store!]

——[ I’ve already paid for my order. The boss called me to cancel it, saying that the duck wouldn’t be available today. ]

[ Oh my God! How can it be so difficult to eat a duck? ! It’s simply hard to get a duck!! ]

…

Li Jianyu endured the pinch of spending a huge amount of money and ordered take-out for the staff, letting everyone take turns to eat.

However, everyone was not in the mood to eat. Clearly, they were all waiting for a suitable duck.

When the young girl’s laughter was heard, it was no exaggeration to say that the scene was instantly filled with excitement as if it was a new year!

”The duck is here, the duck is here!”

”Ah Ah Ah, it’s the duck!”

”It’s so fragrant that I can smell it!”

”…”

In the living room, Daoist Ren had somehow gotten a futon and was sitting cross-legged on the ground, meditating. His posture was that of a peerless expert.

When he heard those noisy voices, the corners of Daoist Ren’s mouth curled up into a disdainful smile.

Heh, that was all.

Even if they were delicacies, they could only satisfy his appetite.

Someone passed by him and urged, “Daoist, please stop meditating. Otherwise, the duck will be gone in a while!”

Daoist Ren opened his eyes. His gaze was like a torch. He shook his horsetail whisk and said, “Young people like you, the good is like water. Water is good for all things and does not compete. It is where everyone is evil, so it is in the Dao…”

That person was dumbfounded. “AH? Daoist, what are you trying to say?”

Daoist Ren said, “Let nature take its course. Do as you wish and do nothing. Do you understand?”

”As expected of a Daoist priest! I am ashamed of my inferiority in mental state!”

The audience of the live stream was stunned.

”… Daoist, you are not some expert in the Dao, right? ?”

”… Think through these words carefully. Your thoughts are extremely profound!”

——’kindness is like water… do as you wish… Thank you, Daoist priest! I feel like I’ve comprehended something!’

..

In the next second.

Half of Xiang Yi’s face popped out from the kitchen. “Daoist Ren, your pot is ready!”

Daoist Ren exclaimed, “Alright!”

The big pot on Daoist Ren’s back was now filled to the brim.

At the bottom was the gravy, in the middle were a few large duck ribs and fried mushrooms, and at the top was a roasted duck roll with shredded cucumbers, shredded green onions, and sweet sauce! ! !

Everyone: ? ? ?

D*mn it!

chapters.title: Chapter 703 Multiple Ways To Eat A Duck
chapters.body:
Chapter 703 Multiple Ways To Eat A Duck

So it wasn’t that you didn’t want to fight, but that you had already taken it all in one go!

He was a ruthless person!

Under everyone’s dumbfounded gazes, Daoist Ren didn’t show any signs of guilt. He calmly walked forward as if he was strolling in the courtyard and steadily picked up the big pot.

He even said courteously, “Little friend Xiang Yi, you’re really too polite. You gave me so much food. It’s too heavy, so heavy that I can’t even hold it anymore.”

Everyone was speechless.

Looking at how easily you’re doing it, I’m afraid that it wouldn’t be a problem for you to have another wok!

Xiang Yi was still smiling. She brought out a big bowl of duck blood vermicelli soup and suggested to Daoist Ren, “I think that it would be good to change to a mandarin wok. You can also fill it with soup and porridge. You won’t have to be afraid of the food getting mixed up either.”

Daoist Ren’s entire body trembled as if he had been enlightened. He said on the spot, “That… that actually works!”

Everyone:”…”

Daoist Ren, those who didn’t know better would have thought that you were discussing the Dao and cultivating.

Who would have thought that you were talking about taking the blame!

And Xiang Yi, aren’t you being too indulgent towards others!

Carrying the double hotpot? You should be carrying a four-grid hotpot or a nine-grid hotpot!

…

The dining table was covered with a sumptuous spread.

Shi Yu’s back was straight and his sitting posture was upright, looking very much like a gentleman.

However, the little boy was already staring straigh ahead.

It smelled so good..

He was so hungry..

He really wanted to eat it..

She put a bowl of soup in front of him and pinched his little cheeks. “Shi Yu, is there anything else you want to eat?”

Shi Yu shook his head.

”Then try it first to see if it suits your appetite. If you want to eat anything else, just let me know, okay?”

Shi Yu nodded.

Not long after their reunion, he leaned back in his chair in enjoyment, his legs shaking as he smelled the food. “Little Shi Yu, eat more. Only when boys eat more can they grow taller! Only by climbing trees can they climb faster!”

The livestream’s comments section was filled with joy:

——[ Miss Xiang, don’t lead the child astray! ]

——[ No, no, no, you’ve misunderstood Miss Xiang. Climbing trees is an escape skill! Miss Xiang, you’re doing it for the child’s future! ]

– [ Heh, climbing a tree is more than an escape skill. Don’t you know how Xiang Yi used tree climbing as a combat skill? I strongly suggest that our country include tree-climbing into the compulsory education system!]

Shi Sui shot them a side-eye. Seeing through the child’s thoughts, he said calmly, “You can eat now.”

”!”

Shi Yu shook his feet under the table twice in excitement because of these words.

He picked up his chopsticks, picked up a small piece of meat that had fallen off the neck of the stewed duck and put it into his mouth.

Boom —

In an instant, the rich taste of the sweet, spicy, and fragrant numbness assaulted the young boy’s tender taste buds.

His defined eyes were wide open, and he seemed to have forgotten to chew. He did not know what to do with it in his mouth.

So there’s such delicious food in the world??

Shi Yu’s parents had a light palate, and their meals were mostly vegetarian. Shi Yu rarely ate meat, and it was even rarer for him to eat spicy food. Today’s food had practically opened the door to a new world for him..

Xiang Yi and Shi Sui, one on the left and the other on the right, served the little boy some food and soup.

Taking care of others was probably an instinct of the Xiang family, and pampering children was even more instinctive.

Thus, Shi Yu absentmindedly experienced the feeling of happiness mentioned in the cartoons..

Shi Sui and Shi Yu even had a friendly conversation.

”It turns out that children are quite easy to take care of.”

”That’s right, who said that it’s difficult to take care of children? I’ve never met a child that’s not easy to take care of!”

The audience in the live broadcast room: …Please take care of me like this!

chapters.title: Chapter 704 Walking Hormone (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 704 Walking Hormone (1)

The pop-up comments were immediately full of acknowledging kins.

——[Daddy, Sister! I’m the Xiang family’s long-lost baby]

——[I’m the most difficult child to take care of in the entire universe! Give me an address, and I’ll deliver myself to you right away!]

——[Don’t you all blush when you call me Daddy every now and then? Heh, a human’s pride has to be taken care of, do you understand? Grandpa! Grandpa, look at me!]

…

Under the meticulous care of the Xiang family’s uncle and nephew, Shi Yu was able to eat as much as he wanted for the first time in his life.

In the end, the little boy ate until his belly was round and bloated. As he burped, he couldn’t help but drink a few mouths of vermicelli soup.

When they met, he took him to take a bath and turned around to ask Shi Sui, “I’ll take this little brat out for a swim after washing up. Daoist Ren, Shi Sui, are you coming?”

Daoist Ren was extremely thick-skinned. “Exercising after a meal is really a way to preserve one’s health.”

Before Shi Sui could respond, the pop-up comments on the screen in the livestream were already flooding with “Ahhhhh”like crazy.

The manor was big enough to fit both an outdoor swimming pool and an indoor swimming pool.

Shi Sui glanced at Xiang Yi. The little girl was lowering her head and drinking soup obediently and softly, one spoon after another.

Hearing their conversation, Xiang Yi raised her head and met Shi Sui’s eyes.

She blinked her doe-like eyes and asked, “Uncle, Daoist Ren, do you want anything to drink? I’ll bring you some water later.”

”Anything.” Xiang Feng carried Shi Yu out. Although Daoist Ren was thick-skinned, his EQ was high. He followed them with a smile.

Only Shi Sui and Xiang Yi were left in the living room.

The cameraman was not there. The fixed camera in the living room was running, and a slight sound could be heard.

Plop Plop Plop..

An ambiguous feeling spread out uncontrollably, and the surrounding temperature seemed to have risen by a few degrees.

Xiang Yi thought that the duck blood vermicelli soup must be too salty. Otherwise, why would her throat be so dry…

”Uh…” She subconsciously licked the corner of her lips. “Aren’t you going?”

Shi Sui looked at her with a half-smile. “Xiang Yi, do you want me to go?”

The man’s voice was deep and magnetic. After deliberately lowering it, there was a hint of hoarseness in it, making it sound so seductive.

The livestream comments:

——[I screamed until the voice-activated lights on the 30th floor lit up!]

——[Xiang Yi, quickly agree! Don’t you want to unlock the swimsuit version of best actor Shi Sui?! ]

——[Oh my God, best actor Shi sure knows how to do it! Sobs, I really feel like I’m in love when I ask this question! I’m so tickled up in front of the screen that my little deer is about to have a concussion!]

…

Under the light, the aroma of rice wafted up. It was a warm and beautiful scene.

Xiang Yi had a calm expression on her face. “Up to you.”However, she quickly added, “Shall I get you a towel?”

It seemed like she had given him a choice.

In fact, she had already conveyed her thoughts.

Shi Sui chuckled and calmly received the little girl’s signal. “Yes, I’ll go change first.”

After he left, Xiang Yi quietly pinched her burning ears.

This scene was coincidentally captured by the camera.

The audience in front of the screen all revealed a heartened smile.

…

Li Jianyu deliberately played tricks. He suddenly switched the screen and said cheekily, “Ah, a live stream of swimming is not very good.”

The pop-up comments on the screen refreshed quickly. They were all full of comments that were strongly urging him to start a live stream.

——[ Swimming is a healthy sport. It should be popularized to more people! ]

——[ I have a friend who has a terminal illness. Her last wish is to take a look at Shi Sui’s abs. ]

——[ Do we want to watch it? It’s Xiang Yi who wants to watch it! Sister Yi’s request must be met!!/Dog Head ]

——[ Start the stream! If you dare to broadcast it, I’ll call you dad from now on! ]

chapters.title: Chapter 705 Walking Hormone (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 705 Walking Hormone (2)

…

The group of people who were usually arrogant and would calmer about hitting Director Li were now crying and calling for their father.

This was probably… a change of positions. One should never bully someone for they might be an underdog, right?

…

Xiang Yi prepared a few drinks and distributed them to the staff first.

The camera panned over, and the audience in front of the screen almost laughed out loud.

In the courtyard, the staff took turns to eat the duck feast, like a large-scale zombie eating fest.

Everyone was desperately stuffing food into their mouths.

The lighting and sound engineers fought online for a mouthful of duck ribs; the makeup artists and assistants pulled each other’s hair for the last bowl of duck blood soup; and the cameraman who started to laugh hysterically while eating…

In the live broadcast room:

——[ Ducks, have a safe journey! ]

——[ Hahaha, here comes another lunatic ]

——[ Xiang Yi, you must have drugged the ducks]

…

With the sour plum juice, strawberry orange juice, peach soda, and five grains and soy milk that Xiang Yi had sent over, another round of battle had started..

Xiang Yi didn’t know whether to laugh or cry. She wanted to go to the kitchen and make more midnight snacks.

Li Jianyu said, “It’s okay to shoot food. I’ll get old Zhang to switch to a dedicated camera for eating and broadcasting…”

The next second, Xiang Yi was pushed by Ruan Qing towards the direction of the swimming pool.

”Xiang Yi, go and send water to Shi Sui and the others first.”

Many female viewers in front of the screen laughed. Indeed, women understood women better!

Director Li was just a noob

…

It was hot in the summer, and the outdoor swimming pool was a good place to cool off.

Xiang Yi reached the side of the pool, put down the drinks and bath towels, and turned around.

The cameraman shot from her point of view, and the camera naturally turned around as well.

The first thing that entered everyone’s eyes was priest Ren.

He was in his thirties, and his skin was tan. He looked unrestrained and wild.

He held a gourd in his hand and was drinking casually. From time to time, he would recite a few lines of poetry while looking at the moon, giving off an air of unworldly detachment.

Everyone: ! ! !

——[I’m crying. I’m actually not as fit as the Taoist priest!]

Immediately afterwards, they took a photo of Shi Yu and their meeting.

Although their meeting was usually simple, they actually loved sports. Moreover, with the Xiang family’s good genes, they had strong abdominal muscles. Holding the soft and obedient Shi Yu was like holding a chick.

He put the yellow duck float on Shi Yu’s body. “Come on, Grandpa will teach you how to play with water.”

Shi Yu tilted his head and learned from him for a while. He boldly pushed up a handful of water and splashed it at the little boy.

Xiang Feng chuckled and said, “Not bad, not bad. You’re learning very quickly. But Little Yu, Grandpa will teach you what it means to be beaten up by society…”

The next second, Xiang Feng took out a large water gun and began to wildly gush at the little boy with lightning speed

Shi Yu: … ! !

The audience in the live broadcast room: ! !

——[ President Xiang is such a good man, why can’t he be a mute? ]

——[ Xiang Feng’s biggest weakness: unfortunately, he can talk. ]

——[ Help me, I’m dying of laughter. Shi Yu is still a baby! Why do you have to bully him like this! The kid is confused too!! ]

…

In the end, the camera did not disappoint… and fell on Shi Sui.

The man was only wearing a pair of tight black swimming trunks. His hair was pulled back, and his brows and eyes were even clearer.

His abdominal muscles were clearly defined, and his V-line had sunk into his torso..

His broad shoulders, narrow waist, and long legs made him look like a perfect inverted triangle, just like a walking hormone..

Sensing the sound of appropriate footsteps, he turned his face and smiled in the direction of appropriate..

chapters.title: Chapter 706 People Destined To Meet Will Meet Again
chapters.body:
Chapter 706 People Destined To Meet Will Meet Again

Xiang Yi had seen Shi Sui smiling differently in his movies and TV series.

Innocent, sinister, desperate, ruthless..

However, she had never been so moved like this.

The little girl calmly nodded at him, but her heartbeat quietly became chaotic.

The people in the livestream had gone mad.

——[ His abs… my nose is bleeding ]

——[ Good Heavens, Best Actor Shi doesn’t treat us as outsiders, right? ]

——[ Sisters, I believe I’m not the only one who’s a jingle cat! ]

——[ Hey, if you want to talk about this, I won’t be sleepy anymore! ]

…

People were scrolling through the comments at an incredible speed.

After meeting and bullying Shi Yu for a while, he finally realized his conscience and brought the little brat to Xiang Yi’s side.

Shi Yu’s face was grim, as if he was sulking.

Ying Yi took a towel and carefully dried his hair. “Do you want something to drink?” she asked.

Shi Yu shook his head and sat down obediently, not saying a word.

Xiang Yi poked the little boy’s cheek. “Are you angry? Do you want me to help you take revenge?”

Shi Yu’s eyelashes were wet, looking a little like a newborn puppy. His voice was a little dejected. “I’m not angry. I just feel that I’ll be leaving in a few days…”

Xiang Yi’s house was too blissful.

But he would leave one day sooner or later.

He told himself that he couldn’t be a greedy little child, but…

He was still so greedy.

He wanted to stay here forever, eat the delicious food cooked by Xiang Yi, and listen to her warm fairy tales.

Xiangyi was stunned for a moment. She hadn’t expected Shi Yu’s answer to be like this.

”If Shi Yu wants to come and play, he can come anytime,” Xiang Yi said with a smile, “I read in a book that people who meet will meet again. So we will definitely have many chances to meet again in the future!”

Shi Yu’s eyelashes trembled, and he obediently wrapped himself in a towel. “Really… can I?”

Before he could finish his words, a shout from not far away rang out.

”Xiang Yi, help us become the referee! We’re going to compete!”

Xiang Yi made a hand gesture to indicate that it was okay.

Meeting: “I’ll count to one from three. Get ready to start, and then we’ll start. Three, two…”

Before they could finish counting, meeting had already jumped into the water and seized the opportunity!

Daoist Ren: ? ?

He didn’t expect that there was someone in the world who had thicker skin than this penniless priest!

He jumped into the water and tried his best to catch up with them.

On the other hand, Shi Sui was still on the shore, lazily moving his wrists and ankles as if he didn’t care about the competition.

Xiangyi became anxious and clenched her small fists. “Go, Boyfriend!”

Hearing the little girl’s voice, Shi Sui glanced at her, raised his eyebrows, and then jumped into the water. His posture was as standard as a professional athlete.

Although they were the first to dive, they lost their strength after swimming to the middle. On the other hand, Daoist Ren was physically strong and swam in front.

However, Shi Sui was like a fish in water. In the blink of an eye, he closed the distance between them!

The man was tall and slender. He was agile and nimble in the water, and his strength and beauty were undoubtedly revealed at this moment!

Five meters…

Three meters…

One meter…

Swoosh!

Taking advantage of Daoist Ren’s rise to catch his breath, Shi Sui directly overtook him and steadily occupied the first place!

The audience was overwhelmed with emotions as they watched:

——[ Best actor Shi’s stamina is not bad! ]

——[ Can Xiang Yi’s small body withstand it in the future… ]

——[ Wake up! Xiang Yi is a girl who nailed a few meters long into a tree with a single sword strike! Everyone should be worried about best actor Shi, right… ? ]

The live broadcast room instantly fell into… a mysterious silence.

chapters.title: Chapter 707 War Challenge
chapters.body:
Chapter 707 War Challenge

That’s true…

Xiang Yi could stir a pot that weighed dozens of pounds, kill a pig that weighed more than a hundred pounds, beat up people, and beat up extremely vicious fugitives…

In comparison…

Best actor Shi seemed a little… delicate?

Someone sent a question from the soul: [Can Best Actor Shi… do it or not?]

In an instant, everyone rushed to answer:

——[I know this question! Best actor Shi can’t do it! ]

——[Don’t ask. Asking means Shi Sui can’t do it!]

——[Is it important whether he can do it or not? Wouldn’t it be fine if Xiang Yi can do it?]

…

The new fans were at a loss.

So there were so many haters of Best Actor Shi?

However, when they clicked into the account that they had most haters on, they actually discovered that most of them were ten-year-old sisters!

New fans: ? ? ?

What kind of operation was this? ! Were the ten-year-old sisters collectively hacked? !

…

A few rounds ended.

Without any suspense, Shi Sui took first place.

Daoist Ren took second place, pulling away from him by more than ten meters.

It was even worse when they met, because he choked on the water in the middle and was panting like a dead dog..

Shi Yu walked to the side of the pool.

He was touched when they met. “Shi Yu, are you here to comfort Grandpa? It’s okay, Grandpa has a good mental state…”

The next second, Shi Yu took out an oversized water gun!

They met: ? ?

Shi Yu glanced at Xiang Yi guiltily. “Sister Xiang Yi gave this to me.”

They met: ? ? ?

”Shi Yu, listen to me…”

He got a merciless water gun attack in response!

Shi Yu’s soft and tender voice sounded. “Sister Xiang Yi said that those who come out to mingle will have to pay back.”

Xiang Feng: … ! !

He was a domineering CEO, but he was defeated by a little brat instead? ! !

This was intolerable!

When he went back, he immediately ordered a super super super super large water gun! !

…

Shi Sui propped himself on the wall of the pool and came ashore, his forearm stretched out in a smooth and clear line.

Xiang Yi immediately handed him a towel, but… there were still some viewers watching the live broadcast, so they quickly took a screenshot!

——[ F * ck, this line, this outline… ]

——[ Sisters, there’s a surprise after zooming in! ]

——[Ah, should I say, as expected of best actor Shi… ]

——[ I tightly covered my best friend’s mouth, not letting her make the sound of a rooster. ]

…

By the pool.

Shi Suiyou was drying her hair casually, and Yingyi’s question rang in her ear, “What would you like to drink?”

”Do you have any recommendations?”

Xiang Yi got into character in a second. “Sir, I would like to recommend peach fizzy water for you. You have added ice cubes and mint grass. Not only does it have the sweetness of a peach, but it also has a refreshing and rejuvenating feeling.”

Shi Sui’s eyes were gentle. “Alright, that’s it.”

Xiang Yi continued to act. “Sir, can you give me your contact information?”

’Is Xiang Yi trying to act?’

A certain best actor calmly accepted the role. “I’m sorry, I already have a girlfriend who is prettier than you. Please don’t disturb me.”

”PFFT…”Xiangyi could not help but laugh.

”What else do you want to act in? We’ll act together for free. We’ll be waiting for you anytime.”

…

Shi Sui’s answer attracted the likes of the audience:

——[Even straight men come to learn. This is practically a standard answer!]

——[Copying homework! I’ll try to trick my boyfriend with this later. Haha~]

——[Long live the UntimelyCouple! ! Please continue to show off your relationship day after day!]

——[Have You Seen Weibo? Master Yan has issued a challenge to Xiang Yi]

——[Master Yan? I’m going to watch some gossip now]

…

When everyone searched for Master Yan, relevant Weibo immediately popped up.

[Master Yan of the Yan sect] : Young lady, plagiarizing the sword techniques, tai chi, and other cultivation methods of the Yan sect is intolerable! Do you dare to Fight Me Tomorrow? @XiangYi

chapters.title: Chapter 708 Reasons Are For Others
chapters.body:
Chapter 708 Reasons Are For Others

The netizens were at a loss.

Who is this person!?!

A class representative immediately came forth to speak.

——[Master Yan, a famous folk martial artist, a live streamer signed by FilmFeather. He specializes in Yan school swordsmanship, Yan School Taiji, and other martial arts (all self-proclaimed) . He has opened several martial arts schools in China (all of which have closed down)

He has challenged and defeated more than ten experts at home and abroad (all of whom are unknown). In conclusion, I suggest that you don’t treat him as a martial arts master. If you treat him as a funny streamer, you’ll be pleasantly surprised.]

Everyone was speechless.

So, he was just a clown?

But very quickly, everyone realized that the internet was so vast that there are indeed all kinds of strange things.

Master Yan really had many loyal fans, and his combat strength was especially fierce!

——[Master Yan’s family history, swordsmanship and swordsmanship are all inherited from the Yan family, so he’s a thief! ]

——[Stealing without warning is stealing, stealing without returning is shameless! I’m a beautiful woman, but I can’t do anything about it. ]

——[ if she doesn’t feel guilty, why doesn’t she dare to accept Master Yan’s tactics? Of course, if you have a guilty conscience, you’re definitely going to be afraid.]

..

In response to this, the netizens’reactions were:

’Psht, as long as you guys are happy.’

They couldn’t bring themselves to see it.

Everyone thought that this was a farce, but they didn’t expect that Daoist Ren also loved surfing. When he went ashore and scrolled to this weibo, he said indignantly. “Nonsense! Nonsense! Release his motherf * cking dog…”

”Ahem, ahem, ahem!” Li Jianyu, who had a strong desire to survive, coughed frantically to remind him.

Daoist Ren forcefully changed his words. “… Release his mother’s dog, and I’ll help him walk. After all, I think he’s full of himself.”

It could be said that he was very civilized!

Xiang Yi took a look at Weibo, but her reaction was mediocre. “I’m not interested in fighting and killing.”

Was it that cooking didn’t smell good, or that Shi Yu wasn’t cute enough?

The good times were used to play the piano, read books, study medicine, adjust fragrances, and nourish flowers, not to be wasted on such a boring person.

Xiang Feng: “Hey, this person is just a clown. Don’t bother.”

Daoist Ren’s phone vibrated. He refreshed it and found that it was Master Yan who had updated it again.

This time, the smell of gunpowder was even stronger, and it even had a hint of personal attack:

[Master Yan, Disciple of the Yan Sect] : Seeing that you are a woman, I can let it go. Any male in your family who comes out to fight with me is also fine! Or let your boyfriend fight!

However… your son and your boyfriend shouldn’t have the guts, right? Looking at the photos, they all look pretty pretty. With all due respect, I can beat ten of them by myself!

…

After browsing through this post, priest Ren could clearly feel that the atmosphere around him had changed.

The source of the change was — the uncle and nephew of the Xiang family.

The first person to jump up when they saw each other was: “Where’s My Knife? Where’s My Knife? ! ! !”

Ahhhh! I’m so angry!

You actually dare to scold my family?

I’m the only one who can scold my family, understand? ?

Xiang Yi’s exquisite little face was calm and composed. She looked very calm and steady, but her words were extremely valiant.

The young girl raised her eyes and looked at the camera with her clear deer eyes. Her gaze was firm and sharp.

”Just because you don’t like fighting and killing doesn’t mean you’re afraid of it. Reason is something that you can talk to people about. Since reason doesn’t make sense, then… let him decide first.”

”Let him decide the time and place.”

”I’ll accompany him to the end.”

All the staff present were shocked by the appropriate aura!

My God… how could the gentle Xiang Yi still have such a powerful side to her?!

Not to mention the audience in the live broadcast room, they were all dumbfounded!

Oh My God, this isn’t Xiang Yi!

This is her brother, father and grandfather!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 709 Don'T Lose For Long (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 709 Don'T Lose For Long (1)

…

When Master Yan received the news, he was also a little confused.

In reality, his martial arts school was not doing well, and he had lost a lot of money. Later, he relied on being an internet celebrity to taste the sweetness.

Xiang Yi actually accepted the challenge?

This was really beyond his expectations.

However, Master Yan smiled contemptuously and did not take Xiang Yi seriously.

She was just a young girl. Even if she started practicing martial arts in her mother’s womb, she would still be no match for him!

…

The hashtag #XiangYiFights! quickly became a hot topic on the internet, causing a heated discussion among netizens.

One camp of netizens treated it as a joke, while another took it as if it was a matter of fact and listed the two’s fighting strength.

——[Although Master Yan always says some strange words to attract attention, his strength is really not worth mentioning. He truly started practicing martial arts at a young age. There’s no need for me to explain the importance of the boy martial arts, right? ]

——[Xiang Yi is not bad either! I feel that Xiang Yi is the type of person who follows the light and agile style of martial arts novels. She is quick-witted and is good at using softness to counter hardness. She is able to easily deal with Master Yan!]

——[Xiang Yi:

Agility: 5 Stars

Strength: 3 Stars

Physique: 4 Stars

Comprehensive Combat Strength: 4 Stars

Master Yan:

Agility: 5 Stars

Strength: 5 Stars

Physique: 4 Stars

Comprehensive Combat Strength: 4.5 Stars

From the perspective of probability, I think Master Yan will win.]

——[Who said that Xiang Yi’s strength is only 3 stars? Didn’t you see the video of her stabbing the snake? ? Her wooden sword pierced through the snake’s body and then into the tree. She must have inner strength!]

…

The two sides argued endlessly. This night was destined to not be peaceful.

..

..

The next day.

It was a very regular schedule. He woke up early in the morning, exercised for a while, and then went to water the flowers and plants.

When the water was almost done, Shi Sui came back from her morning jog.

They made eye contact, and she said, “I just checked Weibo. Master Yan has decided on a place. It’s in his new martial arts school. I’ll go there myself later.”

Shi Sui said, “I’ll accompany you.”

”No, no, I can handle it.” In fact, the little girl was still a little worried about losing.

Her combat ability had never been tested.

So, Xiang Yi was not sure what level she was at in this world.

In any case, she felt that the most powerful and brutal person in the world was her big brother..

Compared to her big brother, she was always a rookie.

”Do you really think I’m just a pretty boy?” Shi Sui walked closer and gently flicked the little girl’s smooth forehead. “Your boyfriend is not as delicate as you think.”

He wasn’t made of paper. He usually played along with the little girl’s jokes, but he always felt that Xiang Yi really thought he was too meek..

Xiang Yi said embarrassedly, “I’m not doubting you, I just don’t want to embarrass myself in front of you…”

Shi Sui said with a half-smile, “If you lose, I’ll help you take revenge.”

Yingyi asked straightforwardly, “What if we both die?”

”… Then I’ll accompany you to get beaten up?”

Xiang Yi imagined the scene of her and Shi Sui supporting each other after they were beaten up..

Sigh, it would be very miserable.

”Sister Yi, Shi Sui, get ready. We’re starting the broadcast!” Li Jianyu led the staff to adjust the equipment, made a gesture, and then opened the live broadcast room.

There were hundreds of thousands of loyal fans waiting for the livestream to begin. When they saw the screen light up, everyone started to bubble up and cheer for Xiang Yi.

However, there were also some people who raised their concerns:

——[Master Yan’s martial arts school has dozens of masters and disciples. Our Xiang Yi only has a few people. It feels like she has lost in terms of dominance…]

chapters.title: Chapter 710 Not Losing For Long (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 710 Not Losing For Long (2)

That’s right, even if Shi Sui, Daoist Ren, and Shi Yu were included, there were only four of them!

”Achoo!” Xiang Feng sneezed as he walked out of the villa and yelled, “Don’t even think about leaving me behind!”

He had the habit of staying up late. It was worse for him to wake up early than not eating junk food for a month.

But even so, Xiang Feng still stubbornly got up!

Moreover, he even changed into a t-shirt that made people rush over all night — ‘Rabbit Invincible’was printed on his chest, and ‘I am your father’was printed on his back.

It was a combination of support and enmity, vividly explaining what it meant to make the most of everything!

Everyone seemed to have woken up from a dream. So there was still the Xiang Chief!

It wasn’t that they had almost forgotten him.

It was that they had truly forgotten him completely.

For some reason, the Xiang chief never had any sense of presence..

”I’ll go with you!” Priest Ren followed closely behind, carrying the peach wood sword on his back and the white horsetail whisk in his hand. He smiled. “If you don’t mind, I’m willing to hold the fort for you.”

In addition, he had prepared a small surprise for little friend Xiang Yi.

”I, I want to go too.” A soft and meek voice came from Shi Yu.

The little boy was very self-sufficient. He dressed himself, washed his face, and even carried a small schoolbag on his back. There were a few tufts of hair on his head, and he looked extremely silly and cute.

Sensing everyone’s feelings, Xiang Yi’s heart warmed.

”Then let’s go together.” If he was embarrassed, so be it. He would just treat it as a day trip.

Xiang Yi went to change her clothes.

They met on the same spot and urged Daoist Ren and Shi Yu to change into support t-shirts — naturally, they were rejected by the two of them.

The adults couldn’t handle it, so Xiang Yi chuckled and extended her claws towards Shi Yu…

The audience who saw this scene felt extremely complicated.

——[Finally, there are five people. Including the staff, there should be around ten of them, right? But it feels like an amateur player going to challenge the national team…]

——[Xiang Feng is not reliable. As expected, he won’t disappoint me! Let go of Shi Yu, he’s still a child!]

——[Wow, FilmFeather’s live stream is really good at stealing the limelight! They’ve also turned on a livestream for Master Yan. They’re trying to steal traffic!]

…

At this moment, in the martial arts academy.

The staff of FilmFeather’s livestream had arrived at the scene last night and installed cameras from various angles.

The website and the app client had arranged pop-up recommendations to ensure that users could see Master Yan’s livestream the moment they entered.

There was no other reason for this. FilmFeather’s live stream was already in competition with the live stream of Starry Entertainment. This battle with Master Yan was undoubtedly a great opportunity to snatch the traffic!

They had already designed a complete package marketing plan for Master Yan. They planned to push him to become a top internet celebrity!

After that, they would follow the example of “Two Under One Roof”and become a daily variety show in the martial arts school. Every episode, they would invite the guests to learn martial arts. After learning, they would cook delicious food. After cooking, they would chat and talk about their lives.

Perhaps, they would become popular all over the internet and successfully become a star. Then, they would export it overseas and defeat “Two Under One Roof”?

Master Yan was well aware that all exposure is good exposure. As soon as the live broadcast started, he began to say some controversial words.

”I advise women not to learn martial arts. It’s better to stay at home to take care of their husbands and children. They can just wash clothes and cook. Otherwise, they will be like Xiang Yi, who will be beaten up until her face is disfigured by me later.”

”I suggest that she call her brothers and boyfriend over. Even if they attack me together, I have a countermeasure! I will definitely be unharmed.”

”You don’t have to worry about whether I can win or not. What you should worry about is whether Xiang Yi can afford to lose!”

”I think she can’t afford to lose!”

chapters.title: Chapter 711 Not Losing For Long (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 711 Not Losing For Long (3)

Stirring up opposition is always the easiest way to stir up conflict.

Nowadays, the easiest way to stir up conflict on the Internet is gender discrimination.

If it doesn’t work out, once these comments are made, the netizens’ emotions will be stirred up.

Some people swore at Master Yan, while others clapped their hands in delight, feeling that Master Yan had revealed their true feelings.

The public opinion instantly turned into an argument about whether a girl should take care of her husband and raise her children. Everyone had their own opinions, and it was a heated argument.

The person-in-charge of FilmFeather’s live broadcast was also present at the scene. Naturally, he turned a blind eye to Master Yan’s actions.

In any case, as long as there was traffic, it would be fine.

What was so important about the rest?

In front of him were two tablets, playing “Two people in a room”and Master Yan’s live broadcast at the same time.

Seeing that Xiang Yi and the others were about to arrive at the dojo, the person in charge gave the order with a confident smile on his face.

Soon, Xiang Yi would experience what it meant to crush!

…

The black nanny van stopped in front of the dojo.

In order to promote the dojo, Master Yan had made the address public, and there was a sea of people at the scene. Fortunately, Ruan Qing had the foresight to find an official and private security company to maintain order.

They got off the car. The girl was dressed in white sportswear. She looked neat and youthful.

There was a heated discussion in the crowd.

”Wow, no wonder she’s a celebrity. She looks so good in person!”

”Xiang Yi’s face is so small. It feels like my face is twice as big as hers…”

”She looks fine in her usual livestreams. She’s too skinny in real life. This small body doesn’t take a beating…”

After Shi Sui got out of the car, the cheers in the crowd reached their peak.

Apart from the strong national popularity and the popularity of passers-by, there were also quite a number of Shi Sui Sisters who rushed to the scene.

”Shi Sui! Shi Sui!!!”

Hearing a few hysterical voices, Shi Sui glanced at the crowd, and gently gestured for them to hush.

As if there was magic, the crowd actually quieted down!

Shi Sui slightly nodded his head in greeting. His manners and demeanor were impeccable.

The crowd entered the dojo.

On the other side, the few of them were dressed in sportswear, and they were simply relaxing. Obviously, they did not place much importance on the battle.

On Master Yan’s side, it was different.

He wore a black training suit with a pair of lapels on it. There were even patterns embroidered on it with gold threads, making it look simple and rustic.

His disciples were all wearing white training suits and a black belt around their waists. They looked very ostentatious.

The audience in the live broadcast room could clearly feel the difference:

[To be frank, Master Yan and the others are really ostentatious… ]

[Xiang Yi and the others are too shabby. It’s all because of their good looks. ]

[Hahaha, Shi Yu has nothing to live for. He’s almost wearing the T-shirt ‘I’m your father’ to his ankles. ]

..

Master Yan sized Xiang Yi up, a slight sneer came out of his nostrils. “You? Little Girl, I advise you to go back and practice it again. Do you know how to form the horse stance? Can you form it for half an hour at a time? What you plagiarized was only the swordsmanship and Tai Chi of our Yan sect, but the true essence of our Yan sect is our basic skills…”

Xiang Yi interrupted him. “If you want to fight, just get started. Why are you talking so much nonsense?”

”…”Master Yan flew into a rage out of humiliation. “Young lady, you don’t know etiquette at all! You don’t know the virtues around martial arts!”

The dozens of disciples behind him also pointed at and mocked Master Yan.

Suddenly…

Daoist Ren said in a clear voice, “Before the official martial arts competition, let us welcome…”

”Fellow Daoist Min of the White Cloud Temple!”

”Fellow Daoist Su of the Jade Spring Temple!”

”Fellow Daoist Yu of the Yongle Palace!”

”…”

Master Yan: ? ? ?

What? He even brought reinforcements? ! ! !

chapters.title: Chapter 712: It'S Her, It'S Her
chapters.body:
Chapter 712: It'S Her, It'S Her

Translator: Dragon Boat Translation Editor: Dragon Boat Translation

He looked at the door with a dumbfounded expression.

A few Daoist priests and nuns wearing either Daoist robes or training clothes entered one after another. Those who were familiar with the culture of the modern Taoist community would know that all of them were big shots!

The livestream instantly broke into an uproar.

"Wow, are all these Daoist priests here to watch the battle?"

"Awesome, they actually invited so many big shots."

"… I wonder who they are here for? Sister Yi or Master Yan?"

Daoist Ren was still loudly introducing, "Fellow Daoist Zhang of the Mount Song Temple!"

"Fellow Daoist Wang of the Yellow Dragon Temple!"

Master Yan's fans immediately rushed to the livestream to speak.

"… These experts are naturally here for Master Yan!"

[How could a woman like Xiang Yi know such a person?]

[Master Yan travels a lot and has a lot of friends. It's perfectly normal for him to have some good friends to help him fight.]

…

They spoke with confidence, but they were constantly put to shame.

After Daoist Ren recited dozens of names, he said slowly, "Thank you for coming, Fellow Daoists, to hold the fort for our little friend Xiang Yi!"

The whole place was in an uproar!

These Daoist masters were all here for Xiang Yi?

In other words, these big shots were all here to support Xiang Yi?!!

Yingyi was quite at a loss. She tilted her little head with her hair tied into a bun, and looked at the newcomers curiously.

These new Daoist Masters looked at Xiang Yi with a very friendly look. Although it was their first time meeting each other, one or two of them seemed to have met Xiang Yi many times!

"Little friend Xiang Yi, do your best and don't leave any regrets."

"Hold your breath and keep your mind steady. Don't be disturbed by the outside world."

"It doesn't matter even if you lose. In life, let nature take its course."

''…''

They showered Xiang Yi with life advice.

Xiang Yi said, "… Thank you."

The audience watching the livestream: ???

— [Xiang Yi is really a team favorite! ]

—[Oh my God, who said that sister Yi doesn't make an impactful appearance! Dozens of Taoist priests are there to support her. I just want to ask, who else! Is there!?]

—[Master Yan is instantly low-key. I feel like his disciple is like one of those background actors who gets hired for 50 yuan a day. Sister Yi's side is like a gathering of big shots]

Master Yan calmed his mind down and opened his mouth to invert black and white. "Heh, do you think that by using such methods to pressure me, I will waver? You are underestimating the temperament of Yan sect's martial artists! I will never yield to the evil side!"

The disciples behind him were visibly moved.

As expected of their master!!

They rolled their eyes at each other and ridiculed, "Can you cut down on your acting? Let me tell you, in terms of acting, we have a professional here!"

Shi Sui smiled slightly.

Meeting Shi Sui's gaze, Master Yan shivered. For some reason, the gaze of this young man made his heart palpitate.

That aura… was too terrifying.

Master Yan avoided Shi Sui's gaze and cupped his hands toward Xiang Yi. "Yan Dazhuang from Yan sect. Please enlighten me."

Xiang Yi:"…"

It was quite ritualistic?

The young girl was about to give a perfunctory reply, however, she was interrupted by her uncle. "She is the successor of the Culinary God! The direct disciple of the holy doctor! The giver of the Muse! The Girl of magic, the Queen of Martial Arts, and the Guardian goddess of the Little Rabbit Farm! It's her, it's her — Xiang Yiyi!"

Master Yan: ????

The audience: ???

The audience watching the livestream were just as confused.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Xiang Yi was so embarrassed that she wished she could dig out a magic castle with her toes on the spot..

chapters.title: Chapter 713: Mutual Blackmailing (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 713: Mutual Blackmailing (1)

After bragging, Xiang Feng still felt that he hadn’t had enough.

His little niece was the cutest and most outstanding kid in the world! No matter how he praised her, he couldn’t overdo it!

On the side, Shi Yu kept nodding his head as he listened.

Yes, Grandpa was right!

Sister Xiang Yi is just that good.

The comments section of the live stream was filled with cheers and laughter:

——[Hahaha, laughing my head off]

——[It’s such a pity that Mr. Xiang isn’t a stand-up comedian]

——[The magical girl, the Queen of Martial Arts, the guardian goddess of the Little Rabbit Farm, is not sick, hahahaha ]

…

After exchanging moves, Master Yan began his performance.

He first took a horse stance, then pushed his hands forward, looking as if he was lucky.

Xiang Yi had developed the good habit of being cautious when she was about to wear a horse stance, which was not to underestimate any opponent.

Even if the opponent looked very weak.

She observed Master Yan and did not attack rashly.

It was just that..

The opponent’s behavior made her extremely confused.

After she was lucky, Master Yan circled around her again and again, occasionally making strange sounds like “Holy crap”and “Heya”.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

The young girl frowned.

She suspected that the opponent was using a disguise tactic.

By pretending to be crazy and acting dumb to hide his true strength, he was actually waiting for an opportunity to kill him in one strike!

Master Yan’s fans also thought the same:

——[You thought that Master Yan is at the first level, but you didn’t know that he’s at the fifth level!]

——[He is predicting Xiang Yi’s move! With this kind of strength, he is probably a peerless expert, a half-step Grandmaster! ]

——[ looking for changes in the changes, master Yan’s cultivation has improved again! Through his rapid movements, he can deduce mysterious counter moves. With his basic skills and flexible fighting style, master Yan is confident! ]

..

However, in most people’s eyes, they only felt that the battle between the two of them… was really boring

Come on, Little Sister Yi, move!

Please, Master Yan, stop spinning around!

There were some people who didn’t mind the fuss and shouted angrily in the bullet comments section: [You can’t kill people by fighting like this!]

…

They were extremely nervous when they met, and kept asking shi sui, “How is it? Do you think Little Xiangyi can beat this old man?”

Shi Sui looked at him quietly.

For some reason, they saw a hint of… pity in his eyes?

However, priest Ren and the others had an idea.

This master Yan was just putting on a show.

They guessed that he had some boy skills, but it was obviously abandoned. His footsteps were weak, and his lower body was unstable. Obviously, he had already become accustomed to the mortal world and practiced martial arts.

His imposing manner seemed to be sufficient, but in fact, it could only scare laymen.

“It’s still not too late for you to admit defeat now!”Master Yan roared.

Xiang Yi: ?

Was he going to use his mouth to attack?

Master Yan thought that he had confused Xiang Yi, so he threw a punch towards Xiang Yi’s face!

Xiang Yi dodged to the side.

Because of Master Yan’s action, a dispute arose in the live broadcast room.

Some people thought that no matter what, hitting others would not hit the face, not to mention Xiang Yi was an artist.

Some people also thought that a martial arts competition was a martial arts competition, and there was no need to distinguish between men, women, Old and young?

The two exchanged a few moves, and basically, it was Master Yan who attacked and defended.

Master Yan was ecstatic.

He won! He definitely won!

This match was obviously very weak..

“Ah! !” Suddenly, a scream sounded, and Master Yan was kicked to the ground by Xiang Yi. He lay straight on the ground, unable to move at all!

The entire arena was completely silent, and one could hear a pin drop!

Xiang Yi actually knock Master Yan out with one move? ! !

The little girl was at a loss. She muttered to herself, “Just… Just like this?”

chapters.title: Chapter 714: Mutual Blackmailing (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 714: Mutual Blackmailing (2)

No, this must be a tactic!

There must be a backup plan!

The young girl collected her thoughts, and with a serious expression, she was prepared to… attack at any time.

But…a second passed..

Ten seconds passed..

In the blink of an eye, half a minute had passed, and Master Yan was still lying on the ground, as if he was dead.

The audience watching the livestream:

——[What happened? Was he killed??]

——[Xiang Yi’s flying kick was so cool! I want to learn it!]

——[Where is the successor of the Yan Sect? Just like this? Just like this? ? Made of paper?!]

The referee was invited by Master Yan. Initially, he wanted to show some favoritism to Master Yan, but faced with the burning gazes of the audience, his old face turned red.

“Ahem, ahem, I declare that the victory of this match goes to Xiang Yi!”

It was the final decision!

Xiang Yi was even more confused. Confusion appeared on her milky-white face. “I… I won? ?”

The reaction of the little girl was so adorable that countless people were stunned!

——[Xiang Yi is super cute, super dumb, and super fierce, hahaha!]

The disciples of Master Yan who were present were all dumbfounded!

No Way! Master lost just like that?

The person-in-charge of the live broadcast of Guanyu fell on his chair!

It was over!

His face was pale, and his lips were moving.

The live broadcast of the martial arts competition had cost a lot of manpower, money, and resources. He had even promised his boss that he would use this live broadcast to create a popular variety show.

But now… it had become a farce.

Master Yan was like a clown!

And he was a fool who had been played by a clown!

When they met, they shouted, “Hey, hey, the winner has been decided. You old man, get up quickly. Don’t try to scam us!”

Master Yan still didn’t move.

His disciples reacted and cried out in a high voice, “Master…”

Everyone surrounded him. This time, they found that Master Yan had actually fainted!

For a moment, the crowd was in a mess again.

It was not easy for Master Yan to wake up.

With the help of his disciples, he managed to stand up. The moment he spoke, he said, “Young Man, you ambushed me when I wasn’t paying attention! I was careless and didn’t dodge! As a martial artist, we should stand in the open! Hmph, I advise you to take care of yourself! The 30,000 disciples of the Yan sect will never let you off!!”

Appropriate: ?

Grandpa, this scam of yours is too obvious.

The little girl was speechless when her little uncle had already pulled her down onto the ground!

When they met, he said nonsense with a serious expression, “Hey, your old man’s martial arts are really amazing! You actually used external force to transform into inner force! It’s really terrifying! Damn it, you actually used inner force to sneak attack us!”

Master Yan: ? ? ?

Damn it. Since when did I have inner strength?

You little brat… Bleep… I’m going to die from anger… Bleep… Ahhhhh! ! ! !

Countless censored swear words flashed across Master Yan’s mind like a bullet screen.

Shi Yu’s eyes widened.

What they had done was completely different from the gentlemanly education he had received. It had caused a strong impact on his worldview!

But..

For the sake of Sister Xiang Yi…

The Little Boy clenched his small fists and quickly laid down beside Xiang Yi and Xiang Yi!

Looking at the three neatly laid down, master Yan and his disciples were flabbergasted!

However, this scene struck the funny spot of countless people. The popularity of the live stream did not decrease, but instead increased! It was actually even higher than the number of people watching Xiangyi and Master Yan’s martial arts competition!

——[Xiang Feng, forever a God in the scamming world!!]

——[Shi Yu actually laid down as well. The child has learned something bad.]

——[Damn it! Mutual scamming is still alright, hahahahaha ]

chapters.title: Chapter 715: Her Boyfriend Had Also Gone Astray
chapters.body:
Chapter 715: Her Boyfriend Had Also Gone Astray

…

Master Yan came back to his senses and was so furious that his hair and beard were standing on ends. “You! You young people have no morals!”

The next second…

Xiang Feng cried out in misery, “AH — Master Yan, you actually plotted against us again!”

Shi Yu followed up with an expressionless face. “AH.”

It was very soulless.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

The little girl held back her laughter with extreme difficulty, and her slender shoulders trembled.

Master Yan was about to go crazy. “What evidence do you have to prove that I hurt you? ! You’re scamming me!!”

The next second…

A low cough was heard.

The voice sounded as if it was trying its best to be surprised, but it could not be controlled. There was a hint of weakness in the voice, a hint of strength in the voice, and a hint of pain in the voice..

Everyone looked in the direction of the voice. They saw Shi Sui’s slender fingers resting on the edge of his lips. His peach blossom eyes had been stained with tears since some time ago. They were dark and wet.

Sensing everyone’s gaze, he raised his eyes and “struggled” to twitch the corner of his mouth. He frowned “Painfully”and said, “Master Yan, you are absolutely right. You did not use your internal energy to sneak attack us…”

“Look! There is finally someone who understands! Did you all hear what he said?”Master Yan was in a hurry to seek confirmation from others.

Little did he know…

The netizens who thought that he was a sand sculpture just a moment ago now felt that Master Yan had something up his sleeve!

Otherwise, how could Shi Sui be like this?

With just one look, it was obvious that he had suffered internal injuries, yet he still endured it!

He must have said this on purpose for the sake of compatibility! He was afraid that compatibility would be harmed by Master Yan again!

The spirit of a man who loved his girlfriend more than his face was too touching!

Even Master Yan’s disciples were shaken.

‘Could it be that… Master really has internal strength?’

‘Is that why Master had been holding back from us all this time? Is he hiding something?’

Many people immediately left Master Yan…

Even the staff members who were watching couldn’t help but point at him.

“It’s a little too much…”

“Master Yan is too much of a bully!”

“He even said that Xiang Yi ambushed him. I think he was the one who did it!”

“…”

Master Yan almost vomited blood. “He said that I don’t have any internal energy! And he didn’t ambush them!!”

Unfortunately…

In terms of acting, a certain best actor was really a professional.

Even if it was just a casual act, the sense of empathy and resonance would be extremely strong!

“Ahem ahem…” Shi Sui coughed a little harder, and the color of his lips was slightly pale. It was as if he would fall to the ground in the next second. He knelt down on one knee beside Xiangyi, and the words of tea and tea came out easily, “That’s, that’s right, Master Yan… didn’t do anything… Ahem ahem ahem… Xiang Yi, are you… are you okay? I’m sorry, I couldn’t protect you well…”

Xiang Yi panicked. “Are, are you alright?”

The little girl was flustered from her concern, thinking that he was really feeling unwell.

Just as she was about to get up to check his pulse, Shi Sui raised his hand and caressed her cheek. Of course, at an angle that others couldn’t easily notice, the man’s palm was placed on her lips.

He looked at the young girl and blinked his eyes.

Xiangyi was shocked.

Very well. Her boyfriend had also gone astray.

At this moment, Daoist Ren and the others also spoke up.

“Ah, it’s just a martial arts competition. Master Yan, why do you have to be so ruthless…”

“Look at how badly you’ve injured these young people! Enough is enough!”

“Master Yan, you’re attacking indiscriminately! This won’t do, I can’t hold on anymore…”

Master Yan’s eyes almost popped out of their sockets. “Ahhhh!”

Damn it, what kind of line-up is this? ! ! !

chapters.title: Chapter 716: Contemporary Sword Cultivator (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 716: Contemporary Sword Cultivator (1)

Master Yan was about to die from anger.

The audience in the live broadcast room, however, reaped happiness.

——[Hahaha, all the villains have gone crazy]

——[Every frame of Master Yan’s expression can be used as an emoji pack! ]

——[I’m dying of laughter. Shi Sui, you won three Best Actor awards just to act as Master Yan today, right?]

——[Oh dear. Words like ‘so terrifying’ and ‘not caring about martial virtue’ are already circulating in my brain!]

…

The person-in-charge of the live broadcast of Guanyu found out that the popularity of the internet was very high from the martial arts competition to the ‘Pengci’, but..

Why the F * ck did all of them go to the livestream of Starry Entertainment?!

And all of them went to the livestream of ‘Two Under One Roof’.

Actually, it could be considered a coincidence.

The publicity for the livestream of Film Feather had been focused on the martial arts competition in the early stages. The publicity for Starry Entertainment was that the 10-year-old sister Yi would go on a one-day trip.

As a result, the audience’s expectations were completely different.

The audience for the live broadcast of the movie of the stars wanted to watch the martial arts competition. After the competition ended and Master Yan lost, of course, it would be meaningless.

The live broadcast of the movie of the stars was different. Everyone was just watching it as a daily routine. They did not expect that this daily routine would be so ridiculous! It was so funny!

Life was already very tough. What was everyone watching the live broadcast of the variety show for?

Wasn’t it just for fun? !

‘Two Under One Roof’ had achieved that point to perfection!

Another thing worth mentioning was that Starry Entertainment did not expect that the livestream would reverse the flow for them..

Perhaps, Shi Sui and Xiang Yi were really lucky?

…

At the Martial Arts academy.

The old man was so angry that he found an excuse to leave. Then, he pulled his niece and the others up and prepared to leave.

Since things had come to this point, Master Yan had lost completely, both in terms of face and reputation!

However, he was really thick-skinned. He changed his angle of attack and said, “Your swordsmanship and Tai Chi were plagiarized from the Yan sect’s inheritance! So, it can’t be considered as my loss. In the end, it was you who used our family’s inheritance to defeat me!”

Xiang Yi realized that the other party was not a real martial artist at all.

He was nothing more than a comical clown.

The young girl brushed the corner of her clothes twice and her eyes were calm. “How can you prove that my swordsmanship and Tai Chi were plagiarized from your family’s inheritance?”

Of course, Master Yan had no way to prove it.

The Dao of martial arts has been passed down since ancient times. It could be said that many families and sects had their own inheritance to some extent.

It was nothing more than if you influenced me, I influenced you, and we fought together to improve.

Of course, there was also the existence of unique techniques.

Master Yan thought that he had found a suitable way to refute and asked, “Then how can you prove that you didn’t plagiarize me?!”

This move was too vicious and too ruthless.

It was like asking a victim why their perpetrator wanted to harm them instead of asking the perpetrator why they hurt their victim and why they did evil.

Why did it have to be you and not someone else?

Master Yan thought that Xiang Yi would not be able to defend herself. Just as he was about to seize the opportunity and win back some public opinion, he heard the young girl say calmly,

“What a coincidence. I can really prove it.”

Master Yan: ? ?

Xiang Feng handed over a few thick ancient books in time. They were just photocopies because the original versions had been donated to the museum.

“My swordsmanship and Tai Chi were inherited from my grandfather, Xiang Yin. Going back a few hundred years, there are records in the family tree.”

The netizens were shocked.

This was not only proof, it was a straight confirmation!

Master Yan: ? ? ?

chapters.title: Chapter 717: Contemporary Swordsman (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 717: Contemporary Swordsman (2)

Master Yan was a little desperate. No, he was very desperate.

Thinking of how he had been blackmailing others for many years and had never lost.

But today, not only did he lose!

He was put to shame badly!

He said that Xiang Yi was a newbie?

In the end, he was knocked out.

He said that Xiang Yi plagiarised?

In the end, it turned out that she had her own inheritance!

This made him very angry!

The netizens were also laughing even more happily because of this dramatic reversal.

——[Master Yan, you have to pay for what you’ve done. ]

——[Wow, after hundreds of years of inheritance, the Xiang family really has a deep foundation. Sister Xiang Yi is really fair, rich, and beautiful!]

——[Master Yan: How does it feel to be caught in a trap? Let me perform for everyone on the spot. ]

…

Even if Master Yan wanted to quibble all words were useless in the face of real evidence!

“You… you plagiarized… Even if you didn’t, it means that your ancestors plagiarized our family! “Uh… anyway, the inheritance of the Yan sect is the most powerful! You’re bullying an old man like me just because you’re young! I was careless, that’s why I fell into your trap…”

Master Yan kept repeating these words over and over again. Unfortunately, no one wanted to hear it anymore.

The thing that people feared the most was losing the attention of everyone!

Master Yan’s disciples, one by one, looked at him differently..

They suddenly woke up as if the fog and clouds had been cleared.

Previously, it was as if Master Yan had drugged them!

No matter what he said, they would believe it.

Actually, if they thought about it carefully, it would not stand up to logical reasoning at all!

Master Yan still did not realize that today was an important turning point in his life from an internet celebrity to an internet blacklist..

Retribution had finally come.

…

Xiang Yi had no intention to argue with Master Yan anymore. She had defended her dignity with martial arts, and she had also proven her innocence with concrete evidence.

That was enough.

“Shall we eat outside today? I know a good private restaurant. I can invite all of you to try it together,” Xiang Yi suggested.

The priests were especially interested in her talisman, so they naturally agreed.

Suddenly, a clear and clean youth’s voice sounded from the door.

“Miss Xiang Yi, please wait.”

This voice… seemed a little familiar?

Xiang Yi turned her head and saw a tall and straight figure rushing through the crowd.

It was a youth about seventeen or eighteen years old. He wore a clean navy blue training suit that had been washed to the point that it was white. He carried a long sword on his back. His facial features were delicate, and his skin was fair. His expression was gentle and shy.

Xiang Yi recognized him. “Shu Xinglan?”

Speaking of which, the two families could be considered family friends.

The Xiang family had practiced medicine for many generations. They had also passed down sword manuals and fist techniques, but most of them were used to strengthen their bodies.

The Shu family was different. Basically, the entire family was martial arts fanatics. They had established a sect in ancient times, and now they had a martial arts dojo.

Yingyi had met Shu Xinglan a few times. He did not speak much, and at most, he would speak a few words about sword techniques.

“Hello, Miss Xiang Yi.”Shu Xinglan nodded his head in greeting and cupped his fists at Xiangyi. “Good, long time no see. I’m sorry, I’m sorry. Can I… Have a match with you?”

The young man’s eyes were bright and bright.

Shi Sui squinted slightly and didn’t move for the time being.

The audience in the live broadcast room was excited.

——[I can handle this younger brother! ! ]

——[He even stutters nervously, ah, I’m Dead! ! ]

——[I say, you women are too double-standard, Liu Neng also stutters, why is no one praising him? ?]

——[What a cute little brother, Xiang Yi, beat him until he cries! Hurry, hurry, hurry!]

chapters.title: Chapter 718: Contemporary Sword Cultivator (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 718: Contemporary Sword Cultivator (3)

——[Are you the devil that made me cry! ! ]

…

The live stream traffic of constellation soared, and the comments section of the live stream room became extremely lively.

However, the online traffic of Film Feather’s live stream continued to drop.

No one wanted to see Master Yan’s flustered quibble.

Meanwhile, Film Feather’s live stream had signed a contract with Master Yan, so all the cameras were aimed at him.

And what the netizens wanted to see was the match between Xiang Yi and Shu Xinglan!

As a result, heartless netizens started downloading the Starry Live app on the spot, contributing another batch of users to the livestream app…

…

“A match?” Xiang Yi asked in puzzlement, “Then you should go find a professional.”

She was just an amateur, and her standard was just average.

Shu Xinglan had learned swordsmanship since he was young, and it was no exaggeration to say that if his swordsmanship was as standard as other sports, then he was definitely at the level of a national team player.

Shu Xinglan was speechless.

Did Miss Xiang have a serious misunderstanding of herself?

“I saw the video of you subduing Guo Shanfeng. It’s very impressive.”

A person who practiced swordsmanship all year round could basically stab a wooden sword into a snake’s body.

However, piercing through a tree trunk was not something that an ordinary person could do!

Xiang Yi said, “Oh, that, it was just a tactful application of force. If you’re interested, I can teach you some techniques to exert force.”

The young man was stunned.

It was such a powerful technique… and she was actually going to teach it to him so casually?

Shu Xinglan immediately felt extremely ashamed!

His family had taught him from a young age that sword techniques could not be taught to outsiders. The opponents he met also strictly adhered to this principle.

Only now did he understand how narrow-minded he and those people were!

Miss Xiang’s state of mind was extraordinary!

“Please… agree to my request!” The young man’s fingertips trembled slightly, and he said in an embarrassed but firm tone, “Please!”

He bowed to Xiang Yi.

Everyone: Oh Ho!

The young man was quite persistent!

Xiangyi’s cherry lips moved, but she really couldn’t say anything to reject him. She said helplessly, “Alright, shall we start now?”

Shu Xinglan’s eyes lit up, and he nodded hard.

“Little friend Ying Ying, I’ll Lend You My Sword!”The warm-hearted priest Ren took down his peach wood sword and threw it to Ying Ying.

The young girl caught it casually.

Shu Xinglan also took down his sword.

When he was out, he always used a wooden sword due to the ban on weapons.

The Shu family loved swords to the point of obsession and treated them as their wives. Therefore, even though it was a wooden sword, the scabbard was extremely exquisite and gorgeous.

The young man slowly drew out his sword. There were patterns engraved on the blade of the sword, which he had carved with his own hands.

“Please enlighten me.”

“I don’t deserve it.”

“…”

The audience in the live broadcast room:

——[Oh my God, this little brother feels like an expert! His aura is completely different from Master Yan’s ]

— [This little brother’s sword is so beautiful! I want to snatch his sword away. Let’s see how angry he gets and cries]

[This little brother seems to be a sword cultivator from an immortal hero novel! And Xiang Yi, her sword is so beautiful! ]

..

The two of them exchanged a few polite words. Without any more nonsense, they began to exchange moves!

“Bang!”

“Cha!”

The wooden swords clashed, making a heart-stopping sound.

The two figures were light and agile, moving quickly. The camera could not catch them in time, and from time to time, there would be afterimages!

Not far away, the person-in-charge of the piece of feather live broadcast sneered, “What’s so interesting about the martial arts competition! The people must have run away!”
