The assistant beside him said shakily, “I-I just saw their data. Not only did they not run away, but there are even more people…”

The person-in-charge: ? ? ?

Were the preferences of the netizens now so unpredictable?!

Suddenly, with a “Dang”sound, a wooden sword fell to the ground and broke!

chapters.title: Chapter 719: Be Good, Don’T Cry
chapters.body:
Chapter 719: Be Good, Don’T Cry

All of a sudden, everyone’s attention was drawn over.

Xiang Yi stared blankly at the broken sword on the ground and pursed her lips.

The two of them were too fast. At this moment, the camera happened to capture Xiang Yi’s back, causing a blind spot. The audience could not see clearly at all, so they all asked:

— [Whose sword is broken? ! !]

The room was extremely quiet.

A moment later.

Everyone heard some soft sobbing.

This voice was..

The camera shifted and landed on Shu Xinglan’s body.

Everyone could see his expression clearly.

The fair and delicate youth clenched his fists tightly. There was nothing in his hands at this moment.

The youth’s beautiful eyes were extremely red. Water vapor was dense, but he stubbornly held back his tears.

He was really… too pitiful.

Everyone: ! ! !

It was actually Shu Xinglan’s sword that broke? !

When she saw his expression, she blamed herself. “I, I’m sorry. I didn’t do it on purpose. I was too strong. I didn’t expect you…”

The rest of her words stopped abruptly.

Clearly, the girl realized that what she wanted to say was inappropriate.

However, this had the opposite effect.

Shu Xinglan’s clear eyes turned even redder. His thin shoulders trembled uncontrollably as he bit his lips tightly.

He had lost.

And he had lost so quickly!

He had practiced swordsmanship for dozens of years, but in front of Xiang Yi, he could not even last twenty moves…

For the first time, Shu Xinglan began to doubt himself.

Was he really talented in the path of swordsmanship? Was he really capable? Could he really continue on?

It was appropriate for him to blame himself.

She thought that she would lose, so she wanted to give it her all and leave no regrets.

But she didn’t expect..

Uh… that the young boy was a little weak?

At first, she was just testing him, and then she tried to fight back, but she didn’t expect that by accident…she would win.

By accident…

She broke his sword.

She had heard that the Shu family treated their swords as their wives. This was simply killing their wives..

If she had known earlier, she would have gone easy on him.

“I was just lucky just now.” Xiang Yi tried to salvage the situation. “Why don’t we try again?”

This time, she would definitely use 50%… No, 10% of her strength!

She had thought that Shu Xinglan would agree without hesitation, but she did not expect that the young man would feel as if he had been greatly insulted. His voice was filled with an aggrieved sob.

“There’s no need for that. You win.”

Tears quickly gathered in his eyes. The young man, who had never cried no matter how hard he practiced swordsmanship since he was young, had a big teardrop stream down his face at this moment.

“I… I lost.”

Xiang Yi panicked. Why was he still crying?

In the live broadcast room, countless sisters were screaming:

——[Ah, ah, ah, Xiang Yi, you did well! You really cried after the fight! ]

——[When I see girls crying, I want to pass her a tissue, but when I saw him crying, my heart itched, and I wanted him to cry even harder/Dog Head ]

——[I’m digging this little brother’s crying voice! He’ll definitely sound good in the balcony, study room, and kitchen!]

…

After Shu Xinglan admitted defeat, his emotions completely collapsed. His entire body was on the verge of collapse, as if he would fall to the ground at any moment.

Xiang Yi hurriedly touched her pocket. Fortunately, she had brought quite a lot of candies to appease Shi Yu.

Just as she was about to give them to Shu Xinglan, her small hands were suddenly wrapped by a pair of large hands. The next second…

Those fair and distinct fingers slowly swept the candies away from her hands, and at the same time gently rubbed against the girl’s soft palm.

It tickled slightly.

Xiang Yi could not help but curl her small hands.

Then, she saw Shi Sui walk up to Shu Xinglan and stuff a piece of candy into his hand, consoling him emotionlessly, “Be good, don’t cry.”

Xiang Yi: ?

It seemed like something was wrong?

chapters.title: Chapter 720: You’Re Not Right.
chapters.body:
Chapter 720: You’Re Not Right.

It wasn’t just the young girl who felt that this scene was subtle.

In the live broadcast room, Shi Sui’s words instantly caused an uproar!

——[eh? ? Best actor Shi, you’re not right! ! ]

——[The Vicious Best Actor x the Pitiful Swordsman. Sorry, I can do it again! !]

——[Although I know that this dog of a man is jealous and doesn’t want Xiang Yi to give candy to him, but I, the all party, feel that I still hit it… ]

..

Shu Xinglan turned his face away and said stubbornly, “I don’t need anyone’s pity!”

… If his voice didn’t have a sobbing tone, perhaps this sentence would be more convincing.

Shi Sui said faintly, “Why should I pity you? Do you think Xiang Yi is also very pitiful?”

Shu Xinglan subconsciously retorted, “I don’t!”

“In my eyes, you are Xiang Yi’s opponent, an opponent worthy of respect. Victory and defeat are common events, why should you be fixated on momentary gains and losses?”

And in Shu Xinglan’s eyes..

The man in front of him was handsome and noble, gentle and refined, and his temperament was as warm as the spring breeze in March. Every word seemed to have touched his heart!

This brother was a good person!

He unconsciously let down his guard and muttered, “Miss Xiang made me understand today that I am a frog at the bottom of a well. She is a mountain that I can not climb over at all…”

What was more terrifying than a blow was a blow that reduced dimensions.

You struggled with all your might, but the other party only put in minimal effort, but it was even more crushing than Mount Tai.

Shi Sui smiled and gave him motivational life advice. “You are still young and have a bright future ahead of you. How do you know what you will look like in the future?”

The youth who had loved swords and became infatuated with them ever since he was young did not know at all. In reality, Shi Sui’s inner thoughts were: This little brat is really annoying

“I understand.” Shu Xinglan lowered his head in shame and clenched his fists tightly. “I won’t give up. One day, I will challenge Miss Xiang again!”

What this young man meant was that as long as he worked hard to climb up, he would have a chance to surpass Miss Xiang!

Listening to what you said was really better than studying for ten years!

The youth felt that he had gained too much today!

Not only in swordsmanship, he had learned that there was always someone better than him. In terms of thinking, he also felt enlightened and blessed!

Shu Xinglan looked at Shi Sui with sparkling eyes, filled with admiration.

“That… Your sword.” Xiang Yi picked up the broken sword and said apologetically, “I’m sorry, how about I compensate you with a wife?”

Shi Sui: ?

Everyone: ?

——[Xiang Yi, what kind of dangerous speech is this! ! ]

——[Mother Cub doesn’t allow you to have two partners! No, no, no! ]

——[So, does Xiang Yi intend to compensate by giving herself to him or does she intend to give best actor Shi to him? ]

——[younger brother: only children make choices, I want all of them! ]

..

The live broadcast room was bustling with activity, and the number of viewers reached a record.

Someone had edited the video of Xiang Yi and Shu Xinglan’s battle and named it [Online Battle of contemporary sword cultivators ] . It instantly became popular, and it received over 100,000 likes in minutes!

In addition, Xiang Yi x Shu Xinglan and Shi Sui x Shu Xinglan’s interactive clips also quickly became popular..

There were two more pairs of heretics..

…

In the dojo.

Shu Xinglan said embarrassedly, “There’s no need. I’m not as good as them…”

“How can you do that? You have to compensate me.”

Shu Xinglan pursed his lips. “If Miss Xiang really wants to compensate me, then…”

Someone shouted, “Compensate me with a husband!”

The crowd instantly burst into laughter.

Shu Xinglan’s face instantly turned red. He waved his hands repeatedly. “No, no, no!”

chapters.title: Chapter 721: He’S Mine
chapters.body:
Chapter 721: He’S Mine

Someone continued to jeer, “Xiang Yi, give best actor Shi to him!”

“…”

With a taut face, Xiang Yi grabbed Shi Sui’s hand and said fiercely, “No way, he’s mine.”

The little girl’s serious look was especially cute. In an instant, she killed countless older sisters and mothers.

——[Kawaii! My daughter is too kawaii! ]

——[Wow, you’ve declared your sovereignty! Today, it’s Xiang Yi who’s overbearing! ]

——[is it fashionable to lure dogs in and kill them? ? If I’m guilty, the law will punish me, not make me eat dog food here! ! ]

…

Shu Xinglan’s ears were slightly red. “I don’t want anything else. I want… Miss Xiang’s promise.”

“Eh?” Xiang Yi was stunned.

Shu Xinglan said, “I want Miss Xiang to promise me that she will compete with me again in the future!” His eyes were full of expectation as he bowed deeply to Xiang Yi. “Please!”

Xiang Yi: “…”

‘This child’s habit of bowing so often has to be changed.’

“Sure, you can compete with me as many times as you want,”the girl said nicely. “As long as I’m free, I’ll accompany you.”

As if he had won five million lottery tickets, Shu Xinglan was very excited.

At this time, a discordant voice sounded, “How long do you plan to stay here with me?”

This discontented voice came from Master Yan.

He felt that Xiang Yi and Shu Xinglan had stolen all of his limelight!

Shu Xinglan was thin-skinned, so he bowed and said, “Sorry to disturb you.”

On the other hand, Xiang Yi called for her uncle and the others and left.

“They finally left!” Master Yan complained, “They have seriously affected our class schedule. Alright, everyone, pack up. I’m going to start today’s teaching…”

The person-in-charge of FilmFeather’s live broadcast almost vomited three liters of blood, splashing it all over the place!

When Xiang Yi and the others were here, there was still traffic in the live broadcast room. Now that they had left, the traffic plummeted. In less than two minutes, the data could no longer be seen!

Was this Master Yan a fool?

Who wanted to watch him in class!

What everyone wanted to see was Xiang Yi and Shi Sui!

However, it was too late.

After Xiang Yi and Shi Sui left, the traffic in the streaming room became lower and lower.

Most of Master Yan’s disciples did not cooperate with him as usual.

On the contrary, they looked at each other and exchanged glances.

After a while, people in the crowd said one after another, “Well, I remember that I have to pick up the children. I’m leaving now!”

“Right, I heard that it’s going to rain today. I have to go back and collect my quilt!”

“Aiya, my stomach is not feeling well. Excuse me, I need to go to the washroom…”

“…”

In the blink of an eye, at least half of the people had left!

Master Yan’s expression changed drastically. He was merely trying to maintain his composure, he pretended to be profound and said, “Some people left not because I didn’t want them to stay, but because they were pursuing the wrong thing! I believe that those who stayed behind truly want to learn the inheritance of our Yan sect…”

“If you don’t want to learn, can you refund the fees?”A careless disciple asked.

Master Yan glared at him. “Are you going to betray the sect? !”

“I’m not learning anymore. So what if I want my tuition back?”retorted the disciple.

Someone immediately responded:

“Yes, yes, yes, get a refund!”

“Hurry up and get a refund, or else I’ll call the Consumer Association.”

“You can teach whoever you want. Anyway, I don’t want to learn from you anymore!”

“…”

Master Yan’s vision went dark, and he almost fainted on the spot!

He was filled with guilt and regret!

If he could do it all over again, he would never go looking for trouble!

…

At the same time, outside the dojo.

chapters.title: Chapter 722: She Knows How To Cook A Little
chapters.body:
Chapter 722: She Knows How To Cook A Little

Taking into account the large number of people, Xiang Feng arranged for a…

Bus.

The Daoist priests got on the bus.

The onlookers were amazed and took out their phones to take photos.

Xiang Yi was really something! She could actually invite so many priests to come and help her!

Little did they know… It wasn’t appropriate to invite them at all. It was the priests who came on their own initiative!

…

Private restaurant.

The manager of this restaurant and meetup were childhood friends. Today, they had specially cleared the area just to receive a group of people who had met.

The weather was just right, so everyone simply sat in the courtyard.

They lit up the lanterns. The light was dim, the breeze blew, and the fragrance of lotus slowly wafted through the air. It was a different kind of feeling.

The audience watched the livestream, and it was also a kind of enjoyment. It was as if the pace of life had suddenly slowed down.

Xiang Yi discussed talisman seals with the various Taoist priests.

Due to the thin spiritual energy, talisman seals no longer had much of an effect. More importantly, they existed as a kind of cultural symbol.

Apart from discussing, there was no way to avoid painting on the spot.

When they met and looked at the little niece who was like the moon surrounded by the stars, they happily discussed with Shi Sui beside them, “Look at Little Xiang Yi. Doesn’t it look like she was dragged to perform in front of the elders during the New Year and forced to open for business?”

Thinking of the past, the corners of Shi Sui’s mouth curled up slightly.

He remembered that one year, when the little girl was paying her new year greetings, she had two small tufts tied to her fingers. She looked so soft and meek as if she was singing to the elders.

She was very cute.

In the crowd, exclamations could be heard from time to time.

“Wonderful! Wonderful!”

“Little Xiang Yi can actually draw so many talismans in one go. She’s really amazing!”

“Sigh! I suddenly realized that what I lack is not only a hand, but also a brain! !”

“…”

On the other side.

Shi Yu and Shu Xinglan were sitting side by side, eating milk candies in their mouths.

Shu Xinglan looked at Xiang Yi from afar with adoration in his eyes. He sighed softly, “Miss Xiang Yi is so amazing…”

Shi Yu said coldly, “She has a boyfriend.”

Shu Xinglan:”… It’s not like I want her to be my girlfriend.”

Shi Yu chewed on some candy and said expressionlessly, “My uncle also has a girlfriend.”

Shu Xinglan: ? ? ?

Little Friend, did you misunderstand something? !

Swords were his wife!

“I have many, many swords!”Taking advantage of the fact that there was no one around, Shu Xinglan straightened his chest and showed Shi Yu the pictures of the swords. He showed them off in a childish manner. “This is my first wife, second wife, and second wife…”

Shi Yu:”… brother, you’re such a Playboy.”

Shu Xinglan corrected him. “This isn’t called a playboy, it’s called a playboy if you have many girlfriends!”

Shi Yu: “Then you can have a girlfriend.”

Shu Xinglan said seriously, “No, women will affect the speed at which I draw my swords!”

..

The conversation between the big and the small was completely recorded by the camera.

In the livestream room, everyone was amused by Shu Xinglan’s statement:

——[hahaha, so his wife is a sword! ]

——[let the two younger brothers continue chatting! I don’t think they’ll be annoyed for a day! ]

——[God damn, this woman will affect the speed at whIch i draw my sword. Boy, you’re destined to be alone like this. ]

…

At this moment, the store manager came over and apologized, “I’m sorry, there are two chefs on break today. In addition, we have a little too many guests. The kitchen is too busy, so the dishes may be served slowly…”

“Are you short of chefs?”His voice was as soft as an angel’s voice.

The store manager replied without thinking, “Of course I’m short! But this is not something that can be found easily…”

“I just happen to know how to cook.”

The store manager turned his head and looked at Xiang Yi. He did not watch the livestream, so he was extremely surprised. “Miss Xiang Yi actually knows how to cook?”

chapters.title: Chapter 723: Fried Chicken With Coke (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 723: Fried Chicken With Coke (1)

He had heard a little about the Xiang family’s tradition of pampering their daughter.

Shouldn’t a little girl who was pampered to bits, not touch any household chores?

Xiang Yi smiled. “It’s my hobby, so I spent some time studying it.”

The comments of the livestream were neat and orderly:

——[Nothing, Xiang Yi only knows a ton! ! ! ]

The manager said carefully, “Then… may I trouble you, Miss Xiang?”

He looked at their meeting, afraid that his good friend would disagree, but unexpectedly, their eyes were sparkling. “Little Xiang Yi! I want fried chicken!”

The manager:”…”could it be that the rumors were false?

“Okay.”The little girl was very polite. She greeted priest Ren and the others before going to the kitchen.

..

In the kitchen.

The head chef was giving instructions to the chefs under him. Due to the lack of manpower, the kitchen was in a bit of a mess.

At first glance, she had come in and heard that she was going to cook. The head chef’s anger immediately flared up. However, due to the livestream, he couldn’t flare up.

“Miss Xiang, right? I’m sorry. Our kitchen is very greasy. Don’t get your clothes dirty.”He smiled falsely. “Please wait outside. The cold dishes will be served soon!”

“I don’t think you guys can handle it,”Xiang Yi said gently. “Is there anything I can do to help? I can cut vegetables and stir-fry them.”

The head chef was extremely disdainful. This female celebrity probably only knew how to cook tomatoes and scrambled eggs, but she insisted on showing off in the livestream!

His kitchen was not important for this kind of person to gain fame!

When he spoke again, the head chef’s tone could not help but be a little sarcastic. “We don’t have enough people. At most, the dishes will be served slowly. But if Miss Xiang cuts your hand here and Burns your face, our kitchen can’t bear this responsibility!”

Xiang Yi blinked. She was not someone who did not understand the ways of the world. On the contrary, she had seen countless people of all shapes and sizes in the quick travel world.

It was just that she was usually too lazy to socialize.

Sensing the other party’s resistance, Xiang Yi did not intend to convince him. Her deer-like eyes turned around and landed on an empty area.

“May I borrow the kitchen utensils over there?”

She was referring to the workbench of the two chefs who had asked for leave. It had a stove, a pot, and a steam oven.

The head chef said impatiently, “Since Miss Xiang insists, then I have nothing to say. You can use the ingredients and seasonings as you wish. I only hope that you will pay attention to your safety and that there won’t be any accidents in the kitchen.”

Xiang Yi nodded calmly and walked to the workbench to familiarize herself with the kitchen utensils.

The head chef looked over and saw her shaking the pot and the ladle. He complained in a low voice, “Pretentious…”

Ignoring everything else, the few pots weighed one to three kilograms, and the largest one weighed more than five kilograms!

This was only the weight of the empty pots!

After adding ingredients, the mass of the pot would increase. Moreover, there were also techniques involving throwing pots, which were usually done with one hand!

However, normal people were used to using their left hand.

Ordinary people would feel their wrists getting sore just by picking it up, not to mention tossing it frequently.

For a delicate and weak little girl like her, with that delicate arm, if she were to toss it into the pot, wouldn’t her hand break?

Hehe.

The head chef lowered his head and busied himself with the dishes. After finally finishing the cold dish, he ordered the kitchen staff to serve the dishes, and he inadvertently glanced at Xiang Yi.

In an instant, he was dumbfounded.

He couldn’t figure out why that little girl tossed the ladle so easily and casually.

Moreover, she used the biggest and heaviest pot! !

chapters.title: Chapter 724: Fried Chicken With Cola (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 724: Fried Chicken With Cola (2)

The head chef wasn’t the only one who was dumbfounded,

The others were dumbstruck too!

Oh my God, this little girl is too strong!

Moreover, why did she make several dishes in the blink of an eye?!

Why did it feel like..

Her efficiency alone was even higher than all of them put together..

The head chef’s expression changed, and his mood fluctuated.

He was originally the sous-chef of a five-star hotel, but he was poached by the manager of this private restaurant. The benefits were all quite good.

As time passed, he couldn’t help but feel a little lazy.

For example, his cooking speed had decreased a lot. Fortunately, the private restaurant usually didn’t have a large flow of people, so it wasn’t obvious.

Now that there was a suitable comparison, it seemed that he…was too slow.

The audience watching the live broadcast also noticed.

—— [“Holy shit! is Xiang Yi an octopus? Her hand speed is amazing!”]

—— [Her coordination sense is really strong. Oh my God, if I had her brain, would I still fail in Math?]

—— [Well, do you guys think that the other chefs are so slow in cooking? Xiang Yi has already cooked a few dishes, but they’re still making cold dishes there?]

——[I didn’t notice it if you didn’t mention it, but now that you mention it, it’s really… Emmmm, a few people aren’t as fast as a person. ]

…

In order to regain his position in front of everyone, the head chef said with a cold face, “You two, chop the blocks faster! Don’t dawdle!”

He urged them, but still… he didn’t forget to say, “Don’t blindly pursue speed. After all, this is a high-end private restaurant. The dishes must be exquisite. The customers will be very disappointed if the dishes are cooked to the standard of a big pot…”

The head chef was very confident in his seasoning and presentation skills. After all, he had been eating this bowl of rice for decades. He still had some real skills.

However…when the two chefs came over to serve the dishes, they each served one of his cold dishes and a suitable cold dish.

Coincidentally, the two of them made a cold mixed vegetable dish. The dishes they chose were similar as well. They all had bean skins, carrots, potatoes, cucumbers, golden needle mushrooms, lotus roots and other ingredients.

The chef’s plate was arranged in a circle. Each dish took up a spot, and the radishes were carved with flowers as decoration.

Although it was exquisite, it was slightly rustic.

The suitable plate was made into a taiji pattern. The lowest layer of ingredients was shredded, and the top ingredients were diced. Peanuts and sesame seeds were sprinkled to decorate it.

It was simple, but it was ingenious. For some reason, it looked better than the chef’s plate!

“This little girl looks pretty good…”

“Yeah, the color combination is really good. It’s so harmonious!”

“…”

Everyone had a wonderful mentality, and the chefs were no exception. They could not help but praise the match.

This praise angered the head chef instead.

“What do you know! Do you work with your hands or your mouth? Hurry up and cook!!”

Everyone immediately fell silent.

However, when the head chef had just made the third hot dish, Xiang Yi… had already made the sixth dish.

Moreover, she had also made some soy milk boxes and pudding and put them in the refrigerator for dessert.

Xiang Yi calculated that the dishes served were enough to last for a while. Therefore, she poured a pot of oil and started to make fried chicken.

When she first started to make cold dishes, the chicken had already been marinated. Flour, starch, egg liquid, honey, and other ingredients were mixed well. She threw the tender and juicy chicken inside, rolled it around, and soaked it in the oil..

The unique sizzling sound of fried food was transmitted to everyone’s electronic devices through the top-notch radio equipment!

chapters.title: Chapter 725 - Fried Chicken With Coke (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 725 - Fried Chicken With Coke (3)

The audience was going crazy.

——[Ah ah ah, swallowing saliva crazily]

——[Poisoning in the middle of the night! I was going to lose weight, but I’ve already clicked on the food delivery app…]

——[I’m different from you guys. In addition to fried chicken, I also ordered grilled shrimp cocktail and milk tea!]

…

At this juncture, the first batch of fried chicken was almost ready.

Xiang Yi scooped out the fried chicken with a colander. Its skin was crisp and light yellow. The camera zoomed in on it and could even clearly see the oil dripping down..

Everyone: ! ! !

This wasn’t a variety show, it was a gourmet variety show!

After the fried chicken was dried, Xiang Yi fried it a second time. This time, the color turned into an appetizing golden yellow and its skin became scaly. It looked even more delicious than the ones bought at fast food restaurants!

The large pot that was suitable for use was fried a lot at once, and people directly carried it out.

…

In the courtyard.

Perhaps it was a coincidence, Shu Xinglan and Daoist Ren sat together.

The two of them chatted for a while about swordsmanship, and they could be considered kindred spirits.

Shu Xinglan clutched his second “wife”, the spare sword other than the broken sword, and said seriously, “In this world, nothing is more important than my sword!”

The audience of the livestream automatically translated his words into: “In this world, nothing is more important than my wife!”

Then…the fried chicken was served.

The overbearing aroma instantly silenced the noisy courtyard!

Even the priests, who usually had little appetite, suddenly felt a little hungry at this moment…

When they met, they laughed maniacally. “Our little rabbit is so obedient!”

He picked up a large drumstick and handed it to Shi Yu as per the photographer’s habit of spoiling his kids.

The little boy received it and was flattered. He stared at it in a daze for quite a while.

He took a whiff of it greedily.

It smelled so good..

Another drumstick, when they met… he put it into the rice bowl in front of him!

He was full of a rice bowl spirit!

A life without a bowl of dry rice would have no soul!

Daoist Ren chuckled and took out his own pot.

The two of them looked at each other and immediately had a feeling of a hero cherishing a hero, and a feeling of pity!

——[Hehe, old friend is steady! He’s on par with our third brother!]

——[Ah, so there are people in this world who share the same thoughts as this poor priest! I am not alone in this path..]

On the other hand, Shu Xinglan’s hand that was holding the sword could not help but tremble slightly..

Damn, damn it!

Why would Miss Xiang’s fried chicken be so..

It was a crime!

Especially since their table mates had already begun to feast on their food, a certain tyrant had no image at all. His mouth was extremely wide open, and with a single bite, half of the drumstick was gone.

“Kacha.”

Under the crispy outer skin was soft and juicy chicken flesh. The two combined to form a simple happiness.

Appropriately, they also used the kitchen’s condiments to prepare several kinds of sauces, such as tomato sauce, honey mustard sauce, sweet and sour sauce, garlic sauce, and so on, to meet everyone’s needs to the greatest extent.

The hot fried chicken was dipped in a full sauce, and the taste was really wonderful!

Even if it was junk food, he could accept it!

How could delicious junk food be called junk food?!

It was called happiness!!!

Shu Xinglan desperately used all his self-control to resist the temptation of the fried chicken. However, the iced cola that was served appropriately became the last straw that broke the camel’s back..

“Ah Ah Ah Ah!” The youth couldn’t hold it in any longer. His hand unconsciously let go of the sword and grabbed a chicken wing! “Awoo!”

chapters.title: Chapter 726 - Fried Chicken With Coke (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 726 - Fried Chicken With Coke (4)

The young man’s sword fell to the ground.

The people at the same table looked at him in surprise. This kid… didn’t he just say that the sword was the most important thing?

Shu Xinglan’s five senses were all focused on the fried chicken…

The gaze in the young man’s eyes turned from shock to absent-mindedness…

Crisp skin, tender meat, hot fried chicken with ice-cold coke. It was so delicious that it made people want to swallow their tongues!

In this world, there was actually something more blissful than… collecting wives!

Shu Xinglan felt as if a mysterious door had opened in front of him..

The netizens also saw the process of him “smelling so good” and smiled at him.

——[The young boy performed vividly for us. What is the meaning of going from resistance to surrender?]

——[Shu Xinglan: I didn’t want to eat and drink too much either. She gave me too much…]

[He threw his sword, which is like his wife, away just like that. Are all sword cultivators so casual?]

[What? This is simply abandoning my wife and child! Sigh, is it the distortion of human nature or the degeneration of morality?]

…

The lights were gentle and the courtyard was filled with fragrance.

The green stone slabs in the courtyard were as empty as a puddle of water. Occasionally, a breeze would blow over and blow a few petals of flowers off the trees. Even if they fell into the vegetables, it would not be a downer.

Xiang Yi sipped her coke. She sneakily picked up some ice cubes with a clip, but her wrist was grabbed by a pair of warm hands.

“Your period is coming soon, right?” Shi Sui leaned against the back of the chair and bent her long legs lazily. “Didn’t you say that ice is cold so we should eat less of it?”

Xiang Yi felt a little guilty, but she still refused to admit it. “Chili is heaty. I’ll eat more chili to neutralize it later.”

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows. “Oh?”

He did not say anything more and just stared at Xiang Yi with a faint smile. His entire silhouette was warmed by the light, but it could not hide his sharp aura.

“…”

The ice melted slightly and a few drops of water dripped into the small bucket.

‘Sigh, this is the trouble of being in love, right?’ Xiang Yi thought to herself.

She felt that there was one more person who cared about her…

The little girl reluctantly let go of her hand.

“I’ll drink room temperature,” she whispered, her voice a little muffled.

Shi Sui rubbed her little head, raised his hand to turn off the mic, leaned over to the girl’s ear, and whispered a few words.

There was dense steam around the girl’s snowy fair neck, and his thin lips were almost pressed against the girl’s reddened collarbone..

This scene was enough to make the fans of the UntimelyCouple go crazy.

——[I announce that they have already consummated their marriage!]

——[it’s born! It’s a big fat boy!]

——[Bullsh * t, I’m at the scene, she’s obviously a cute little girl!]

——[? ? ? Help, the fans have turned into sand sculptures, and it’s showing signs of being contagious!]

…

No one knew what Shi Sui said, but the redness on Xiang Yi’s collarbone spread to the tip of the ear.

He needed to keep some distance between them.

The young girl pinched her ears lightly with her fair and soft fingertips.

… It was so hot.

Shi Sui’s words kept circulating in his brain. He felt that it was quite sweet, but then again…

… He was so shy.

The middle-aged man next door suddenly said mysteriously, “Everyone, do you know what will appear on your face if you eat fried food often?”

Perhaps he was too serious, the people at the table subconsciously became serious as well.

“Pimples?”

“Shut up?”

“Blisters due to heatiness??”

“…”

Even the audience in the live broadcast room curiously joined in the guessing game.

All of their curiosity was piqued.

Xiang Feng let out a wave of cheerful goose-like laughter. “Of course it’s a smile, hahaha…”

Everyone:”…”

It didn’t seem like there was anything wrong with it?

chapters.title: Chapter 727: Do Whatever You Want
chapters.body:
Chapter 727: Do Whatever You Want

…

Today’s live broadcast ended in a wave of cheers and laughter.

All the Daoist Priests had fulfilled their wishes. After eating, one after another, they bid farewell to Xiang Yi.

Before leaving, Daoist Priest Ren had even specially dragged Xiang Yi into their group.

Dozens of additional messages suddenly appeared on Xiang Yi’s phone, and she agreed to them one by one.

The phone buzzed for a long time before it returned to silence.

She rubbed her sore eyes.

After treatment, her nearsightedness had recovered somewhat, but after looking at electronic products for a long time, she still felt sore.

“Don’t rub.” Shi Sui held her hand and pulled her into his embrace. He gently pressed his fingertips on the little girl’s temple.

Xiang Yi closed her eyes and couldn’t help but moan comfortably.

A certain best actor obviously paused in his actions, and after a moment, he returned to his normal frequency.

…

Next to him.

Shu Xinglan was still eating fried chicken. He had eaten so much that his stomach was full.

Shi Yu looked at Shi Sui with curiosity. The way the two of them got along was a little strange to him..

His parents… didn’t have a good relationship..

“Shi Yu, don’t be a child who always watches others show off their affection.” When they met, he patted Shi Yu on the shoulder and said in an experienced tone, “Otherwise, you’ll only be single when you grow up!”

Shi Yu was innocent and innocent. “Grandpa, why don’t you find a wife?”

When they met, they sighed. “You don’t understand. I clearly wanted to find one, but every time I see a girl, I don’t want to socialize anymore.”

Wanting someone to accompany them and wanting to be alone at the same time, these were the worries of the current generation of adults.

Shi Yu said, “Grandpa, have you ever thought that you’re being too narrow-minded? Why do you have to have demands on your gender?”

Xiang Feng was confused.

Children tend to shoot from the hip…

Shi Yu continued, “It’s also possible that other people have requirements, but Grandpa, you didn’t fulfill them.”

Shu Xinglan gnawed on the chicken wings, his cheeks puffing up. “Little brother, what you said makes a lot of sense.”

Xiang Feng: ? ? ? ?

Were all the little brats nowadays speaking in such a heart-wrenching manner?

The knife is stabbing into his heart!

Believe it or not, I’ll whip your butts! !

Xiang Feng angrily began to roll up his sleeves, but seeing the muscle lines of Shu Xinglan’s forearm…

Thin as he was, he was obviously strong…

Xiang Feng silently pulled back his sleeves.

Don’t misunderstand, he wasn’t a coward! ! He was doing what he wanted, letting nature take its course, understand? !

…

The program team had a meeting, and after the meeting, Li Jianyu grabbed a small notebook and went to the courtyard. He briefly told Shi Sui and Xiang Yi about the guests for this weekend.

“We fought hard to invite those two big shots this time. One of them is a legendary singer, and the other is an international voice actor. “But there are rumors of discord between the two of them. This live broadcast might not be easy, so it’ll be hard on Xiang Yi and Shi Sui.”

The two of them expressed their understanding.

After chatting about the program flow, Li Jianyu looked at Xiang Feng.

After all, Xiang Feng was the big boss of Starry Livestream, and he was also the biggest sponsor of “Two Under One Roof” Li Jianyu felt that it was necessary to suck up to him.

“President, do you have any objections?”

Xiang Feng wiped his mouth and revealed a devilish smile that was the standard of a domineering CEO:

“Do you have enough money to spend?”

Li Jianyu said, “Yes, yes. With Xiang Yi, we can save quite a bit of budget…”

“Save what! Spend it! Don’t come to me if you can’t spend it all!”

Li Jianyu: … ! !

Hur, using money to insult him?

So what!

The next second…

His loud and cheerful voice rang out in the courtyard. “Alright, thank you, Daddy! ! ! !”

chapters.title: Chapter 728: Ling Ye’S Return 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 728: Ling Ye’S Return 1

…

The crowd couldn’t help but laugh when they saw Li Jianyu acting like a lackey.

The program team of “Two Under One Roof” basically comprised of young people. The atmosphere had always been good, and they had a strong, unshakable core cohesiveness..

Xiang Yi’s delicious food!

Other variety programs had a huge turnover of staff, but the program team of “Two Under One Roof”had almost no job hoppers. No one could poach them..

Other variety shows were also speechless. We’ve already offered such a high price! You guys should at least be tempted!

How could the food Xiang Yi cooked be so delicious? !

…

Everyone got on the car and rushed to Little Rabbits Farm.

The moment Xiang Yi got on the car, a familiar notification sounded in her mind.

“Ding –”

The young girl raised her eyebrows and discreetly communicated with the system in her sea of consciousness.

The small system had probably held back for too many days. Finally, it could not hold back anymore and issued a mission to Xiang Yi. “Host, please conquer the male protagonist as soon as possible! Not only do you want his heart, but you also want his body!”

Due to the restrictions of the rules, after Xiang Yi turned on the screen mode, it could not speak unless it issued a mission.

Although… although that person had told it not to communicate too much with Xiang Yi, it was really bored!

Xiang Yi was speechless.

She was becoming more and more suspicious that this system was not very serious.

In fact, she already had a guess in her heart. Xiang Yi felt that she was infinitely close to the truth.

She lowered her raven-black eyelashes and asked, “If I can’t complete it, will I be wiped out like Ling Ye?”

The soul, which was also the consciousness, would completely disappear.

This was the cruelest punishment.

The little system felt a little guilty. Could she have discovered something?

The words that came out of her mouth were very official. “Host, please treat the strategy mission seriously and don’t slack off.”

She leaned back in the back seat and said slowly, “What should I do? I don’t think I can do it.”

The little system subconsciously said, “How can that be? According to the test, the male protagonist’s favorability toward you has reached 100%! Not to mention getting his body, he wouldn’t even hesitate to cut his heart out for you!!”

“Sigh… you don’t understand…” The girl’s tone was low and she said, “I just can’t get over that hurdle in my heart. Perhaps, his misogyny has infected me…”

What? The host has misogyny? ?

The little system couldn’t understand. How could Xiang Yi get such a disease? However, it was just a data flow program after all. Even though it had artificial intelligence..

But, after all, it was not a real person.

If it was Xiang Yi, it would believe her.

“Then, how about I go to the main system to discuss it and give you a new mission?”The little system coughed, “Just focus on your career and work hard to become the most popular female celebrity. Well, this will be a side mission!”

It thought that it had thought of the most logical and perfect solution, but it was instantly caught by Xiang Yi’s loophole.

“Is it you? Or… is it you guys?” The young girl’s question, at first, sounded like it did not have a clue, but it immediately shocked the little system!

If it had a physical body, its hair would have stood on end by now!

The little system was silent for a long time, trying to play dead.

Xiang Yi asked, “It’s okay if it’s inconvenient to say. I just want to ask, is he… is he okay?”

Sobs…

Goddess Xiang Yi is so smart! As expected of the gold medal support boss who had completed all the transmigration missions!

It said weakly, “He just… changed his form of existence.”

Although it did not give a clear answer, the girl’s eyebrows still curved up.

“That’s really, really great.”

chapters.title: Chapter 729: Ling Ye’S Return (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 729: Ling Ye’S Return (2)

Hearing this, the little system felt sour again — even though it didn’t have a nose.

Sob… Sob… Sob…

Goddess Xiang Yi was really so gentle!

It felt extremely horrible for actually participating in the plan and lying to her all along..

The little system rolled around in a sea of numbers, Ahhhh, should it apologize to Goddess Xiang Yi?

She was such a good person, she would forgive herself… right?

…

At the manor.

Shu Xinglan’s face was also red as he followed them.

The youth said that he wanted to learn swordsmanship from Xiang Yi, but… he understood everything.

It was just that he didn’t expose him for the sake of the Shu family.

When they met, he brought Shi Yu and him to the hot spring at the Little Rabbit Farm to take a bath.

Shi Sui went back to his room to take a bath.

As for Xiang Yi, she had already changed into comfortable home clothes, turned on the television, and casually played a variety show. Then, she hugged the hatchet and rubbed her hands with Xiaoxi.

The television suddenly sizzled, and black and white snowflakes appeared. Then, Xiang Yi felt that someone in her sea of consciousness was contacting her.

She closed her eyes, allowing her thoughts to become more focused. At the same time, she allowed herself to enter a state of sleep.

In the familiar space, she saw a familiar figure.

A pale and exquisite, angel-like beautiful youth.

Ling Ye.

Someone she knew when she was about to wear it.

Previously, he had occupied the body of “Ling Ye” in this plane to assist Qin Wanyan in her mission, but he had suddenly disappeared.

At one point, Xiang Yi thought that he had been erased by the system.

But later, she felt that something was wrong.

Xiang Yi tried several times, but the new system that she had bound to gave her too much freedom.

It didn’t seem like she wanted her to complete the mission as soon as possible, but more like… more like she would never be able to complete the mission.

Then, she thought about what Ling Ye had done previously…

Her guess was that this system had a certain relationship with Ling Ye.

She didn’t expect Ling Ye to take the initiative to look for her.

Their gazes met gently in the air.

The little system was as quiet as a chicken, not daring to speak.

After a long silence, Ling Ye was the first to speak, “Long time no see, Sister.”

Xiang Yi replied calmly, “Long time no see.”

Ling Ye looked a little helpless, “I knew it, you would guess it…”

However, he also knew that this trick would work on others, but on his sister, it would definitely be seen through.

It was only a matter of time.

He asked in a gentle voice, “Are you alright?”

The youth’s Adam’s apple bobbed.

Probably only… his sister would care about him.

“Yeah, I’m fine.”Ling Ye smiled. “Sister, I lied to you. How are you going to punish me?”

“I think you should have your own reason.”

“Sister, aren’t you going to ask what it is?”

“Your matter has nothing to do with me.”

“So cold…” the youth shrugged, “Looks like I’ve overestimated myself. Sister Xiang Yi really won’t take me to heart.”

After scheming so much, there was actually a part of him that wanted to show off to Xiang Yi.

It would also give rise to a mentality like: [See, I’ve gotten rid of the main system. Big Sister, am I powerful?]

However, in the end, Xiang Yi didn’t care about this so-called “system” at all.

Xiang Yi looked at him. “Will you… be discovered?”

Ling Ye’s dim eyes suddenly lit up. “Sister, are you worried about me?”

Xiang Yi said helplessly, “At least we’ve known each other for a while. I don’t want to see you get killed.”

Ling Ye said confidently, “I won’t.” He emphasized, “Absolutely not.”

He walked towards Xiang Yi. His appearance changed bit by bit, and in the end, he became a youth with black hair and teary eyes. He looked somewhat similar to Ling Ye, but he was even more dazzling and arrogant.

chapters.title: Chapter 730: A Loophole
chapters.body:
Chapter 730: A Loophole

Soon enough, Xiang Yi understood what the little system meant by “Changing into a different form of existence.”

Ling Ye raised his hand, and what was supposed to be an ethereal soul-like forearm turned into…

A piece of data formed by numbers.

Xiang Yi’s expression changed slightly.

“Even though you have guessed it, I still want to tell you how amazing I am now.” Ling Ye had the temperament of a child, showing off his toys to someone close to him, “That’s right, I’ve become a piece of data, or rather, a program.”

Every wish of the transmigration system was to turn from a program to a physical entity.

However, Ling Ye… did the opposite.

They wanted to turn from a physical body to data.

It was appropriate to not comment on his choice.

After all, she was not Ling Ye. She did not know what Ling Ye had experienced, what kind of environment he was in, and what kind of mood he was in.

“Why do I have to be stuck in the ‘human form’?”

Ling Ye’s body kept changing. In this space, he had absolute laws. His arms were moving like that of characters of a sci-fi movie, turning into the body of a furry animal, the cold and hard shell of a mecha, and some kind of liquid that shone with the luster of the stars..

“The current me has the ‘Power of God’. I can exist in any internet in millions of planes.” The corners of Ling Ye’s mouth curled up into a frivolous smile, “Even the main system can’t kill me.”

Xiang Yi was amazed.

She actually had such an idea, and it really came true.

“You’re very powerful. You’re a genius,” Xiang Yi commented.

Ling Ye was not satisfied that she only had a few words. She tilted her head as if she was acting coquettishly, and her eyes had a beautiful arc. “Sister, if you want, I can help you…”

“Thank you, that’s not necessary.” Xiang Yi was not moved by her words. “I feel that the current situation is very good.”

She had a family and a lover. She lived a peaceful and stable life.

Ling Ye’s smile disappeared as he carefully sized up Xiang Yi.

The young girl’s expression was candid and magnanimous. There was no pretense.

Ling Ye mocked himself. His sister had a choice, but he did not have a choice.

“It’s alright, I’m not interested now, so I won’t bring it up. When you change your mind, you can contact me anytime.”

Xiang Yi thought of another question. “That mission… is it related to the main system? Or did you just randomly release it?”

Ling Ye blinked mischievously. “Sister, do you think that I would hand you over to another man?”

“… are you the legendary human oil?”

Ling Ye, who had been despised, gritted his teeth and lowered his head in frustration.

He had originally thought that researching a romance novel would be useful.

Unexpectedly, it backfired.

He said weakly, “I didn’t do it. It was indeed released by the main system.

“But… it doesn’t matter whether you finish it or not. The plane you’re in now is equivalent to a single-player game instead of an online game because I’m stuck in a loophole… So the main system won’t notice that we’re offline…”

I see.

But she still had one more question.

“Is my world really a book?”

“That depends on what you think. To you, this is your world, and to others, this is a book. There’s no conflict between the two.”

Xiang Yi was deep in thought. After a moment, she said calmly, “Go surf. I’m leaving. Bye.”

She ended the dream and opened her eyes.

At a glance, she saw a man in a black bathrobe looking at her with a faint smile. COMMENT 0 comment VOTE SEND GIFT

The warm light flowed like water and poured down.

Xiang Yi’s heart skipped a beat and she forced herself to remain calm. “Are you done washing up?”

The moment she said this, she regretted it.

Why does it feel… weird..

Shi Sui’s elbow was resting on the cushion of the sofa. He took off his spectacles. His peach-blossom-shaped eyes were darker than the night sky outside the window. He stared at his little rabbit without blinking. “Mm.”

Xiang Yi felt a little embarrassed because of the way he was staring at her. She picked up Xiao Naofu and stood between the two of them, as if she felt safe.

Xiao Naofu’s ice-blue eyes were wide open.

“Meow Meow Meow?”

‘Am I a tool!?’

Shi Sui raised his hand and scratched Xiao Naofu’s chin twice. Xiao Naofu was rejecting him in his heart, but…

The dog of a man was stroking him too comfortably!

The strokes were light then heavy, deep then shallow, fast then slow..

That’s all there is to it!

Not long after,Xiao Naofu softened and laid in Shi Sui’s arms, whining coquettishly. “Meow ~ Meow ~”

Shi Sui was speechless.

“Have you fallen asleep just now?”Shi Sui was multitasking and naturally found a topic of conversation.

“Yes.” Xiang Yi nodded. “Ahem, did you forget to fix your collar? Let me help you pull it.”

Shi Sui was wearing a black silk bathrobe. It was loose-fitting, but his belt was loosely tied, which led to…

The collar was half open, from his collarbone to his chest, revealing his cold and white skin.

Xiang Yi was like a worried motherly fan. She raised her hand to fix Shi Sui’s collar, afraid that his skin would be exposed.

However, her slender wrist was held by the man’s large hand, and the heat was constantly transmitted to her.

Shi Sui chuckled. “How do you know whether I forgot or did it on purpose?”

“Eh?”

Xiang Yi was stunned for a few seconds before she gradually came to her senses. Her face instantly burned up…

Did her boyfriend mean that he did it on purpose… to show her?

Looking at the little girl’s blushing face and the smoke coming out from the top of her head, Shi Sui lowered his voice as if he was bewitching her like a monster, but also as if he was purely discussing scientific knowledge.

“Do you want to know what it feels like to touch your abs?”

Boom —

To Xiang Yi, this was simply beyond the limits of her shyness. She was like a cat that had its tail stepped on, shrinking to the other end of the sofa in a flash.

“No, I don’t want to!” She said. However, she did not mean what she said.

However, Shi sui even asked slowly, “You really don’t want to?”

“Hmm…”

Xiao Naofu was puzzled to see that the silly woman’s face was as red as a prawn.

‘Isn’t it just some abs? What’s the big deal!?!’

‘I will touch it for you!’

So…

The furry cat claws lifted Shi Sui’s bathrobe and pressed on the well-defined abs!

“Meow?”

Xiao Naofu poked them curiously. Eh, it was completely different from the stupid woman’s fragrant and soft body!

“Sister Xiang Yi, it’s said that pets follow their owners. You… are acting like a hoodlum,” Shi Sui said with a lazy smile.

Xiang Yi waved her hands repeatedly. “No, I’m not! Xiao Naofu! Let go of me quickly!” In a moment of desperation, she blurted out, “All of you!”

Shi Sui’s black eyes narrowed.

Xiao Naofu, on the other hand, became playful. First, it pretended to be obedient and moved its claws away, and then… it pressed down on its lower abdomen with curiosity!

… Meow?

Why were his paws a little hot?

“! ! !”

He picked up the blanket beside him and covered his head with it.

Shi Sui’s expression did not change. He picked up the kitten and slowly moved it in front of him.

“Do you want me to kiss you?”

Xiao Naofu’s legs were dangling crazily in the air. “Meow Meow Meow Meow Meow Meow!”

‘Don’t f**king come over! ! ! ! !’

chapters.title: Chapter 731: Don’T Come Over
chapters.body:
Chapter 731: Don’T Come Over

The warm light flowed like water and poured down.

Xiang Yi’s heart skipped a beat and she forced herself to remain calm. “Are you done washing up?”

The moment she said this, she regretted it.

Why does it feel… weird..

Shi Sui’s elbow was resting on the cushion of the sofa. He took off his spectacles. His peach-blossom-shaped eyes were darker than the night sky outside the window. He stared at his little rabbit without blinking. “Mm.”

Xiang Yi felt a little embarrassed because of the way he was staring at her. She picked up Xiao Naofu and stood between the two of them, as if she felt safe.

Xiao Naofu’s ice-blue eyes were wide open.

“Meow Meow Meow?”

‘Am I a tool!?’

Shi Sui raised his hand and scratched Xiao Naofu’s chin twice. Xiao Naofu was rejecting him in his heart, but…

The dog of a man was stroking him too comfortably!

The strokes were light then heavy, deep then shallow, fast then slow..

That’s all there is to it!

Not long after,Xiao Naofu softened and laid in Shi Sui’s arms, whining coquettishly. “Meow ~ Meow ~”

Shi Sui was speechless.

“Have you fallen asleep just now?”Shi Sui was multitasking and naturally found a topic of conversation.

“Yes.” Xiang Yi nodded. “Ahem, did you forget to fix your collar? Let me help you pull it.”

Shi Sui was wearing a black silk bathrobe. It was loose-fitting, but his belt was loosely tied, which led to…

The collar was half open, from his collarbone to his chest, revealing his cold and white skin.

Xiang Yi was like a worried motherly fan. She raised her hand to fix Shi Sui’s collar, afraid that his skin would be exposed.

However, her slender wrist was held by the man’s large hand, and the heat was constantly transmitted to her.

Shi Sui chuckled. “How do you know whether I forgot or did it on purpose?”

“Eh?”

Xiang Yi was stunned for a few seconds before she gradually came to her senses. Her face instantly burned up…

Did her boyfriend mean that he did it on purpose… to show her?

Looking at the little girl’s blushing face and the smoke coming out from the top of her head, Shi Sui lowered his voice as if he was bewitching her like a monster, but also as if he was purely discussing scientific knowledge.

“Do you want to know what it feels like to touch your abs?”

Boom —

To Xiang Yi, this was simply beyond the limits of her shyness. She was like a cat that had its tail stepped on, shrinking to the other end of the sofa in a flash.

“No, I don’t want to!” She said. However, she did not mean what she said.

However, Shi sui even asked slowly, “You really don’t want to?”

“Hmm…”

Xiao Naofu was puzzled to see that the silly woman’s face was as red as a prawn.

‘Isn’t it just some abs? What’s the big deal!?!’

‘I will touch it for you!’

So…

The furry cat claws lifted Shi Sui’s bathrobe and pressed on the well-defined abs!

“Meow?”

Xiao Naofu poked them curiously. Eh, it was completely different from the stupid woman’s fragrant and soft body!

“Sister Xiang Yi, it’s said that pets follow their owners. You… are acting like a hoodlum,” Shi Sui said with a lazy smile.

Xiang Yi waved her hands repeatedly. “No, I’m not! Xiao Naofu! Let go of me quickly!” In a moment of desperation, she blurted out, “All of you!”

Shi Sui’s black eyes narrowed.

Xiao Naofu, on the other hand, became playful. First, it pretended to be obedient and moved its claws away, and then… it pressed down on its lower abdomen with curiosity!

… Meow?

Why were his paws a little hot?

“! ! !”

He picked up the blanket beside him and covered his head with it.

Shi Sui’s expression did not change. He picked up the kitten and slowly moved it in front of him.

“Do you want me to kiss you?”

Xiao Naofu’s legs were dangling crazily in the air. “Meow Meow Meow Meow Meow Meow!”

‘Don’t f**king come over! ! ! ! !’

chapters.title: Chapter 732: I’M Scared, I’M Scared
chapters.body:
Chapter 732: I’M Scared, I’M Scared

Xiao Naofu resisted with all its might, but Shi Sui, the one who started it, looked lazy and playful.

A pair of dark eyes, light lips, smooth and clear jawline, and a perfect and noble face slowly approached…

Click.

It imprinted on Xiao Naofu’s forehead.

Xiao Naofu let out an indignant roar, “Woof Woof Woof Woof Woof Woof!”

— This tiger is dirty! This tiger is not clean anymore!!

After kissing the little kitten, Shi Sui loosened his grip on it. Xiao Naofu seemed to have received a huge blow, and it looked at Xiang Yi aggrievedly and barked twice.

Xiang Yi wanted to hug it, but the little kitten shook its ears, afraid that the dog of a man would take revenge on it again. Its short, fleshy legs clicked, and it disappeared without a trace.

Little Xiji barked a few times and chased after it anxiously. Not long after, the cat and the dog disappeared without a trace, and no one knew where they were hiding.

“…” Xiang Yi was confused. Did Xiao Naofu hate her?

Little did she know… Xiao Naofu was really afraid.

All the gifts of fate had been secretly priced.

Woof, woof, woof, this was the price of being touched by the dog man!

…

“Is it… angry with me?” Xiang Yi began to reflect on what she had done in the past few days.

Every day, she made delicious food for Xiao Naofu, provided it with snacks, played with it for an hour, and coaxed it to sleep at night, including telling stories, watching cartoons, listening to music, and so on.

Was she… not good enough?

“This kid has grown up and has its own little temper,”Shi Sui said lazily. He had unknowingly wrapped his arms around the girl’s slender waist, and with a little strength, she easily pulled the girl into her arms.

Shi Sui was hugging the slender young girl from behind.

Xiang Yi’s ears began to heat up again, but she did not push him away.

“It doesn’t seem that easy to raise a child…”

Not only did she have to pay attention to her diet, most importantly, she had to pay attention to her mood.

“Then don’t raise one.” Shi Sui’s voice came from beside her ear.

Xiang Yi turned her small face. “Don’t you like children?”

“I’ll only like children if they’re mothered by you.”

The sudden romantic words made Xiang Yi bite her lips. Then, she mustered up her courage and took the initiative to wrap her arms around Shi Sui’s neck. Her gentle voice trembled slightly, but she was very determined and brave.

“I like Shi Sui children too.”

Was this… a confession?

After Xiang Yi finished speaking, she couldn’t help but bury her face into Shi Sui’s collarbone. The soft flesh at the back of her neck was a mess of red.

Shi Sui patted her back and gently comforted her.

Xiang Yi adjusted her emotions, and soon, the girl returned to her usual calm and composed appearance.

I’m the boss of transmigration. With gold medal support, and just a few words of love, what’s the big deal?

The little girl comforted herself in her heart, and then she pulled a long face and said in extreme shock, “What you said tonight… let’s begin.”

In the small courtyard of that private restaurant, Shi Sui had mentioned it to her a few times.

That was…

The two of them watching a movie together and holding hands together the entire time!

In order not to be disturbed, an idea flashed through Xiang Yi’s mind. “Shall we go watch it in my room?”

There was a projector installed in her bedroom. After it was turned on, it could be projected onto the entire wall.

Shi Sui, who originally wanted to tease Xiang Yi rolled his Adam’s apple. “It’s not quite appropriate.”

“I see.” Xiang Yi hammered her forehead and said in annoyance, “What if I do something to you, then what should I do…”

Shi Sui was dumbfounded.

The air continued to heat up, creating a faint ambiguity.

The man’s low laughter was slightly hoarse, and it hit her ear, causing a slight itch that tugged at her heartstrings.

“Little Sister Yi, I’m bold, I’m not afraid.”

chapters.title: Chapter 733: Coax Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 733: Coax Me

…

…

She didn’t know if she was possessed, but when she woke up, she found herself lying on her bed in her bedroom, but beside her..

There was an extra person.

A classic horror movie was playing on the projector, but unfortunately, both of them were very strong mentally, so the movie didn’t have the effect it should have.

She wrapped herself tightly in a small blanket, feeling… uncomfortable.

Even though she slept with Xiao Naofu every day, the feeling of a kitten and a man was really different.

She felt as if her territory had been occupied.

And it was very oppressive.

There was a distance between the two of them, but they were holding hands, and their fingers were still interlocked.

Xiang Yi gently scratched her palm. “Um…”

“Huh?”

Their eyes met, and time seemed to stand still.

The lights went out, and only the light from the curtain fell down. Frame by frame, light and shadow flowed, like stars twinkling.

Xiang Yi licked the corners of her mouth, finding it a little dry for some reason. “Should I… meet your parents?”

In the little girl’s understanding, falling in love was a matter between two people, but it should also be approved of by both families.

Actually, Shi Sui had already met her brothers, her little uncle, and her grandparents.

However, she still knew nothing about Shi Sui’s family.

Shi Sui was silent for a moment before saying in a low voice, “Something… happened in my family. After that, my father chose to die, and my mother was traumatized and is still recuperating abroad.”

Xiang Yi was stunned.

She had heard about the incident in the Shi family, but she did not know that it was so cruel…

“I’m sorry…” the young girl could not bear it.

However, Shi Sui continued, “As for the previous generations, I’m not too close to them, except for the New Year.”

“I’ve never mentioned it. Firstly, I feel that it’s nothing worth mentioning. Secondly, I’m worried that you will dislike it. After all, our family is not as close as yours.”

The Shi family’s relationship was very indifferent, and Shi Sui was already used to it.

Xiang Yi looked into his eyes. “I won’t dislike you, never.”

Shi Sui was speechless.

The little girl was always so sincere in front of him.

He raised his hand to cover his eyes, finding it difficult to speak. “Xiang Yi, I’m not as good as you think. Ahem… I’ve secretly bullied Xiao Naofu before…”

“You were fierce to it, right?”

“… You knew about it?”

Xiang Yi turned over and got closer to him. Her clear deer-like eyes were filled with a gentle moonlight. “I’ve always known.”

Shi Sui moved his hand away. There was obviously a trace of astonishment on his face.

His thick and long eyelashes trembled twice.

“Xiang Yi, don’t you hate it?”

“How could I!” Xiang Yi smiled. “I like your gentle look, I like your pitiful look, and your ‘pretentious’ look. You’re obviously so cute, but I really like it too!”

“…” Shi Sui’s Adam’s apple moved slightly, and he didn’t know what to say.

“I… I like you the most.”

The little girl said with a blush and tried to crawl into the blanket like an ostrich, but Shi Sui held her tightly, not allowing her to retreat.

His voice was hoarse. “Say it again.”

“I don’t want it…”

His warm fingertips caressed her earlobe and gently rubbed it twice. As he wished, he saw that her little ear was completely red.

“Good girl, Xiang Yi.” The moist and scalding aura enveloped her, drawing dense electric currents bit by bit. A small flower exploded at the nerve endings. “Coax me, okay?”

chapters.title: Chapter 734: I Like You The Most
chapters.body:
Chapter 734: I Like You The Most

“Oh…”

The movie was still going on, but no one paid attention to the content. It was completely reduced to the background sound.

The distance was close, and it was ambiguous.

…

…

The young girl’s beautiful deer eyes were filled with tears.

She did not remember how many times she was forced to say “I like you the most.” Xiang Yi was so shy that her entire body trembled slightly. The tips of her fingers and toes curled up unconsciously.

Shi Sui caressed her cheek and kissed her from the side, one kiss after another, gently and affectionately.

The feeling of touching each other was wonderful and moving.

“Shi Sui…” Xiang Yi was so sleepy that her eyelids were fighting. She called out to him in a soft voice with a nasal tone, “You’ll have me in the future.”

“…”her heart felt as if it was hit by something. It did not hurt, but it felt like it was wrapped in soft and warm cotton candy.

It was filled with sweetness.

It was as if all her flaws, darkness, and bigotry had been saved at this moment.

The thousands of gray clouds dispersed, and in her heart, there was only the gentle and soft little girl in front of her.

She had fallen asleep.

Her fingers were still unconsciously grabbing the corner of his shirt.

Perhaps she had been bullied too harshly, but there was still a hint of red at the end of the girl’s eyes.

Shi Sui gently wiped his fingers twice and replied in a low voice, “Yes, I love you. I Only Love You.”

..

..

It was late at night on this side of the ocean, but the sun was rising on the other side of the ocean.

A chinese-american director, Mu Si, yawned as he looked up from a pile of manuscripts. His face, which had stayed up all night, looked particularly haggard.

“It’s finally done…”his new movie was currently in the midst of filming. It was a standard western commercial blockbuster style, but it had incorporated the traditional elements of China. Eastern and Western cultures collided and created a strong chemical reaction, just a few Reuters photos had been released, and the major media outlets had already sealed their verdict. This was going to be the highest-grossing movie in the world this year!

But outsiders did not understand Mu Si’s pain.

How to combine business and art was a difficulty that every director would encounter.

The early stages of filming were very smooth. It had always been getting better and better, but recently, it had met with trouble.

He had integrated the elements of kung fu into the film. He wanted to create the elegant and classical feeling of a traditional eastern swordsman, but several versions of the martial arts director’s design could not meet his requirements.

The budget was limited, so mu si could not stay stuck here forever. Now, he was faced with a choice.

Was he going to make do or persevere?

“Sigh…” He looked at the messy storyboards on the ground and drank the coffee left in the quilt.

It was already cold, so bitter that he frowned.

Forget it, I’ll relax for a while.

Mu Si took out his phone and refreshed his social media app. He slid down the list of followers and liked it from time to time.

When he scrolled to an overseas Chinese official account, his fingertips suddenly stopped.

[Martial arts, stop fighting for martial arts, martial arts practitioners, self-cultivation skills also…]

Martial Arts?

Mu Si’s interest was piqued, and he clicked on the video below.

What greeted his eyes was a martial arts school.

Mu Si’s first reaction was — the taste of decoration was too terrible! The nondescript ancient style was simply an aesthetic disaster!

But very quickly, his attention was attracted by the young girl in the video.

The two of them each held a wooden sword. Not to mention anything else, just their looks alone were pleasing to the eye.

Mu Si, who was obsessed with looks, was extremely satisfied.

The next second, the two of them began to fight..

The gaze in Mu Si’s eyes went from relaxed to shocked to pleasantly surprised..

Before he could finish watching the video, he suddenly stood up and dialed his assistant’s number.

“Book me a ticket to China! Immediately!!”

chapters.title: Chapter 735: Participating In The Movie (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 735: Participating In The Movie (1)

…

At the same time.

The late night internet was still bustling with activity.

Netizens surfing the Internet commented on national affairs, ridiculed celebrity scandals, ridiculed weird leaders, and shared beautiful daily life..

When the netizens scrolled to a post in the official daily, everyone’s reaction was like Mush, and they curiously stopped at their fingertips.

[Martial arts, stop fighting for martial arts, martial arts practitioners, and the art of self-cultivation. People who practice martial arts should have a strong body, cultivate both internal and external skills, and have both morality and martial arts! @ Xiang Yi @xiaoshu, the two young men who love to practice swordsmanship, demonstrate the elegance of martial arts, carry forward traditional culture, and never forget their initial love, only then can they achieve great success in martial arts! ]

Everyone clicked on the video of Xiang Yi and Shu Xinglan’s battle.

The video had undergone post-processing, and one look was enough to tell that it was the work of a big shot. The camera cut, the tone of the scene, the background music, the split-camera rhythm… all of them were top-notch! It was practically comparable to an official documentary!

In this video, the swordsmanship of China was displayed artistically.

The end of the video was fixed at the moment when the wooden sword broke, and it was appropriate to immediately retract the sword.

The screen turned black and showed two lines of subtitles:

[Since you have come out of the cave, you have no reason to do so. If you have to spare someone, spare them. ]

[Virtue comes first, etiquette comes first, peace comes first, and sincerity comes from the heart! ]

The shock was overwhelming.

Countless people were stunned for a while before they could react. They could not help but open it and read it a second time..

——[Oh my God, I feel like I have returned to the hot-blooded feeling of reading wuxia novels when I was a child! ]!

——[Xiang Yi is really polite. She did not follow up on her victory, but just stopped. This is the spirit of Chinese martial arts! ]

[ this is a fake fight, right? She can really fight to such a level? Does our country really have kung fu? This is unbelievable! ]

..

After the passersby finished lamenting, they suddenly realized..

What the F * ck?

Xiang Yi was actually praised by the official media again? !

How many times had this been? !

It was already rare for other artists to be praised once. How could they be like sister Yi? The official media couldn’t wait to praise her every day!

It was as if she was an elder during the new year, showing off to her relatives how outstanding her children were!

Because the content of this video was wonderful and the production was well-made, it quickly spread and became extremely popular!

In the early morning, there were even bloggers who brought back news that the video had also become popular overseas!

Many netizens praised, “Let’s not talk about other things, Xiang Yi has really done a good job for our country!”

In this regard, the Spicy Rabbits expressed:

So-so

Very Normal

Basic operation

Our Xiang Yi is just an ordinary girl. We don’t know why she is so popular

The fans of a few A-list female stars in the country have a stronger sense of crisis.

At first, Xiang Yi was popular, more like she was an online celebrity. In fact, the circle didn’t really recognize her position.

But now that she had received official recognition, it was equivalent to having a backer! The industry would also re-evaluate her business value!

It was said that several luxury brands and national brands had already started to approach her management team. Invitations for TV dramas and movie scripts also came like snowflakes.

The market’s cake was only so big. Originally, everyone had a piece of it, and Kazumi had appeared. Now, it was not about snatching the cake..

It was to eat the whole cake!

Could this be tolerated?

Of course not!

Thus, a wave of organized, disciplined, and premeditated rhythm began..

They avoided the topic of Xiang Yi’s personality and talent, and focused all their efforts on one point:

[ Xiang Yi has no representative work! ]

chapters.title: Chapter 736: Acting In The Movie (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 736: Acting In The Movie (2)

A few A-list female stars joined forces to form a so-called “exposure-proof group” whose strength could not be underestimated.

They were not like the Internet trolls who only knew how to copy and paste mechanically. Instead, they had a very flexible rhythm.

There were some who pretended to be fans, some who were sarcastic, and some who used jokes to make fun of them. All sorts of methods were used.

——[I have been a fan of Xiang Yi for a long time. Our Xiang Yi’s representative work is the most popular live variety show in the country. Who among the little flowers in the same period can compete with her?]

——[As an artist, isn’t the most important thing your own business ability? You’re not even doing your main job well, and you’re doing all kinds of flashy side jobs every day. Hey, isn’t that just not doing your main job!]

— [Although I smoke, drink, and perm my hair, I’m a good girl’and ‘although I don’t have a movie, a TV series, or music, I’m a good artist’have the same effect. Who Am I talking about?]

..

After taking turns to lead the rhythm, the effect was indeed remarkable.

On the Internet, there was a discussion on the topic “What kind of artist is a qualified artist?”

The mainstream view agreed that as an artist, the most basic thing must be to do well in singing, dancing, and acting.

In addition, because artists are public figures, they also have requirements for ethics and artistic ethics.

As they discussed… The crowd started to take stock of Shi Sui.

She was first-rate in her business, had a professional attitude and was polite. She had a series of representative works and was extremely popular, but she never acted like a big shot. She didn’t do drama and didn’t randomly accept advertisements.

As for the requests from her fans for selfies, she was satisfied as long as she could satisfy them.

Since her debut, she had been clean and didn’t have any scandals with any women.

She actively participated in public welfare and never freeloaded on the red carpet. Every time she attended a charity banquet, the amount of donations she received was the highest.

The more everyone read, the more they felt that Shi Sui was simply a textbook model artist!

All kinds of small rainbow-like essays were written one after another, causing the “exposure-proof group”to be filled with questions.

In? How did you praise best actor Shi? !

Weren’t we scolding him for being appropriate? !

I finally realized how painful it was for a Chinese teacher to see a composition that went off topic..

A child can not be taught Ah Ah Ah Ah Ah Ah!

…

The day and night changed, and the sunlight cut through the mist and shone on the warm manor.

At eight o’clock, Li Jianyu started the livestream as usual and first took a picture of the scene in the courtyard.

The courtyard was full of flowers and was separated by a fence from another area. Chickens, ducks, and geese strutted around, occasionally muttering to each other.

Li Jianyu started to grumble. Normally, Xiang Yi should be cooking after practicing her sword skills at this time. Why was there no one here today?

And sometimes, father, he had the habit of jogging in the morning. By right, he should be back by now..

He switched to the camera in the living room and caught the clingy Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji sleeping together in the Cat Villa.

The Little Cat was sleeping on the shiba inu’s cream-colored belly, snoring.

Little Xiji was hugging it, and its tail was still hooked around its tail.

In the live broadcast room, a group of netizens were planting lemons online:

——[It’s okay to eat Xiang Yi’s 10-year-old dog food, but I didn’t expect to eat the little hatchet and Little Xiji’s dog food! ]

——[ I’m tired. Even the little hatchet has Little Xiji to sleep with, and I’m still alone in my 20s. ]

——[Ah, ah, the western axe couple is real! Little Xiji is really overbearing. She’s hugging Little Xiji so tightly! ]

..

At this moment, a microscope girl made a row of exclamation marks:

——[F * ck! Am I seeing things? Look at the bottom left corner. Best actor Shi has come out of Xiang Yi’s room! ! ! !]

chapters.title: Chapter 737: Acting In A Movie (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 737: Acting In A Movie (3)

Everyone took a closer look..

Wasn’t that tall, slender, and calm figure best actor Shi Sui?!

The live broadcast room was boiling! !

——[Another day of crying over someone else’s love]

——[Actually, you should have a child, right?]

——[I bet 50 cents on twins! How about Shi Muxiang and Shi Muyi! ! ]

[UwU, what I’m on isn’t the UntimelyCouple. I’m on a Beautiful Love Cookie TV series ahhhh! ]

…

Li Jianyu, who was in the director’s office spat out a mouthful of coffee!

W-What’s going on?

Did the two of them get it on?

Or… did Shi Sui take advantage of the dark night to bully Xiang Yi?

Shi Sui was such a dog, the possibility of the latter was very high..

Li Jianyu was filled with grief and indignation.

Xiang Yi was so gentle and cute, how could you do it! !

Shi Sui, be a human! ! !

Just then..,

they met, yawning, and came out of the room to meet up with Shi Sui on the narrow road..

“Good morning, Sui Sui.” When they met, his hair was as messy as a chicken coop, and he casually pulled it a few times, feeling extremely good about himself.

Shi Sui nodded calmly. “Good Morning.”

“Yu Yu and Lan Lan, are you awake? You have to eat breakfast, don’t starve…”

After chatting for a while, they suddenly realized that something was wrong and widened their eyes. “You… you… you, why did you come out of Little Xiji’s room!”

Shi Sui looked like he had not slept well. He leaned against the wall lazily and said in a hoarse voice, “I had no choice. Sister Xiang Yi asked me to sleep in her room.”

Last night, after he waited for Xiang Yi to fall asleep, he was about to go back to his room. However, when he moved, the Little Rabbit woke up.

After that..

When they met, his body shook. “What did you say?”

‘My little rabbit knows coax a dog?’

When the audience of the livestream heard the conversation between the two, some conservative people expressed their inability to accept it.

——[It’s better for a girl to be more self-important… ]

——[It suits a girl to be so proactive. I don’t Like It Anyway. ]

——[A group of people shouted that they had hit the girl’s body. Hehe, once the gender was changed, the comments immediately exceeded ten thousand.]

…

Shi Sui rubbed the space between his eyebrows. “I’ll go and see if Shi Yu and the others are up yet.”

“Don’t even think about running away!”When they met, he was so furious that he exploded from the bird’s nest into a hedgehog. “Where’s my knife? Where’s my knife?”

They didn’t find the knife, but they did find Shu Xinglan’s wife… Cough, a wooden sword.

When they met, they felt like they had used a firewood stick, and they were shouting that they wanted to beat Shi Sui up.

“Creak.”Another door was opened.

Xiang Yi rubbed her eyes and looked at the two people standing in the living room with sleepy eyes.

“Good morning. Is there anything you want to eat?”

The little girl’s voice was warm and soft, probably because she hadn’t woken up yet. Her tone didn’t sound as calm as usual, but it sounded like she was acting coquettishly.

When they met, she said in surprise, “You… Why did you come out of Shi Sui’s room?”

The audience in the live broadcast room was also dumbfounded. These two people… actually did not share the same room?

Shi Sui asked, “Huh?”

Only then did the young girl react. She knocked her head, which was aching from the hangover, in an attempt to wake up the memories of last night.

Certain scenes appeared in her mind..

After she woke up last night, she pulled Shi Sui to drink. It seemed that she had drunk too much and insisted that Shi sui sleep on her bed..

She seemed to have even rolled on the floor..

In the end, Shi Sui had no choice but to sleep in her room.

However, a certain vicious Best Actor had tricked her into his room.

Xiang Yi was speechless.

Social death was nothing more than that.
