chapters.title: Chapter 738: Acting In A Movie (4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 738: Acting In A Movie (4)

Everyone watched helplessly. The little girl’s ears were red beyond belief, but she was still clenching her fingers and pretending to be calm.

“Ah, I went the wrong way.”

This shriek was like an ancient well without ripples or a soul.

The girl looked at Shi Sui. “Ah, what a coincidence. You also went the wrong way.”

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows and chuckled. “Whatever you say, Xiang Yi.”

This was a vivid explanation of what it meant to be a wife-spoiling maniac.

When they met, their gazes moved back and forth between the two of them. At first, their mood was gratified, but then it became melancholic. The cycle was endless..

The gratifying thing was that their little rabbit did not turn the dog around, nor was it turned around by the dog.

The melancholic thing was that they were good brothers. Could it be… that they really could not do it?

They were very conflicted.

…

Taking into account everyone’s different tastes, Xiang Yi made a simple breakfast for everyone.

Sandwiches, steamed buns, crystal shrimp dumplings, oatmeal milk, black coffee..

Vegetables and eggs were also essential.

Shi Yu and Shu Xinglan, one big and one small, ate very well.

When they met, they joked, “Lanlan, aren’t you going to carry your wife today?”

Shu Xinglan, who was stuffing ham and cheese sandwiches into her mouth, revealed… a hint of confusion in her beautiful eyes.

That’s right.

Where’s my wife?

The young man seemed to have woken up from a dream. He stood up immediately and panicked visibly. “My wife is gone! !”

PFFT..

The audience who were watching the live broadcast laughed out loud.

——[Hahahaha, this little guy’s reaction is too slow. ]

——[What’s so important about your wife? Let’s eat first!]

——[I’m shocked. A certain young man actually abandoned his wife. Is this a distortion of human nature or a depravity of morality?]

…

“Stop teasing him,” Xiang Yi said.

The moment she spoke, they did not dare to be cheeky anymore. They obediently found the wooden sword hidden behind the sofa pillow and returned it to Shu Xinglan.

… What kind of joke was this? He was not afraid of Xiang Yi.

What he was afraid of was the people who supported Xiang Yi.

For example, Shi Sui, Xiang Chen…

Shu Xinglan felt as if he had obtained a treasure as he hugged his little wife tightly.

A few seconds later, he silently released her..

He said in all seriousness, “My wife affects the speed of my cooking.”

After saying that, he picked up the sandwich that he was halfway through eating and bit into it.

The audience in the live broadcast room: ? ? ?

[Little Brother, do you know what you’re doing? Do you want me to slap my own face??]

“Buzz Buzz.”

Xiang Yi’s phone vibrated. It was a call from a bodyguard.

“Miss, there’s a guest.”

“A guest? But today is not the day for a guest to come…”

Li Jianyu also installed a fixed camera at the entrance. He switched the camera position and found a tall man standing at the door. He looked like a mixed-race man. Worried that the bodyguard did not understand English, he was gesticulating with him.

The bodyguard was expressionless as he spoke to him in fluent English.

The man was speechless.

If the bodyguard’s spoken language skills were so good, then the owner of this manor was probably well-hidden…

He explained his purpose for coming. “I want to invite two people to participate in the filming of my movie!”

Oh, and it was a director?

Before everyone could recognize him, Shi Sui said, “It’s Director Mu Si.”

Upon hearing this name, whether it was in the live studio or the live broadcast room, a bunch of gasps could be heard.

That genius Chinese-American director who was renowned both at home and abroad, Mu Si who directed movies that had accumulated over ten billion at the box office? !

In an instant, everyone’s gaze was locked onto Shi Sui.

Presumably, such an international famous director had come to pay a visit. He must have come to look for Best Actor Shi!

Shi Sui smiled and said, “Should not be looking for me.”

chapters.title: Chapter 739: First Collaboration (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 739: First Collaboration (1)

What?

If he wasn’t here to look for Shi Shi, then wouldn’t that be…

Countless audience members simultaneously turned their gazes to the young lady beside him.

——[Are you here to look for Xiang Yi? ? ]

——[How is that possible? Mu Si is an international director, and he has never worked with an oriental female star before. This is his first collaboration, so he should at least be at the level of best actress, right?]

——[You said that you’re here to look for someone suitable to make a movie. Are you trying to make me laugh to death so that you can inherit my position in the game? Even if you think about it with your feet, you know that it’s impossible! Real directors don’t look at popularity, they look at acting skills! Is there such a thing as ‘suitable’? ]

…

The immortal hero drama where ‘Xiang Yi’ and ‘Shi Sui’ acted as Director Zheng’s cameo had yet to be broadcasted. Therefore, the audience’s view of Xiang Yi’s acting skills was still based on the awful idol drama that she had starred in the past year..

She would glare to show her anger.

She would glare to show her shock.

She would glare to show her sadness.

Even when the male lead confessed to her, she merely glared at him too…

At that time, Xiang Yi was so popular that the entire internet was filled with pictures of her acting skills — the black-and-red kind.

Therefore, everyone naturally felt that director Mu Mu Si would not hire Xiang Yi even if he had hired Xiao Naofu and Little Xiji.

…

Please! continue reading at New Novel .Org

Out of courtesy, Shi Sui and Xiang Yi went to the door to welcome Director Mu Si.

The program team confirmed with him that they had agreed to shoot the film before following him to the live broadcast.

The moment he saw Xiang Yi, Director Mu Si’s eyes lit up!

It was her!

It was her!

She had a petite and slender figure, delicate facial features, and a gentle temperament. However, she was extremely strong and could knock down a strong man with a single punch!

This was the kind of contrast that he wanted!

“Hello, Hello, my name is Mu Si.” Director Mu Si greeted him with a smile. His accent did not sound very familiar.

Shi Sui went up and greeted him.

Mu Si said, “You are a very excellent actor. I have seen all your movies!”

Updated by NewNovel/ Org

This was enough to show that he approved of Shi Sui.

“Thank you. I also like your movies.”

The two of them bragged to each other. Mu Si could not help but rub his hands together. “Um… can you introduce me to the lady beside you?”

He was nervous for a moment and blurted out in English.

“Of course.” Shi Sui nodded and naturally switched to English to introduce him and Xiang Yi to each other.

Xiang Yi also used English to communicate with director Mu Si.

Hearing Xiang Yi’s fluent spoken language, Mu Si couldn’t wait to sign a filming contract with her on the spot!

Amazing! Amazing!

Read More on NewN0vel, 0rg

This must be the blessing of the goddess of luck, which allowed him to meet Xiang Yi!

The role in his movie was simply tailor-made for her!

Mu Si’s tone was sincere. “Miss Xiang, please forgive me for being abrupt and presumptuous, but I really think that you are very suitable for one of my movie roles! I want to invite you to participate in the shooting of my movie with the utmost sincerity!”

The live broadcast room was in an uproar.

Mu Si was actually… really looking for suiting to shoot a movie!

When the “Bomb Squad” formed by a few A-list female stars and fans heard the news, they rushed over and saw the content translated by the enthusiastic netizens in the bullet screen. They were all about to vomit blood!

No, what right did she have to act in a suitable film! ! What right did she have to act in an international blockbuster? !

Also, was there something wrong with director Mu Si’s taste in beauty!

Couldn’t he look for their idol?

Why Xiang Yi?

Does she have acting skills? Does she know how to make movies? ! Can she make movies better than others?!

All of a sudden, doubts arose.

——[I now suspect that director Mu Si is a fake!]

——[I also think that it might be some new type of scam!]

——[Is Xiang Yi worthy of this good pastry? She doesn’t deserve it! Is she not afraid of choking herself to death!?!]

chapters.title: Chapter 740: First Cooperation (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 740: First Cooperation (2)

Regarding this, the spicy rabbits’ response could be said to be a textbook example.

——[Good, good, good, you’re all liars.]

——[Yes, yes, yes, everything you say is right.]

——[Wow! You’ve already discovered this! You’re all Sherlock Holmes!]

——[OK, fine, it’s our Xiang Yi who doesn’t deserve it. Your family’s cooking is the best! It’s going to be popular all over the country in no time. It’s going to be popular all over the country and abroad. She’s going to get countless Oscar awards!]

…

The audience in the comment section burst into laughter.

The Spicy Rabbits are foolish fans!

Even if you want to fight, you can’t fool the first place winner!

You guys must be the descendants of the modern science of fooling around!

“Exposure-proof team” was speechless.

This feeling was like a punch hitting cotton. She was unable to exert any strength.

You thought that if you hurt the other party, the other party would be so sad that tears would flow down his face. You didn’t expect that in reality, the other party was enjoying himself so much that he didn’t seem to care about you at all!

Don’tyou think youare angry? !

However, he was full of anger and did not know how to vent it.

The Spicy Rabbits did not scold or step on anyone. Instead, it was rather peace-loving. It was just a little perfunctory…

In such a situation, if they were to tear each other apart, passersby would instead stand up against the Spicy Rabbits!

As a result, the “anti-exposure group” could only break their teeth and swallow it down. It could not be said how wronged they were!

…

Manor, living room.

Xiang Yi brought a cup of coffee for Mu Si.

Mu Si took a sip and looked at yingyi with appreciation.

Double espresso.

It was his favorite ratio.

The coffee beans were fragrant and the temperature was just right. Taking a sip was both refreshing and enjoyable.

He once again proposed to let Xiang Yi and Shu Xinglan participate in his new movie. He also elaborated on his understanding of eastern culture and swordsmanship.

Shu Xinglan hugged his wife and stood aside, slowly digesting director Mu Si’s words.

Filming a movie?

For him, it was something he had never thought of.

The youth’s expression was blank, and his grip on his sword tightened.

Xiang Yi’s reaction was also very calm. He took small sips of the peach oolong that had been soaked.

Mu Si: ? ? ?

The famous director, who had always rejected others and had never been rejected by others, fell into confusion.

Was filming his movie no longer attractive?

Why were both of them indifferent?

Audience: ? ? ?

——[Is my English hearing alright? is Director Mu inviting Xiang Yi and Shu Xinglan to film? ]

——[Yes… but it’s not appropriate to use the translation of an invitation. It should be more appropriate to use a plea… ]

…

The lively comments section fell into a moment of lost silence.

Let them figure it out.

It wasn’t Xiang Yi and Shu Xinglan crying for Director Mu’s movie.

It was Director Mu who begged the two of them to film it!

The key was that the two of them weren’t overwhelmed by the favor and were ecstatic!

How many artistes in the entertainment industry would they be envious of!

…

Shu Xinglan pursed his lips and couldn’t make up his mind. He looked at Xiang Yi for help. “Sister, I’ll listen to you!”

Yesterday, during the sword competition, he still called her Miss Xiang Yi, but after dinner, he changed his address to sister..

Xiang Yi was not against acting in movies. “Director Mu, don’t we need to audition?”

Director Mu was stunned for more than ten seconds before he roared.

“Audition for what? No need! ! !”

“Are you satisfied with the pay? If not, I can add more! Miss Xiangyi, Mr. Shu, if you have any requests, feel free to mention them!”

“It’s already my honor for the two of you to appear in my camera!”

The audience in the live broadcast room: ? ! ! !

Mu Si, wake up! You’re an international famous director! ? Don’t you care about your face?

How could you be so lowly as to suck up?

chapters.title: Chapter 741: Happily Mentioning The Male Lead (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 741: Happily Mentioning The Male Lead (1)

However, no matter what others think, Mu Si’s decision was very firm!

The pursuit of art, the capture of the market, and the fusion of popular elements resulted in his high-quality film standards and high box office ratings for his films.

Xiang Yi and Shu Xinlan can form a perfect closed loop when connected well!

“… you’re too polite,” Xiang Yi said politely.

Mu Si hurriedly said, “You guys… agreed to it?”

Xiang Yi nodded. “I look forward to working with you happily.”

Shu Xinglan also said, “Me too!”

Xiang Yi said, “I hope that my performance will not disappoint you.”

Shu Xinglan said, “Me too!”

Xiang Yi said, “If there are any problems during the filming process, just tell me directly. I’m not fragile.”

Shu Xinglan exclaimed, “Me too!”

Mu Si said excitedly, “I’ll get someone to draft a contract right away!”

In the comments section of the live broadcast room:

——[Pfft, I’m going to laugh myself to death in this lousy variety show sooner or later! ]

——[My younger brother is just like me, who doesn’t have much vocabulary. Other than saying ‘me too’, he can’t even say much. ]

— [ F * ck! Then wouldn’t Xiang Yi become the first asian female star that director Mu has worked with? Xiang Yi can brag about it for the rest of her life, right? ]

…

It wasn’t just the audience watching the live broadcast that was shocked.

The insiders also received the news that Mu Si was going to work with Xiang Yi in the blink of an eye.

Capital was naturally driven by profit. Immediately, the number of endorsements and scripts that came knocking on the door increased by several times!

The high-end brands that had been on the sidelines previously even took the initiative to lower their status and put on the most sincere attitude to seek cooperation!

…

Mu Si was extremely efficient in doing things. Very quickly, she got people to draw up the contract.

Si Chuanbai and Ah Nan rushed over. Following them were the elite lawyers from Linchen Law Firm who were in charge of contract law and overseas law.

After carefully perusing every clause of the contract, the lawyer proposed a few amendments. Mu Si arranged for people to link up and modify the contract on the spot.

It could be said that he had given the greatest sincerity! The most preferential contract!

Even Shu Xinglan was also basking in the glory.

The youth signed the contract in a daze before he went to look at the pay.

Eh, why are there so many zeros after that…

He rubbed his eyes and repeated it a few times before he believed that he had not seen wrongly!

The youth pretended to be calm, but he could not help but cheer. “I can buy many, many wives!”

The netizens were amused by him and started to play pranks:

– [ human trafficking warning! ]

– [ objectified female warning! ]

– [ polygamous bigamy warning! ]

Unexpectedly, the joke attracted the attention of the internet police.

A line of bolded red words appeared on everyone’s screen:

– [ received a report from the public that there are human traffickers in the live broadcast room? ]

When the staff noticed this, they quickly told Li Jianyu that Li Jianyu’s easily frightened constitution was acting up. His entire body trembled and he quickly went into the mirror to explain:

“It’s a misunderstanding, it’s all a misunderstanding! A child’s middle school idiot is acting up. The ‘wife’that Shu Xinglan mentioned isn’t referring to a human that exists in reality, but his sword.”

Shu Xinglan’s face was flushed red from embarrassment. He bowed to the camera and apologized to the audience.

Even so, the internet police still went through a thorough investigation to make sure that no one was suspected of committing a crime before they left.

The audience, which was as quiet as a chicken just now, was now jumping up and down with joy:

——[ I’m dying of laughter. Baby, debut on the spot. ]

——[ brother, you broke the law! I declare you to be a heart thief! ! ]

— [Am I the only one who thinks that Shi Sui is outdated? He can’t even get a cameo role? ]

chapters.title: Chapter 742: Happily Mentioning The Male Lead (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 742: Happily Mentioning The Male Lead (1)

There was the Spicy Rabbits in the front, and the Shi Sui Sisters in the back.

The screen was filled with entries:

– [ # Shi Sui, No Way # ]

– [ # Shi Sui, not popular # ]

– [ # Shi Sui, outdated # ]

…

Everyone: ? ? ?

What kind of fans are they? !

Why aren’t you playing by the rules?!

How can you defame your own idol like this? How much hatred and resentment do you have?!

Of course, the Shi Sui Sisters all agreed that we were the only ones who could slander them.

At most, at most, we could barely add the Spicy Rabbits…

It wasn’t recognition!

In fact, they didn’t have to worry about Shi Sui’s career at all.

Shi Sui had already won a Grand Slam for best actor and even won the Best Actor award. His movies and TV series all had representative works, and he had a lot of outstanding roles.

Even if he retired from the film industry, it could be said that he did not leave behind any regrets.

He was dedicated enough, and he was disciplined enough. Now that he was finally willing to rest, his fans were happier than anyone else.

Unfortunately, things did not go as planned..

After signing the contract, Director Mu Si could not wait to talk about the script, but his phone kept ringing.

“What?”

“Really??”

“Jesus…”

By the time he received a few phone calls, he already had a look of despair on his face.

Xiang Yi poured him a glass of water and asked, “Director Mu, are you okay?”

Mu Si wanted to cry, but no tears came out. “My male lead has run away…”

“Ah?” Xiang Yi was confused. “Did he not have time to sign the contract?”

“No, he signed it, but he would rather pay the penalty. His father is retiring, and he has to go back to inherit the family business and become the King…”

Xiang Yi: ?

Shi Sui usually kept the habit of watching domestic and foreign movies, and he knew quite a lot about foreign artists. He explained to Xiang Yi, “George Alexander. Because of his love, he devoted himself to acting for many years. His father is the king of a small country, and he has the right to inherit first.”

Xiang Yi suddenly understood: “I see.”

In the live broadcast room:

——[ this… This works? ]

——[ if you don’t work hard, you can only return home and become a king. ]

——[ this probably means that there’s a mine at home… Oh, no, there’s a home in the mine! ]

…

Mu Si was dying of worry.

Although he wasn’t afraid of the male lead’s scenes yet, George was already the person he could find that suited the character and temperament of the main character the most.

Where could he find a new male lead…

Could it be that the filming of the movie had to be put on hold for the time being?

Mu Si sighed as she frantically scratched her hair. Her originally receding hairline was in danger, and it made one feel uneasy..

“What should we do now?” Mu Si sighed as her gaze accidentally landed on Shi Sui.

The man held a cat toy stick as he calmly played with Xiao Naofu.

It was a simple white cotton shirt. It was casual and lazy. His hair had grown a little recently, so he hadn’t had the time to cut it yet. It covered his eyes and brows slightly.

The twenty-seven-year-old man had an inexplicable feeling of a salt-based youth.

Clean and fresh.

Mu Si’s eyes lit up.

He had seen all of Shi Sui’s movies. Not only was he handsome, but his acting was also impeccable.

Previously, due to the restrictions of foreign countries, Mu Si hadn’t considered Shi Sui.

But today…

Due to fate, he had come to Nancheng..

Wasn’t this fate? !

Mu Si’s eyes shone with an artist-like fanaticism. “Mr. Shi, I wonder if you’re interested in playing the male lead in my movie?”

Shi Sui muttered, “This…”

Mu Si interrupted him. Simply put, she was exhilarated.

“I believe that we will make the best movie ever! It will be remembered in the history of films!”

The audience was in a trance.Has Shi Sui… become the male lead?

chapters.title: Chapter 743: One-Stop Service (1)
chapters.body:
Chapter 743: One-Stop Service (1)

Although Shi Sui’s resources were already very good, and he had collaborated with international directors before, but..

No one would turn down greater opportunities.

Especially when the Shi Sui Sisters heard this, each of them was more excited than the other!

Shi Sui had won a Grand Slam for Best Actor in the country. If he could act in an international best actor award…

‘Go, Shi Sui! Go! Go! Go!’

‘Sorry, Shi Sui, Momma shouldn’t have blackmailed you! You’re the best!’

Our journey is the Sea of Stars! To win the Best Actor Oscar! !

…

There were a few “Oh, is it so easy to get an Oscar?”comments, but most people had high hopes for Shi Sui.

In the face of absolute strength, everything was not a big deal.

Shi Sui had his own considerations and was about to decline politely, “Thank you for your kindness, but I…”

Mu Si exclaimed, “Are you worried about the love scene? Other than the male lead having a few intimate scenes with Xiao An, who is played by Miss Xiang, he has no interaction with any other female characters! If you don’t mind, I can edit it!”

Shi Sui’s expression did not change. “I think I can act.”

Everyone: ?

Best Actor Shi, your answer is like breaking a leg!

Mu Si’s gaze moved back and forth between him and Xiang Yi. Suddenly, he laughed mischievously. “Then I’ll add some more intimate scenes for you guys?”

The little uncle coughed when they met and acted like an elder. “There’s no need for that. Everyone wants to see the plot. who wants to see the two of them hugging and kissing on the big screen? It’s like a child playing house!”

Mu Si said seriously, “This isn’t child’s play! They’re sacrificing themselves for the sake of art!”

The audience in the live broadcast room:

——[Hahahaha, well done!]

——[Hey! We can still watch the intimate scenes between the two of them for ten hours!]

——[I feel that Director Mu is naturally dull on the outside, but naturally dark on the inside. He has accurately grasped the timing.]

…

After negotiations, another person had signed the contract..

The official shooting time was set for two weeks later — that was when the live broadcast of “Two Under One Roof” ended.

The details of the contract could not be exposed, but the shooting time was not hidden.

The audience suddenly realized that the lousy variety show… was about to end?

Was the live broadcast of the variety show that had accompanied everyone for the entire summer going to end just like that?

Sad emotions shrouded the comment section.

——[I don’t want to see the end of the stupid variety show at all.]

——[How could time pass so quickly! I Can’t bear to part with Shi Sui and Xiang Yi?]

——[There will be a second season, right? I beg the original cast and crew to return! I beg you!]

…

Fortunately, the program team had already made preparations. Li Jianyu put away his usual cheerful style and said seriously,

“Every time we meet, there will be a time for us to part

“Every time we part, it’s also for the next time, for a better meeting

“I hope that everyone will not be immersed in the mood of ‘Ah, the program is ending’. Instead, they will enjoy ‘one room, two people’and the happiness that Xiang Yi brought to everyone. They will feel and cherish the meaning of life. This is also the reason why we do variety shows in the first place.”

When many people in front of the screen heard these words, they felt a strange sourness in their noses.

It was like chasing a book or a drama. They were looking forward to the end, but when it really came to the end, they felt a sense of loss.

However, this emotion did not last long. Everyone heard the conversation between Mu Si and Xiang Yi.

“Then I’ll go back and shoot the scenes for the others first…”

“Since you’re already here, director Mu, why don’t you stay and have a meal?”

chapters.title: Chapter 744: One-Stop Service (2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 744: One-Stop Service (2)

“I hope that everyone will not immerse themselves in the emotion of ‘Ah, the program is about to end’. Instead, they will enjoy ‘Two Under One Roof’ and the happiness that Xiang Yi brought to everyone. They will feel and cherish the meaning of life. This is also the reason why we do variety shows in the first place.”

When many people in front of the screen heard these words, they felt an inexplicable sourness in their noses.

It was like reading a book or watching a drama, looking forward to the end. However, when it really came to the end, they felt a sense of loss.

However, this kind of emotion did not last long. Everyone heard Mu Si and Xiang Yi’s conversation.

“Then I’ll go back and film the other people’s scenes first…”

“Since you’re already here, Director Mu, why don’t you stay and have a meal?”

Those four words ‘since you’re already here’ could make people eat more, walk more, climb more mountains, and shop more..

It could practically cover all the food, clothing, shelter, and travel.

Especially when they were traveling and climbing mountains. Even though the group of people didn’t have much energy to continue, when they heard the lady say, “We’re all here,” at least more than half of the people would climb with her!

Director Mu Si declined, “No, no, I’m quite busy. Moreover, I grew up abroad, so I’m not used to eating Chinese food.”

His words were already very reserved. In fact, it was not that he was not used to it, but that he hated it.

Mu Si’s mother was Chinese, and she had an excellent… dark cuisine.

That was why Mu Si often joked that it was a miracle that he could survive.

The overbearing CEO waved his hand when they met. “Isn’t that simple? I’ll give you the whole chef!”

Mu Si hesitated for a moment before agreeing.

However, he couldn’t help but ask, “Zheng, what do you mean?”

…

Very soon, the chef from the five-star hotel that they met arrived at the manor.

He even brought a bunch of assistants with him.

It was a rare opportunity for him to take a break. He simply made some soup, marinated some meat slices, and then brought director mu around.

Even though Mu Si had been to many noble parks and was lucky enough to be invited to be a guest by the Queen of Country E, he boasted that he had seen the world. However, when he saw the cozy little courtyard that was suitable for maintenance and the farm that had a combination of rural style and technology, praises were incessant.

“Oh, this glass greenhouse is amazing! With the light and shadow, it’s very suitable for an art film!”

“My God, these small animals are so cute! What? They’re not pets, but are used for eating? Hmm… so cute, it must be delicious.”

“This pond is very artistic! Oh my God, I suddenly have an inspiration. Madam Xiang, can I take a photo here?”

Xiang Yi replied gently, “Sure, you can do whatever you want.”

Mu Si was overjoyed. She carefully selected the angle and took a few photos.

After walking around, it was almost time for dinner.

Everyone returned to the living room.

The efficiency of a five-star chef was extremely high. He had already prepared the cold dishes and appetizers,

After Xiang Yi and the others returned, he immediately began to serve the dishes.

It was worth mentioning that someone had specially set up the dining table.

The table cloth was pure white and matched with exquisite sound-quality cutlery. There were a few small blue orchids in the vase, and they were even decorated with sparkling water droplets.

The chef that they had met was a master of French cuisine, and every dish was made like a work of art.

However…

They were not happy at all when they met.

The portion was too small!

The person eating had lost his soul!

Even though they had specially changed a few dishes to take into account the taste of the children, Shu Xinglan and Shi Yu had also eaten very little.

There was nothing else they did not like.

chapters.title: Chapter 745: One-Stop Service (3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 745: One-Stop Service (3)

——[I’m dying of laughter. What kind of country bumpkin is Xiang Yi?]

——[Please, when do you eat Western food with hotpot? Do you know how to eat it? ]

[The taste of hotpot must be very strong. Will it affect the taste of French food? If Xiang Yi does this, it’s too irresponsible!]

…

When they met, they led the two brats to the French window furthest away from the table. They added charcoal into the small copper pot.

Coincidentally, the head chef personally came out to deliver the main dish. It was a fried steak.

The assistants helped him serve the dishes one by one.

However, the head chef did not go back immediately. Instead, he chatted with Xiang Yi.

“Xiang Yi, long time no see. I tried the fusion dish that you told me about the last time. I really made a few new dishes. The customers are especially satisfied!”

Xiang Yi smiled and said, “That’s great.”

… Oh?

Did Xiang Yi and the head chef know each other?

“There’s one more thing. After we finish eating, can you…” the head chef said embarrassedly, “Sell me two packs of spicy rabbit heads produced by Little Rabbit Farm? My daughter likes to eat them very much, but she can’t get them…”

Audience in the live broadcast room: pfft!

——[ are you serious? Look at the logo on the clothes. This is the head chef of a five-star hotel in south city! ]

——[ the Little Rabbit Farm is on fire! SOB, SOB, SOB, when will you dare to open the time limit and not limit it once? ]

——[ one person’s blood letter seeks younger sister Yi to expand production! become bigger and stronger. Won’t it be fragrant to be a rich woman in the snack world? ! ]

…

“I’ve prepared it for you.” Xiang Yi stood up and took out a basket from the side. In it, apart from the spicy rabbit head, five-spice beef, mixed noodles, and a few packets of hot pot seasonings, the head chef was overjoyed.

The head chef was overjoyed and thanked him profusely.

At this moment, the small copper pot of the mandarin duck was also boiling.

The first person to start eating was Xiang Yi, who had prepared the cured meat before.

The beef and mutton were cut into slightly thick slices and marinated with starch, chili powder, egg liquid, and other ingredients. They were placed into the hot pot and boiled with a gurgling sound…

The smell drifted to the tip of Mu Si’s nose faintly. It was as if it was soul-stirring and tickled his heart.

When the head chef smelled the fragrance, he gave a thumbs up to Xiang Yi. “Xiang Yi, your culinary skills are really superb! In terms of seasoning, you are truly a genius among geniuses!”

He had specially studied the products of the Little Rabbit Farm and wanted to make it for his daughter to eat. However, no matter what, the seasoning was always a little inferior.

“You flatter me.”

“If I wasn’t a chef, I’m afraid I would be thick-skinned enough to eat hotpot with you!” After the head chef finished sighing, he turned his head back three times and walked towards the kitchen.

Mu Si didn’t quite understand their conversation, but she could feel that the head chef was praising her appropriately.

… could it be that her hot pot tasted pretty good?

As for Xiang Feng, he was already sweating from eating.

He took out his phone and habitually tapped into the live broadcast room.

Seeing that someone was ridiculing him, he was instantly delighted when they met. He put down his chopsticks and immediately started a battle with someone:

“Eating in a restaurant requires etiquette.”

“But who made the rule that you have to follow that set of rules even if you eat at home?”

“We can eat however we want! It’s none of your business!”

Not only did he use physical attacks on his words, he also began to use his actions to deal magic damage.

When they met, he picked up a piece of cured meat and used his hand to block behind him so that the camera could focus on him.

“Do you see it? This meat is tender, smooth, and delicious. When you eat it, it’s spicy and fragrant!”

He stuffed it into his mouth and smiled slyly. “Do you want to eat it? You Can’t eat it, so you can eat it!”

The audience was speechless.

Thank you, I was hurt.

chapters.title: Chapter 966: Treants
chapters.body:
Chapter 966: Treants

After discussing the ruins, Chen Rui no longer stayed in Cloud City and left.

The pseudo-angel Kuhler gave Chen Rui a good impression. Although he was called an angel, he was human after all. Unlike Raphael, Michael and others, he did not have the kind of momentum that was aloof and regarded the common people as ants. However, there was a saying that once the mask was worn too much, it was easy to become the real face.

Therefore, Chen Rui often takes off his mask and becomes his true self in front of his relatives and friends.

The most important thing was that no matter how the world changes, he would ultimately not change.

Chen Rui suddenly raised his head and looked directly at the blue sky.

Those angels and even gods whom people need to look up, what kind of face did you have before you put on the mask? Do you still remember?

“What are you thinking?”

Zola’s voice interrupted Chen Rui’s thoughts. In front of him was the boundless sea. He was leaning on the main mast of the Devil’s Snare Ship with the beautiful Ms. Fairy Dragon in his arms. Chen Rui took a deep breath, calmed down, and gently stroked her hair, “It’s nothing.”

“Really?”

“ En … Actually,” Chen Rui smiled and kissed her face, “I’m thinking about how to fulfill our Zola’s little wish.”

“ Oh .” Ms. Fairy Dragon’s face suddenly turned red, and this little wish was to give Duoduo a younger brother or sister.

For this little wish, Ms. Fairy Dragon had been ‘diligent’ these days. According to Kia’s original words, it meant that she ‘enjoyed alone’.

Due to the lifespan and environment, the stronger the demons, the harder it was to have descendants. Chen Rui’s body was human. Although the powerhouse of the human world also had a rule that the stronger it was, the harder it was to give birth, in general, the human fertility was much stronger than that of demons. In the past, Chen Rui was weak and exhausted, so he didn’t think much about this aspect. Now he had a stable family. Athena, Kia, Zola, Shea, Catherine and Isabella made up a total of 6 lovers who had an official relationship with him. The sex frequency could be described by the word ‘hard work’, but up to now, he only had 1 daughter Duoduo. Furthermore, the little phoenix used the secret technique of talent to be born through Catherine. Is it because the combination of human and other races (the Demon Realm’s races) is difficult to have children? Or is it because of the soul reborn? Or because of the Super System? Chen Rui had always wondered. But let’s leave the problem of offspring to affinity. Anyway, there is Darling Duoduo now. She is the closest and dearest daughter. Anyhow, I am a justified father now.

Having a wife, having kids, having friends, and having a family. This life is worth it no matter what. Chen Rui kissed Zola again and hugged her tightly. He stood against the mast as he felt the sea breeze. His eyes were particularly calm.

Zola laid on his chest, feeling the strong heartbeat, feeling the tranquility and warmth in his heart; only to feel that his own heart was also warm, and there was a mass of inescapable happiness there.

“Chen Rui…

“ En ?”

“I’m really happy. I no longer have to rely on desperate training and research to dilute my loneliness. I have lived ignorantly for so many years, and now I truly feel alive. How great.”

“ Oh .”

“For the rest of your life, you must hold me tight like this.”

“What?”

“….” Ms. Fairy Dragon opened her mouth again, but didn’t say anything because she unceremoniously took a bite out of a certain poor imitator.

“ Ah …my hand…”

Seeing Ms. Fairy Dragon’s puffed-up appearance, Chen Rui blew the back of his hand that had 2 teeth marks with a bitter face, and he suddenly whispered in her ear.

“Let’s go, let’s try to fulfill that little wish.” Ms. Fairy Dragon’s face blushed. Her ears were itchy, and her body couldn’t help but feel a little weak. Chen Rui laughed as he carried her up and walked to the ship cabin.

The sandmen, who were puzzled, turned a blind eye, and continued to carefully refer to the map while driving the Devil’s Snare Ship forward. The goal was the Jade Forest Sea.

The Devil’s Snare Ship sailed very fast. In the early morning 2 days later, they could already see the vast and lush forest sea.

After landing, Chen Rui put away the sandmen and the Devil’s Snare Ship. He took out a green leaf map specially made by the elf tribe that Finoia had given him.

The green leaf map was different from the ordinary magic map or compass. According to Finoia, it was a precious map made by the natural breath unique to the elf tribe, and it would not be disturbed by the different forces or enchantment of the Jade Forest Sea. The center of the map was the elf tribe’s Silver Moon Celestial Capital. Like a compass, no matter where the holder went, the green leaf’s pointer would always point to the correct location of the celestial capital.

As long as he found Finoia in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, he would be able to find the Stone Fist Village of the forest hobbit. Chen Rui took Zola to the direction of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital in the direction of the green leaf pointer.

The Jade Forest Sea was extremely large, far exceeding the territory of ordinary kingdoms and even empires. The forest was full of towering ancient trees and strange plants, and there were countless unpredictable dangers.

Zola exuded a trace of dragon’s breath at the Kingdom level, and the approaching predators started to flee. However, there were also many carnivorous plants that relied on instinct to hunt and did not buy this. Once the prey reached the range, they would immediately launch an attack. Although it was difficult to pose a threat, they still had to be careful.

Chen Rui and Zola move forward hand in hand. Both of them were the strength of the peak stage of the Kingdom level. The strange powers in the forest sea had a lot of restrictions on the space power, so they couldn’t shift with all their strength, but Zola’s 6 element kingdom power was very wonderful. Chen Rui felt like being wrapped in wind elements and walking on the wind. Without activating any power by himself, his body was lightly driven by her to move forward quickly.

This speed was much faster than ground mounts or even the silver pegasus of elves. Chen Rui secretly lamented the mystery of magic elements, but for him, a magic idiot, he could only sigh with emotion.

About 6 hours later, Zola’s high-speed figure suddenly stopped while Chen Rui also keenly felt the abnormality ahead.

It was a huge ancient tree that would take at least 20 people to hug it. This kind of ancient tree was actually common in the Jade Forest Sea. It looked no different from ordinary trees on the surface, but Chen Rui and Zola both were able to sense that kind of pure and powerful life force.

Race: Treants.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS-

Physique: SSSS-, Strength: SS-, Spirit: S, Speed: C

[Analysis]: Earth attribute, super gardener, entanglement power, enchantment barrier.

Danger level: Normal. This was the first time Chen Rui had seen a Kingdom level powerhouse with a speed of only C. These huge ancient trees also had a special talent ‘super gardener’. The area that I saw along the way is particularly lush with plants growing. It should be related to this kind of talent. It seems that the treants are also masters of farming.

Seeing the 2 people who stopped advancing, the treants moved slowly. As its huge body shook, a lot of dirt fell quickly, and many birds flew up from the branches in fright.

At the same time, special enchantment powers quickly spread out with the treant as the center, as if countless layers of translucent walls divided the space into countless ‘fragments’, blocking the way.

2 eyes slowly opened on the huge tree trunk, and the facial features were actually very vivid. The ‘eyebrows’ and ‘beards’ were lush branches and leaves. It looked like an old man from a distance.

The age of this ‘tree’ was unknown, but judging from the long breath of life, Zola was probably just a little girl in front of him.

The treant moved its ‘body’ (that was the trunk) again slowly. The ‘big mouth’ moved and made a grunting sound as if burping.

“Front… go… Stone… Fist…. “

The rhythm of these words was a slow one. When Chen Rui and Zola heard the words ‘Stone Fist’, their eyes lit up.

Stone Fist Village?

I wanted to go to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital first through Finoia and then to the Stone Fist Village, but I didn’t expect to come directly to the destination!

The treant over there continued in slow motion, “Vil… lage…”

I have an urgent matter. You old man is still going slowly. Such a bummer. I have no time for you.

“The Stone Fist Village is in front; no passing through!” The speed of the treant’s speech suddenly became faster. In fact, it was not the speed of the treant that had become faster, but the faster flow of time made the sentence more coherent. Chen Rui really couldn’t stand the speed of the treant, so he activated the time law.

“We are friends of the forest hobbit. The hobbit is in great danger now, please let us help the hobbit by passing through.”

“No one is allowed to pass!”

“Then, can you pass a message for me? My friend is the mechanic grand master Bernd of the hobbit tribe.”

“No! You can’t take 1 step forward!”

“…”

Chen Rui explained it for a while, and he did not hesitate to activate time law to speed up the conversation. However, the treant seemed to be not very good at words, and it had a stubborn temperament. He wouldn’t let anyone go.

Chen Rui had no choice but to look at Zola, “I can only get past it by force; try not to hurt him.”

Zola, who had been thinking about it for a long time, nodded and clenched Chen Rui’s hand. The index finger of the other hand moved slightly, and the enchantment ‘wall’ suddenly cracked.

The figures of the 2 people instantly moved into the criss-cross space. Following that, there were several cracks and turns. They had easily broken through the protection of the enchantment and appeared in the distance behind the treant.

This distance was already quite far. With the speed of the treant, it was too late to even turn around, but suddenly countless vines shot out from the ground like countless whips, overwhelmingly wrapping toward Chen Rui and Zola like lightning.

At this speed, there was absolutely no feeling of treant going slowly. At a closer look, these were actually roots and beards.

This scene made Chen Rui think of terms like ‘Lanruo Temple’ and ‘Grandma’.(Referencing to a haunted temple in a Chinese movie which is under the jurisdiction of the thousand-year-old tree demon grandma). He couldn’t help but snort. This kind of tentacle-like talent seemed to be very ecchi. .. Before the ‘tentacles’ wrapped them up, Zola’s beautiful purple eyes quickly blinked. The roots all over the sky stagnated for a while, and they all turned red. In a split second, they wilted and disappeared.

Immediately afterward, many roots broke out from the ground, almost inexhaustible.

When Zola blinked again, the originally hot air suddenly became cold, and the ground quickly froze. The ice was as strong as steel, and the roots could no longer break through from the ground. The treant seemed to want to turn back and continue to attack, but his movements were too slow. When he turned around, the 2 enemies had already disappeared from vision and perception.

Just as Chen Rui and Zola got rid of the treant, several treants appeared in front of them again, and they released the enchantment barrier without saying a word. It was very likely that the treant before used some special method to convey the news of the ‘intruders’.

The treants should be a very peaceful race, and their defense skills were quite good. The effect of the enchantment barrier activated by a combination of several treants would be doubled, and even Zola could not easily crack it. However, the attacks of the treants were relatively weak. Most of the treants only knew to entangle. Of course, this entanglement really was also very fierce and beastly, but for Chen Rui and his wife, it was far less troublesome than the enchantment barrier.

A faint yellow flame emanated from Zola’s body. With a move of her hand, a huge energy blade pierced into the barrier of the enchantment. The blade vibrated in a strange rhythm, and the blade surface began to crack. However, not only the ‘blade’ was cracked, the enchantment barrier that several treants jointly cast also cracked more and more. In the end, the entire joint barrier and the ‘blade’ collapsed at the same time. At the moment when Zola defeated the enchantment barriers and broke through the defense line, several whistles sounded. Something was coming at like lightning.

Zola frowned as the space beside her immediately froze. Dozens of objects stagnated in front of her for a few meters, which turned out to be silver arrows.

Although Zola froze the arrows, the other party’s reaction was quick. The whistles sounded again, and the tip of the dozens shooting arrows actually hit the tail of the front nock with accuracy, causing some kind of explosion that made the space shake.

Unfortunately, the other party still underestimated Zola’s power. No matter what changes happened to these feather arrows, they couldn’t shake Zola’s protection.

Chen Rui raised his brows slightly~ This kind of magical archery is by no means treants, but… elf!

After the treants’ enchantment barrier was broken, Chen Rui had sensed the elf hidden in the woods. A large number of elves seemed to be coming quickly from a distance.

According to the previous treant, this should be the Stone Fist Village where the forest hobbit is located. Why are there so many elves?

Chen Rui had stayed in the Silver Moon Celestial Capital for a long time, and he personally killed the 4-winged angel Isyorul of the church in the outskirts of the celestial capital. He was no stranger to the elf tribe. Judging from the kind of archery that Zola encountered just now and the equipment of the elves ahead, it should be the regular army of the elves.

What happened to the Stone Fist Village?

chapters.title: Chapter 967: [Divine Healing]
chapters.body:
Chapter 967: [Divine Healing]

“I’m a friend of Grand Master Finoia! I’m invited to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital!”

Chen Rui didn’t want to repeat the mistake of misunderstanding with the mountain hobbit, and now he was eager to find out what happened to the Stone Fist Village, so he immediately held up the green leaf map high as he said loudly, “This is the green leaf map that he gave me!

Finoia said that the green leaf map could not only indicate the direction, but it was also an identity certificate. As long as he reached the official residence of the elf tribe, such as the Purple Orchid Port that Chen Rui went to with Starlight College’s Deputy Dean Socrates last time, he could show the map to receive the highest courtesy of the elf tribe and led to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital.

However, this time Chen Rui’s plan changed on the way. Instead of going directly to the elf’s residence, he went around the forest sea from the other direction.

The whistle of the arrows stopped suddenly as if there was some kind of communication, and the roots of the treants slowly retracted, but the bows and arrows of the elves in the woods were still aimed at the 2 of them. No one stepped forward.

Chen Rui motioned for Zola to land on the ground, then they stood there and waited patiently. After a while, a familiar voice sounded in the distance.

“Old friend, is that you?” The voice was Finoia himself.

“Of course!” Chen Rui was surprised and delighted, “Sir Finoia, that’s how you welcomed your old friend Chen Rui?”

The name Chen Rui was completely unfamiliar to the human world. Only a few relatives and friends know the real meaning. Finoia was one of them. Without a doubt, he walked out of the woods and appeared in front of Chen Rui.

“You’re finally here, my friend.” The elf grand master stepped forward and hugged Chen Rui. This hug only touched the shoulders, but for an elf, it was already a very intimate etiquette. This scene let all the elves in the woods put down their hostility.

“This is my wife Zola. The last time you and Bernd came, she happened to be training and didn’t meet you. However, I remember talking about her and her father on purpose.”

Finoia was shocked, and his gaze toward Zola immediately became awe-inspiring. He gracefully said with a very formal and solemn ceremony, “It is an honor to meet you, beautiful lady, descendant of the legendary hero king.”

Knowing that this elf was 1 of Chen Rui’s only friends in the human world, Zola smiled and returned with an ancient magician etiquette.

The elves in the distance were taken aback when they saw Finoia’s way of bowing, and they secretly guessed the origin of this powerful female magician who actually made the grand master of the tribe so respectful toward her.

Finoia asked Chen Rui, “Why are you here? I told several elf stations to keep an eye out for your arrival, but I didn’t expect you to choose this path.”

“I’ll explain to you later.” Chen Rui looked at the heavily armed elf soldiers behind, “Is this the Stone Fist Village where Bernd is located? Why are there so many warriors of the elf tribe? Has something wrong happened?”

Finoia nodded solemnly, “The forest hobbit is really facing a problem. You came just in time. See if you can save the trouble of the Stone Fist Village.”

Chen Rui and Zola followed Finoia into the woods. Along the way, they encountered some treants and warriors from the elf tribe. After passing through the woods, they saw a huge basin, where the Stone Fist Village of the forest hobbit was located.

“So you helped the mountain hobbit and the cave hobbit solve the crisis and came to the Stone Fist Village to warn them?” Finoia listened to Chen Rui talking about the experience of the Black Rock Mountain, and he lamented, “Unfortunately, you are still a step late.”

Chen Rui thought of the appearance of the elf army, and he had a bad feeling in his mind, “Could it be that the forest hobbits have…”

“Look at me… I’ve been so busy because of the hobbit matter these past few days, so I can’t talk normally.” Finoia patted his head, “It’s not as bad as you think. Although the forest hobbits have been deceived by the fallen cave hobbits and were almost completely controlled, the prophet of the elf tribe foresees the erosion of the Jade Forest Sea by evil forces. After a period of investigation, we set our target at the Stone Fist Village. Last night, the super-level guardian of the elf tribe was dispatched to rescue the imprisoned Forest Hobbit King Ebeck, then we launched a long-awaited raid on the Stone Fist Village, taking complete control of the area, destroying the evil altar and capturing all the fallen ones in one fell swoop.”

It seems that the elf tribe is still quite strong. They are able to detect the existence of the Abyss power and control the forest hobbit in one fell swoop. Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief, “So that’s the case. What happened to Bernd?”

“Many of the forest hobbits were eroded by an evil power and lost themselves. Although Bernd was not eroded, he was seriously injured in the battle…” Speaking of this old friend, Finoia’s mood suddenly became low, ” Now the therapist of the elf tribe is taking care of the wound. His condition is very bad. I wonder if you can save him.”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Take me to him immediately.”

The forest hobbit had lived in the Jade Forest Sea for many years and respected the power of nature. Except for the outer city walls, most of the buildings inside were round houses built on trees or vegetation. Many of these houses were damaged in the battle last night, and there were traces of fierce battles along the way. Chen Rui followed Finoia and quickly entered the palace of the forest hobbit. The temporary emergency room was set up in the palace hall.

The palace hall was full of wounded hobbits and elves while the emergency room of the main hall was full of the seriously wounded.

Chen Rui saw the old hobbit, Bernd, wrapped in thick gauze and undergoing magic treatment at first glance. He walked over quickly, “Bernd!”

Beside him was an elf female magician who was treating Bernd. Seeing this stranger approaching so recklessly, she was about to reprimand him, but she saw Finoia wave his hand behind him, so she immediately remained silent.

“Is that you? Human boy.” The old hobbit raised his heavy eyelids and forced a smile, “Is there any wine? I want the best.”

Chen Rui silently took out a bottle of wine, opened the stopper, and handed it to the old hobbit.

As soon as the cork was opened, the rich wine fragrance drifted away. The wine fragrance was so strong that when the elf female magician next to him smelled it, she actually felt dizzy. The initially laying hobbits became high-spirited. Many people twitch their noses, and some people couldn’t help but ask, “What is this wine? It smells so good?”

“ Ha , no matter what wine it is, it’s mine! Bring it over and give it to me to taste.” Bernd’s eyes flashed. If he wasn’t seriously injured and unable to move, he would have rushed over to drink it.

“This is the best white wine that I secretly brew, but there is only this small bottle. You drink it slowly.” Chen Rui took the special small square bottle and brought it in front of Bernd.

The elf ‘nurse’ lady couldn’t bear it any longer and shouted, “He is seriously injured now, and he has just applied herbs. How can he drink wine?!”

Before Chen Rui could speak, the hobbits who were about to die began to make noise.

“What do you elf know? Wine is the best thing!”

“No herb can compare to fine wine!”

“Being able to die in wine is the greatest happiness.”

“Such a fragrant wine. As long as you give me a drink, I will be willing to return to Mother Earth later.”

“…”

The nurse elf blushed with anger, and she was speechless for a while. The wounded elves on the side were displeased, and they quarreled with the hobbits. This didn’t look like an ‘intensive care unit’ at all.

At this moment, Bernd had already drunk a small sip of white wine. He opened his eyes, let out a breath, and his voice was a few pitch higher, “It actually has such strong afterkick! I have never drank such strong wine!”

He didn’t look like a dying patient, but Chen Rui could see that the old hobbit was seriously injured. He was just holding on with a brave spirit through wine now.

Finoia asked, “Lynn, how are the wounded?”

Lynn, the elf nurse, shook her head, “The elves are better, but the hobbits’ physique is special, so the general treatment is almost ineffective. They can only be treated with herbs, and the situation is not optimistic. This person even gave the hobbits wine to drink… …”

The elf nurse lady obviously didn’t have a good impression of the guy who interfered with the treatment. Chen Rui shrugged at Finoia and smiled. Finoia was moved to see his relaxed smile, but he didn’t say anything.

“Bernd! Give me a sip of your wine!” Cried the wounded black bearded hobbit leaning on the chair.

“Ebeck, don’t even think about it! Even if you are my brother, the king of the forest hobbit, don’t even think about taking the last sip of wine from me!” Bernd sneered coldly.

Only then did Chen Rui know that the black bearded hobbit was Ebeck, the king of the forest hobbit, and he was actually Bernd’s brother. He walked over with the white wine, and Bernd yelled, “Come back! I haven’t had enough! This is the last bottle of wine in my life!”

Chen Rui took a few steps, looked back and smiled, “Bernd, my friend, I can guarantee this is definitely not the last bottle of wine in your life.”

Soon after, the wounded outside walked into the hall and gathered together under the call of Finoia and Ebeck. This was naturally Chen Rui’s request.

Chen Rui estimated the range and walked to the center of the wounded with the Crown of Thorns on his head. A soft white light spread out in all directions. Wherever the white light passed, the wounded felt their bodies lighten, and their injuries began to heal quickly. Even the hobbits, who were quite resistant to magic, felt the same.

[Divine Healing]——The most powerful healing. No potential hidden danger of exhaustion. Fundamentally repair the wounds of the soul and body, promote the power of regeneration. Could be used once after every hour. (Multiple objects could be locked)

After the white light subsided, the wounded all showed surprised expressions. Especially those who were supposed to be seriously injured, many of them stood up by themselves. Lynn and other elf therapists were stunned.

Finoia was overjoyed and kept nodding. Chen Rui no doubt has a way!

chapters.title: Chapter 968: Psychedelic Forest Trap
chapters.body:
Chapter 968: Psychedelic Forest Trap

In the main hall, the hobbits and the elves also cheered. The treatment that Chen Rui activated just now was incredible. The seriously wounded and dying were all pulled back from the death line. Although they still needed quite some time to be healed completely, at least it was not life-threatening.

The biggest hero, Chen Rui, was not in the hall at the moment. Instead, he followed Finoia outside the hall and met 4 people.

These 4 were super powerhouses: 3 were elves, and 1 was a hobbit.

The strongest was a female elf with silver hair and eyes. Her strength was SSS, which was the intermediate stage of the Demi-God. The other 2 elves were a peak stage of the Kingdom level, an early stage of the Kingdom level, while the hobbit was a peak stage of the Kingdom level.

“Did you activate the [Divine Healing] of the Crown of Thorns just now?” The female elf asked the keypoint in the first sentence, but her tone was a bit arrogant, which was also a common problem of most elves. Furthermore, the strength that Chen Rui was showing now was not even a Master level, so it was inevitable that he would be looked down upon.

“Yes.” Chen Rui bowed slightly without showing any special respectful expression.

Finoia hurriedly said, “Madam Kilanya, this is Third Prince Arthur of the Dragon Bright Empire. His alchemy is the best in the world; even I’m inferior to him. His Highness Arthur came all the way from the Thick Soil Castle on the mountain hobbit. He hid his identity in order to escape the assassin’s pursuit. He is now called Chen Rui, please keep it a secret, sirs.”

As soon as these words came out, the 4 super powerhouses all showed surprised expressions. Their eyes that looked at this ‘weakling’ were very different. No matter what world they were in, people with strength and ability could always be valued.

Finoia’s revelation of Chen Rui’s identity had been agreed in advance, so Chen Rui’s face transformed for a while with Zola’s ‘help’, temporarily reverting to the appearance of ‘Arthur’ before he stated his intentions again.

Kilanya wanted to ask something else, but her eyes were set on Zola behind Chen Rui, and she suddenly frowned.

“It turns out that Your Highness was commissioned by the king of the mountain hobbit and came to warn us. This time, thanks to the treatment of Your Highness, many people were rescued. On behalf of the forest hobbit, I, Lutoche, would like to express my sincere thanks to Your Highness. You’re a true friend of all the hobbits!” With that said, the hobbit Lutoche of the peak stage of the Kingdom level performed a deep bow.

Chen Rui hurriedly returned the bow, “It’s just a coincidence. It’s a relief that the elf tribe has actually detected the fallen power and made a move in time, otherwise the forest hobbits may suffer unimaginable losses.”

Lutoche sighed, “Yeah, no one could have imagined that Ruhem and Toern actually became slaves of evil power, controlled the Hobbit King Ebeck, and secretly built the evil altar, causing the forest hobbit to almost suffer extinction. Although destroying the evil altar, the hobbits paid dearly, and my best friend Agut died in this battle.”

“How come the Crown of Thorns is in your hands?” The elf Kelsa of the peak stage of the Kingdom level, “Are you from the Holy Church?”

“I’m not a member of the church, I just happened to get the Crown of Thorns.” Chen Rui shook his head and changed the subject, “By the way, the [Divine Blessing] power of the Crown of Thorns can dispel evil breath to a certain extent. It can help those controlled with mild symptoms from the evil erosion. I wonder if those fallen hobbits…”

“That’s great! They’re still in the prison now. We’re quite troubled by this!” Lutoche suddenly refreshed as he pulled Chen Rui and hurriedly rushed to the prison. Zola, who had been silent, followed behind.

“The hobbits are all hotheads.” Elf Plott of the early stage of the Kingdom level shook his head, “Madam Kilanya hasn’t finished asking yet.”

“It’s about the life and death of the tribe, so it’s understandable.” Kelsa looked at Zola’s back, “That woman… has the breath of dragons, and she doesn’t seem to be weak.”

“Dragons?” Plott was taken aback, “The guardian of the human grand master?”

“Fairy Dragon.” Kilanya snorted as her silver pupils shone brightly.

“Sirs and madams.” Finoia hesitated for a moment before he spoke up, “That fairy dragon is the daughter of Elf King Span.”

As soon as these words came out, the 3 elf powerhouses were shocked, and they all showed their shocked expressions. There was a strange sharpness in Kilanya’s eyes, and Finoia could only smile bitterly in his mind.

With the experience of the Thick Soil Castle, Chen Rui quickly used [Divine Blessing] to rescue a considerable part of the hobbit that was not deeply eroded while the rest could only continue to be imprisoned.

Even so, Lutoche and the forest hobbit were overjoyed, and Chen Rui naturally became the savior of the Stone Fist Village. Bernd was especially excited, but unfortunately, now that his life was out of danger, Chen Rui kept the bottle of ‘white wine’ that made all the hobbits salivate, saying that he couldn’t drink wine during the recovery period, which made the old hobbit feel unbearable. Ebeck, the king of the forest hobbit who tasted white wine, was also longing for it.

After getting Chen Rui’s big promise about white wine, Bernd let Chen Rui leave with the elves.

With the help of the elf tribe, the crisis of the forest hobbits was solved more easily than Chen Rui imagined. Chen Rui learned from the hobbits about the story of the incident. The 2 cave hobbit super powerhouses came to the Stone Fist Village to tell the bad news of the collapse of the Golden Bright Underground Palace, saying that now the cave hobbit could barely make a living outside the Red Rock Mountain Range, so they wanted to seek the forest hobbit’s help.

Although the hobbit split into 3 factions many years ago, they were still in the same line after all. The Forest Hobbit King Ebeck and the forest hobbit’s super-level guardian decided to take in the cave hobbit after negotiation, so they dug the cave according to the request of the other party and prepared to welcome the arrival of the cave hobbits. Who knew that this was the beginning of disaster. The 2 fallen ones who had been planning for a long time, secretly controlled the Hobbit King Lutoche, and led the forest hobbit into the Abyss of ‘fear’ step by step.

If it wasn’t for the rescue of the elf tribe, the entire forest hobbit would have followed in the footsteps of the cave hobbit.

Chen Rui did not stay at the Stone Fist Village because he was invited by Finoia to return to the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. The last time Finoia was at the Golden Estate, he mysteriously said that he had a gift. In fact, he had already given it at that time, but it could only be redeemed at the Silver Moon Celestial Capital, and that was the green leaf map.

This green leaf map was not simple. In addition to being able to act as a map to find the Silver Moon Celestial Capital in the Jade Forest Sea, it also had a special function, that was, it could be used as a token to meet the legendary prophet of the elf tribe, Alucier.

Alucier’s name was not well-known in this world, and many people didn’t know what the name represented. However, among veteran trainers and bloodline race with heritage memories, this name was astounding. The name had appeared in the key plots of many legends, and some stories even go back to ancient times. He was a ‘legendary prophet’ who lived up to his name.

Even Zola’s father, Span, mentioned this legend of the elf tribe in front of Chen Rui. Span once received some advice from Alucier, and called him ‘teacher’. Alucier was also the ‘teacher’ who was most respected by all super powerhouses of the elf tribe.

Similarly, Alucier was also 1 of the few Elf Kings in the history of the elf tribe. Compared with him, the Chen Rui’s Old Father-in-law Elf King who had lived for tens of thousands of years could only be regarded as a junior.

The green leaf map enabled him to meet Alucier and get a gift, which might be a treasure or a vision for the future. In short, it must be a great benefit.

Chen Rui could guess that the reason why Finoia gave him the green leaf map instead of accepting the gift of the legendary prophet himself might be due to some special restrictions and conditions, but since the elf grand master didn’t say it, he didn’t ask more, because Chen Rui believed that Finoia would never harm friends.

Since the elf tribe and the forest hobbit were allies, the Silver Moon Celestial Capital had a special teleportation array outside the Stone Fist Village, so it didn’t take much time to get back to the Celestial Capital.

Chen Rui and Zola went directly to Finoia’s Purple Heart Treehouse to rest instead of the post house. His current identity as a prince was still kept secret. It was the most convenient and comfortable to go to Finoia’s place.

After a night of rest at Purple Heart Treehouse, in the early morning, Chen Rui brought Zola along to the Psychedelic Forest where the legendary prophet was located.

The Psychedelic Forest was located to the west of the Silver Moon Celestial Capital. It was an ancient forest with treants.

Chen Rui learned from Finoia that the treants outside the Stone Fist Village were just sent by the legendary prophet from the Psychedelic Forest to defend the fallen ones from escaping, but because the treants were traveling too slowly, even with the teleportation array, those treants from the Stone Fist Village had not yet returned to the Psychedelic Forest.

When approaching the Psychedelic Forest, the green leaf map had automatically turned into a leaf-shaped badge, which was similar to the Holy Leaf Heraldry that Chen Rui once saw, but it was more crystal clear, like emeralds.

Relying on the power of this badge, Chen Rui and Zola were not blocked in any way. They entered the Psychedelic Forest along a small stone slab path that appeared under their feet. Soon after, they came to the entrance of a ring-shaped forest, and they could vaguely see a house at the center.

It was not the common tree house of the elf tribe, but an ordinary thatched hut.

At the entrance of the woods, there was a somewhat unexpected ‘acquaintance’, the elf tribe Demi-God powerhouse Kilanya whom they met in the Stone Fist Village.

Kilanya looked at the 2 who were walking hand in hand, and she said lightly, “You guys are here to see the teacher? Where’s the token?”

This sentence sounded unnecessary. Chen Rui raised the leaf-shaped badge in his hand, and Kilanya nodded before her eyes were set on Zola, “You can go in, but this woman must leave the Psychedelic Forest. No! Leave the Silver Moon Celestial Capital! Dragons are not welcome here, especially nasty fairy dragons!”

Chen Rui noticed the unkindness in Kilanya’s eyes and frowned. I even rescued the seriously wounded elf tribe yesterday, and Zola did nothing to offend this elf beauty powerhouse. Why did she have such strong hostility?

Leave? Chen Rui glanced at the dumbfounded Ms. Fairy Dragon. He smiled slightly and put the badge onto the ground.

“Since that’s the case, then I’ll give this thing back to you. Zola, let’s go.”

Kilanya was startled. Finoia should have already said the benefits of seeing the legendary prophet. I didn’t expect this weak human to actually just turn around and leave.

The fierceness in the female elf’s eyes burst out, and her voice sounded horrendous, “I took great efforts to lead you here. How can you leave without letting me give you a good reception?”

In the deep laughter, Kilanya’s body burst into flames. The dense forest quickly burned and scorched, and a torrent of lava-like torrents quickly appeared nearby. The entire landscape became a volcano-like existence, and the air was suffocating and hot.

chapters.title: Chapter 969: Test?
chapters.body:
Chapter 969: Test?

Chen Rui was shocked by this familiar and terrifying breath. Meanwhile, Kilanya’s figure had changed. The original white robe had turned into a golden red armor, tightly wrapping the bumpy hot body. The silver eyes had already become blood red. Flames filled with destructive breath lingered all over her body, and there was a long whip in her hand. When she swung it, lightning and sparks swayed.

This is… the abyss creatures’ blazing flame witch! The blazing flame witch of the Demi-God level must be the strongest elite of mutated!

Thinking of Kilanya’s previous words, Chen Rui’s heart suddenly sank – Is this invitation to the Psychedelic Forest a trap?

Could it be that the entire incident of the Stone Fist Tribe is a terrifying trap? The top of the elf tribe has been completely eroded by the power of the abyss, including this Demi-God level female elf and the legendary prophet whom I have yet to meet?

Chen Rui activated the [Analytical Eyes], but Kilanya, who was not far away, showed no information. It should be due to some kind of folding space. The actual distance between them was much farther than the visual distance, exceeding the [Analytical Eyes]’s detection range.

“ Pak! ” Kilanya whipped the ground.

Countless terrifying cracks suddenly appeared on the ground, spreading toward Chen Rui like lightning. Her attack seemed to have no space limit.

When the cracks arrived in front of Chen Rui, they turned into a terrifying rift. The rift was full of blood-red lava that was erupting continuously.

When Zola blinked, Chen Rui’s figure disappeared with Ms. Fairy Dragon in the sky.

Kilanya had already determined the direction of Zola’s movement. With a flick of the whip, countless whip shadows appeared around Zola and Chen Rui, interweaving into a huge net that completely sealed off their way to dodge.

Chen Rui clearly sensed the powerful destructive power contained in the whip shadow, and it even had a special hatred power. He was secretly stunned – It is just as I deduced; it’s not an illusion! But the real abyss power!

Kilanya’s strength was Demi-God, so the power of this attack was extremely terrifying. The Secret Shadow appeared in Zola’s hand. Circles of halos rippled out, and those whip shadows condensed by power suddenly solidified like real objects before they burst into pieces.

Kilanya didn’t expect that her powerful blow would be forcefully solved by Zola at the mere Kingdom level. A hint of surprise could be seen in her bloody eyes. It wasn’t easy for Zola to take this blow. Chen Rui’s figure had already appeared on the ground below. He was obviously moved to a safe position by Zola.

Kilanya didn’t intend to let go of Chen Rui the ‘ant’ at all. She stomped her feet to the ground, and a large number of terrifying figures came out of the lava flowing around. The gap demon, the berserk demon, the blazing flame witch, the abyss lord, and even various unknown Abyss creatures appeared one after another and rushed toward Chen Rui. They could completely delete the poor Prince ‘Arthur’ with a blink of an eye.

The moment Kilanya released the army of the abyss, Zola had already made a move. Her spectacles were shining brightly. If one looked closely at her eyes now, he would find that the fairy dragon’s purple pupils were flashing with 6 shining colors that were spinning.

At the same time, the 6 rays of lights began to appear on the ground around Kilanya, spinning like the colors in Zola’s pupils. Kilanya instinctively felt a rare sense of crisis. She flicked the whip to wrap herself, protecting her in circles of flames.

The 6 colored rays of light were instantly intertwined and merged into a transparent color, that was, colorless. The next second, a terrifying explosion occurred.

The power of this explosion could hardly be described by texts.

This was Zola’s newly comprehended strongest blow of the [6 Elements Kingdom] , inspired by Chen Rui’s inadvertent mention of the principle of anti-matter weapons during the voyage of the Devil’s Snare Ship a few days ago. Chen Rui named it [Element’s Fury].

For example, if the explosive power of a single element was calculated as 10, then in [Element’s Fury], the power of the simultaneous explosion of 6 elements was like the terrifying energy caused by the collision of positive and negative matter. It was not 60, nor 600, but 10 to the power of 6! 1 million!

In the blink of an eye, Kilanya was engulfed by a soft light, which seemed peaceful and harmless, but all the abyss creatures around, whether it was a blazing flame witch or an abyss lord, were instantly annihilated when they were touched by this light.

The impact was so strong that Chen Rui, who was enveloped by Zola’s protective power, sensed the terrifying impact and was secretly horrified.

The soft light gradually faded. there was a terrifying trace of overpowered destruction. The ground was full of exaggerated distortions and cracks while the summoned abyss creatures all disappeared.

With a ‘ bang ’, something intangible seemed to burst open, and one could vaguely see countless cracks appearing in the space, which then turned into powder and disappeared. This was the power of space. Zola’s [Element’s Fury] shattered the space that originally isolated them!

Although this blow showed great power, Zola’s expression did not relax at all. A figure in the center of the explosion gradually rose up. It was Kilanya.

The whip in Kilanya’s hand had only a short handle. Her golden-red armor was full of cracks, and there were several shocking wounds.

With a ‘ hoo ’ sound, Kilanya’s body burned with a raging flame again. The flame contained a strong hatred intent. In the flame, her injuries and the cracks in her armor gradually disappeared. The whip in her hand returned to its original state.

The flames continued to spread, and the entire space was burning. The air was filled with terrifying high temperatures and manic breath.

“I underestimated you, Fairy Dragon!” Kilanya gritted her teeth and said while exuding a terrifying momentum all over her body. Her strength did not decrease; instead, it became stronger, “The next blow, I will make you completely…”

Before she could finish speaking, a strange light suddenly appeared in the monstrous flames. It was a crimson, dazzling starlight.

The starlight instantly filled the entire vision. Kilanya was shocked because the starlight didn’t come from Zola in the air, but from the ground… ‘Arthur’!

— That ‘ant’ who only has the strength of a Warrior!

Before Kilanya could make the next reaction, a red ‘meteor’ flew toward her. This ‘meteor’ contained terrifying kingdom power. It was a real kingdom that contained faith power and life force!

With this kind of faith and the power of life, even a Demi-God level powerhouse like her could only look up to it.

At a critical juncture, Kilanya sent the charged power toward the ‘meteor’ without hesitation. This power hit the ‘meteor’ and was repelled by a great power. In an instant, Kilanya instinctively had an extremely dangerous warning sign. This sense of crisis was 100 times more terrifying than when she faced [Element’s Fury] just now. Even the flames flowing around her trembled. At the same time, the will and soul of Kilanya were also shaken.

For some reason, the meteor’s figure suddenly slowed down, then a crimson light brushed past Kilanya’s body for a short while.

The light of the meteor quickly converged into a human form. This figure wore armor that shone bright and gorgeous like a star.

The figure maintained a punching posture, and the fist was staying on Kilanya’s left side. His chest and abdomen were vulnerable at the moment, but Kilanya didn’t take the opportunity to attack. Her dilated pupils seemed to be paused.

The next second, a red line appeared in the space behind her. All of a sudden, there was a visual distortion centered on the red line including the sky and the earth as if it had been cut in half by some kind of force.

Kilanya’s dilated pupils shrank as her body trembled slightly. The golden-red armor showed large cracks, and it totally shattered.

Her body now seemed to be stabbed by countless sharp needles, which was extremely painful. What’s more terrifying was that her soul and will were deterred by that terrifying power. She basically lost her fighting spirit.

She was just brushed by the aftermath of the blow just now!

With that punch, if he hadn’t diverged in time, under normal circumstances, my body would have turned to dust.

Is this the true power of ‘Arthur’?

It turns out that everyone was deceived by this human! There is no need for any guardian at all, even the strength of the fairy dragon guardian is far inferior to one being protected!

Kilanya suddenly understood 2 things. First, Zola’s ‘colorful’ big move just now was just a test move with a Demi-God powerhouse by her. Second, the reason she put ‘Arthur’ to the ground was not to avoid him from being affected by the battle but to kill her with 1 hit.

“Why didn’t you kill me?” Kilanya asked abruptly.

The visor on Chen Rui’s face was automatically lifted, revealing his facial features. He exhaled a turbid breath as he shrugged, “You’re not really the abyss creatures, Ms. Elf. Those Abyss powers are indeed realistic, but they are not real after all. If I guessed correctly. I should be in the kingdom of a big sir. With his protection, even if I hit you with that move just now, you may not die… Psychedelic Forest is a good name. I was almost bewildered.”

In fact, Chen Rui, who had the memory of 2 ruins of the alchemy civilization and had a real confrontation with the Abyss, had felt that there was something wrong with the ‘Abyss’ here earlier. Especially when approaching Kilanya just now, the data shown in the [Analytical Eyes] showed that this elf did not have any Abyss attribute, so that hatred power was obviously an attached ‘shell’.
