“No!” In Thomas’ desperate scream, the giant mouth swallowed the earth origin fragment at the top of the pillar.

Good chance! Zola felt that the defense of the main altar instantly plummeted to the lowest point, and the surrounding bloody fire ring also quickly dimmed. Her purple eyes lit up, and the Element Goddess Crown echoed the brilliant light. She raised the Secret Shadow in soul weapon mode high and tapped it to the ground!

A rainbow appeared above the main altar, then the entire underground palace trembled. Astonishing cracks appeared on the solid mountain walls, and huge rocks kept falling from the top.

This blow condensed all the power of the fairy dragon. Coupled with the strongest power of the Element Goddess Crown, Secret Shadow, star position buff, [Star-level Enhancement] buff and Demi-God level kingdom, the main altar that lost the protection of the earth origin fragment fell apart. Thomas’ body was also torn apart.

As soon as the main altar shattered, the bone towers that had not been destroyed by Paglio collapsed automatically. The bloody mist disappeared without a trace, and the corpses in the passage were also destroyed. The 2 abyss soul variants that fought fiercely with Chen Rui exploded in an instant, turning into particles and scattered in the air.

“Good job! Zola!” Chen Rui was overjoyed. He shifted to Paglio’s side in an instant and grabbed the staggering poison dragon. Paglio, who had unleashed in full force, had already turned into a bloody man. That tragic appearance made Chen Rui startled when he saw it. He quickly poured him a bottle of potion.

“Is it solved? As expected of the madwoman…” The poison dragon was relying on a desperate faith and determination to fight just now, but after successfully destroying the main altar, his supporting strength also suddenly disappeared along with the disappearance of the pressure. His feet immediately softened. If it wasn’t for Chen Rui’s support, he would have fallen to the ground.

At this time, Dodo had recovered from the state of being an invincible foodie. Master Slime was covered in wounds and could not even jump. It was squirming hard on the ground like a caterpillar before it finally came to madam.

Those rich expressions and vivid body language successfully portrayed a wounded ‘thing’ who was dying and wanted to fulfill its last wish before the end of its life.

The blow just now exhausted Zola’s strength, and the fairy dragon was panting violently. Seeing the miserable appearance of the slime, her purple eyes blinked, and several golden cards appeared in her hand. Dodo’s ‘dying’ eyes lit up as he immediately took out a dark yellow crystal from his mouth and offered it with both hands; it was the earth origin fragment.

The origin fragment covered in the slime’s saliva made the fairy dragon frown. Meanwhile, Chen Rui, who came over with the poison dragon, didn’t care. With a wave, the earth origin fragment flew over and entered the storage warehouse of the Super System.

Dodo got those cards as he wished. He counted them one by one. He transformed a few palms at the same time. After confirming that it was 11, he showed an exaggerated smiley face and held up the gold cards, “Princess Villa’s free gold card. 10 gift cards worth 888 black crystal coins from the Princess Retail Store! Rich! Master Dodo truly-handsome!”

The slime looked elated, full of energy, invincible youthful, truly handsome, and so on without the pitiful appearance that was on the verge of dying just now.

The Princess Villa free gold card? The Princess Retail Store gift cards? Chen Rui was stunned. Thinking of the slime’s performance and consistent cowardice when he fought against the Holy Dragon Rodriguez at the bottom of the Dead Sea, he suddenly had a realization in his mind — Wait, that’s not right!

The so-called ‘Free Gold Card’ was issued to the highest grade VIPs in limited quantities when the Princess Villa first opened. It can be used for 30 days, but it will expire within 2 years, and it has expired by now.

‘The Princess Retail Store Gift Card’ can be used, but the premise of obtaining the gift is that the accumulated consumption reaches 8888 black crystal coins, and it is limited to 1 at a time.

Well, obviously, the slime was duped.

Chen Rui glanced at Zola, just in time to meet Ms. Fairy Dragon’s gaze.

Ms. Fairy Dragon’s beautiful purple eyes blinked narrowly, and the word ‘blackhearted’ appeared in someone’s mind. He glanced at the slime sympathetically, and he shrugged at his madam wife without exposing it.

At this moment, a thick blood mist rose from the center of the shattered altar. The slime, who was shouting euphorically, shuddered, and his teeth began to chatter. Not only Dodo but also Chen Rui and the rest also felt a burst of uncontrollable fear as if something extremely terrifying was about to appear.

Now Paglio had basically lost his combat power, and Zola had almost exhausted all her power due to the previous blow. Under normal circumstances, Dodo could basically be ignored. The only 1 who still had the power to fight was Chen Rui.

Chen Rui shouted loudly and blocked in front of the fairy dragon as well as the poison dragon. Among the countless stars, hundreds of berserk Scorching Dragons roared out and rushed toward the blood mist.

The blood mist was still rising. The huge impact brought by [Scorching Dragon Roar] could not stir the floating blood mist even a little.

The berserk red dragon wave had rushed into the blood mist in the blink of an eye, but the moment it entered the blood mist, the terrifying momentum and light suddenly extinguished.

Disappear with no hope of returning. The words suddenly appeared in Chen Rui’s mind.

A pair of eyes seemed to have opened in the strange red mist. At the moment of opening, a dazzling red light suddenly erupted, and the countless terrifying huge beasts rolled back and rushed toward them.

Chen Rui was startled- [Scorching Dragon Roar] is reflected back!

Zola’s reaction was the fastest. With a wave of the Secret Shadow, a circle of rainbow appeared, blocking the front of the Scorching Dragons. However, the rainbow only resisted for a few seconds before being shattered by the Scorching Dragons.

But these few seconds gave Chen Rui valuable reaction time as he immediately activated the fusion power of the Star Conferring Platform and kept Zola, Paglio and Dodo into the Star Conferring Platform.

At this time, the Scorching Dragons that reflected back had already swarmed Chen Rui. The underground palace, which had lost its main altar defense power, kept shaking while many places had collapsed.

The red berserk flame finally extinguished. Most of the torches and magic lamps in the underground palace had been extinguished under this powerful impact. The magic lamp in the human world was different from the Demon Realm. It was the power of a pure light element which was easily disturbed and shattered.

Under the dim light, one could see the extremely damaged ground. A figure still stood still, but the broken armor had disappeared without a trace, and his momentum had also dropped significantly.

If it weren’t for the power of time law and [Demonic Flies Transformation], Chen Rui would have been annihilated by his own killing move just now.

In the blood mist were a pair of dark green eyes with an intimidating gaze. These eyes and gaze were familiar. No doubt it was the ‘acquaintance’ whom he had seen in the underground mine of the Thick Soil Castle.

“We meet again, Fear Lord Sosbach.” Chen Rui suddenly dissipated all his strength. He seemed to have only Warrior (Higher Demon) strength. He sat on the ground weakly, “Despite being a projection, you are much weaker than Quilliana. Is it because this main altar was destroyed?”

The faint green eyes flashed and locked on Chen Rui.

Chen Rui felt like a frog being stared at by a viper. Countless fears poured out of his mind, but he smiled, “Actually, I still have a lot of secrets I want to tell, but before that, you should catch up with someone who might be your… old friend.”

There was a badge in his hand, the Holy Ring Badge. When dodging the Scorching Dragons, he had activated the badge.

As soon as the words ended, a light beam descended inconceivably in the closed sky. The light beam was full of sacred and strong power. In the light, a figure gradually became clear with 12 white wings behind it.

1 of the 3 archangels, Raphael!

TL: He summoned Raphael? How can he explain himself for being here?

chapters.title: Chapter 997: Raphael Vs Sosbach
chapters.body:
Chapter 997: Raphael Vs Sosbach

During the battle of the Tree of Nature at the Jade Forest Sea, Chen Rui encountered his most terrifying foe, Hatred Lord Quilliana.

Even though it was just a projection, the strength displayed was enough to make Chen Rui annihilated in an instant. If it wasn’t for Quilliana’s desire to control him instead of destroying him from the beginning, Chen Rui would not have been able to win at all.

Now that he thought about that battle, it could be regarded as a fluke.

The projection of the Fear Lord Sosbach facing him today was far inferior to Quilliana.

As the top of the 3 rulers of the abyss, Quilliana must be stronger than Sosbach, but the real reason for Sosbach’s projection being so weak was that his main altar was destroyed.

Despite this, Fear Lord’s projection still showed a power that made Chen Rui feel extremely dangerous. He knew that he could not fight him. However, he did not use the power of the [Star Gate] to escape, but he activated a ‘best fit’ trump card without hesitation: The Holy Ring Badge.

The Holy Ring Badge was the biggest life-saving charm given to Chen Rui by Raphael when he was in the Golden Estate, which could summon the avatar of this archangel.

After Rafael (avatar) appeared, his first sight was fixed on Chen Rui, “No doubt you are still alive!”

Raphael had already received the news of the disappearance of ‘Arthur’. He was inevitably angry and depressed. It was the ‘Holy Child’ whom he won over to be his subordinate after using many means, but he unexpectedly suffered the ambush of the Black Death Follower in the Blue Glory Empire! The most important thing was that the Crown of Thorns which could affect the future of the Holy Church was still in the hands of ‘Arthur’. If the Crown of Thorns fell into the hands of the Black Death Follower, the consequences would be disastrous.

Now, Raphael finally breathed a sigh of relief as ‘Arthur’ had activated the last life-saving trump card that he gave and successfully summoned his avatar. However, the archangel was only relieved for a second as he immediately noticed that terrifying and familiar gaze that seemed to see through everything behind him.

Raphael’s pupils shrank suddenly. Without turning his head, he shouted out the name of a mortal enemy, “Sosbach!”

As soon as he said that, an extremely strong destruction power attacked from his back like a light stream. Raphael couldn’t dodge in time, and his body was abruptly cut in half, seemingly vulnerable.

It wasn’t that Raphael couldn’t defend, but because his first reaction after realizing that the enemy was Sosbach was not to turn around to fight or defend, but to cast a protective light around Chen Rui first.

This light was like a cocoon, wrapping Chen Rui and floating in the air. When the destruction power that split Raphael’s body in half hit the light cocoon, it was dispersed like hitting something slippery. Chen Rui’s body also flew into the distance because of this momentum, yet the light cocoon was still intact.

If it was any friend who ‘sacrificed himself to save him like this, Chen Rui would have gone up to fight Sosbach with all his strength. However, the Raphael in front of him was just an avatar, and the protection was obviously only activated for the sake of his value to the Holy Church. More importantly, there was a sneer on his face that was cut in half. This blow didn’t really hurt Raphael.

The 2 bodies changed for a while, turning into 2 identical Raphael which slowly turned around. The overlapping voice sounded, “Your strength… is unexpectedly weak, Sosbach.”

The green eyes in the blood mist condensed the facial features and body as the outline was glowing with a faint red light. It was a body about 3 meters high. When the red mouth grunted, Chen Rui felt the whole underground palace scene suddenly changed drastically, turning into a red sea.

The sea was filled with hot blood with an eerie and terrifying smell. Even within that ‘protective film’, Chen Rui still felt the destructive breath with terrifying heat and intense ‘fear’.

Although it was just a projection, Chen Rui could see it at a glance. This is not an ordinary spirit kingdom, but a real Pseudo-Kingdom of God. Sosbach actually has such a real blood sea in a certain plane!

The monstrous blood sea shot out a sky-high wave, which turned into countless pairs of blood-red claws that surrounded the 2 Raphaels overwhelmingly. Wherever the claws passed, countless cracks appeared in the space. The power was evident.

Raphael’s 2 bodies were smashed into countless pieces in the blink of an eye, but this attack method still couldn’t really cause effective damage as the shattered parts became more Raphaels again.

“Throne of Heavenly Sacrifice!” Hundreds of overlapping sounds came at the same time, and countless Raphaels shone brightly like the sun. They turned into light streams and crisscrossed in the air. These light streams didn’t rush into the blood sea. That kind of trajectory, in Chen Rui’s eyes, was ancient runes with infinite mystery.

The high-speed moving light streams were combined layer by layer to form a complex and mysterious ancient runes, which showed a magnificent throne, exuding mysterious power. The waves of the blood sea gradually subsided under this intangible force, and it could no longer release the bloody claws.

“The ignorant who rejoice in ignorance are like dead animals if they do not awake…”

“God has mercy on the world, but not on the deceitful wicked…”

“Sinners must be exterminated…”

During Raphael’s loud recitation, the blood sea trembled violently. Its height dropped inch by inch as if it was drying up.

All of a sudden, the blood sea, which was suppressed to a low point, boiled frantically again. It condensed a huge face that roared at the throne in the air.

This roar carried a terrifying might, and countless tiny cracks appeared on the protective light cocoon beside Chen Rui, but fortunately, it did not shatter. The one that was hit the most was the ‘Throne of Heavenly Sacrifice’” above. The light streams that made up the throne were suddenly shattered and disordered; almost collapsed entirely.

“If your power is a little stronger, you can completely collapse my avatar from the beginning, but unfortunately…” The countless overlapping voices in the scattered light streams sounded. By the time the word ‘unfortunately’ sounded, the sense of overlap had disappeared. The light stream seemed to merge into 1.

The light stream reconverged into the Throne of Heavenly Sacrifice, and a 12-winged giant figure appeared on the throne. When the figure appeared, the blood sea and the huge head seemed to freeze in an instant.

Chen Rui could see it clearly. This was a special might that could bind the opponent’s power, kingdom and even might.

“The controller of this world is the 3 archangels. Even if it is to be destroyed, it is by us, not the Abyss.” Raphael said it in the Abyss language, probably because he was concerned about the presence of the ‘Holy Child’ that still had value. However, he never imagined that the inconspicuous ‘ant’ in the corner could easily understand the meaning of this sentence.

Having said that, the silver long staff in Raphael’s hand paused for a while, and the huge head condensed in the blood sea below shook slightly and burst open in an instant. At the same time, the entire blood sea kingdom exploded. Chen Rui felt his mind shake, and his vision was blurred, then he returned to the original dark underground palace scene.

The shattered protective light membrane gradually disappeared. Chen Rui showed a frightening appearance while gasping for breath. After a while, he finally calmed down and bowed, “Sir Raphael! Thank you for saving me!”

Raphael’s eyes swept across the scene in the underground palace, and he finally looked at Chen Rui, exuding a faint majesty, “Tell me what you have experienced. Don’t miss any details.”

Chen Rui had already felt the strangeness in the [Analytical Eyes]. This Raphael’s information is actually all unable to be determined!

In other words, what stood in front of me now is not the avatar summoned by the Holy Ring Badge but the real Raphael!

Chen Rui had seen Satan and Sariel fighting. Both of them used the secret technique to turn the projected avatar into a real body step by step. Raphael apparently also used this secret technique, presumably because the enemy had a very heavy weight and he did not dare to neglect it. As for the 3 rulers of the destruction, there must be some kind of restriction that caused them unable to turn the projection into the real body.

Although he thought quickly in his mind, he did not hesitate on the surface. He told the ‘personal experience’ that he had been preparing for a long time. At the engagement ceremony of the Blue Glory Empire, ‘Arthur’ was voluntarily imprisoned in the prison out of guilt for Princess Landbis, but unexpectedly, a group of mysterious people rushed into the prison, knocked him unconscious and kidnapped him. He didn’t know what happened next, but he only knew that he had been brought to this terrifying place after several twists and turns.

There was a mysterious leader wearing a red mask. After confirming that ‘Arthur’ was the 1 who got the Crown of Thorns, he began to hold a special sacrificial ritual to sacrifice him to the Evil God.

At the critical moment, the 2 guardians who had been searching for the special secret left by ‘Arthur’ finally arrived. The 2 tried their best to destroy the entire altar, but in the end, they lost and died to Evil God who was summoned by the mysterious leader at the cost of his life.

At this time, ‘Arthur’, who had barely recovered his mobility, struggled to take out the Holy Ring Badge given by Raphael, summoned Raphael at the last moment, and finally defeated Evil God.

In fact, there were still some details to be scrutinized in this story, such as why the guardians did not appear before ‘Arthur’ came here, why the Holy Ring Badge was not taken away by the enemy and so on. However, in Raphael’s view, ‘Arthur’ had no reason to lie in front of him, and the most important thing was that it was an indisputable fact that the main altar of the Fear Lord was destroyed. If the main altar was not destroyed, it was impossible to beat Sosbach so easily even if Raphael personally descended.

“Very good!” Raphael nodded. The main altar of the 3 rulers of the Abyss was not simple. It could absorb the destruction faith of the entire plane. It was 1 of the most important powers of the mysterious cult, and it was unique. Every Abyss ruler had only 1 main altar. Once destroyed, it would take enormous time and effort to rebuild.

Now that the ‘fear’ main altar had been destroyed, it was equivalent to breaking 1 side of the mysterious cult’s trident. For the Holy Church, it was a glorious victory. As for the fall of the guardians of ‘Arthur’, it was not worthy to mention at all.

“Arthur, you’ve done a great job this time. What reward do you want?”

Chen Rui looked at the blood stains left by the poison dragon on the ground and said with a hopeful expression in his eyes, “Sir Raphael, is there any secret technique to resurrect?”

“Even if it is a resurrection potion, the constraints are quite large, not to mention this kind of complete annihilation.” Raphael’s senses were very sharp. He immediately recognized that those fresh bloodstains were indeed left by dragons, so he no longer had the slightest doubt in his mind, “You can use the Holy Grail to confine their souls before they are completely annihilated, then sacrifice them with something pure and bright like the Snow Dallet Flower, which will hopefully restore the soul. Following that, try to find a body and resurrect it with the secret technique.”

The Snow Dallet sacrifice? Chen Rui was intrigued. He showed a frustrated expression on his face, “I got the Holy Grail not long ago, but I only got its initial approval, and I can’t activate it yet.”

“You have been recognized by the Holy Grail? It seems that your talent is as good as your physique!” Raphael’s eyes lit up slightly, then he shook his head, “Unfortunately, let alone now that the soul has completely dissipated, even if it is kept in the Holy Grail, the Snow Dallet Flower is also impossible… In short, don’t think about it. If you lack a guardian, I can send an angel from the church to protect you.

“No need for now… I lost not only my guardian but also my partner and lover. This incident has made me comprehend a lot of things. No position can compare to real power.” Chen Rui sighed sadly, then his gaze gradually became firmer, “My other super-level guardian should be on his way. I will leave a secret mark to meet him as soon as possible. For Prince Arthur, who has been kidnapped, hiding in the dark is safer than going to the open place now. I need to disappear for a while. After I’ve dealt with some trivial matters, I will discard those superfluous things and enter the Holy Light Mountain with unshakable will and determination. I will also ask sir for more guidance at that time. “

“This time is fruitful after all since you can recognize this. You must personally kill the enemy who has taken your relatives and friends to be considered a real revenge.” Raphael nodded approvingly, “You will have such a day. When you completely digest the ancient inheritance, I will give you real responsibility. If you show enough effort and aptitude, I can even ask for the divine grace to descend on you and convert you into an angel with eternal life.”

“Eternal life? Thank you sir!” Chen Rui’s eyes lit up with a delighted expression on his face, but the words ‘eternal your ass’ came to his mind.

“Okay, I’ll take you out of here first!” Raphael waved his hand, and a ring of light imprinted with terrifying power landed in the center of the underground palace and quickly spread around. The next second, Chen Rui felt a change in the space, and he had already appeared in the air.

“ Boom …” There was a violent tremor in the distance. It seemed that another terrifying earthquake had occurred. A large area of the main mountain range of Red Rock Mountain had collapsed.

The huge underground world Golden Bright Underground Palace excavated by the cave hobbit had finally become history.

TL: Is that the way to save Veronica?

chapters.title: Chapter 998: Unexpected Good News
chapters.body:
Chapter 998: Unexpected Good News

After completely solving the crisis in the Golden Bright Underground Palace, Raphael didn’t stay long because of this ‘little character’. According to Chen Rui’s request, Raphael placed him in the border town of the nearby Monto Empire and left.

Since the Holy Ring Badge had expired and Raphael had no item to summon his avatar at the moment, Chen Rui was not willing to give the ‘great credit’ to the Holy Church in vain.

Under the deliberate guise of losing his partner and lover, and considering that the credit was indeed great, Raphael pondered for a moment and finally rewarded him with something.

Brilliant Thunder of Light.

Like the Holy Ring Badge, this was a consumable item, but instead of summoning, it explodes.

Once activated with the steps told by Raphael and given a trace of special Pseudo-God might, it would unleash terrifying destructive power, especially if ‘Arthur’ would rather die than be threatened by darkness and evil in the future.

It is definitely a good item to save my life and get away from those hard-to-fight foes. In combination with the [Star Gate], it might well turn the tide of the battle.

Perhaps in the future, this good stuff can also be used in the Holy Light Mountain? Well, am I too cruel…

Compared with the earth origin fragment and destroying the main altar, Brilliant Thunder of Light was actually just a bonus. There was another bonus, that was, when witnessing Raphael and Sosbach’s battle, the ancient runes that condensed ‘Throne of Heavenly Sacrifice’ had been completely recorded by [Deep Analysis]. Although it was impossible to rely on this to compete with Raphael, as long as the mystery of these runes could be deciphered, he and Zola’s understanding of ancient runes would also go to a higher level.

The ancient runes were called the language of the gods. Judging from the previous Pseudo-God battles, there were some traces of ancient runes. It was likely to be a key to unlocking the mystery of ‘might’. It must not be ignored. In fact, Chen Rui and Zola had been comprehending the mystery of ancient runes while training. They had also taught ancient runes to Paglio and others, but this kind of runes was too difficult and profound. Even the poison dragon who had a very high attainment of the Dragon Inscription found it difficult to master.

As for the Brilliant Thunder of Light, Chen Rui still wanted to do a little bit of work. Raphael still had some reservations on this ‘super bomb’, that was, he could stop the explosion of the Brilliant Thunder of Light at any time. This meant that Chen Rui could not activate this thing in front of Raphael. What Chen Rui had to do was to block Raphael’s control, which was not an easy task, but he even assimilated Sariel’s Evil Pupil, let alone this little bomb?

Not only that, Chen Rui also wanted to modify the bomb to further enhance its power.

3 hours later.

Storm Island.

The merged state of the Star Conferring Platform was indeed amazing. Zola, Paglio and Dodo had fully recovered their injuries and power after being released. Even Paglio, who was in the most dire state, was no exception. The price was a corresponding number of faith crystals. This ‘huge amount’ was just a drop in the bucket for Chen Rui.

After listening to Chen Rui’s brief description of the ending of the battle in the underground palace, the poison dragon pointed to his nose in astonishment, “You mean I’m already dead?”

“For the sake of the plot. Hehe .” Chen Rui shrugged, “Your part should end. Otherwise, you will steal too much screen time from the protagonist in this script.”

Paglio was naturally used to hearing these strange ‘terms’. He glanced at Zola and sneered coldly, “The problem is, the heroine is also ‘dead’. Let’s just wait for the troll to be trolled to death.”

“What?” Zola asked without responding to the poison dragon’s provocation as if she didn’t hear it clearly.

This sentence made Master Poison Dragon feel a little nervous. Okay, the 2 of you are a team. I will not fight with you.

“ Hmph Hmph! I’ll end my part then. I can also get out of Little Betty’s vision and wander around to see if there are any beauties to hook up with. The air of freedom tastes really wonderful…” The poison dragon sat on the ground and exaggeratedly took a few deep breaths, making it clear that he was demonstrating to someone whose wife was watching.

“Then… just take a few breaths of the wonderful air of freedom now.” Chen Rui said regretfully, “Because your Little Betty will be here soon.”

“What did you say?” Paglio bounced as though his ass seemed to be on fire.

“I have used a communication talisman to get in touch with the Golden Estate. Ms. Betty is already on her way to Storm Island. When we get here, we will go back to the Demon Realm together. I need to hand over the earth origin fragment to Moore.”

“Go back to the Demon Realm? That’s fine too!” The sly poison dragon rolled his eyes, “You can’t leave your Ms. Yini alone in the Golden Estate, plus your loyalist knight. Better let Little Betty protect her there.”

“Don’t worry, Zola will disguise as Betty and go to the Golden Estate to protect Yini. Zola is now Demi-God and with Gueroas’ secret support, even if there is any situation, she can take Yini and Samuel to leave safely.”

The poison dragon was dumbfounded for a while, then he finally roared angrily, “I will fight to death with you!”

The slime on the side ignored the 2 people who were fighting fiercely. The onion produced 11 hands, each holding a golden card, as it shouted excitedly, “Back – to – the – demon – realm!”

Paglio’s struggle could not change the ending. After breathing the air of freedom for a few days, Ms. Betty rushed to Storm Island and Zola went to the Golden Estate. Chen Rui used the Star Conferring Platform to bring along the poison dragon couple and the slime through the [Star Gate] to go back to the Star Point on the Dark Moon Estate.

The light door disappeared. Looking at the familiar courtyard, Chen Rui felt a touch of warmth in his heart.

The yard was very quiet today. By right, even without the poison dragon and Dodo, the scourges like Ms. Black Dragon, the flat-chested loli, and Student Nephew were enough to make the whole yard lively. The little mermaid princess was even more proficient in rubbing salt into the wound. As for the naga girl, she was a very good listener and participant, so everyone liked her. Of course, the premise of this ‘lively’ was the absence of the cutest daughter, little phoenix. If Darling Duoduo was there, it would not be ‘lively’ but ‘turned upside down’.

The whole house was silent, and there seemed to be no one there. When Chen Rui was about to release the poison dragon and others, he heard footsteps outside.

A familiar figure came in at the door. She was not tall, wearing a long white dress with long golden curly hair. She had a delicate appearance of about 13 years old, and her purple eyes looked smart and beautiful.

This figure reminded Chen Rui of the scene when he was first reborn in the Demon Realm. This was the first woman he met… er , to be precise, the first girl, little girl.

It had been more than 7 years, and the little sister was still the same as the loli back then. She had almost no change. This was also the most distressing fact for this loli.

“Alice.”

Looking at the familiar smile, Alice was stunned for a while, but after a while, she came back to her senses and pounced over, “Brother! You’re back!”

Chen Rui did not evade. Based on past experience, once he avoided it, there would be no tiger pouncing behind him. There were also a series of ‘killing moves’ such as Alice’s throat lock, Alice’s neck strangle, Alice’s hair pull, and loli sitting.

Except for Duoduo, no one could compete with Alice.

Very smoothly, a koala successfully hung on his body.

Feeling the warmth of the girl’s body and the joy from the bottom of her heart, Chen Rui smiled and ruffled her beautiful curly long hair.

“Brother, you are the worst!” The girl hung on him coquettishly and swayed around. If it wasn’t for Chen Rui’s strength, he suspected that his cervical vertebra would develop hyperostosis by the swaying.

“By the way, where did Olypheus, Lalaria and the others go?”

“Adeline and Helen wanted to go back to the Dead Sea some time ago to visit their tribe and relatives. It just happened that Lalaria got a treasure map of the Dead Sea last time, so Olypheus suggested going treasure hunting together. Therefore, they went to the Dead Sea. By the way, your subordinate Vesilna also followed.”

Chen Rui nodded. He instructed Vesilna to follow Lalaria just in case. Although the Dead Sea was dangerous, Adeline and Helen themselves were sea creature tribes. Besides, there were 2 Demi-God level powerhouses, Lalaria and Vesilna. Hence, this trip shouldn’t be a big problem.

“Alice, why didn’t you go with them?”

Speaking of this, the little loli’s face was full of unhappiness, “Sister didn’t allow me to go, then I secretly wanted to go with them, but I was caught by that bad woman, Manlace.”

Manlace was the strongest maroon lamp spirit. Alice’s full name for her was actually ‘bad woman without clothes’, because she first saw Manlace when Chen Rui successfully resurrected the maroon lamp spirits. The newly resurrected maroon lamp spirits, uh , had no clothes on. What the little loli cared about the most was – another big boobs lady!

Manlace was the lamp spirits commander responsible for the safety of Shea and her sister, so to capture the escaped loli was actually doing her duty. Chen Rui did not continue on this topic. He looked at the grumpy Alice and smiled, “I will take you to the Dead Sea when I have time later. By the way, why didn’t I see Kia and the others. Is Athena in the palace now?”

“You only think about them…” Alice suddenly remembered something, and her big eyes suddenly turned red, “Athena, Athena…”

The more the little loli thought, the sadder she was. Tears rolled down her cheeks, startling Chen Rui, “Alice? What’s wrong with Athena?”

“Little princess, why are you walking so fast…” The voice of the little succubus maid sounded from the door. The little succubus also heard Alice’s cry, so she walked in quickly, just in time to see Chen Rui.

Chen Rui also saw Kia and… Little Duoduo in her arms.

“Daddy!” The little phoenix sensed daddy’s breath as she approached the yard, so she immediately broke free from Kia’s embrace and flew toward Chen Rui. Soon, there was another young little loli around his neck. At the same time, there were many drool marks on his face.

Chen Rui kissed his daughter, but Darling Duoduo disliked his spiky beard and pulled his hair in dissatisfaction.

The little succubus maid came over and smiled, “You are back.”

“ En .” Chen Rui leaned forward and kissed the succubus’s face with 2 lolis hanging on it, “Kia, what happened to Athena?”

Hearing Athena’s name, there was a bit of special resentment in the succubus’ eyes.

“Okay, little princess, come down first. Duoduo, you and Sister Alice will play for a while. Aunt Kia and daddy will come to the side to talk a bit.”

The 2 big and little loli showed their dissatisfaction at the same time. Chen Rui only knew something happened to Athena, so he quickly coaxed Alice and Duoduo before he followed Kia to the side.

“You and Athena…”

Chen Rui was a little anxious with the hesitant look of the little succubus, “Kia, speak up if you have something to say!”

Kia finally made up her mind, “The night before you brought Zola and the others to the human world, did you and Athena… do ‘that’?”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Why would you ask this question?”

“Answer quickly!”

“ Uh , yes.” Chen Rui scratched his head. Wasn’t it Athena’s turn that day?

“Do you still remember… What poses did you 2 use?” The little succubus bit her lip, and she actually took out a small notebook to record.

“ Ah ?” Chen Rui showed a strange expression. What kind of question is this?

The questions that follow were even more outrageous, including whether other ‘passages’ were used, how many times of ‘ papapa ‘, whether the total was odd or even, and other embarrassing questions.

Facing the curious and serious gossip succubus reporter, Chen Rui was completely speechless. Judging from Kia’s appearance, Athena shouldn’t be in any danger.

“About Chen Rui… um ,” The little succubus maid whispered to his ear with a blushing face, “Let’s follow the steps you and her did last time tonight, okay? No, every night. Is that okay?”

With that said, the little succubus actually stretched out her tongue and licked his ears. This kind of seduction talent made Chen Rui not only shiver, but he also had the urge to punish this succubus on the spot — Hey, of course it’s okay to ask for a sex, but you should pay attention to not influence Alice and Duoduo. They are still there…

“Tell me first, what’s wrong with Athena?” Chen Rui’s voice was a little loud, and Alice in the distance heard it. The Royal Highness Little Princess had stopped crying, and was pricking up her ears to eavesdrop. When Kia and Chen Rui were intimate, her heart was a little sour, then when she heard the word ‘Athena’, she even burst into tears.

Seeing Alice crying, Little Phoenix Duoduo joined in the fun and started crying.

“Brother doesn’t want me anymore!” (Crying…)

“Daddy doesn’t want Duoduo anymore!” ( Cooperating with crying… )

“Athena is going to be a mother, and I’m still single!” ( Wailing… )

“Aunt Athena has a baby, daddy doesn’t want Duoduo anymore!” ( Cooperating with wailing… )

“…”

Chen Rui stared at the 2 lolis who were hugging and crying, then at the succubus who was full of resentment and envy. He finally realized what happened to Athena.

What a surprisingly… great news!

TL: Another children so fast?

chapters.title: Chapter 999: Mother-To-Be Athena
chapters.body:
Chapter 999: Mother-To-Be Athena

Athena was actually pregnant. This was indeed a very unexpected good news.

Chen Rui once thought that he had a soul-reborn crossover attribute, which made it impossible for women in this world to conceive. The birth of Duoduo was actually an exception, because the little phoenix was equivalent to using the secret technique to borrow Catherine as the main body. It was not a real fertilization and pregnancy. Of course, this did not affect Duoduo’s position in the hearts of Chen Rui and the girls.

Today, Athena’s successful pregnancy had broken a certain scruple that Chen Rui had been worried about. In a sense, the continuation of bloodline also meant that he, an ‘outsider’, had truly been recognized by the world.

Dark Moon Royal Palace.

“Athena, take a rest first, I’ll get these official documents done right away.”

“You don’t need to practice swords anymore. I heard Catherine say that it’s best not to exercise vigorously, but you can’t lie still all day. I’ll accompany you to walk around the palace later.”

“Tonight we eat mushroom meatball soup, as well as green vegetables, purple eggplant, white stone fish…”

“I know you don’t like to eat purple eggplant, but you are a mother-to-be now. This is a mother-to-be nutrition recipe specially provided by Catherine. For the sake of yourself and our baby, you must eat it!”

“…”

Athena looked at this talkative man with a blissful smile on her face.

Some time ago, she had been feeling unwell, but she didn’t take it to heart. Later, when Catherine sent Duoduo to the Dark Moon Estate, she noticed that she was retching. Her Majesty Empress was always attentive, and she had experienced it before, so she immediately realized something. After repeated inspections, she finally confirmed that Athena was pregnant.

Athena was both surprised and delighted. Originally, because she had to take care of the Dark Moon Estate, she was inevitably a little sad as she couldn’t accompany Chen Rui to travel and take adventures like Zola and Isabella. Now that she was going to be a mother, the good news swept away these emotions swept away.

Considering the situation that human ‘Chen Rui’ deliberately showed at the Dark Moon Estate before, this news was not spread. Only the closest friends and relatives knew it. Certainly, Shea and the girls were so happy for Athena and envious at the same time. No wonder Kia would do that ‘interview recording’ behavior.

Athena’s father, George, the first general of the Fallen Angel Empire, was even more ecstatic. Mom Red Dragon Gloria, who had the best relationship with Athena, came to the Dark Moon from the Warlock Fortress to take care of his daughter.

Looking at her busy son-in-law, Mom Red Dragon became more and more satisfied – This man is not only excellent in strength, but he also has a deep relationship with Athena, and is attentive and caring to his wife. If there is any ‘shortcoming’, it is that he has more than 1 woman, but this situation is common in the Demon Realm. Chen Rui is considered to have very few women. My husband, George, has nearly twice as many wives and concubines, and George is very restrained among the noble families of the same level. For ordinary noble families, dozens or hundreds of wives and concubines are basically common.

However, the other wives of this son-in-law are not simple. The empresses of the 2 empires alone are enough to shock the entire Demon Realm. ‘Royal Highness Prince Consort’ is unique. Athena’s ability to share a man with Her Majesty Empress is also a proud honor for the Wales Family.

“Actually, I’m not so delicate. Just do things as usual. You don’t need to make a fuss about it.” Athena laughed, “Catherine said that it will take at least 2 years to give birth, and now I can’t see any abnormality on the outside. Furthermore, I can feel that the child’s condition has basically stabilized. I just need to pay more attention in the last few months.”

Whether it was a creature from the human world or the Demon Realm, it was much more difficult for a powerhouse to have an offspring than for ordinary people, especially when both husband and wife had powerful strength. Athena was also a high-level powerhouse, not to mention the strength of Chen Rui, so it was quite difficult.

As for the pregnancy period, there were long and short ones. The short term was similar to the ‘10-month pregnancy’ that Chen Rui knew in his previous life. Catherine gave birth to the little phoenix with this time period, but Ms. Duoduo was a special case – Duoduo belonged to the immortal soul bloodline reincarnation. She was born smoothly after using Catherine’s blood and power to brew a mature embryo. This birth did not blindly absorb the energy of the maternal body. On the contrary, Catherine had also obtained considerable benefits. The secret technique of exhausting power to fight the enemy of higher realm was derived from the special power of Duoduo, as well as [Fire Phoenix’s Yearning] and so on.

A race with a long pregnancy period could last for several years or even longer. In theory, the stronger the strength and the stronger the potential of the child, the longer the pregnancy period would be. The most representative was dragons. Pregnancy often lasted for more than 10 years or decades, but the baby was very powerful at birth.

Pregnant maternal body generally had the most accurate sense of pregnancy. Firstly, Athena had no experience of being a mother. Secondly, her strength had grown too fast in recent years that she was still unable to use it freely, so there was no way to sense the length of pregnancy. However, according to Catherine’s preliminary judgment, the due date should be much longer than when she was pregnant with Duoduo: At least 2 years.

“You still have to be careful. Alright, I won’t disturb you young couple…” Gloria added worriedly, “Remember, although the condition of the fetus has stabilized, don’t make too many intimacy movements so as not to affect the child.”

The last sentence made the 2 of them blush immediately. Even Chen Rui, who had a thick face, was no exception. Mom Red Dragon had always been bold and not long-winded. She walked out of the room with a big laugh.

Chen Rui and Athena stared at each other for a while, and they finally smiled at each other. Chen Rui came to her side, squatted down, and put his ear to her belly and listened.

“It’s still early! Even my stomach is flat now. I don’t see any change in appearance.” Athena said while stroking his hair lightly with her fingers.

Chen Rui closed his eyes, concentrated his mind, and gradually sensed a faint fluctuation of life. In an instant, a feeling of bloodline connection surged in his heart, which was not only a feeling but also a touching emotion.

Although Athena couldn’t see that kind of expression, she could feel the emotion in her heart. She stroked his back, feeling like she, the child and Chen Rui were integrated into one whole. Her heart was instantly filled with happiness.

“Do you like girls or boys?”

“I like both. Boys should be as smart as I’m, and girls should be as beautiful as you.”

“In Paglio’s words, you’re cunning, and as for me… I’m not as beautiful as Catherine, Zola and the others.”

“No, you are the most beautiful.” Chen Rui took her hand and put it on his face, “It has always been so. From the first time I saw you, that heroic, generous and beautiful female swordsman is imprinted in my heart – You are unique.”

“Sweet-talking guy.” Athena felt sweet in her heart, “No wonder even Alice falls for you.”

“I’m wronged!” Chen Rui jumped up quickly to clarify his innocence, “I really have nothing to do with Alice! As soon as I came back, I was inexplicably held by her as she cried out lot. In the end, Duoduo also cried, saying that you have a baby and don’t want her anymore. I had to coax her for a long time.”

“Duoduo is so silly. She will always be the baby of us, and she will be the eldest sister in the future. As for Alice…” Athena suddenly sighed, “Tell me honestly, how long are you going to make the little princess wait? Didn’t you guys have an agreement?”

“That agreement… she was still young at the time.” Chen Rui shrugged, “it was just a tactic of delaying. I think that she will be able to find someone she really likes in the future.”

“So now, who do you think she really likes?” Athena shook her head, “When Alice knew that I was pregnant, she was very happy but also very sad. She knew you before me. Since then, she has always secretly liked you. Now I have your children, yet she is still alone. How many years we have loved each other is equivalent to the number of years she has waited for you.”

Athena’s last sentence touched Chen Rui’s heart. He was not wood, and he knew what Alice was thinking. Although her appearance and personality seem to be the same as before, the loli of that year had grown up after all.

“Shea would kill me if she knew.”

“You think Princess Royal… Ugh, Royal Majesty is a fool?” Athena looked into Chen Rui’s eyes, “Do you know how many nobles have asked Princess Royal, er … Her Majesty Shea for marriage over the past few years? ? However, these requests were all rejected by Her Majesty. As an older sister, Her Majesty knows very well who Alice is waiting for. If… it is Alice, not only me and Shea, even Kia, Zola and the others can accept it. “

Chen Rui smiled wryly, “Let’s go with the flow then.”

“ Hmph ! Still pretending to be innocent! You should feel lucky, if it wasn’t for our child, I wouldn’t be so generous…” Athena glared at him, “By the way, my secretary hasn’t come to report yet. Is it because she can’t get out of bed because of the ‘hard work’ late at night?”

Chen Rui sneered a few times. It really is like this. The fact that Athena was pregnant made the little succubus envious, so she had been entangling him a lot these days. She actually strictly followed the posture and steps he remembered the last time he had sex with Athena. This cycle kept repeating, and she eventually exhausted herself, which was ludicrous.

“When will you bring back your fiancee princess in the human world?”

“Why do I smell a sour smell?” Chen Rui laughed, “Aren’t you more generous when you have a child?”

Athena bit her lip and was about to twist his waist, but he hugged her in his arms, telling what happened in the human world, especially the transaction between the Blue Glory Empire and Landbis.

Hearing Chen Rui rejecting marriage in public at the engagement ceremony, Athena hugged him happily even though she knew it was just a deal. Meanwhile, the thrilling battle at the Tree of Nature and the Golden Bright Underground Palace made her nervous.

“I came back this time to go to Mountain Xilang to hand over the earth origin fragment to Moore, then I gave to go back to the human world to do some things, including going to the Holy Light Mountain to comprehend creation origin and bringing back Raizen’s daughter. Finally, i will also bring Zola and Yini back as well as the Samuel Family that I told you about.”

With that said, Chen Rui kissed Athena’s face, “I can now travel between the 2 worlds freely. Next time, when you are free of work, I will take you to the human world for a vacation.”

“ En .” Athena knew about the 3 empires’ alliance and Tiffany, and she nodded, “This time to Mountain Xilang…”

“Let’s go together? Just like back then?”

Athena felt warm as she reminisced the scene where she and the ‘human mining officer’ went to Mountain Xilang hand in hand. However, she shook her head, “I’m too busy, take Alice with you.”

“Why are you promoting Alice again?”

“If I don’t promote Alice, should I wait until you marry the Bloody Empire’s empress? The Sir Prince Consort of the 3 empires?”

“Why are you jealous again? Where is the wise and generous madam general, madam lord and madam wife?” Chen Rui exclaimed exaggeratedly, “No! I want to check to see if someone is impersonating my Athena!”

With that said, this guy actually started to take off Athena’s clothes for ‘examination’. The female madam general was very sensitive during pregnancy. After her symbolic resistance was invalid and her private part was being assaulted frequently, she finally gave up the resistance. Amidst the moaning and breathing sounds, her gaze became intoxicated gradually. The lust she had accumulated for a long time finally poured out like a flood. She was completely immersed in the sex with him.

TL: Still feel a little weird for Alice to be his woman…

chapters.title: Chapter 1000: Loli’S Diary
chapters.body:
Chapter 1000: Loli’S Diary

X year X month X day.

Fine weather. Probably because of the presence of brother, the light of the 2 moons felt particularly warm.

Brother and I embarked on a journey to Mountain Xilang, and I can’t think of any words to describe my current mood. Maybe I should learn Lalaria’s kind of laughing “Oh Ho ho ho ho…”

I don’t know how Lalaria and the others are doing after going to the Dead Sea. Alian and Eve are now concentrating on learning mechanical skills with Uncle Fonsaq behind closed doors. I haven’t seen them for a long time. I miss them very much. This time, although I couldn’t sneak into the Dead Sea and was caught back by that bad woman, I could go to Mountain Xilang with brother, it’s just… Oh Ho ho ho!

Brother finally doesn’t have to hide his strength like he used to. His ‘shifting’ is really amazing. The space seems to be compressed. He can cross a distance of tens of thousands of meters or even more in one step, which is more exciting than playing ‘Titanic’ in the air.

Our mission this time is to conquer the earth elementals occupying the earth realm at the west of the Dark Moon Estate!

Set off! Girl!

In this battle, we did not send the Wyvern Legion, but we dispatched the most elite and invincible ‘Alice Attack Legion’. The legion has only 2 most powerful man and woman, that is Alice and her brother!

We must sweep the earth realm and bring the elementals to our feet.

Uh… wait, the last time I went to the earth realm, I pretended to be my brother’s fiancée. Then, I was actually acknowledged by Earth Elemental King Moore and he gave me a gift of light and dark crystal. Later, I gave the crystal to sister to help her break through to the Demon Overlord.

Since Moore is so kind, I will persuade my brother king as a wife to let him give up his plan to conquer the earth realm. This story of giving up the country for the sake of beauty will be written into a novel by later generations. No, it will go down in history…

(The above was excerpted from ‘Alice’s Diary’)

“Alice, what are you writing?”

“It’s nothing,” Alice hurriedly put away the small notebook and pen as she took a breath of the rich aroma of food in the air, “Brother, is your meat done?”

“It’s not my meat.” Chen Rui rolled his eyes, “It’s the spicy fried pork chops I made. Come, try it.”

Alice took a bite, “ Wow! It’s delicious! This scent is so special! Never tasted it before!”

“This is a high-quality spice in the human world called cyanobacteria millet. It’s a bit hot, eat it slowly!”

“ Ah , hot! So hot!” Alice shouted while fanning her hand to her mouth, “Brother, I’m so hot…”

Looking at the appearance of a loli creature with her lips raised, Chen Rui was speechless for a while. How is this asking for cooling? It is clearly asking for kissing…

“This bottle of iced juice is for you. Don’t drink too much, or your stomach will hurt.”

Alice took the juice from Chen Rui with a displeased expression. She drank it all in a huff, and bit into the fried pork steak with bitter hatred as if it wasn’t delicious food but a guy who didn’t understand her seduction.

Chen Rui shook his head secretly. If we follow the normal shifting speed, although it takes a lot of energy, half a day is enough to get to Mountain Xilang, so there is no need to stay in the black rainforest. It took a long time to camp and rest after landing in the black rainforest because of Alice’s strong request. Anyway, this time I am not in a hurry, so I just did what she wanted, but it seems that the Royal Highness Little Princess seems to have other premeditions… He looked at the 2 moons above his head, which color was gradually changing, then he looked at the loli with a flickering gaze. Chen Rui had a hunch that it might not be peaceful tonight.

After finally finishing the steak, Chen Rui deliberately told a few small jokes, which aroused Alice’s interest again. When he said the funny thing, the loli could no longer maintain her poker face and laughed.

The rejuvenated Alice carefully combed her beautiful hair with a comb, then she took a small toothbrush and a towel to the tent to wash. Suddenly, she screamed in shock. Almost instantly, Chen Rui appeared in the tent beside her, “What’s the matter?”

“Gnawing mouse!” Alice’s face was full of fear while hugging him tightly, “I’m afraid!”

Chen Rui was speechless – You are afraid of gnawing mice? Last time at the Princess Retail Store, it seemed that a certain Royal Highness Little Princess heroically threw a gnawing mouse’s tail into the cage, euphemistically called ‘the princess’ special pet’. It’s actually sold for a high price of 5 black crystal coins.

Chen Rui also didn’t expose Alice’s tricks, but let her hug him all the way to the magic tent, “You can sleep at ease. This tent is not only safe but also very comfortable.”

“Brother… Are we going to sleep so soon?” Loli’s eyes lit up.

“Yeah, we have to travel early tomorrow morning.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “You rest here, I will guard outside, lest things like gnawing mice come and scare you again.”

Gnawing mouse? Alice was speechless for a while as she started it all. Then loli seemed to remember something, and she started to look at Chen Rui with a strange gaze. She was looking at his mouth, and then at his eyes, repeating a few times, until his heart shuddered. He quickly said, “Rest well, I’m going out first.”

“Wait a minute!” Alice rolled her eyes, “I can’t sleep right now, brother. Can you tell me a story first?”

“ En .”

Chen Rui sat down and was about to speak when Alice put her head on his lap, “Can you tell the story like this?”

“ Uh … okay.”

“Let’s just tell the story of a Rapunzel…”

As soon as he started talking for a while, the loli moved and moved until she sat on his lap, “This position is more comfortable.”

“…”

“Brother, can you touch my hair?”

“…”

“Brother, does my neck look good?”

“…”

The whole story ended hastily. The loli, who should have gone to sleep after listening to the story, sat up, with a grumpy puffed up face as she stared at Chen Rui angrily.

“Alice…” Chen Rui spread his hands innocently. I didn’t offend you, right?

“Liar!” Alice slammed a book on the ground and cried, “It’s a lie, you are a liar! You’re all liars!”

Chen Rui picked up the book, and the title was ‘A Guide to Women’s Obtaining Kisses’. When he turned to the first page, the first article read:

Kissing hint 1: You need hot and straight eyes. Look at his lips, and then put vision back in his eyes, staring at him like this. As long as he is a man, he will definitely be unable to hold back.

Kissing hint 2: Let him stroke your hair. Before that, you need to take care of your hair carefully and exude a fragrance that he likes. The head is where women like to be touched by a man. Letting him stroke your hair is a proactive and seductive sign, unless he’s incompetent.

Kissing hint 3: Sit on his lap and let him look at your white neck. Studies have shown that 1 of man’s most favorite parts of a woman’s body is the neck. As long as it is not a man with physical or psychological problems, it will induce a sense of longing for you.

Kissing hint 4…

Chen Rui was sweating profusely, and he finally understood what Alice’s previous strange actions and preparations were all about. After a long time, he was actually labeled as ‘not a man’, ‘incompetent’, ‘man with physical or psychological problems’ and so on.

If you don’t succeed, then he is not a man. How strong is the resentment of the author of this book?

“I know you like Athena, sister, Kia, Teacher Zola, female fox, Empress Catherine… You like a lot of people, even Adeline, but you don’t like me!” Alice’s eyes were red, “Your promise with me is just trying to delay time. But, I have always liked you, even before Athena. Do you know that?”

“Alice, listen to me…” Chen Rui sighed. He came to her side and sat down, “The most important thing about love is consensual. It’s not that if you like me, I will definitely like you.”

Alice stared at him blankly for a while, and she did not jump on him again. She just lowered her head, remained silent for a long time, and murmured, “I understand.”

The Alice in his impression was always full of vitality, and sometimes there were some blackhearted pranks, but she had never been so depressed and dispirited.

“You still don’t understand.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I like Alice.”

“What?” The loli raised her head as her big purple eyes widened, as if she instantly regained a powerful vitality.

Chen Rui gently stroked her hair. The curly blond hair exuded the fragrance of fruit, as fresh as a young girl. He suddenly thought of what Athena said, ‘How many years we have been in love is equivalent to the number of years Alice has waited for you’ and his heart suddenly softened, “I’ve always liked Alice.”

“Really?” Alice squinted her eyes comfortably under his stroking, like a cat scratched to the itch, enjoying it extremely.

“Of course.” Chen Rui smiled, “I still clearly remember that when I was picking Jade Dragonfruit in Blue Lake, I was knocked unconscious by a sly little girl from behind with a stick, and then… she took away my first kiss.”

Alice’s ‘face’” flushed red. Unexpectedly, 1 of the biggest little secrets in her heart was revealed. She stuttered, “You, you… you actually…”

“At the time, I thought you saw through my hidden power and wanted to take my life.” Chen Rui shrugged, “Who knew you just wanted to steal my kiss.”

“That…” Alice’s face was already red as if she was about to drip blood, “Actually, it was also my first kiss.”

“I know, as you said, you’ve liked me for a long time.” Chen Rui squeezed her smooth face lightly, “However, there is still a certain difference between liking and love. Let everything go with the flow, okay? Our agreement is still valid.”

“Okay…” Alice blushed with joy, then she suddenly shook her head and said, “No! you’re still delaying it! Unless… you kiss me!”

“Okay.” Chen Rui bowed his head and kissed her forehead lightly.

Alice accepted the kiss with a smile, then she shook her head calmly, pointing to her lips.

Chen Rui hesitated for a while, the loli had already raised her head, and the girl’s slightly pink lips had come close to him and printed on his lips.

The moment their lips touched, he clearly felt that the small body that pretended to be calm trembled slightly while her breathing also became rapid in the close approach.

The same youth, the same warmth, and the same aroma. The only difference was that this time there was no stick.

Chen Rui felt a restless little tongue sticking into his lips. He gently sucked on the pink lips, and the tip of his tongue began to touch the little tongue lightly.

The girl trembled as if she was electrocuted. Soon, she learned the trick without a teacher. She began to respond jerkily. This kind of wonderful taste similar to the fusion of souls was not comparable to ‘knocking out’ a certain guy at the beginning.

It took a long time for the 4 lips to separate.

“This is kissing? Is this what you usually do with Athena? I never thought it would be like this…” Alice held her red apple-like face and looked at Chen Rui shyly and excitedly, “Let’s do it again?”

Chen Rui shook his head quickly, “Do as you say. That’s it for today. Sleep well, I’ll be watching outside.”

“Then… shall we try again next time?”

“What?”

“That’s it! Good night brother.”

“ Uh , good night… I’m going out first.” Chen Rui hurried out. As he watched the natural reaction of a certain part, he scolded himself for being a beast. He took a deep breath, and slowly channeled his power, and finally calmed down.

In the tent, Alice excitedly rolled on the blanket, took out her small notebook and a magic lamp as she started writing in her diary.

Today is a big day to remember, brother and I kissed …

chapters.title: Chapter 1001: Attack On Shura
chapters.body:
Chapter 1001: Attack On Shura

The ‘adventure’ to Mountain Xilang was smooth sailing. Chen Rui came to the Walan Fortress smoothly and entered the Earth Realm through the teleportation portal.

As the savior and friend of the earth elementals, as well as the best friend of the Earth Elemental King Moore, Chen Rui was warmly welcomed by the earth elementals. Alice, who had been there once, was not timid at all. Instead, she appeared to be generous and experienced with dealings. Since having an intimate kiss with Chen Rui at the black rainforest, this loli had assumed herself to be an official fiancée.

Chen Rui and Moore hugged and he directly took out today’s ‘main course’, the earth origin fragment, from the storage warehouse. Earth Elemental King immediately sensed the purest earth element power connected to the soul. There was an unbelievable expression in his eyes, then the disbelief turned into a surprise.

The dark yellow crystalline polymorph turned into a bizarre mask in Moore’s hands. Moore put the mask on his face, and they gradually merged into one. The originally angular ‘stone’ facial features actually turned into an actual face which was vivid and expressive.

From a distance, Moore looked like a human wearing rock armor.

“The earth origin fragment, ‘the Face of Earth’, has finally returned to my hands. No words can express my gratitude, my friend.” Moore’s smile was much clearer than before. The only thing that remained unchanged was the kind of sincerity.

“Between true friends, there is no need for extra gratitude.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “It is very surprising that the Fire Elemental King Ogmarton was the one who provided the whereabouts of the earth origin fragment. He also abandoned the initial condition negotiated. Meanwhile, Ogmarton was specially summoned by your old nemesis, the Wind Elemental King Sethtine…”

Moore was taken aback for a moment. An expression of surprise crossed his face as if thinking of something. He said in a deep tone, “I want to know the real reason.”

“Actually, I want to know too.” Chen Rui shrugged, “The 3 Kings of Light made this puzzling decision after meeting Zola.”

“Zola?”

Moore’s eyes narrowed slightly, revealing a thoughtful expression. Chen Rui, who was accustomed to seeing his stone face before, felt a little unaccustomed to that meticulous expression. At the moment, he briefly talked about Zola’s advancement to a Demi-god and his relationship with the 3 Kings of Light in Storm Island.

Moore was surprised by how quickly Zola advanced to Demi-God, but he was most surprised by something else, “Zola got the Element Goddess Crown? Now I understand…”

“Understand what?” Chen Rui asked curiously. He never understood why the 3 Kings of Light treated Zola so differently that they even risked the fall in the next Elemental War in order to collect the 6 elements origin fragment by giving the news of the earth origin fragment to his nemesis friend for free.

“I’m very sorry, I can’t tell you for the time being due to some kind of restriction.” Moore expressed his guilt.

“You don’t need to apologize, I understand.” This answer was actually expected by Chen Rui. Moore’s relationship with him was different from that of the 3 Kings of Light. Moore said that he couldn’t tell him for the time being, so the ‘restriction’ must be a big deal.

“Actually, I just hope Zola doesn’t encounter any unexpected danger.”

“In the future, she may have more power than she can imagine, but at the same time, it also means taking on heavier responsibilities.” Moore’s words were exactly the same as the 3 Kings of Light.

“No matter what it is, I will face it with her.” Chen Rui’s voice was not loud, but there was unquestionable firmness.

Alice’s big eyes flickered on the side. She felt that this man exuded a special charm, which had nothing to do with appearance, but momentum and temperament.

(Suddenly, I envy Teacher Zola, and I envy Athena and my sister…)

(Fortunately, I got him with a kiss. Uhm, at least I got half of him.)

“If possible, do your best to find the fire origin fragment. This will be the hope of all elementals.”

Although Chen Rui was curious about what would happen to the 6 elements fragment, he didn’t ask more and just nodded, “Don’t worry, this is also my promise to Fire Elemental King. By the way… can you give me some earth element source power? I want to modify a thing to improve its power. I have obtained the source power of the light element, fire element and wind element.”

Moore was startled, “Could it be… the ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ of the 6 elements?”

“Yes, I’ve got this structure from the Wind Elemental King.” Chen Rui shrugged, “You won’t be angry, right? He’s your nemesis.”

“Essentially, there’s no real opposition between elements. You’ll understand this later. Now that you’ve got the ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ structure, you should know its dangers, so I won’t go into it. Just stay here for a while, I will contact Hegel and Lambost as soon as possible and ask them to come to the Earth Realm. Firstly is to tell them the news of the appearance of Element Goddess Crown, and the other is to help you get all 6 element source powers.”

Alice’s big eyes on the side were brighter. Staying here for a while means that I can spend many days alone with brother, and that kiss ‘game’…

Thinking of this, the loli’s face could not help turning into a red apple.

Meanwhile, in another sunny world.

Unlike the bright sunshine outside, this huge platform in some valley was shrouded in a dark and bloody breath.

In the distance of the platform was a group of mysterious people wearing cloaks and masks. The 2 mysterious people sitting in the middle were wearing red cloaks, and the masks on their faces were also maroon. They were obviously the leaders. In the core area, there were also men in the cloak either wearing a dark golden mask, a blood red mask or a pale red mask with the corresponding golden and red robes. The rest of the men in the cloak were mostly dressed up in black robes and golden masks.

Everyone’s eyes were fixed on the 2 figures in the cloak wearing pale golden masks on the platform. They were fighting fiercely. Although the momentum was astonishing, the platform was only shaking slightly, and there was no sign of any power overflowing. A solid enchantment was obviously set up.

“Kurci, what do you think of these 2 people?” The man in the cloak in the maroon mask asked to the side. His action seemed to be casual, but except for a few people around him, the others couldn’t hear the conversation.

“Rotts.” Kurci was another man in the cloak with a red robe and red mask, “I said it a long time ago, I’m optimistic about Thunder Dragon. His strength is well-deserved number 1 among the Destruction Messengers.”

“I’m afraid you’re going to miss out this time.” Rotts shook his head, “I’m optimistic about Shura. He will replace Thunder Dragon as the top Destruction Envoy and get the highest main altar guardian qualification.”

“I admit that Shura is really not simple. He has been hiding his super-level strength until the last time when the east district base was surrounded by the Holy Church. He killed the 2-winged angel of the church and rescuing Chief Bishop Soranly. Although the origin of this person is unknown, his hatred against the church is beyond doubt. He also has an amazing destruction physique. He is reasonable to be promoted to Destruction Messenger. However, it is a bit exaggerated to say that he can defeat Thunder Dragon. Thunder Dragon is a veteran Kingdom level powerhouse who is extremely rich in fighting skills and experience. He is only 1 step away from Demi-God. Although Shura is the best among the members, he is still not his opponent.”

Rotts thought for a while, then he spoke up to the side, “Kruchwert, pay attention to the battle situation. Although the battle disregards death, these 2 are the elites of the church. Try not to let them suffer casualties.”

“Understood.” The Chief Destruction Messenger with a dark golden mask and red robe beside him stood up.

“Recently, the church has suffered many setbacks, whether it is personnel or base.” Kurci’s voice was very solemn, “Especially the fear main altar. The power of the Fear Lord has been greatly weakened. This is a huge loss that is almost irreparable.”

Rotts nodded and said, “Kurci, what do you think of the magic game that the dragons made?”

“It’s quite a wonderful thing. It has self-righteous superiority factor everywhere, but it’s a good thing for training. Unfortunately, our strength can’t benefit from it. We can only watch it as a spectator, and we can’t enter the dungeon.”

“I have heard some of the cultists who entered the dungeon describe the situation, which gives me a strange feeling, but it should be just an illusion… Well, let’s not discuss this boring thing. For now, our focus is still on protecting the existing resources. The achievements of so many years of hard construction and operation must not be destroyed in one fell swoop.”

“Yes, although we have the largest trump card, we must not slack off. Otherwise, even if the great will finally come, it will be weakened a lot.” Kurci stretched out a finger, “So, absolutely no more mistakes are allowed at the hatred main altar!”

During the conversation, the situation of the battle changed suddenly. Thunder Dragon’s vigorous attack forced back Shura. With a loud shout, silver lightning flashed all over his body as his hands formed claws, and he pressed at Shura in the air, “[Lightning Prison]!”

Shura’s body was instantly intertwined with countless lightning, forming a square cage. The cage instantly burst into a terrifying light, completely engulfing Shura inside.

Chief Destruction Messenger Kruchwert, who witnessed this scene, moved his fingers slightly. When he was about to make a move, he realized something and stopped again.

After the cage engulfed Shura, it completely burst open and turned into nothingness together with the person inside. However, the ‘nothingness’ turned into a black hole. The black hole condensed into a black-robed human figure in the blink of an eye, imitating the posture of the Thunder Dragon and pressing with both claws.

This gesture surprised Thunder Dragon. What made him even more in disbelief was that countless intertwined lightning appeared beside him, instantly forming a square cage. It was his own killing move!

The Thunder Dragon, who was surrounded by lightning, shuddered. A strong sense of crisis ensured him that all this was not an illusion. He immediately shrank his body into a ball, and his hands formed a strange seal. Countless mirror-like lights appeared around his body.

The lightning in the cage hit the ‘mirror’, and the ‘mirror’ cracked, but at the same time, a lot of lightning was reflected back. The shining thunder light was eventually extinguished. Although the Thunder Dragon was still standing in the field, he was already scorched black. His power had also been greatly weakened. After all, what he just took was his own biggest killing move, and he couldn’t use more power to protect himself in a hurry.

Thunder Dragon raised his head abruptly, and he saw Shura’s figure appearing in the air with his red eyes exuding destructive breath.

“[Star Explosion]!”

That brilliant death starlight reflected the expression of despair in Thunder Dragon’s pupils. Even in his heyday, he couldn’t resist this move, let alone in this state of injury and exhaustion.

The incomparably shining starlight was instantly extinguished in a palm. A figure with a dark golden mask and a red cloak appeared in the field, it was Chief Destruction Messenger Kruchwert.

The voice of Archbishop Rotts sounded, “Shura, Thunder Dragon, this battle is very exciting. You are all elites of the church. No matter who is injured, it is the loss of the church. No matter whether this battle is victory or loss, the church has gained 2 strongest Destruction Messengers. Kurci and I have unanimously decided that both of you will receive the highest guardianship and corresponding rewards at the same time. I hope you can work together to protect the most important main altar.”

“Yes!” Shura and Thunder Dragon bowed at the same time. When Shura heard the words ‘main altar’, a strange light suddenly appeared in the red eyes, and an implicit smile appeared under the mask.

chapters.title: Chapter 1002: Level 5 Civilization Metropolitan
chapters.body:
Chapter 1002: Level 5 Civilization Metropolitan

After finishing the matter of the Earth Realm, Chen Rui, who left Mountain Xilang, did not directly return to the Dark Moon Estate. Instead, he went to the Blue Lake Mountain Range.

After getting dark element source power and water element source power from Dark Elemental King Hegel and Water Elemental King Lambost, he had collected 6 kinds of source power.

‘Cosmos Annihilation’ was similar in principle to Zola’s [Element’s Fury]. It used the conflict and fusion between the 6 elements to burst out destructive power of several times. As far as the power was concerned, it was beyond Zola’s [Element’s Fury], but it could only be used once.

Chen Rui’s real intention of making ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ was that when it was attached to Brilliant Thunder of Light, it could exert several times of power. Of course, the production process was also quite dangerous. Even if there was an architecture diagram provided by Elemental King, a terrifying explosion would occur if he wasn’t careful. The creator’s life would be in danger.

However, this danger was zero for Chen Rui, because he could complete the entire manufacturing process in the Super System’s refining room. Even if there was an accident, it would not endanger him. The only thing to pay attention to was the success rate. The element source power was the purest law power of the Elemental King, the Elemental King would suffer considerable damage if it was separated from his body. When Chen Rui obtained the 6 source powers for Zola, he spent a lot of energy fighting and scheming. Now, although he had become good friends with the 6 Elemental Kings and easily obtained the source power. Nevertheless, the 6 element source at hand was the only one; there was no backup.

Once he failed, he couldn’t really ask for it from the 6 kings, so he must succeed in one try.

Hence, the reason Chen Rui decided to go to the City of Stars in the Blue Lake Mountain Range was firstly to make ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ to complete the enhanced version of Brilliant Thunder of Light; secondly, after he successfully completed the mission of the Tree of Nature, he received a reward from the legendary prophet Alucier handed over by Kilanya – the box full of relics of the ancient alchemy civilization.

The value of the contents in this box couldn’t be measured by money for Chen Rui. It was very likely that the level 3 alchemy civilization city, City of Stars, would be directly upgraded to level 4.

Just as Chen Rui was about to leave, the loli had something to say.

Alice had a very happy time. Since it took time for the Water Elemental King and the Dark Elemental King to get here, she dragged Chen Rui to play around the Xilang Mountain Range and Town Leia in the Dark Shadow Empire. Alice had been busy managing the Princess Villa and the Princess Retail Store for the past few years; she was also the empress’ only sister, the empire’s Royal Highness Little Princess, so the pressure she bore was far beyond what ordinary girls could compare. Particularly, when the girl saw Chen Rui being intimately close to her sister and other women, her heart was even more depressed.

Since the incident in the black rainforest tent that day, the biggest burden in the girl’s heart had been untied, and she looked excited and relaxed, just like the initial loli with an amazing aura and endless energy. These days, she let go of everything and played for a while, so she felt happier than ever before.

Regrettably, despite Royal Highness Little Princess’ best efforts, that ‘kissing’ game did not succeed again. The most successful one was just tricking her brother into kissing her face. For this reason, Alice had a grumpy face in front of Chen Rui more than once. She denounced that a certain man had a ‘special obsession’ with big breasts.

In fact, Chen Rui was not the ‘big breast fetish’ as Alice claimed. Flat breasts were also a scarce resource. Sweet peaches had the taste of peaches, and green apples also had the taste of green apples… The problem lay in the heart.

In terms of human age, Alice’s age was actually not a loli anymore. In other words, the loli in the past had been ‘developed’ successfully, but the ‘unsuccessful’ part of the little body with a height of only 1.4 meters and a flat chest indeed made her still a total little loli.

Such an overly young body could give people a special feeling, even normal physiological reactions would become extremely strong, but perhaps due to some concepts from previous lives, Chen Rui had always had the illusion of a crime in his mind.

Let’s just go with the flow, it’s better to wait until she grows a little taller… No. Sigh. Better not to say anything. Anyway, whatever I say, I’m still an animal…

Knowing that Chen Rui was going to the City of Stars in the Blue Lake Mountain Range, Alice, a regular visitor to the City of Stars, naturally wanted to go with him, but she was rejected by Chen Rui because the crafting of ‘Cosmos Annihilation’ required concentration.

Alice was naturally very dissatisfied with this. Chen Rui coaxed her for a long time, and he had to use a killing move to get the little princess in the end, which was a ‘kiss’ that the loli had been looking forward to for a long time. Chen Rui went straight to the Blue Lake Mountain Range while Alice was escorted back to the Dark Moon by General Tim of the Walan Fortress.

After entering the central control room of the City of Stars, Chen Rui took out the space box given by Alucier. After the appraisal of the central life crystal, Crystal Phoenix, the conclusion surprised Chen Rui.

These relic items are actually from the highest level 6 civilization capital!

The City of Stars was still a level 3 civilization city, and even the ‘Sky Wheel’ encountered by Chen Rui on the Storm Island was only a level 4 civilization city!

In the civilization city level of the ancient alchemy civilization, the level 1 and 2 were a tier, called ‘castle’; level 3 and 4 were a tier, called ‘city’; level 5 was a dividing line, which was called ‘metropolitan’.
